name: 0.1% Triton X-100 Permeabilization Buffer

notes.en: Apply to PFA-fixed cells only. Incubate at RT for 10–15 min. Triton concentration can range 0.1–0.5%; higher concentrations increase permeabilization but reduce morphology preservation. Use 0.5% for nuclear antigens. Wash 3× with PBS before immunostaining.
notes.zh: 用于固定后的细胞透化 (PFA 固定后)。室温处理 10–15 min。Triton 浓度 0.1–0.5% 可选，浓度越高透化越强但形态保存越差。对于核抗原，0.5% 效果更好。使用后 PBS 洗 3 次再做免疫染色。

ref: Donaldson (2015) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 69:4.3.1–4.3.7

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Add {v:100:µL} Triton X-100 to {v:100:mL} PBS
prepSteps.zh: 取 {v:100:µL} Triton X-100 加入 {v:100:mL} PBS

prepSteps.en: Mix gently (avoid foaming)
prepSteps.zh: 轻柔混匀（避免起泡）

prepSteps.en: Apply to PFA-fixed cells, 10–15 min at RT
prepSteps.zh: 加至 PFA 固定的细胞上，室温 10–15 min

prepSteps.en: Wash 3× PBS before immunostaining
prepSteps.zh: PBS 洗 3 次后进行免疫染色

name: 0.25% Trypsin-EDTA Solution

notes.en: Filter-sterilize (0.22 µm). Aliquot and store at −20°C; working aliquots at 4°C for up to 2 weeks. Pre-warm to 37°C before use. Optimize digestion time for each cell type (1–5 min). Neutralize with serum-containing medium. EDTA chelates Ca²⁺ to disrupt cell-cell junctions.
notes.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌。分装后 -20°C 保存，工作液 4°C (2 周内用完)。使用前预热至 37°C。消化时间需根据细胞类型优化 (1–5 min)。加含血清培养基终止消化。EDTA 螯合 Ca²⁺ 破坏细胞间连接辅助消化。

ref: Freshney (2010) Culture of Animal Cells, 6th ed., Wiley

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve trypsin and EDTA·4Na in Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺-free PBS
prepSteps.zh: 将胰蛋白酶和 EDTA·4Na 溶于无 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ 的 PBS

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize (0.22 µm)
prepSteps.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌

prepSteps.en: Aliquot 5–10 mL per tube, store -20°C
prepSteps.zh: 分装 5–10 mL/管，-20°C 保存

prepSteps.en: Pre-warm to 37°C before use. Add to washed cells for 1–5 min
prepSteps.zh: 使用前预热至 37°C。加至洗过的细胞上消化 1–5 min

prepSteps.en: Neutralize with equal volume of serum-containing medium
prepSteps.zh: 加等体积含血清培养基中和

name: 1.5 M Tris-HCl pH 6.8

notes.en: pH meter accuracy warning: many electronic pH meters cannot accurately read concentrated Tris solutions. Use a probe rated for high-ionic-strength solutions. Start with ~118 mL HCl and fine-tune. Also used for preparing 4× Laemmli sample buffer.
notes.zh: pH 计精度警告：许多电子 pH 计无法准确测量高浓度 Tris 溶液。使用适合高离子强度的探头。先加约 118 mL HCl 再微调。也用于配制 4× 上样缓冲液。

ref: Standard biochemistry protocol

usage.en: 1.5 M Tris-HCl pH 6.8 stock for SDS-PAGE stacking gel and sample buffer preparation.
usage.zh: 1.5 M Tris-HCl pH 6.8 母液，用于 SDS-PAGE 浓缩胶和上样缓冲液配制。

label.en: RT, 12 months (autoclave); Autoclave to sterilize. Store at RT.

prepSteps.en: Dissolve 181.65 g Tris base in 700 mL ddH₂O with stirring.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve 181.65 g Tris base in 700 mL ddH₂O with stirring.

prepSteps.en: Add ~118 mL concentrated HCl to adjust pH to 6.8. Fine-adjust as needed. ⚠️ Many electronic pH meters are inaccurate with concentrated Tris solutions — use an appropriate probe.
prepSteps.zh: Add ~118 mL concentrated HCl to adjust pH to 6.8. Fine-adjust as needed. ⚠️ Many electronic pH meters are inaccurate with concentrated Tris solutions — use an appropriate probe.

prepSteps.en: Bring to 1000 mL final volume with ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to 1000 mL final volume with ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Autoclave to sterilize. Store at RT.
prepSteps.zh: Autoclave to sterilize. Store at RT.

name: 1× PBS

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.4 with HCl or NaOH. Autoclave. Can also dilute from 10× PBS. Store at RT, stable for months.
notes.zh: 用 HCl 或 NaOH 调 pH 至 7.4。高压灭菌。也可由 10× PBS 稀释。室温保存，可稳定数月。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed., CSHL Press

usage.en: Isotonic phosphate-buffered saline; universal wash buffer for cells, tissues, and proteins.
usage.zh: 等渗磷酸盐缓冲液，用于细胞、组织和蛋白质的通用洗涤。

label.en: 4°C, 6 months (autoclave); Autoclave or sterile-filter for cell culture

prepSteps.en: Dilute {v:100:mL} 10× PBS into {v:900:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 取 {v:100:mL} 10× PBS 加入 {v:900:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Mix well, check pH (~7.4)
prepSteps.zh: 混匀，检查 pH（应为 ~7.4）

prepSteps.en: Autoclave or filter-sterilize (0.22 µm) for cell culture use
prepSteps.zh: 若用于细胞培养需高压灭菌或 0.22 µm 过滤除菌

name: 1× Running Buffer (Tris-Glycine-SDS)

notes.en: pH should naturally reach ~8.3; no adjustment needed. Can also dilute from 10× stock.
notes.zh: pH 应自然达到 ~8.3，无需调 pH。也可由 10× 母液稀释。

ref: Laemmli (1970) Nature 227:680–685; Gallagher (2012) Curr Protoc Mol Biol Ch.10

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Dilute {v:100:mL} 10× Running Buffer into {v:900:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 取 {v:100:mL} 10× Running Buffer 加入 {v:900:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Mix well. Do NOT adjust pH
prepSteps.zh: 混匀。不要调 pH

prepSteps.en: Can reuse 2-3× for mini-gels but fresh is better
prepSteps.zh: Mini-gel 可重复使用 2-3 次，但建议用新鲜配的

name: 1× TBST

notes.en: Prepare fresh. Tween-20 at 0.05–0.1% is acceptable; adjust based on background signal.
notes.zh: 现配现用。Tween-20 终浓度 0.05–0.1% 均可，根据背景调整。

ref: Burnette (1981) Anal Biochem 112:195–203

usage.en: Tris-buffered saline + Tween-20; standard blocking and washing buffer for Western blot.
usage.zh: 含 Tween-20 的 Tris 缓冲盐水，WB 标准封闭和洗涤缓冲液。

label.en: RT, 1 month; Prepare fresh weekly if Tween-20 precipitates

prepSteps.en: Dilute {v:100:mL} 10× TBS into {v:900:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 取 {v:100:mL} 10× TBS 加入 {v:900:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Add {v:1:mL} Tween-20 (0.1% final)
prepSteps.zh: 加入 {v:1:mL} Tween-20（终浓度 0.1%）

prepSteps.en: Mix well. No pH adjustment needed
prepSteps.zh: 充分混匀，无需调 pH

name: 1× Transfer Buffer (Towbin)

notes.en: Add methanol last, bring to 1 L. For proteins >100 kDa, add 0.01–0.05% SDS. Use cold (4°C). Do not adjust pH.
notes.zh: 加入甲醇后定容至 1 L。转膜大蛋白 (>100 kDa) 可加 0.01–0.05% SDS。4°C 使用。不要调 pH。

ref: Towbin et al. (1979) PNAS 76:4350–4354

usage.en: Wet or semi-dry transfer buffer for moving proteins from SDS-PAGE gel to membrane.
usage.zh: 蛋白转膜缓冲液，用于 SDS-PAGE 后湿转或半干转膜。

label.en: 4°C, 1 month; Add methanol fresh; keep cold during wet transfer

prepSteps.en: Dilute 10× Running Buffer 1:10, add methanol to 20%
prepSteps.zh: 将 10× Running Buffer 1:10 稀释，加甲醇至 20%

prepSteps.en: Pre-chill to 4°C (transfer generates heat)
prepSteps.zh: 预冷至 4°C（转膜过程会产热）

prepSteps.en: For large proteins (>100 kDa): reduce methanol to 10%, add 0.01% SDS
prepSteps.zh: 大蛋白 (>100 kDa)：甲醇降至 10%，加 0.01% SDS

prepSteps.en: Do NOT adjust pH
prepSteps.zh: 不要调 pH

name: 10× Cresol Red Dye for PCR Gel Loading
nameCn: 10× 甲酚红 PCR 上样染料

notes.en: This is ONLY the dye — not PCR buffer. You still need colorless 10× PCR buffer. Add 10% volume of 10× Cresol red to the PCR master mix. Load PCR product directly onto gel — do NOT add additional loading dye. Cresol red runs at ~1000 bp in 1% agarose (between xylene cyanol ~5000 bp and bromophenol blue ~500 bp). Combining with transparent PCR buffer equals CoralLoad PCR Buffer (QIAGEN). If frozen, warm to 37°C or 55°C to fully thaw before use.
notes.zh: 这只是染料，不是 PCR 缓冲液！需要另外加无色 10× PCR buffer。在 PCR master mix 中加入总体积 10% 的 10× 甲酚红。PCR 后直接上样，无需额外 loading dye。甲酚红在 1% 琼脂糖凝胶中迁移位置约 1000 bp。冷冻后需 37°C 或 55°C 完全融化后使用。

ref: Gold Biotechnology Cresol Red guide; QIAGEN CoralLoad PCR Buffer product note

usage.en: Alternative loading dye for gel electrophoresis; can be added to PCR master mix before amplification and loaded directly onto gel without additional dye.
usage.zh: 琼脂糖凝胶电泳替代上样染料，可在 PCR 反应前加入 master mix，反应后直接上样无需额外加 loading dye。

label.en: 4°C, 6 months (0.22 µm filter); Also can aliquot and freeze at -20°C. Inspect before use — sucrose solution may grow bacteria; discard if cloudy.

prepSteps.en: Add water to beaker (~20 mL for 50 mL batch).
prepSteps.zh: Add water to beaker (~20 mL for 50 mL batch).

prepSteps.en: While stirring, add sucrose (30 g) and cresol red sodium salt (0.1 g).
prepSteps.zh: While stirring, add sucrose (30 g) and cresol red sodium salt (0.1 g).

prepSteps.en: Continue stirring until completely dissolved. Add water to reach 50 mL final volume.
prepSteps.zh: Continue stirring until completely dissolved. Add water to reach 50 mL final volume.

prepSteps.en: Filter through 0.22 µm filter in the hood.
prepSteps.zh: Filter through 0.22 µm filter in the hood.

prepSteps.en: Aliquot to 2 mL sterile tubes. Label '10X Cresol red'. Store at 4°C or freeze at -20°C.
prepSteps.zh: Aliquot to 2 mL sterile tubes. Label '10X Cresol red'. Store at 4°C or freeze at -20°C.

name: 10× MOPS Buffer (RNA Gel Running Buffer)
nameCn: 10× MOPS 缓冲液（RNA 凝胶电泳缓冲液）

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.0 with NaOH. MOPS is light-sensitive — store in dark bottle at RT (or 4°C). Solution yellowing = degraded, prepare fresh. Autoclave or filter-sterilize. Dilute 1:10 to 1× for gel and running buffer.
notes.zh: NaOH 调 pH 至 7.0。MOPS 对光敏感——棕色瓶中 RT 或 4°C 保存。溶液变黄 = 降解，需重新配制。可高压灭菌或过滤除菌。用时稀释 10 倍至 1×（凝胶和电泳缓冲液）。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning 3rd ed.; Rio et al. (2010) RNA: A Laboratory Manual, CSHL Press

usage.en: 10× MOPS buffer for denaturing RNA agarose gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 10× MOPS 缓冲液，用于 RNA 变性凝胶电泳。

label.en: 4°C, 3 months; Light-sensitive; store in dark bottle; yellowing = degraded

prepSteps.en: Dissolve MOPS in ~700 mL DEPC-treated ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve MOPS in ~700 mL DEPC-treated ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Add sodium acetate and EDTA.
prepSteps.zh: Add sodium acetate and EDTA.

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.0 with NaOH.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust pH to 7.0 with NaOH.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 1000 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 1000 mL.

prepSteps.en: Autoclave; solution will turn yellow — this is normal and acceptable.
prepSteps.zh: Autoclave; solution will turn yellow — this is normal and acceptable.

prepSteps.en: Store at room temperature in dark bottle.
prepSteps.zh: Store at room temperature in dark bottle.

name: 10× PBS

notes.en: Autoclave to sterilize. Dilute 1:10 with dH₂O for 1× PBS. Check pH after dilution — should be 7.4. Store at RT.
notes.zh: 高压灭菌。用 dH₂O 1:10 稀释得 1× PBS。稀释后需校 pH（应为 7.4）。室温保存。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed., CSHL Press, Appendix 1

usage.en: Concentrated phosphate-buffered saline; dilute to 1× for universal wash and diluent.
usage.zh: 磷酸盐缓冲液浓缩液，稀释至 1× 后用于通用洗涤和稀释。

label.en: 4°C, 12 months (autoclave); Autoclave or sterile-filter for cell culture

prepSteps.en: Weigh NaCl, KCl, Na₂HPO₄, KH₂PO₄ into a {v:1:L} beaker
prepSteps.zh: 称取 NaCl、KCl、Na₂HPO₄、KH₂PO₄ 于 {v:1:L} 烧杯

prepSteps.en: Add ~{v:800:mL} ddH₂O, stir until dissolved
prepSteps.zh: 加入约 {v:800:mL} ddH₂O，搅拌至完全溶解

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.4 with HCl (usually needs very little)
prepSteps.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 7.4（通常只需极少量）

prepSteps.en: Top up to {v:1000:mL} with ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 用 ddH₂O 定容至 {v:1000:mL}

prepSteps.en: Autoclave 121°C 20 min. Store at RT
prepSteps.zh: 121°C 高压灭菌 20 min，室温保存

prepSteps.en: Dilute 1:10 to get 1× PBS before use
prepSteps.zh: 使用前 1:10 稀释得 1× PBS

name: 10× PCR Buffer (Qiagen-Equivalent, Dual-Cation)
nameCn: 10× PCR 缓冲液（仿 Qiagen 双阳离子）

notes.en: Use sterile nuclease-free stock solutions. Final 1× concentrations: 10 mM Tris-HCl, 50 mM KCl, 10 mM (NH₄)₂SO₄, 1.5 mM MgCl₂. Combine with 10× Cresol red dye for CoralLoad-equivalent PCR buffer.
notes.zh: 使用无菌无核酸酶的母液。1× 终浓度：10 mM Tris-HCl、50 mM KCl、10 mM (NH₄)₂SO₄、1.5 mM MgCl₂。可与 10× 甲酚红染料搭配使用。

ref: Reverse-engineered from Qiagen PCR Buffer specifications

usage.en: Dual-cation 10× PCR buffer functionally equivalent to Qiagen's standard buffer. K⁺ and NH₄⁺ ions increase the annealing window and reduce non-specific amplification.
usage.zh: 仿 Qiagen 标准缓冲液的双阳离子 10× PCR buffer。K⁺ 和 NH₄⁺ 扩大退火窗口、降低非特异性扩增。

prepSteps.en: Add 1.0 mL of 1 M Tris-HCl (pH 8.7 at 20°C).
prepSteps.zh: Add 1.0 mL of 1 M Tris-HCl (pH 8.7 at 20°C).

prepSteps.en: Add 2.5 mL of 2 M KCl.
prepSteps.zh: Add 2.5 mL of 2 M KCl.

prepSteps.en: Add 1.0 mL of 1 M (NH₄)₂SO₄.
prepSteps.zh: Add 1.0 mL of 1 M (NH₄)₂SO₄.

prepSteps.en: Add 150 µL of 1 M MgCl₂.
prepSteps.zh: Add 150 µL of 1 M MgCl₂.

prepSteps.en: Add 5.35 mL nuclease-free water to reach 10.0 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Add 5.35 mL nuclease-free water to reach 10.0 mL.

prepSteps.en: Vortex thoroughly. Aliquot 1 mL/tube. Store at -20°C.
prepSteps.zh: Vortex thoroughly. Aliquot 1 mL/tube. Store at -20°C.

name: 10× RBC Lysis Buffer

notes.en: 1× working concentrations: 155 mM NH₄Cl, 10 mM KHCO₃, 1 mM EDTA. For tissue dissociation: add 1 mL 1× RBC lysis to pellet, incubate 1-5 min on ice, then quench with culture medium. Do not leave cells in lysis buffer too long — can damage white blood cells. If red blood cells persist, repeat lysis step.
notes.zh: 1× 工作浓度：155 mM NH₄Cl、10 mM KHCO₃、1 mM EDTA。组织消化用：加 1 mL 1× 裂解液至细胞沉淀，冰上 1-5 分钟，培养基终止。不要放置过久以免损伤白细胞。红细胞残留可重复裂解。

ref: Standard ammonium chloride RBC lysis protocol

usage.en: 10× stock ammonium chloride-based red blood cell lysis buffer. Dilute to 1× with sterile water before use.
usage.zh: 10× 氯化铵红细胞裂解液母液。使用前用无菌水稀释至 1×。

label.en: 4°C, 12 months (0.22 µm filter); Dilute to 1× with sterile water fresh before use. Do not dilute with PBS.

prepSteps.en: Dissolve NH₄Cl (82.9 g), KHCO₃ (10 g), and EDTA-Na₂ (3.72 g) in ~800 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve NH₄Cl (82.9 g), KHCO₃ (10 g), and EDTA-Na₂ (3.72 g) in ~800 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Stir until fully dissolved.
prepSteps.zh: Stir until fully dissolved.

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to ~7.3 if needed (usually no adjustment required).
prepSteps.zh: Adjust pH to ~7.3 if needed (usually no adjustment required).

prepSteps.en: Bring to 1000 mL with ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to 1000 mL with ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm (or autoclave). Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm (or autoclave). Store at 4°C.

prepSteps.en: Dilute to 1× with sterile water (not PBS) immediately before use.
prepSteps.zh: Dilute to 1× with sterile water (not PBS) immediately before use.

name: 10× Running Buffer

notes.en: Do NOT add SDS when making 10×. Add SDS when diluting to 1× (or add separately). Do not adjust pH — should be ~8.3 without adjustment. Do not autoclave.
notes.zh: 配 10× 时不加 SDS。稀释成 1× 时加 SDS（或另加）。不调 pH——不调即为 ~8.3。不可高压灭菌。

ref: Laemmli (1970) Nature 227:680–685

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris, glycine, and SDS in ~{v:800:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tris、甘氨酸和 SDS 溶于约 {v:800:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Stir until clear. Do NOT adjust pH (should be ~8.3)
prepSteps.zh: 搅拌至透明。不要调 pH（应为 ~8.3）

prepSteps.en: Top up to {v:1000:mL}
prepSteps.zh: 定容至 {v:1000:mL}

name: 10× TBE

notes.en: Provides higher resolution than TAE for certain applications. Use at 0.5× or 1×.
notes.zh: 分辨率要求高时用 TBE (优于 TAE)。稀释至 0.5× 或 1× 使用。0.5× = 45 mM Tris-borate, 1 mM EDTA, pH ~8.3。室温保存，过 0.22 µm 滤膜防沉淀。

ref: CSH Protocols doi:10.1101/pdb.rec8458; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

usage.en: 10× TBE buffer; dilute to 0.5–1× for DNA/RNA gel electrophoresis and EMSA.
usage.zh: 10× TBE 缓冲液，稀释至 0.5–1× 用于 DNA/RNA 凝胶电泳和 EMSA。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris and boric acid in ~{v:800:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tris 和硼酸溶于约 {v:800:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Add 0.5 M EDTA pH 8.0 stock
prepSteps.zh: 加入 0.5 M EDTA pH 8.0 母液

prepSteps.en: Top up to {v:1000:mL}. Dilute 1:10 before use
prepSteps.zh: 定容至 {v:1000:mL}。使用时 1:10 稀释

name: 10× TBS

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.6 with HCl. Autoclave. Dilute 1:10 for 1× TBS. Add 0.1% Tween-20 to make TBST.
notes.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 7.6。高压灭菌。1:10 稀释得 1× TBS。加 0.1% Tween-20 即为 TBST。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed., CSHL Press

usage.en: Tris-buffered saline concentrate; dilute to 1× for WB membrane washing.
usage.zh: Tris 缓冲盐水浓缩液，稀释至 1× 后用于 WB 膜洗涤。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris base and NaCl in ~{v:800:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tris base 和 NaCl 溶于约 {v:800:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.6 with concentrated HCl (~{v:15:mL} 12N HCl)
prepSteps.zh: 用浓 HCl 调 pH 至 7.6（约需 {v:15:mL} 12N HCl）

prepSteps.en: Top up to {v:1000:mL}. Autoclave
prepSteps.zh: 定容至 {v:1000:mL}，高压灭菌

name: 2× Laemmli Sample Buffer

notes.en: Aliquot and store at −20°C. β-mercaptoethanol can be replaced with DTT (200 mM). Heat at 95–100°C for 5 min before loading.
notes.zh: 分装后 -20°C 保存。β-mercaptoethanol 可用 DTT (200 mM) 替代。使用前 95–100°C 加热 5 min。

ref: Laemmli (1970) Nature 227:680–685

usage.en: 2× SDS-PAGE sample loading buffer for protein denaturation before gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: SDS-PAGE 上样缓冲液（2×），蛋白变性后上样。

label.en: RT or 4°C, 6 months; Aliquot; add reducing agent fresh; -20°C for long storage

prepSteps.en: Mix Tris-HCl pH 6.8, glycerol, SDS, and bromophenol blue
prepSteps.zh: 混合 Tris-HCl pH 6.8、甘油、SDS 和溴酚蓝

prepSteps.en: Heat gently to dissolve SDS if needed (do NOT boil)
prepSteps.zh: 必要时轻微加热溶解 SDS（不要煮沸）

prepSteps.en: Aliquot 0.5–1 mL per tube, store at -20°C
prepSteps.zh: 分装 0.5–1 mL/管，-20°C 保存

prepSteps.en: Before use: add 5% β-mercaptoethanol or 100 mM DTT
prepSteps.zh: 使用前加入 5% β-巯基乙醇或 100 mM DTT

prepSteps.en: Mix 1:1 with protein sample, boil 95°C × 5 min
prepSteps.zh: 与蛋白样品 1:1 混合，95°C 煮沸 5 min

name: 20× SSC Buffer

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.0 with HCl. Autoclave and store at room temperature. For Southern/Northern blot hybridization use 2×–6× SSC; for stringent washes use 0.1×–0.5× SSC. Also required for in situ hybridization (ISH).
notes.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 7.0。高压灭菌后室温保存。杂交 (Southern/Northern blot) 时使用 2×–6× SSC；严格洗膜用 0.1×–0.5× SSC。ISH (原位杂交) 也需要。

ref: CSH Protocols doi:10.1101/pdb.rec8765; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

usage.en: 20× SSC (saline-sodium citrate) concentrate for Northern blot, Southern blot, and FISH.
usage.zh: 20× SSC 浓缩液，用于 Northern blot、Southern blot 和 FISH 实验。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve NaCl and sodium citrate in ~{v:800:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 NaCl 和柠檬酸钠溶于约 {v:800:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.0 with HCl
prepSteps.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 7.0

prepSteps.en: Top up to {v:1000:mL}. Autoclave 121°C 20 min
prepSteps.zh: 定容至 {v:1000:mL}。121°C 高压灭菌 20 min

prepSteps.en: Dilute as needed: 6× (hybridization), 2× (mild wash), 0.1× (stringent wash)
prepSteps.zh: 按需稀释: 6×（杂交）、2×（温和洗涤）、0.1×（严格洗涤）

name: 4% Paraformaldehyde (PFA)

notes.en: 60°C water bath to dissolve (do not exceed 70°C); add NaOH to clarify; cool and adjust pH to 7.4. Filter (0.45 µm). Aliquot at −20°C.
notes.zh: 60°C 水浴搅拌溶解 (勿超 70°C)，加 NaOH 至澄清，冷却后调 pH 至 7.4。过滤 (0.45 µm)。分装 -20°C 保存。⚠️ 通风橱操作！

ref: CSH Protocols doi:10.1101/pdb.rec11863; Bhatt et al. (2012) Methods Mol Biol 869:29–40

usage.en: 4% paraformaldehyde fixative for cells and tissue sections (IF, IHC, flow cytometry).
usage.zh: 4% 多聚甲醛固定液，用于细胞和组织切片固定（IF、IHC、流式）。

label.en: 4°C, 1 month; Toxic; fume hood required; -20°C for longer storage

prepSteps.en: ⚠️ Work in fume hood! PFA is toxic
prepSteps.zh: ⚠️ 在通风橱内操作！PFA 有毒

prepSteps.en: Heat PBS to 60°C (do NOT boil)
prepSteps.zh: 将 PBS 加热至 60°C（不要煮沸）

prepSteps.en: Add PFA powder, stir until dissolved
prepSteps.zh: 加入 PFA 粉末，搅拌至溶解

prepSteps.en: Add 1–2 drops 1N NaOH to clear solution
prepSteps.zh: 滴加 1–2 滴 1N NaOH 使溶液变澄清

prepSteps.en: Cool to RT, adjust pH to 7.2–7.4 with HCl
prepSteps.zh: 冷却至室温，用 HCl 调 pH 至 7.2–7.4

prepSteps.en: Filter (0.22 µm), aliquot, freeze at -20°C
prepSteps.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤，分装，-20°C 冻存

name: 4× Laemmli Sample Buffer

notes.en: Aliquot and store at −20°C. Dilute 1:4 before use (3 parts sample : 1 part buffer).
notes.zh: 分装保存 -20°C。上样时 1:4 稀释（样品:buffer = 3:1）。

ref: Laemmli (1970) Nature 227:680–685

usage.en: 4× concentrated SDS-PAGE sample buffer; mix 1:3 with protein sample.
usage.zh: SDS-PAGE 上样缓冲液（4×），与蛋白样品 1:3 混合。

label.en: -20°C, 12 months; Aliquot; add reducing agent fresh

prepSteps.en: Same as 2× but at double concentration
prepSteps.zh: 同 2× 配法，浓度翻倍

prepSteps.en: Mix 1 part buffer : 3 parts sample
prepSteps.zh: 1 份缓冲液 : 3 份样品混合

prepSteps.en: Boil 95°C × 5 min
prepSteps.zh: 95°C 煮沸 5 min

name: 5% BSA Blocking Buffer

notes.en: Suitable for phospho-protein detection. Add 0.02% NaN₃ to store at 4°C for ~1 week.
notes.zh: 适用于磷酸化蛋白检测。加 0.02% NaN₃ 可 4°C 保存约 1 周。

ref: Gallagher (2012) Curr Protoc Mol Biol Ch.10, Unit 10.2A

usage.en: 5% BSA blocking solution for WB; preferred for phospho-protein and phospho-antibody use.
usage.zh: BSA 封闭液，WB 用，特别适用于磷酸化蛋白和磷酸化抗体。

label.en: 4°C, 1 week; Prepare fresh weekly; add 0.02% NaN3 to extend to 2 weeks

prepSteps.en: Weigh {v:2.5:g} BSA (Fraction V or IgG-free)
prepSteps.zh: 称取 {v:2.5:g} BSA（Fraction V 或 IgG-free）

prepSteps.en: Dissolve in {v:50:mL} TBST. Rock gently, do NOT vortex vigorously
prepSteps.zh: 溶于 {v:50:mL} TBST，轻摇溶解，不要剧烈涡旋

prepSteps.en: Filter through 0.22 µm if needed
prepSteps.zh: 必要时 0.22 µm 过滤

name: 5% Skim Milk Blocking Buffer

notes.en: Prepare fresh. Do not use for phospho-protein detection (milk casein is phosphorylated). Use BSA blocking instead.
notes.zh: 现配现用。勿用于检测磷酸化蛋白（milk 中含酪蛋白磷酸化位点），改用 BSA。

ref: Burnette (1981) Anal Biochem 112:195–203

usage.en: 5% non-fat dry milk blocking solution; standard WB blocking buffer.
usage.zh: 脱脂奶粉封闭液，WB 标准封闭缓冲液。

label.en: 4°C, 3 days; Prepare fresh; milk degrades quickly

prepSteps.en: Weigh {v:2.5:g} skim milk powder
prepSteps.zh: 称取 {v:2.5:g} 脱脂奶粉

prepSteps.en: Add to {v:50:mL} TBST, vortex until dissolved
prepSteps.zh: 加入 {v:50:mL} TBST，涡旋至完全溶解

prepSteps.en: Use immediately. Discard after use
prepSteps.zh: 立即使用，用后丢弃

name: 5× Laemmli Sample Buffer

notes.en: Dilute 1:4 with sample before loading (e.g. 5 µL buffer + 20 µL sample). Heat at 95-100°C for 5 min before loading gel.
notes.zh: 上样前 1:4 稀释（如 5 µL buffer + 20 µL 样品）。95-100°C 加热 5 分钟后上样。

ref: lifescience.net; Laemmli (1970) Nature 227:680-685

usage.en: 5× concentrated SDS-PAGE sample buffer; mix 1:4 with protein sample before loading.
usage.zh: SDS-PAGE 上样缓冲液（5×），与蛋白样品 1:4 混合后上样。

prepSteps.en: Combine Tris-HCl, SDS, and glycerol.
prepSteps.zh: Combine Tris-HCl, SDS, and glycerol.

prepSteps.en: Add bromophenol blue and DTT. Mix until dissolved.
prepSteps.zh: Add bromophenol blue and DTT. Mix until dissolved.

prepSteps.en: Bring to 15 mL final volume with ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to 15 mL final volume with ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Aliquot 1 mL into 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes.
prepSteps.zh: Aliquot 1 mL into 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes.

prepSteps.en: Store at -20°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store at -20°C.

name: 5× Q-Solution (Betaine GC-Enhancer)
nameCn: 5× Q-Solution（甜菜碱 GC 增强剂）

notes.en: Use at 1× final concentration (1 M Betaine). For 50 µL PCR: add 10 µL of 5× Q-Solution and subtract from water volume. Use ONLY as troubleshooting additive for GC >60% or strong secondary structures (hairpins). Do NOT use Betaine-HCl — must be anhydrous Betaine.
notes.zh: 终浓度 1×（1 M 甜菜碱）。50 µL PCR 体系加 10 µL 5× Q-Solution（相应减少水量）。仅用于 GC 含量 >60% 或强二级结构的 troubleshooting。必须用无水甜菜碱，不可用盐酸甜菜碱。

ref: Qiagen Q-Solution equivalent recipe

usage.en: 5 M Betaine stock (Qiagen Q-Solution equivalent) for amplifying GC-rich templates. Equalizes AT and GC melting temperatures, prevents polymerase stalling on secondary structures.
usage.zh: 5 M 甜菜碱母液（等效 Qiagen Q-Solution），用于扩增 GC 富含模板。均衡 AT/GC 碱基对熔解温度，防止聚合酶在二级结构处停滞。

label.en: -20°C, 12 months (0.22 µm filter); Aliquot 1 mL/tube, store -20°C

prepSteps.en: Weigh exactly 5.86 g anhydrous Betaine (do NOT use Betaine-HCl).
prepSteps.zh: Weigh exactly 5.86 g anhydrous Betaine (do NOT use Betaine-HCl).

prepSteps.en: Add to 15 mL tube with ~5 mL nuclease-free water.
prepSteps.zh: Add to 15 mL tube with ~5 mL nuclease-free water.

prepSteps.en: Vortex/shake until completely dissolved.
prepSteps.zh: Vortex/shake until completely dissolved.

prepSteps.en: Adjust final volume to 10.0 mL with nuclease-free water.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust final volume to 10.0 mL with nuclease-free water.

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm syringe filter.
prepSteps.zh: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm syringe filter.

prepSteps.en: Aliquot 1 mL/tube, store at -20°C.
prepSteps.zh: Aliquot 1 mL/tube, store at -20°C.

name: 50× TAE

notes.en: Dilute to 1× (40 mM Tris-acetate, 1 mM EDTA) for gel electrophoresis. TAE gives better DNA recovery than TBE but lower buffering capacity — change buffer for long runs. Store 50× at RT.
notes.zh: 稀释至 1×（40 mM Tris-acetate, 1 mM EDTA）用于凝胶电泳。TAE 比 TBE DNA 回收率更高但缓冲能力较弱——长时间电泳需换液。50× 室温保存。

ref: CSH Protocols doi:10.1101/pdb.rec8644; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

usage.en: 50× TAE buffer concentrate; dilute to 1× for DNA agarose gel electrophoresis and gel extraction.
usage.zh: 50× TAE 缓冲液浓缩液，稀释至 1× 用于 DNA 凝胶电泳和胶回收。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris base in ~{v:800:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tris base 溶于约 {v:800:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Add glacial acetic acid and EDTA stock
prepSteps.zh: 加入冰醋酸和 EDTA 母液

prepSteps.en: Top up to {v:1000:mL}. No pH adjustment needed (~8.5)
prepSteps.zh: 定容至 {v:1000:mL}。无需调 pH（~8.5）

prepSteps.en: Dilute 1:50 for working solution
prepSteps.zh: 使用时 1:50 稀释

name: 6× DNA Loading Dye

notes.en: Aliquot and store at −20°C; stable at 4°C for months. Mix 1:5 with sample (1 µL dye + 5 µL sample). Bromophenol blue co-migrates with ~300 bp in 1% agarose; xylene cyanol co-migrates with ~4 kb. Optionally add EDTA (10 mM final) to chelate DNases.
notes.zh: 分装后 -20°C 保存，4°C 可存数月。使用时 1:5 混合 (1 µL dye + 5 µL 样品)。Bromophenol Blue 在 1% 琼脂糖中迁移率 ~300 bp，Xylene Cyanol ~4 kb。可选加 EDTA (终浓度 10 mM) 螯合 DNase。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed., CSHL Press, Appendix 1

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Bromophenol Blue and Xylene Cyanol in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将溴酚蓝和二甲苯青 FF 溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Add glycerol to 30% final
prepSteps.zh: 加甘油至终浓度 30%

prepSteps.en: Mix well. Aliquot and store at 4°C or -20°C
prepSteps.zh: 充分混匀。分装后 4°C 或 -20°C 保存

prepSteps.en: Use 1 µL per 5 µL DNA sample
prepSteps.zh: 每 5 µL DNA 样品加 1 µL

name: Anti-Fade Mounting Medium

notes.en: Use 6-8 µL per 18mm coverslip — solution should slowly spread to edges. Too much will prevent nail polish seal. This medium does NOT harden — seal with nail polish to prevent drying. For fluorescence-only: use 90% glycerol (best resolution). For DIC + fluorescence: use 50% glycerol (preserves DIC contrast). Many fluorophores are brighter at higher pH — Tris pH 8.0 helps.
notes.zh: 每个 18mm 盖玻片用 6-8 µL。封片剂不会硬化——必须用指甲油密封防止干燥。纯荧光用 90% 甘油（最佳分辨率），DIC+荧光用 50% 甘油（保留 DIC 对比度）。高 pH 下多数荧光团更亮。

ref: Jackson ImmunoResearch; Harvard NIC

usage.en: Anti-fade mounting medium for fluorescence microscopy. Reduces photobleaching of fluorophores with n-propyl gallate in glycerol.
usage.zh: 荧光显微镜抗淬灭封片剂。含正丙基没食子酸酯（NPG）减少荧光漂白。

label.en: 4°C, 3 months; Store at 4°C protected from light.

prepSteps.en: Prepare 20% (w/v) n-propyl gallate stock in DMSO or DMF (NPG does not dissolve well in water).
prepSteps.zh: Prepare 20% (w/v) n-propyl gallate stock in DMSO or DMF (NPG does not dissolve well in water).

prepSteps.en: Mix 0.2 mL of 1 M Tris pH 8.0 with 9 mL glycerol (or 5 mL for 50% glycerol formulation).
prepSteps.zh: Mix 0.2 mL of 1 M Tris pH 8.0 with 9 mL glycerol (or 5 mL for 50% glycerol formulation).

prepSteps.en: Add 0.25 mL of 20% NPG stock dropwise with rapid stirring (0.5% final concentration).
prepSteps.zh: Add 0.25 mL of 20% NPG stock dropwise with rapid stirring (0.5% final concentration).

prepSteps.en: Warm to 37°C and vortex if needed to dissolve completely.
prepSteps.zh: Warm to 37°C and vortex if needed to dissolve completely.

prepSteps.en: Adjust to ~10 mL final volume. Store at 4°C protected from light.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust to ~10 mL final volume. Store at 4°C protected from light.

name: Antigen Retrieval Buffer (EDTA, pH 9.0)

notes.en: Adjust pH to 9.0 with NaOH. For nuclear antigens (Ki67, H3K4me3), membrane antigens (HER2), or when citrate pH 6.0 fails. Heat 95–100°C 20 min (pressure cooker or water bath). Cool 20 min at RT before use.
notes.zh: NaOH 调 pH 至 9.0。适用于核抗原（Ki67、H3K4me3）、膜抗原（HER2）及柠檬酸缓冲液效果差的情况。95–100°C 加热 20 min。冷却 20 min 后继续操作。

ref: Shi et al. (2001) J Histochem Cytochem 49:931–937; Ramos-Vara & Miller (2014) Vet Pathol 51:42–87

usage.en: EDTA antigen retrieval buffer (pH 9.0) for nuclear antigens in IHC (Ki67, H3K4me3).
usage.zh: EDTA 抗原修复缓冲液（pH 9.0），用于 IHC 中核抗原（Ki67、H3K4me3）的修复。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve EDTA in ~800 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve EDTA in ~800 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 9.0 with NaOH (EDTA dissolves as pH rises).
prepSteps.zh: Adjust pH to 9.0 with NaOH (EDTA dissolves as pH rises).

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 1000 mL with ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 1000 mL with ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Autoclave at 121°C for 20 min.
prepSteps.zh: Autoclave at 121°C for 20 min.

prepSteps.en: Store at room temperature.
prepSteps.zh: Store at room temperature.

name: Blue Native PAGE Cathode Buffer

notes.en: Do not adjust pH (~7.0). After the gel front has migrated ~1/3, switch to cathode buffer without CBB to reduce background.
notes.zh: 不调 pH (约 7.0)。电泳 1/3 后可换不含 CBB 的阴极缓冲液。

ref: Wittig et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:418–428

usage.en: Blue-native PAGE cathode buffer (CBB G-250) for membrane protein complex analysis.
usage.zh: 蓝色天然 PAGE 阴极缓冲液（CBB G-250），用于膜蛋白复合体分析。

label.en: 4°C, 1 week; Prepare fresh; CBB G-250 degrades

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tricine and Bis-Tris in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tricine 和 Bis-Tris 溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Add Coomassie G-250 to 0.02%
prepSteps.zh: 加入考马斯亮蓝 G-250 至 0.02%

prepSteps.en: Prepare fresh; use cold (4°C)
prepSteps.zh: 现配；冷用 (4°C)

name: Bradford Reagent (Coomassie Brilliant Blue G-250)
nameCn: Bradford 考马斯亮蓝 G-250 染料试剂

notes.en: Dissolve CBB G-250 in ethanol first, then add phosphoric acid, then water. Filter through Whatman No.1 paper. Store at RT protected from light; stable for months. Solution appears brown-red before reaction, shifting to blue with protein. Alternatively use commercial Bio-Rad Protein Assay (5× concentrate: dilute 1:5).
notes.zh: 先将 CBB G-250 溶于乙醇，再加磷酸，最后加水至定量。Whatman 1 号滤纸过滤。室温避光保存，稳定数月。试剂未与蛋白反应时呈棕红色，与蛋白结合后变蓝色。也可直接购买 Bio-Rad Protein Assay（5× 浓缩，1:5 稀释使用）。

ref: Bradford (1976) Anal Biochem 72:248–254; Bio-Rad Protein Assay Technical Note 1

usage.en: Coomassie G-250 dye solution for Bradford colorimetric protein quantification at A595.
usage.zh: 考马斯亮蓝 G-250 试剂，用于 Bradford 比色法蛋白定量（A595）。

label.en: RT, 3 months; Store in dark bottle

prepSteps.en: Dissolve 100 mg Coomassie Brilliant Blue G-250 in 50 mL 95% ethanol.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve 100 mg Coomassie Brilliant Blue G-250 in 50 mL 95% ethanol.

prepSteps.en: Add 100 mL 85% phosphoric acid and mix well.
prepSteps.zh: Add 100 mL 85% phosphoric acid and mix well.

prepSteps.en: Bring to 1000 mL with ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to 1000 mL with ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Filter through Whatman No. 1 filter paper.
prepSteps.zh: Filter through Whatman No. 1 filter paper.

prepSteps.en: Store in dark bottle at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store in dark bottle at 4°C.

prepSteps.en: Reagent should be brown/red; discard if it turns green.
prepSteps.zh: Reagent should be brown/red; discard if it turns green.

name: BSA Standard Curve Dilution Series (2 mg/mL Stock)
nameCn: BSA 标准曲线稀释系列（2 mg/mL 母液）

components.name: BSA (bovine serum albumin, fraction V)
components.note: 2 mg/mL stock in ddH₂O or same buffer as samples; aliquot 200 µL at -20°C

notes.en: Prepare in same buffer as samples. BCA: 37°C 30 min, A562. Bradford: RT 5 min, A595. Triplicate.
notes.zh: 用与样品相同的缓冲液配制。BCA：37°C 30 min，A562。Bradford：室温 5 min，A595。三重复。

ref: Smith et al. (1985) Anal Biochem 150:76 / Bradford (1976) Anal Biochem 72:248

usage.en: Diluted BSA standard curve for protein quantification assays (BCA at 37°C A562, Bradford at RT A595).
usage.zh: BSA 标准曲线稀释系列，用于 BCA（A562）和 Bradford（A595）蛋白定量。

label.en: -20°C, 12 months; Aliquot 2 mg/mL stock; single-use aliquots

prepSteps.en: Prepare 2 mg/mL BSA stock: dissolve in ddH₂O or in the same buffer used for protein samples (important for matrix matching). (Aliquot 200 µL per tube; freeze at -20°C. Thaw fresh for each use.)
prepSteps.zh: Prepare 2 mg/mL BSA stock: dissolve in ddH₂O or in the same buffer used for protein samples (important for matrix matching). (Aliquot 200 µL per tube; freeze at -20°C. Thaw fresh for each use.)

prepSteps.en: Prepare dilution series in sample buffer. Pipette in duplicate or triplicate.
prepSteps.zh: Prepare dilution series in sample buffer. Pipette in duplicate or triplicate.

prepSteps.en: BCA assay: add 200 µL BCA working reagent; 37°C 30 min; read A562. Bradford: add 200 µL Bradford reagent; RT 5 min; read A595.
prepSteps.zh: BCA assay: add 200 µL BCA working reagent; 37°C 30 min; read A562. Bradford: add 200 µL Bradford reagent; RT 5 min; read A595.

prepSteps.en: Fit linear regression (R² > 0.99) to calculate unknown protein concentration.
prepSteps.zh: Fit linear regression (R² > 0.99) to calculate unknown protein concentration.

name: Buprenorphine Working Solution (0.01 mg/mL)

notes.en: Final concentration 0.01 mg/mL. Dosing: 0.05 mg/kg body weight. For a 20 g mouse, this equals 1 µg total = 100 µL of working solution. Follow institutional IACUC protocols for controlled substance handling.
notes.zh: 终浓度 0.01 mg/mL。给药：0.05 mg/kg 体重。20 g 小鼠用 1 µg = 100 µL 工作液。按 IACUC 规定操作管制药品。

ref: Standard veterinary analgesic protocol

usage.en: Buprenorphine working solution for post-surgical analgesia in mice. Dose: 0.05 mg/kg (1 µg for a 20 g mouse).
usage.zh: 丁丙诺啡工作液，用于小鼠术后镇痛。剂量：0.05 mg/kg（20 g 小鼠约 1 µg）。

label.en: RT, 1 month; Aliquot ~15 mL into vacuum bottles from animal facility. Store per IACUC guidelines.

prepSteps.en: Transfer 1 mL buprenorphine (0.3 mg/mL) to a 50 mL conical tube.
prepSteps.zh: Transfer 1 mL buprenorphine (0.3 mg/mL) to a 50 mL conical tube.

prepSteps.en: Add 29 mL sterile PBS to total 30 mL volume (final: 0.01 mg/mL).
prepSteps.zh: Add 29 mL sterile PBS to total 30 mL volume (final: 0.01 mg/mL).

prepSteps.en: Mix well.
prepSteps.zh: Mix well.

prepSteps.en: Aliquot ~15 mL into each of 2 vacuum bottles (max 20 mL/bottle) using sterile syringe and needle.
prepSteps.zh: Aliquot ~15 mL into each of 2 vacuum bottles (max 20 mL/bottle) using sterile syringe and needle.

name: ChIP Dilution Buffer

notes.en: Dilute SDS lysate 10× with this buffer before immunoprecipitation. Add protease inhibitors.
notes.zh: 将 SDS 裂解产物稀释 10× 后用于免疫沉淀。加蛋白酶抑制剂。

ref: Upstate/Millipore ChIP Protocol; Nelson et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:179–185

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Mix Triton X-100, EDTA, Tris-HCl, NaCl in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Triton X-100、EDTA、Tris-HCl、NaCl 混合于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Dilute ChIP lysate ~10-fold with this buffer
prepSteps.zh: 用此缓冲液将 ChIP 裂解物稀释约 10 倍

name: ChIP High Salt Wash Buffer

notes.en: High-salt wash reduces nonspecific binding.
notes.zh: 高盐洗涤减少非特异性结合。

ref: Nelson et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:179–185

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Prepare and use ice-cold
prepSteps.zh: 配制后冰上使用

prepSteps.en: Wash beads 3–5 min with rotation at 4°C
prepSteps.zh: 4°C 旋转洗珠 3–5 min

name: ChIP Low Salt Wash Buffer

notes.en: ChIP wash step; rotate at 4°C for 5 min each wash.
notes.zh: ChIP 洗涤步骤，每步 4°C 旋转 5 min。

ref: Nelson et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:179–185

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Prepare and use ice-cold
prepSteps.zh: 配制后冰上使用

prepSteps.en: Wash beads 3–5 min with rotation at 4°C
prepSteps.zh: 4°C 旋转洗珠 3–5 min

name: ChIP SDS Lysis Buffer

notes.en: Use after crosslinking (1% formaldehyde, RT 10 min). Add protease inhibitors. Sonicate to generate 200–500 bp DNA fragments.
notes.zh: 交联后 (1% 甲醛，室温 10 min) 使用。加蛋白酶抑制剂。超声使 DNA 片段 200–500 bp。

ref: Lee et al. (2006) Cell 125:301–313; Collas (2010) Mol Biotechnol 45:87–100

usage.en: SDS lysis buffer for chromatin solubilization in ChIP and CUT&RUN experiments.
usage.zh: SDS 裂解缓冲液，用于 ChIP 和 CUT&RUN 实验中的染色质溶解。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve SDS, EDTA, Tris-HCl in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 SDS、EDTA、Tris-HCl 溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: pH should be ~8.1 from Tris stock
prepSteps.zh: pH 应为 ~8.1（来自 Tris 母液）

prepSteps.en: Add protease inhibitors before use
prepSteps.zh: 使用前加入蛋白酶抑制剂

name: Chloroquine Diphosphate Stock (25 mM)
nameCn: 氯喹二磷酸盐母液 (25 mM)

notes.en: Filter-sterilize 0.22 µm. Aliquot and protect from light. Working concentration 25 µM (1:1000 dilution). Chloroquine inhibits endosomal acidification, improving CaPO₄ and PEI transfection efficiency. Must replace medium within 5h — prolonged exposure is cytotoxic.
notes.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌。分装避光保存。使用浓度 25 µM（1:1000 稀释）。氯喹抑制内体酸化，提高 CaPO₄ 和 PEI 转染效率。加入培养基后 5h 内须更换培养基，氯喹长时间暴露有细胞毒性。

ref: Luthman & Magnusson (1983) Nucleic Acids Res 11:1295

usage.en: Chloroquine stock solution for enhancing plasmid transfection efficiency (calcium phosphate method).
usage.zh: 氯喹母液，用于提高质粒转染效率（磷酸钙法）。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve {v:129:mg} chloroquine diphosphate in {v:10:mL} sterile ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 {v:129:mg} 氯喹二磷酸盐溶于 {v:10:mL} 无菌 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm
prepSteps.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌

prepSteps.en: Aliquot in amber tubes or wrap in foil. Store at -20°C
prepSteps.zh: 分装至棕色管或锡箔包裹。-20°C 保存

name: Citrate Buffer (Antigen Retrieval)

notes.en: Adjust pH to 6.0 with HCl. Microwave method: submerge slides in buffer, bring to boil then maintain at medium power for 10–20 min. Allow to cool to RT. Can also use pressure cooker or water bath (95–100°C). For FFPE tissue sections.
notes.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 6.0。微波法: 将切片浸入缓冲液，微波加热至沸腾后中低火维持 10–20 min，自然冷却至室温。也可用压力锅或水浴 (95–100°C)。适用于甲醛固定石蜡包埋 (FFPE) 组织。

ref: Shi et al. (1991) J Histochem Cytochem 39:741–748

usage.en: Sodium citrate antigen retrieval buffer (pH 6.0) for FFPE tissue IHC/IF.
usage.zh: 柠檬酸抗原修复缓冲液（pH 6.0），用于 FFPE 组织 IHC/IF。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve sodium citrate in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将柠檬酸钠溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 6.0 with HCl
prepSteps.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 6.0

prepSteps.en: Add Tween-20 to 0.05%. Top up to {v:1:L}
prepSteps.zh: 加 Tween-20 至 0.05%。定容至 {v:1:L}

prepSteps.en: For retrieval: submerge slides, microwave to boil then medium power 10–20 min
prepSteps.zh: 修复时: 浸没切片，微波煮沸后中火维持 10–20 min

prepSteps.en: Cool to RT in buffer (~20 min). Then proceed to IHC staining
prepSteps.zh: 在缓冲液中自然冷却至室温 (~20 min)。然后进行 IHC 染色

name: Coelenterazine Stock for Renilla Luciferase Imaging
nameCn: 腔肠素母液 (Renilla 荧光素酶成像)

notes.en: WARNING: Mouse mortality has been reported with this formulation — titrate carefully and investigate before routine use. Signals decay fast — image immediately after injection. Better vendors: nanolight.com (h-coelenterazine-in-vivo) or PerkinElmer (Xenolight RediJect 760506).
notes.zh: 警告：曾报告使用此配方导致小鼠死亡——使用前需仔细滴定并排查原因。信号衰减快——注射后立即成像。更好的供应商：nanolight.com 或 PerkinElmer。

ref: Bhaumik & Bhaumik (2007) Nat Protoc 2:1236-1244; NanoLight Technology coelenterazine handling guide

usage.en: Native coelenterazine stock for in vivo Renilla luciferase bioluminescence imaging. Working: 200 µg/mL, dose 100 µL/mouse (20 µg/mouse).
usage.zh: 天然腔肠素母液，用于活体 Renilla 荧光素酶成像。工作浓度 200 µg/mL，100 µL/只小鼠（20 µg/鼠）。

label.en: -80°C, 6 months; Aliquot 100 µL/tube. Light-sensitive — wrap in foil when thawed.

prepSteps.en: Prepare 50:50 (v/v) 1,2-propanediol and ethanol solvent.
prepSteps.zh: Prepare 50:50 (v/v) 1,2-propanediol and ethanol solvent.

prepSteps.en: Dissolve 10 mg coelenterazine in 5 mL solvent (2 mg/mL stock).
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve 10 mg coelenterazine in 5 mL solvent (2 mg/mL stock).

prepSteps.en: Aliquot 100 µL/tube, freeze at -80°C.
prepSteps.zh: Aliquot 100 µL/tube, freeze at -80°C.

prepSteps.en: Before use: thaw vial (wrap in foil), dilute 10× with sterile PBS to 1 mL (200 µg/mL working concentration).
prepSteps.zh: Before use: thaw vial (wrap in foil), dilute 10× with sterile PBS to 1 mL (200 µg/mL working concentration).

prepSteps.en: Retro-orbital injection: 100 µL/mouse (20 µg coelenterazine per mouse). Image immediately — signals decay fast.
prepSteps.zh: Retro-orbital injection: 100 µL/mouse (20 µg coelenterazine per mouse). Image immediately — signals decay fast.

name: CRISPR RNP Assembly Buffer

notes.en: sgRNA:Cas9 molar ratio 1.2:1–3:1. Incubate at RT for 10 min to assemble RNP complex. Deliver by electroporation or lipofection.
notes.zh: sgRNA:Cas9 摩尔比 1.2:1–3:1。室温孵育 10 min 组装 RNP。电转或脂质体转染。

ref: Kim et al. (2014) Genome Res 24:1012–1019; Hanna & Doench (2020) Nat Biotechnol 38:824–844

usage.en: Pre-assembled Cas9 ribonucleoprotein (RNP) complex for efficient CRISPR genome editing.
usage.zh: 预组装的 Cas9 核糖核蛋白（RNP）复合体，用于高效 CRISPR 基因组编辑。

label.en: Use fresh or -80°C, 3 months (-80°C); Assemble RNP fresh; freeze single-use aliquots

prepSteps.en: Mix HEPES pH 7.5 + KCl + MgCl₂ in nuclease-free H₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 HEPES pH 7.5 + KCl + MgCl₂ 混合于无核酸酶水中

prepSteps.en: Add Cas9 protein + sgRNA (1:1.2 molar ratio)
prepSteps.zh: 加入 Cas9 蛋白 + sgRNA（1:1.2 摩尔比）

prepSteps.en: Incubate RT 10 min for RNP formation
prepSteps.zh: 室温孵育 10 min 形成 RNP 复合物

prepSteps.en: Electroporate immediately
prepSteps.zh: 立即电穿孔

name: D-Luciferin Stock (15 mg/mL) for Firefly Luciferase Imaging

components.name: D-Luciferin Firefly potassium salt (e.g. Goldbio LUCK-1G)

notes.en: Scale up proportionally if preparing from >1 g. Light-sensitive — work in the dark. Store aliquots at -80°C. For in vivo imaging, inject 100 µL per mouse (IP or retro-orbital per protocol).
notes.zh: 如用量超过 1g，按比例放大。避光操作。-80°C 保存。活体成像用量：100 µL/只小鼠。

ref: Gold Biotechnology D-Luciferin product guide; Contag & Bachmann (2002) Annu Rev Biomed Eng 4:235-260

usage.en: D-Luciferin stock solution for in vivo firefly luciferase bioluminescence imaging. Dose: 100 µL/mouse.
usage.zh: D-荧光素母液，用于活体萤火虫荧光素酶生物发光成像。剂量：100 µL/只小鼠。

label.en: -80°C, 12 months (0.22 µm filter); Aliquot 1 mL/tube. Light-sensitive — prepare in dark. Thaw individual aliquots before use.

prepSteps.en: Work in TC hood with light OFF inside the hood — keep dark.
prepSteps.zh: Work in TC hood with light OFF inside the hood — keep dark.

prepSteps.en: Dissolve 1 g D-Luciferin in 66.6 mL sterile PBS (15 mg/mL).
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve 1 g D-Luciferin in 66.6 mL sterile PBS (15 mg/mL).

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm syringe filter into 50 mL tubes.
prepSteps.zh: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm syringe filter into 50 mL tubes.

prepSteps.en: Aliquot 1 mL per sterile Eppendorf tube. Label on cap.
prepSteps.zh: Aliquot 1 mL per sterile Eppendorf tube. Label on cap.

prepSteps.en: Freeze at -80°C. In vivo use: 100 µL/mouse.
prepSteps.zh: Freeze at -80°C. In vivo use: 100 µL/mouse.

name: DEPC-Treated Water

notes.en: Use for RNA work only. Do NOT add DEPC to Tris buffers (reacts with amine groups). Modern alternative: commercial nuclease-free water.
notes.zh: 用于 RNA 实验。不要加 DEPC 到 Tris 缓冲液（与氨基反应）。替代品：商品化无核酸酶水。

ref: CSH Protocols doi:10.1101/pdb.rec8135; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

usage.en: DEPC-treated RNase-free water for RNA work and RNase-sensitive experiments.
usage.zh: DEPC 处理的无 RNase 水，用于 RNA 实验和对 RNase 敏感的操作。

label.en: RT, 6 months (autoclave); Autoclave after DEPC treatment to inactivate residues

prepSteps.en: Add {v:1:mL} DEPC per {v:1:L} ddH₂O (0.1% v/v)
prepSteps.zh: 每 {v:1:L} ddH₂O 加 {v:1:mL} DEPC (0.1% v/v)

prepSteps.en: Shake vigorously to disperse (DEPC is not readily soluble)
prepSteps.zh: 剧烈摇匀分散（DEPC 不易溶解）

prepSteps.en: Incubate 37°C overnight (12 h) or RT for 2 h
prepSteps.zh: 37°C 过夜（12 h）或室温 2 h

prepSteps.en: Autoclave 121°C 15 min to decompose residual DEPC → CO₂ + ethanol
prepSteps.zh: 121°C 高压灭菌 15 min 分解残余 DEPC → CO₂ + 乙醇

prepSteps.en: ⚠️ Do NOT use DEPC with Tris or other amine-containing buffers (DEPC reacts with primary amines). Prepare those buffers with DEPC-water instead
prepSteps.zh: ⚠️ 不要将 DEPC 直接加入 Tris 或其他含氨基的缓冲液（DEPC 与伯胺反应）。改用 DEPC 水配制这些缓冲液

name: EMSA Binding Buffer (5×)

notes.en: Dilute to 1× for binding. Add poly(dI-dC) as competitor. Run non-denaturing PAGE 5-6% in 0.5× TBE at 4°C.
notes.zh: 结合反应稀释至 1×。加 poly(dI-dC) 作为非特异竞争物。4°C 0.5× TBE 中 5-6% 非变性 PAGE。

ref: Garner & Revzin (1981) Nucleic Acids Res 9:3047

usage.en: Optimized buffer for EMSA protein-nucleic acid binding reactions.
usage.zh: EMSA 蛋白-核酸结合反应的优化缓冲液。

prepSteps.en: Combine Tris-HCl, KCl, MgCl₂, EDTA, and DTT in ~40 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Combine Tris-HCl, KCl, MgCl₂, EDTA, and DTT in ~40 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Add glycerol and NP-40.
prepSteps.zh: Add glycerol and NP-40.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 50 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 50 mL.

prepSteps.en: Store at −20°C in aliquots.
prepSteps.zh: Store at −20°C in aliquots.

name: Exosome/EV Isolation Buffer (PBS-based)
nameCn: 外泌体/细胞外囊泡分离缓冲液

components.name: PBS (10×, filtered through 0.22 µm)
components.note: Must use sterile, filtered PBS — particle-free

notes.en: All water and reagents must be particle-free for EV isolation. Filter all buffers through 0.22 µm or preferably 0.1 µm before use (NTA analysis highly sensitive to buffer particles). Avoid PBS with detergents. Store at 4°C. For downstream NTA (NanoSight/ZetaView): dilute EVs 1:100–1:1,000 in this buffer.
notes.zh: 外泌体分离要求所有试剂无颗粒。使用前 0.22 µm 或 0.1 µm 过滤（NTA 分析对缓冲液中颗粒极敏感）。避免含去污剂的 PBS。4°C 保存。下游 NTA 分析（NanoSight/ZetaView）：样品在此缓冲液中稀释 1:100–1:1,000。

ref: Théry et al. (2006) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.22.1; Witwer & Théry (2019) J Extracell Vesicles 8:1648167

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Prepare PBS base and add protease inhibitors.
prepSteps.zh: Prepare PBS base and add protease inhibitors.

prepSteps.en: Adjust to appropriate sucrose/trehalose concentration if needed.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust to appropriate sucrose/trehalose concentration if needed.

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm filter.
prepSteps.zh: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm filter.

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C.

name: FACS Staining Buffer

notes.en: Include NaN₃ to prevent capping; omit for live cell sorting. Store at 4°C. Filter through 0.22 µm.
notes.zh: NaN₃ 防止 cap-and-strip；若做活细胞分选则不加 NaN₃。4°C 保存。过滤 (0.22 µm)。

ref: Cossarizza et al. (2019) Eur J Immunol 49:1457–1973 (Guidelines for flow cytometry)

usage.en: PBS + BSA/FBS + EDTA for cell suspension and antibody incubation in flow cytometry.
usage.zh: 含 BSA/FBS 和 EDTA 的 PBS，用于流式细胞术细胞悬液和抗体孵育。

label.en: 4°C, 1 month (0.22 µm filter); Sterile-filter for live-cell staining

prepSteps.en: Dissolve BSA and EDTA in PBS
prepSteps.zh: 将 BSA 和 EDTA 溶于 PBS

prepSteps.en: Optional: add 0.05% sodium azide (NaN₃)
prepSteps.zh: 可选：加入 0.05% 叠氮钠 (NaN₃)

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize (0.22 µm)
prepSteps.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌

prepSteps.en: Keep at 4°C, use cold
prepSteps.zh: 4°C 保存，冷用

name: Ficoll-400 Density Solution (Self-Prepared, 20% w/v)
nameCn: Ficoll-400 密度梯度溶液（自配，20% w/v）

components.name: Ficoll-400 (Sigma F4375 or equivalent)
components.note: MW ~400,000; high-viscosity hydrophilic polymer; dissolves slowly

notes.en: Dissolve Ficoll in warm water (37°C) with gentle stirring — takes 1–2 h. Do NOT heat >60°C. Autoclave at 121°C 15 min (solution turns slightly yellow — normal). Final density: ~1.077 g/mL for PBMC isolation. Verify density with refractometer or weighing (1 mL should weigh ~1.077 g). Store at RT up to 6 months. For standard Ficoll-Paque density 1.077: mix 20% Ficoll with sodium diatrizoate solution to reach target density, or purchase Ficoll-Paque PLUS (GE). Commercial Ficoll-Paque: density 1.077 g/mL for human PBMC; 1.083 for mouse. Self-preparation tip: dissolve 9 g Ficoll-400 + 3.1 g sodium diatrizoate (NaDiatrizoate) in 100 mL pyrogen-free water → density ~1.077.
notes.zh: Ficoll 溶解缓慢，37°C 温热 ddH₂O 轻搅 1–2 h。勿超过 60°C。121°C 高压灭菌 15 min（溶液略微变黄——正常现象）。终密度：~1.077 g/mL 用于 PBMC 分离。用折射仪或称重验证密度（1 mL 应重约 1.077 g）。RT 保存 6 个月。商品 Ficoll-Paque PLUS 密度 1.077（人 PBMC）；1.083（小鼠）。自配方案：9 g Ficoll-400 + 3.1 g 泛影酸钠（NaDiatrizoate）溶于 100 mL 无热原水 → 密度 ~1.077。

ref: Böyum (1968) Scand J Clin Lab Invest Suppl 97:77–89; GE Healthcare Ficoll-Paque PLUS Datasheet; Percoll Application Note (GE Healthcare)

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Ficoll-400 in ddH₂O to desired concentration.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve Ficoll-400 in ddH₂O to desired concentration.

prepSteps.en: Heat gently to 37–50°C with stirring to dissolve.
prepSteps.zh: Heat gently to 37–50°C with stirring to dissolve.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume.

prepSteps.en: Autoclave or filter-sterilize.
prepSteps.zh: Autoclave or filter-sterilize.

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C.

name: Ficoll-400 Stock Solution (30% w/v)

components.name: Ficoll-400 (PM400 grade, tissue culture tested)
components.note: MW ~400,000 Da; use sterile cell-culture grade

notes.en: Dissolve Ficoll-400 by stirring at 37°C (30–60 min) — it is highly viscous. Do NOT heat above 50°C (degrades). Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm PES membrane (use low-protein-binding). Check density with refractometer: 30% ≈ 1.131 g/mL, adjust if needed. Store at 4°C protected from light (months); stable up to 2 years at −20°C. For Ficoll-Paque PBMC isolation: dilute to 1.077 g/mL (see ficoll_paque_pbmc buffer).
notes.zh: 37°C 搅拌溶解 Ficoll-400（30–60 min），非常粘稠。不超过 50°C（会降解）。0.22 µm PES 膜过滤除菌（用低蛋白结合膜）。折光仪测密度：30% ≈ 1.131 g/mL，如需调整。4°C 避光保存（数月）；−20°C 稳定 2 年。PBMC 分离配制：稀释至 1.077 g/mL（见 ficoll_paque_pbmc）。

ref: Boyum (1968) Scand J Clin Lab Invest Suppl 97:77–89; GE Healthcare Ficoll-Paque PLUS Instructions

usage.en: 30% Ficoll-400 stock solution for preparing PBMC density gradient separation medium.
usage.zh: 30% Ficoll-400 母液，用于配制 PBMC 密度梯度分离液。

label.en: 4°C, 24 months (0.22 µm filter); Light-sensitive; do not freeze

prepSteps.en: Weigh Ficoll-400 powder.
prepSteps.zh: Weigh Ficoll-400 powder.

prepSteps.en: Dissolve in ddH₂O by heating to 37–50°C with stirring (takes 1–2 h).
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve in ddH₂O by heating to 37–50°C with stirring (takes 1–2 h).

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume.

prepSteps.en: Autoclave at 121°C for 15 min (Ficoll is autoclavable).
prepSteps.zh: Autoclave at 121°C for 15 min (Ficoll is autoclavable).

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C.

name: Ficoll-Paque Density Gradient Solution (1.077 g/mL for PBMC)
nameCn: Ficoll-Paque 密度梯度液（PBMC 分离用，1.077 g/mL）

components.name: Diatrizoate sodium (sodium diatrizoate / Hypaque-sodium, 50% solution)
components.note: MW 635.1; provides radiopacity and density modulation. Sterile solution.

notes.en: Target density: 1.077 g/mL at 20°C. Verify with calibrated pycnometer or densitometer. Adjust: more Ficoll → higher density; more diluent → lower density. At 1.077 g/mL: erythrocytes + granulocytes (1.08–1.09) sink; PBMCs (1.07–1.075) band at interface; platelets stay in plasma layer. pH 7.2–7.4. Osmolality: 290–310 mOsm. Warm to room temperature before use (critical for proper separation). Commercially available as Ficoll-Paque PLUS (Cytiva), Lymphoprep (Stem Cell Technologies), Histopaque-1077 (Sigma).
notes.zh: 目标密度：20°C 时 1.077 g/mL。用校准比重计或密度计验证。调整：增加 Ficoll → 密度升高；增加稀释液 → 密度降低。1.077 g/mL 时：红细胞 + 粒细胞（1.08–1.09）沉入底部；PBMC（1.07–1.075）在界面成带；血小板留在血浆层。pH 7.2–7.4。渗透压：290–310 mOsm。使用前务必恢复室温（对分离效果至关重要）。商品化产品：Ficoll-Paque PLUS（Cytiva）、Lymphoprep（Stem Cell Technologies）、Histopaque-1077（Sigma）。

ref: Boyum (1968) Scand J Clin Lab Invest Suppl 97:77–89; Broxmeyer et al. (2011) Curr Protoc Stem Cell Biol 19:Unit2A.3; GE Healthcare Ficoll-Paque PLUS Instructions 71-7167-00

usage.en: Density gradient solution (1.077 g/mL) for isolating peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs).
usage.zh: 密度 1.077 g/mL 的梯度液，用于从外周血分离单个核细胞（PBMC）。

label.en: 4°C, 6 months (0.22 µm filter); Warm to RT before use; do not freeze

prepSteps.en: Mix Ficoll-400 stock (30% w/v) with sodium diatrizoate solution.
prepSteps.zh: Mix Ficoll-400 stock (30% w/v) with sodium diatrizoate solution.

prepSteps.en: Adjust density to 1.077 g/mL using refractometer or density meter.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust density to 1.077 g/mL using refractometer or density meter.

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm.
prepSteps.zh: Filter-sterilize through 0.22 µm.

prepSteps.en: Protect from light, store at RT (15–25°C).
prepSteps.zh: Protect from light, store at RT (15–25°C).

prepSteps.en: Verify density before each use.
prepSteps.zh: Verify density before each use.

name: G418 Stock Solution (250 mg/mL)

notes.en: Working concentration varies by cell line, typically 200-1000 µg/mL. Perform a kill curve to determine optimal concentration. Chemical stored at 4°C or -20°C.
notes.zh: 工作浓度因细胞系而异，通常 200-1000 µg/mL。需做杀伤曲线确定最佳浓度。化学品保存 4°C 或 -20°C。

ref: Caisson Laboratories G418 product protocol; Bhatt et al. Methods Mol Biol (2012)

usage.en: G418 (Geneticin) stock for selection of stably transfected mammalian cells carrying neomycin resistance.
usage.zh: G418 母液，用于筛选携带新霉素抗性基因的稳定转染哺乳动物细胞系。

label.en: -20°C, 12 months (0.22 µm filter); Aliquot into Eppendorf tubes. Can also store at 4°C short-term.

prepSteps.en: Dissolve 2.5 g G418 Sulfate in 10 mL sterile DPBS (250 mg/mL).
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve 2.5 g G418 Sulfate in 10 mL sterile DPBS (250 mg/mL).

prepSteps.en: Filter through 0.22 µm filter into a sterile tube.
prepSteps.zh: Filter through 0.22 µm filter into a sterile tube.

prepSteps.en: Aliquot into Eppendorf tubes. Label 'G418, 250 mg/mL' and date.
prepSteps.zh: Aliquot into Eppendorf tubes. Label 'G418, 250 mg/mL' and date.

prepSteps.en: Store at -20°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store at -20°C.

name: Gibson Assembly Master Mix (1.33×)

notes.en: 5× ISO Buffer: 25% PEG-8000, 500 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 50 mM MgCl₂, 50 mM DTT, 1 mM each dNTP, 5 mM NAD. Aliquot 15 µL/tube after preparation. Each reaction: 15 µL mastermix + 5 µL DNA fragments. Cost approximately 1/10 of commercial kit.
notes.zh: 5× ISO Buffer: 25% PEG-8000, 500 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 50 mM MgCl₂, 50 mM DTT, 1 mM each dNTP, 5 mM NAD. 制备后分装 15 µL/管冻存。每反应加 15 µL mastermix + 5 µL DNA。成本约为商业试剂盒的 1/10。

ref: Gibson et al. (2009) Nat Methods 6:343–345

usage.en: Gibson Assembly master mix for seamless cloning of multiple DNA fragments.
usage.zh: Gibson Assembly 主混合液，用于多片段 DNA 无缝克隆。

prepSteps.en: Prepare 5× ISO Buffer: 25% PEG-8000, 500 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 50 mM MgCl₂, 50 mM DTT, 1 mM each dNTP, 5 mM NAD
prepSteps.zh: 配制 5× ISO Buffer: 25% PEG-8000, 500 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 50 mM MgCl₂, 50 mM DTT, 各 1 mM dNTP, 5 mM NAD

prepSteps.en: Mix ISO Buffer with enzymes and ddH₂O on ice
prepSteps.zh: 冰上混合 ISO Buffer、酶和 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Aliquot 15 µL per tube. Store at -20°C
prepSteps.zh: 分装 15 µL/管。-20°C 保存

name: GST Elution Buffer

notes.en: Prepare fresh; reduced glutathione oxidizes quickly. Add NaCl 150 mM to improve elution from Glutathione Sepharose. Adjust pH to 8.0. Eluted fractions contain free GSH — remove by dialysis_buffer_generic before downstream assays. Higher GSH (15–50 mM) can increase yield.
notes.zh: 需新鲜配制，还原型谷胱甘肽易氧化。可加 150 mM NaCl 提高洗脱效率。pH 调至 8.0。洗脱液含游离 GSH，下游分析敏感时需透析（dialysis_buffer_generic）去除。提高 GSH 浓度至 15–50 mM 可增加产量。

ref: GE Healthcare Glutathione Sepharose 4B Instruction 71-5027-67; Harper & Speicher (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 6.6.1

usage.en: Reduced glutathione elution buffer for releasing GST-fusion proteins from Glutathione Sepharose.
usage.zh: 还原型谷胱甘肽洗脱液，用于从谷胱甘肽琼脂糖中释放 GST 融合蛋白。

label.en: Use fresh, 24 hours; Reduced glutathione oxidizes rapidly; prepare fresh or aliquot at -80°C

prepSteps.en: Dissolve reduced glutathione in 50 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0
prepSteps.zh: 将还原型谷胱甘肽溶于 50 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 (glutathione is acidic)
prepSteps.zh: 调 pH 至 8.0（谷胱甘肽偏酸性）

prepSteps.en: Use fresh or thaw from -20°C aliquots
prepSteps.zh: 现配或从 -20°C 分装中解冻使用

name: GST Reduced Glutathione Elution Buffer
nameCn: GST 还原型谷胱甘肽洗脱液

notes.en: Prepare fresh; reduced glutathione oxidizes rapidly. Adjust pH to 8.0. Eluted fractions contain free glutathione — remove by dialysis if downstream assays are sensitive. Some protocols use 15–50 mM GSH for higher yield.
notes.zh: 需新鲜配制，还原型谷胱甘肽容易氧化。pH 调至 8.0。洗脱液含游离谷胱甘肽，下游分析敏感时需透析去除。部分方案用 15–50 mM GSH 以提高产量。

ref: GE Healthcare Glutathione Sepharose 4B Instruction 71-5027-67 EK; Harper & Speicher (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 6.6.1

name: HEPES Buffer (1 M stock)

notes.en: HEPES maintains pH stability outside the CO₂ incubator, ideal for extended bench work and live imaging.
notes.zh: HEPES 在 CO₂ 培养箱外能维持 pH 稳定，适合长时间台面操作和活细胞成像。

ref: Good et al. (1966) Biochemistry 5:467–477; Sigma-Aldrich HEPES Buffer Protocol

usage.en: HEPES-based physiological buffer for cell culture and biochemical assays.
usage.zh: HEPES 生理缓冲液，用于细胞培养和生化实验。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve HEPES in ~{v:80:mL} ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 HEPES 溶于约 {v:80:mL} ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.2–7.6 with NaOH
prepSteps.zh: 用 NaOH 调 pH 至 7.2–7.6

prepSteps.en: Top up to {v:100:mL}
prepSteps.zh: 定容至 {v:100:mL}

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize (0.22 µm). Store at 4°C protected from light
prepSteps.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌。4°C 避光保存

prepSteps.en: Add to culture medium at 10–25 mM final concentration
prepSteps.zh: 加入培养基至终浓度 10–25 mM

name: His-tag Binding/Wash Buffer

notes.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH. Binding buffer: 10–20 mM imidazole; wash buffer: 20–50 mM; elution buffer: 250–500 mM.
notes.zh: NaOH 调 pH 至 8.0。结合液含 10–20 mM imidazole；洗涤液 20–50 mM；洗脱液 250–500 mM。

ref: QIAGEN Ni-NTA Handbook; Kimple et al. (2013) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 73:9.9.1–9.9.23

usage.en: Ni-NTA binding and wash buffer (20 mM imidazole) for His-tagged protein IMAC purification.
usage.zh: Ni-NTA 结合/洗涤缓冲液（20 mM 咪唑），用于 His 标签蛋白 IMAC 纯化。

label.en: 4°C, 6 months; Filter 0.22 µm and degas before FPLC use

prepSteps.en: Dissolve NaH₂PO₄, NaCl, imidazole in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 NaH₂PO₄、NaCl、咪唑溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH
prepSteps.zh: 用 NaOH 调 pH 至 8.0

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize
prepSteps.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌

name: His-tag Elution Buffer

notes.en: Adjust pH to 8.0. Dialyze or desalt immediately after elution to remove imidazole. Gradient elution improves purity.
notes.zh: 调 pH 至 8.0。洗脱后立即透析或脱盐去除 imidazole。可用梯度洗脱提高纯度。

ref: QIAGEN Ni-NTA Handbook; Kimple et al. (2013) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 73:9.9.1

usage.en: 250 mM imidazole elution buffer for His-tagged protein Ni-NTA affinity chromatography.
usage.zh: 250 mM 咪唑洗脱液，用于 Ni-NTA 亲和层析洗脱 His 标签蛋白。

label.en: 4°C, 6 months; Filter 0.22 µm and degas before FPLC use

prepSteps.en: Same as binding buffer but with 250 mM imidazole
prepSteps.zh: 同结合缓冲液，但咪唑浓度为 250 mM

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 (imidazole shifts pH)
prepSteps.zh: 调 pH 至 8.0（咪唑会改变 pH）

prepSteps.en: Collect 1 mL fractions, check by Bradford/SDS-PAGE
prepSteps.zh: 收集 1 mL 组分，Bradford/SDS-PAGE 检测

name: IF Blocking Buffer

notes.en: Block 1 h at RT. Serum species should match the secondary antibody host. 10% donkey serum also works.
notes.zh: 封闭 1 h 室温。serum 种属应与二抗宿主一致。也可用 10% donkey serum。

ref: Donaldson (2015) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 69:4.3.1; Im et al. (2019) STAR Protoc Preview

usage.en: Blocking buffer for immunofluorescence (IF) to reduce nonspecific antibody binding.
usage.zh: 免疫荧光（IF）封闭缓冲液，减少非特异性抗体结合。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve BSA in PBS, add normal serum (same species as secondary Ab)
prepSteps.zh: 将 BSA 溶于 PBS，加入正常血清（与二抗同种属）

prepSteps.en: Add 0.1% Tween-20 (optional, reduces background)
prepSteps.zh: 可选加入 0.1% Tween-20（降低背景）

prepSteps.en: Block cells 1 h at RT or overnight at 4°C
prepSteps.zh: 室温封闭 1 h 或 4°C 过夜

name: IF Permeabilization Buffer

notes.en: Incubate at RT 10–15 min. For membrane proteins use 0.05% Triton or 0.1% saponin. For nuclear proteins use 0.5% Triton.
notes.zh: 室温孵育 10–15 min。胞膜蛋白用 0.05% Triton 或 0.1% saponin。核蛋白可用 0.5% Triton。

ref: Donaldson (2015) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 69:4.3.1–4.3.7; Nature Protocols

usage.en: Triton X-100 permeabilization buffer for intracellular antigen access in immunofluorescence.
usage.zh: Triton X-100 透化缓冲液，用于免疫荧光中胞内抗原的暴露。

prepSteps.en: Add 0.1–0.5% Triton X-100 to PBS
prepSteps.zh: 在 PBS 中加入 0.1–0.5% Triton X-100

prepSteps.en: Incubate cells 10–15 min at RT
prepSteps.zh: 室温孵育细胞 10–15 min

prepSteps.en: Wash 3× with PBS
prepSteps.zh: 用 PBS 洗 3 次

name: IHC Primary Antibody Diluent

components.name: 5% Sodium azide stock
components.note: Prepare or purchase as stock solution

notes.en: Azide inhibits HRP enzyme — NEVER dilute HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies in this solution. Normal goat serum from CST 5425S.
notes.zh: 叠氮钠会抑制 HRP——绝对不要用此液稀释 HRP 标记的二抗。正常山羊血清来自 CST 5425S。

ref: Cell Signaling Technology IHC Protocol; Abcam IHC staining guide

usage.en: General-purpose primary antibody diluent for IHC staining. Contains sodium azide to prevent microbial growth — do NOT use for secondary antibody dilution (azide inhibits HRP).
usage.zh: IHC 通用一抗稀释液。含叠氮钠防腐——切勿用于稀释二抗（叠氮钠抑制 HRP）。

label.en: 4°C, 3 months; Store at 4°C for lab sharing. Azide prevents microbial growth.

prepSteps.en: Add PBS to a clean bottle.
prepSteps.zh: Add PBS to a clean bottle.

prepSteps.en: Add Tween-20 and mix gently (avoid excessive foaming).
prepSteps.zh: Add Tween-20 and mix gently (avoid excessive foaming).

prepSteps.en: Add normal goat serum and sodium azide stock.
prepSteps.zh: Add normal goat serum and sodium azide stock.

prepSteps.en: Mix well. Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Mix well. Store at 4°C.

name: IMAC High-Imidazole Elution Buffer (500 mM)
nameCn: IMAC 高咪唑洗脱缓冲液（500 mM）

notes.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH. Used as step gradient (50→100→250→500 mM imidazole) or linear gradient on FPLC. Filter (0.22 µm) and degas before use. For step elution, 250 mM is often sufficient for most His-tagged proteins.
notes.zh: NaOH 调 pH 至 8.0。可用阶梯梯度 (50→100→250→500 mM imidazole) 或 FPLC 线性梯度。使用前 0.22 µm 过滤并脱气。阶梯洗脱通常 250 mM 即可洗脱大部分 His 标蛋白。

ref: QIAGEN Ni-NTA Handbook 5th ed.; Kimple et al. (2013) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 73:9.9.1

usage.en: 500 mM imidazole elution buffer for high-affinity His-tagged proteins on Ni-NTA resin.
usage.zh: 500 mM 咪唑洗脱液，用于洗脱强结合的 His 标签蛋白。

label.en: 4°C, 6 months; Filter 0.22 µm and degas before FPLC use

prepSteps.en: Dissolve NaH₂PO₄ and NaCl in ~400 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve NaH₂PO₄ and NaCl in ~400 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Add imidazole to 500 mM.
prepSteps.zh: Add imidazole to 500 mM.

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 500 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 500 mL.

prepSteps.en: Filter through 0.22 µm and degas.
prepSteps.zh: Filter through 0.22 µm and degas.

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C.

name: IMAC High-Salt Wash Buffer

notes.en: pH 8.0 with NaOH. High NaCl (500 mM) reduces electrostatic nonspecific binding. Use as second wash after standard wash buffer. Optional: add 1 mM ATP + 5 mM MgCl₂ to strip chaperones (Hsp70/DnaK).
notes.zh: NaOH 调 pH 8.0。高 NaCl（500 mM）减少非特异性静电结合。作为第二步洗涤液使用。可选：加 1 mM ATP + 5 mM MgCl₂ 以去除共纯化的分子伴侣（Hsp70/DnaK）。

ref: QIAGEN Ni-NTA Handbook; Bornhorst & Falke (2000) Methods Enzymol 326:245–254

usage.en: High-salt wash buffer (500 mM NaCl) for removing nonspecific proteins from Ni-NTA resin.
usage.zh: 高盐洗涤缓冲液（500 mM NaCl），去除 Ni-NTA 树脂非特异性结合蛋白。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve NaH₂PO₄ and NaCl in ~800 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve NaH₂PO₄ and NaCl in ~800 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Add imidazole to wash concentration (20–40 mM).
prepSteps.zh: Add imidazole to wash concentration (20–40 mM).

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust pH to 8.0 with NaOH.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 1000 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 1000 mL.

prepSteps.en: Filter through 0.22 µm.
prepSteps.zh: Filter through 0.22 µm.

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C.

name: IP / Co-IP Lysis Buffer

notes.en: Add protease/phosphatase inhibitors before use. For Co-IP use mild detergent (0.5% NP-40) to preserve interactions. Lyse on ice 30 min, centrifuge at 4°C 14,000×g for 15 min.
notes.zh: 使用前加蛋白酶/磷酸酶抑制剂。Co-IP 用温和去垢剂 (0.5% NP-40) 保持蛋白互作。冰上裂解 30 min，4°C 14,000×g 离心 15 min。

ref: Miernyk & Thelen (2008) Plant J 55:415–425; Nature Protocols

usage.en: Native lysis buffer optimized for immunoprecipitation (IP) and Co-IP experiments.
usage.zh: 专为 IP 和 Co-IP 优化的天然条件裂解缓冲液。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris-HCl, NaCl, NP-40, EDTA in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tris-HCl、NaCl、NP-40、EDTA 溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.4
prepSteps.zh: 调 pH 至 7.4

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize, store at 4°C
prepSteps.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌，4°C 保存

prepSteps.en: Add protease inhibitors immediately before use
prepSteps.zh: 使用前立即加入蛋白酶抑制剂

name: Isotonic Percoll Stock Solution

components.name: Percoll (100%, undiluted, GE/Cytiva)
components.note: Do not autoclave; filter-sterilize if needed (0.2 µm PES)

components.name: 10× PBS (pH 7.4)
components.note: To achieve isotonic concentration (final 1× PBS); maintains cell/organelle osmotic balance

notes.en: This 100% isotonic Percoll = stock for dilution to desired density. Density of undiluted isotonic Percoll: ~1.123 g/mL. Prepare working concentrations by diluting with 1× PBS: 18% for PBMC-compatible layer, 30% for mitochondria interface (as in mitochondria_isolation), 70–90% for dense organelles. Percoll self-generates gradient by centrifugation (20,000–40,000×g 30–60 min 4°C). Unlike Ficoll, Percoll is colloidal silica — do NOT use in vivo. Store at 4°C (do not freeze — aggregates).
notes.zh: 此 100% 等渗 Percoll = 稀释工作液的母液。未稀释等渗 Percoll 密度约 1.123 g/mL。用 1× PBS 稀释至所需密度：18%（PBMC 兼容层）、30%（线粒体界面，见 mitochondria_isolation）、70–90%（高密度细胞器）。Percoll 可通过离心自动形成梯度（20,000–40,000×g，30–60 min，4°C）。Percoll 是胶体二氧化硅——严禁体内使用。4°C 保存（切勿冷冻——会聚集）。

ref: Pertoft (2000) J Biochem Biophys Methods 44:1–30; GE Healthcare Percoll Application Note; Ford et al. (1983) Biol Cell 48:1

usage.en: Isotonic colloidal silica stock for preparing iso-osmotic density gradients for cell/organelle separation.
usage.zh: 等渗胶体二氧化硅母液，用于配制等渗密度梯度分离细胞或细胞器。

label.en: 4°C, 12 months; Do NOT freeze (aggregates); do NOT autoclave

prepSteps.en: Mix 9 parts Percoll with 1 part 10× PBS.
prepSteps.zh: Mix 9 parts Percoll with 1 part 10× PBS.

prepSteps.en: Mix well by inversion.
prepSteps.zh: Mix well by inversion.

prepSteps.en: This gives Stock Isotonic Percoll (SIP) at ~1.123 g/mL.
prepSteps.zh: This gives Stock Isotonic Percoll (SIP) at ~1.123 g/mL.

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C for up to 1 month.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C for up to 1 month.

name: Kinase Assay Buffer

notes.en: Universal in vitro kinase assay buffer. Add DTT and phosphatase inhibitors fresh.
notes.zh: 通用体外激酶检测缓冲液。DTT 和磷酸酶抑制剂需临用加入。

ref: Cell Signaling Technology #9802

usage.en: Reaction buffer for in vitro kinase assays with ATP as phosphate donor.
usage.zh: 体外激酶反应缓冲液，以 ATP 作为磷酸供体。

label.en: 4°C, 3 months; Add ATP fresh before use

prepSteps.en: Combine Tris-HCl pH 7.5, MgCl₂, and DTT in ~40 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Combine Tris-HCl pH 7.5, MgCl₂, and DTT in ~40 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Add MnCl₂ if required for specific kinases.
prepSteps.zh: Add MnCl₂ if required for specific kinases.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 50 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 50 mL.

prepSteps.en: Aliquot and store at −20°C.
prepSteps.zh: Aliquot and store at −20°C.

prepSteps.en: Add ATP fresh before use.
prepSteps.zh: Add ATP fresh before use.

name: Luciferase Reporter Lysis Buffer

notes.en: Gentle lysis preserves luciferase activity. Lyse 15 min RT. Use 20 µL lysate + 100 µL substrate.
notes.zh: 温和裂解保留荧光素酶活性。室温 15 min。20 µL 裂解液 + 100 µL 底物。

ref: Promega E1500

usage.en: Passive lysis buffer for dual-luciferase reporter assays (Promega-compatible).
usage.zh: 被动裂解缓冲液，用于双荧光素酶报告基因检测（与 Promega 兼容）。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris, EDTA, and DTT in ~80 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve Tris, EDTA, and DTT in ~80 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Add Triton X-100 or NP-40 (1%) and glycerol (10%).
prepSteps.zh: Add Triton X-100 or NP-40 (1%) and glycerol (10%).

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.8 with HCl.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust pH to 7.8 with HCl.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 100 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 100 mL.

prepSteps.en: Store at −20°C in aliquots.
prepSteps.zh: Store at −20°C in aliquots.

name: Lysosome Isolation Buffer (Sucrose-Based Homogenization)
nameCn: 溶酶体分离缓冲液（蔗糖匀浆法）

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.4 with KOH. Keep all solutions ice-cold. Add protease inhibitors just before use (lysosomes contain lytic enzymes — leakage causes self-digestion). Sucrose maintains organelle osmolality during isolation. After fractionation, lysosome identity markers: LAMP1, LAMP2, cathepsin B/D, β-hexosaminidase activity.
notes.zh: KOH 调 pH 至 7.4。所有溶液保持冰冷。用前加蛋白酶抑制剂（溶酶体含溶解酶——泄漏导致自消化）。蔗糖维持分离过程中细胞器渗透压。分离后溶酶体标记蛋白：LAMP1、LAMP2、组织蛋白酶 B/D、β-己糖苷酶活性。

ref: Graham (2002) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.6.1; Bright et al. (2016) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 72:3.27.1; Rahman et al. (2020) STAR Protoc 1:100122

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve sucrose in ~300 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve sucrose in ~300 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Add HEPES and EDTA; adjust pH to 7.4.
prepSteps.zh: Add HEPES and EDTA; adjust pH to 7.4.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 500 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 500 mL.

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C; add protease inhibitors fresh.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C; add protease inhibitors fresh.

name: MACS Separation Buffer

notes.en: Degas before use. Store at 4°C. 2% FBS can substitute BSA.
notes.zh: 脱气后使用。4°C 保存。也可用 FBS 替代 BSA (2% FBS)。

ref: Miltenyi Biotec MACS Handbook; Cossarizza et al. (2019) Eur J Immunol 49:1457

usage.en: Cold PBS buffer for MACS magnetic bead separation; keeps cells viable during separation.
usage.zh: 冷 PBS 缓冲液，用于 MACS 磁珠分选，保持细胞活力。

label.en: 4°C, 1 month (0.22 µm filter); Keep cold; use same day ideally

prepSteps.en: Dissolve BSA and EDTA in PBS
prepSteps.zh: 将 BSA 和 EDTA 溶于 PBS

prepSteps.en: Degas buffer (prevents air bubbles in MACS column)
prepSteps.zh: 缓冲液脱气（防止 MACS 柱中产生气泡）

prepSteps.en: Keep at 4°C
prepSteps.zh: 4°C 保存

name: Matrigel Coating Solution

notes.en: Keep everything on ice! Matrigel solidifies above 10°C. Use pre-chilled pipette tips and tubes. Working concentration ~1-2 mg/mL (1:8 to 1:6 dilution). Apply 50 µL per Transwell insert, incubate 1-2h at 37°C to solidify.
notes.zh: 全程冰上操作！Matrigel 在 10°C 以上即凝固。使用预冷的枪头和管。工作浓度约 1-2 mg/mL（1:8 到 1:6 稀释）。Transwell 膜需 50 µL/insert，37°C 孵育 1-2h 凝固。

ref: Corning Matrigel Matrix Technical Guide; Justus et al. (2014) J Vis Exp 88:e51046

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

label.en: -20°C (stock); 4°C (working), 6 months (stock); Thaw on ice; never at RT

prepSteps.en: Thaw Matrigel stock overnight at 4°C on ice (NEVER at RT)
prepSteps.zh: 4°C 冰上过夜解冻 Matrigel 母液（绝不在室温解冻）

prepSteps.en: Dilute 1:8 in ice-cold serum-free medium using pre-chilled tips
prepSteps.zh: 用预冷枪头在冰冷无血清培养基中 1:8 稀释

prepSteps.en: Apply 50 µL per Transwell insert. Incubate 1-2h at 37°C to solidify
prepSteps.zh: 每个 Transwell 加 50 µL。37°C 孵育 1-2h 凝固

name: MES Running Buffer (20×)

notes.en: Dilute to 1× before use. Optimized for NuPAGE Bis-Tris gels; better resolution for low MW proteins (<30 kDa) compared to MOPS buffer. Do not adjust pH.
notes.zh: 20× 母液。使用前稀释至 1×。适用于 NuPAGE Bis-Tris 凝胶，分辨低分子量蛋白 (<30 kDa) 优于 MOPS。不要调 pH。

ref: Invitrogen NuPAGE Technical Guide (Thermo Fisher MAN0003690)

usage.en: MES SDS running buffer for resolving low-MW proteins (3.5–60 kDa) on Bis-Tris gels.
usage.zh: MES SDS 电泳缓冲液，用于 Bis-Tris 胶上分辨低分子量蛋白（3.5–60 kDa）。

prepSteps.en: Weigh MES, Tris base, SDS, EDTA
prepSteps.zh: 称取 MES、Tris base、SDS、EDTA

prepSteps.en: Dissolve in ~{v:800:mL} ddH₂O, bring to {v:1:L}. Do NOT adjust pH
prepSteps.zh: 溶于约 {v:800:mL} ddH₂O，定容至 {v:1:L}。不要调 pH

prepSteps.en: Dilute 1:20 to 1× before use
prepSteps.zh: 使用前 1:20 稀释至 1×

name: Mild Lysis Buffer for Protein Purification
nameCn: 温和裂解缓冲液（蛋白纯化用）

notes.en: Keep ice-cold. For E. coli: add lysozyme, 30 min ice, then sonicate (3× 30 s, 30% amplitude, ice bath). Clarify 20,000×g 30 min 4°C. Add PMSF just before use (unstable in water). Optional: 0.5% Triton X-100 for membrane proteins.
notes.zh: 全程冰冷。大肠杆菌：加溶菌酶冰上 30 min，再超声（3× 30 s，30% 振幅，冰浴）。20,000×g 4°C 30 min 澄清。PMSF 用前现加。可选加 0.5% Triton X-100 提高膜蛋白回收率。

ref: Wingfield (2015) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 80:6.1.1; GE Healthcare His-tag Purification Guide

usage.en: Mild native lysis buffer for extracting soluble recombinant proteins from E. coli.
usage.zh: 温和裂解缓冲液，用于从大肠杆菌中提取可溶性重组蛋白。

label.en: 4°C, 1 month; Add PMSF, lysozyme, DNase I fresh before use

prepSteps.en: Combine Tris-HCl, NaCl, and non-ionic detergent in ~400 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Combine Tris-HCl, NaCl, and non-ionic detergent in ~400 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Add EDTA and glycerol if required.
prepSteps.zh: Add EDTA and glycerol if required.

prepSteps.en: Stir until dissolved.
prepSteps.zh: Stir until dissolved.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 500 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 500 mL.

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C; add protease inhibitors fresh before use.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C; add protease inhibitors fresh before use.

name: Miniprep Buffer P1 (Resuspension)
nameCn: 质粒提取缓冲液 P1 (重悬液)

notes.en: Prepare Tris-EDTA, autoclave, cool to RT, then add RNase A. RNase A is heat-sensitive — do not autoclave. Store at 4°C.
notes.zh: 先配 Tris-EDTA，高压灭菌后冷却，再加 RNase A。RNase A 热敏，不可高压灭菌。4°C 保存。

ref: Birnboim & Doly (1979) Nucleic Acids Res 7:1513; Sambrook & Russell (2001)

usage.en: Resuspension buffer for alkaline lysis miniprep plasmid extraction (contains RNase A).
usage.zh: 碱裂解 miniprep 质粒提取的重悬缓冲液（含 RNase A）。

label.en: 4°C, 6 months; Add RNase A fresh or store P1+RNase at 4°C

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris-HCl and EDTA in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tris-HCl 和 EDTA 溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 8.0, autoclave
prepSteps.zh: 调 pH 至 8.0，高压灭菌

prepSteps.en: Cool to RT, add RNase A (do NOT autoclave RNase A)
prepSteps.zh: 冷却至室温，加入 RNase A（不可高压灭菌 RNase A）

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C
prepSteps.zh: 4°C 保存

name: Miniprep Buffer P2 (Lysis)
nameCn: 质粒提取缓冲液 P2 (裂解液)

notes.en: Prepare fresh or store at RT. NaOH denatures genomic DNA and proteins; SDS solubilizes cell membranes. Mix gently by inversion (DO NOT vortex!) to avoid shearing genomic DNA.
notes.zh: 现用现配或室温保存。NaOH 变性基因组 DNA 和蛋白，SDS 溶解细胞膜。使用时轻柔混匀（不可涡旋！），避免剪切基因组 DNA。

ref: Birnboim & Doly (1979) Nucleic Acids Res 7:1513

usage.en: Alkaline lysis buffer (NaOH + SDS) for cell disruption in miniprep plasmid extraction.
usage.zh: 碱裂解缓冲液（NaOH + SDS），用于 miniprep 质粒提取的细胞破碎。

label.en: RT, 12 months; Keep tightly closed; NaOH absorbs CO2

prepSteps.en: Dissolve NaOH and SDS in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 NaOH 和 SDS 溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Mix gently — do not autoclave
prepSteps.zh: 轻柔混匀——不需要高压灭菌

name: Miniprep Buffer P3 (Neutralization)
nameCn: 质粒提取缓冲液 P3 (中和液)

notes.en: Dissolve potassium acetate, adjust pH to 5.5 with glacial acetic acid. K⁺ precipitates SDS (forming KDS), co-precipitating denatured proteins and genomic DNA. Plasmid DNA remains in the supernatant.
notes.zh: 溶解醋酸钾，用冰醋酸调 pH 至 5.5。加入后轻柔混匀。K⁺ 使 SDS 沉淀（形成 KDS），携带变性蛋白和基因组 DNA 一起沉淀。质粒 DNA 留在上清。

ref: Birnboim & Doly (1979) Nucleic Acids Res 7:1513

usage.en: Neutralization/precipitation buffer for precipitating cell debris in miniprep plasmid extraction.
usage.zh: 中和/沉淀缓冲液，用于 miniprep 中沉淀细胞碎片。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve potassium acetate in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将醋酸钾溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 5.5 with glacial acetic acid
prepSteps.zh: 用冰醋酸调 pH 至 5.5

prepSteps.en: Bring to volume
prepSteps.zh: 定容

name: Mitochondria Isolation Buffer

notes.en: Keep all solutions ice-cold. Add BSA fresh; remove BSA for functional assays. Adjust pH to 7.4 with KOH. This buffer is for tissue (mouse liver/heart). For cultured cells: 210 mM mannitol + 70 mM sucrose instead.
notes.zh: 全程保持冰冷。BSA 现加；功能性实验需去 BSA。KOH 调 pH 至 7.4。本缓冲液适用于组织（小鼠肝/心）匀浆。培养细胞将甘露醇降至 210 mM + 70 mM 蔗糖。

ref: Frezza et al. (2007) Nat Protoc 2:287–295

usage.en: Mannitol-sucrose iso-osmotic buffer for mitochondria isolation by differential centrifugation.
usage.zh: 甘露醇-蔗糖等渗缓冲液，用于差速离心法分离线粒体。

label.en: 4°C, 1 month; Add BSA fresh; remove for functional assays

prepSteps.en: Dissolve sucrose, HEPES/MOPS, and EGTA in ~400 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: Dissolve sucrose, HEPES/MOPS, and EGTA in ~400 mL ddH₂O.

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.4 with KOH.
prepSteps.zh: Adjust pH to 7.4 with KOH.

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume of 500 mL.
prepSteps.zh: Bring to final volume of 500 mL.

prepSteps.en: Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: Store at 4°C.

prepSteps.en: Add BSA (0.1%) and protease inhibitors fresh before use.
prepSteps.zh: Add BSA (0.1%) and protease inhibitors fresh before use.

name: MOPS SDS Running Buffer (NuPAGE)

notes.en: Can be stored as 20× concentrate. Dilute to 1× before use. Optimized for NuPAGE Bis-Tris gels; better resolution for mid-to-high MW proteins (>30 kDa) than MES buffer. Do not adjust pH.
notes.zh: 20× 浓缩液可储存，使用前稀释至 1×。适用于 NuPAGE Bis-Tris 凝胶，分离中-大分子量蛋白 (>30 kDa) 效果优于 MES。不需调 pH。

ref: Invitrogen NuPAGE Technical Guide (Thermo Fisher MAN0003690); Schägger (2006) Nat Protoc 1:16–22

usage.en: 1× MOPS running buffer for denaturing RNA agarose gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 1× MOPS 电泳缓冲液，用于 RNA 变性凝胶电泳。

label.en: 4°C, 1 month; Use fresh; discard if yellow

prepSteps.en: Weigh MOPS, Tris base, SDS, EDTA
prepSteps.zh: 称取 MOPS、Tris base、SDS、EDTA

prepSteps.en: Dissolve in ~{v:800:mL} ddH₂O. Do NOT adjust pH
prepSteps.zh: 溶于约 {v:800:mL} ddH₂O。不需调 pH

prepSteps.en: Top up to {v:1000:mL} for 1× working solution
prepSteps.zh: 定容至 {v:1000:mL} 得 1× 工作液

prepSteps.en: For 20× stock: multiply all amounts by 20, dissolve in {v:1:L}
prepSteps.zh: 配 20× 浓缩液: 所有量 ×20，溶于 {v:1:L}

name: MTT Stock Solution

notes.en: Filter-sterilize (0.22 µm). Aliquot and store at −20°C protected from light. Add 10 µL per 100 µL medium. After 37°C 4 h incubation, discard supernatant and solubilize formazan.
notes.zh: 过滤除菌 (0.22 µm)。分装 -20°C 避光保存。使用时每孔加 10 µL/100 µL 培养基。37°C 4 h 后弃上清，加 DMSO 150 µL 溶解紫色结晶。490–570 nm 读数。

ref: Mosmann (1983) J Immunol Methods 65:55–63; van Meerloo et al. (2011) Methods Mol Biol 731:237–245

usage.en: MTT (3-(4,5-dimethylthiazol-2-yl)-2,5-diphenyltetrazolium) stock solution for cell viability assay.
usage.zh: MTT 母液，用于细胞活力检测（线粒体还原酶催化生成甲臜）。

label.en: -20°C, 6 months (0.22 µm filter); Light-sensitive; aliquot; prepare 5 mg/mL in PBS

prepSteps.en: Dissolve MTT powder in PBS to 5 mg/mL
prepSteps.zh: 将 MTT 粉末溶于 PBS 至 5 mg/mL

prepSteps.en: Filter-sterilize (0.22 µm)
prepSteps.zh: 0.22 µm 过滤除菌

prepSteps.en: Aliquot into light-protected tubes, store -20°C
prepSteps.zh: 分装至避光管，-20°C 保存

prepSteps.en: Add 10 µL per 100 µL culture medium, incubate 2–4 h
prepSteps.zh: 每 100 µL 培养基加 10 µL，孵育 2–4 h

name: Native PAGE Running Buffer
nameCn: 非变性 PAGE 电泳缓冲液

notes.en: Same as SDS-PAGE but without SDS. pH ~8.3 forms naturally. Do not boil samples or add reducing agents. Run at 4°C.
notes.zh: 与 SDS-PAGE 相同但不加 SDS。pH ~8.3 自然形成。样品不煮沸不加还原剂。4°C 电泳。

ref: Wittig et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:418–428

usage.en: Native PAGE running buffer for non-denaturing protein electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 天然 PAGE 电泳缓冲液，用于非变性蛋白质电泳。

label.en: 4°C, 3 months; Keep cold; do not add SDS

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris and glycine in ddH₂O (NO SDS)
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tris 和甘氨酸溶于 ddH₂O（不加 SDS）

prepSteps.en: pH should be ~8.3. Do not adjust
prepSteps.zh: pH 应为 ~8.3，不要调节

prepSteps.en: Run gel at 4°C to preserve native structure
prepSteps.zh: 在 4°C 跑胶以保持蛋白天然结构

name: NP-40 Lysis Buffer

notes.en: Mild lysis buffer that preserves protein-protein interactions, ideal for Co-IP. NP-40 does not lyse the nuclear membrane. Add protease inhibitors fresh before use. Add phosphatase inhibitors for phosphoprotein detection.
notes.zh: 温和裂解液，保留蛋白-蛋白相互作用，适合 Co-IP。NP-40 不裂解核膜。使用前加蛋白酶抑制剂。可加磷酸酶抑制剂用于磷酸化蛋白检测。

ref: Abcam Co-IP protocol; Sambrook & Russell (2001)

usage.en: Mild non-ionic detergent lysis buffer for IP and Co-IP under native conditions.
usage.zh: 温和非离子去污剂裂解缓冲液，用于天然条件下的 IP 和 Co-IP。

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Tris-HCl, NaCl, EDTA in ddH₂O
prepSteps.zh: 将 Tris-HCl、NaCl、EDTA 溶于 ddH₂O

prepSteps.en: Add NP-40 (IGEPAL CA-630) to 1%
prepSteps.zh: 加入 NP-40 (IGEPAL CA-630) 至 1%

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.4, bring to volume
prepSteps.zh: 调 pH 至 7.4，定容

prepSteps.en: Add protease inhibitors fresh before use
prepSteps.zh: 使用前现加蛋白酶抑制剂

name: Nuclear/Cytoplasmic Fractionation Buffer A
nameCn: 核质分离裂解液 A (胞浆)
