detailedSteps.en: **Dilute samples**: Prepare 2–3 dilutions of each unknown sample in the same buffer (e.g., 1:5, 1:10, 1:20). Ensure concentrations fall within the 0.1–1.5 mg/mL linear range.
detailedSteps.zh: **稀释样品**: 用相同缓冲液将每个未知样品制备2-3个稀释度（如1:5、1:10、1:20）。确保浓度落在0.1-1.5 mg/mL线性范围内。

detailedSteps.en: **Set up plate/cuvettes**: Pipette 5 µL of each standard and sample in triplicate into a 96-well plate. For cuvette format, use 20 µL sample + 1 mL reagent.
detailedSteps.zh: **设置板/比色皿**: 将每个标准品和样品各取5 µL，以三复孔加入96孔板。若使用比色皿格式，则用20 µL样品 + 1 mL试剂。

detailedSteps.en: **Add Bradford reagent**: Add 250 µL of 1× Bradford reagent (Coomassie Brilliant Blue G-250) to each well. Mix gently by pipetting up and down 3 times. Avoid bubbles.
detailedSteps.zh: **加入Bradford试剂**: 向每孔加入250 µL 1× Bradford试剂（考马斯亮蓝G-250）。轻柔吹打混匀3次，避免产生气泡。

detailedSteps.en: **Incubate**: Incubate at room temperature (RT) for 5–10 min. ⚠️ Read within 30 min — the dye-protein complex is unstable and absorbance drifts after 60 min.
detailedSteps.zh: **孵育**: 室温孵育5-10分钟。⚠️ 30分钟内读数——染料-蛋白质复合物不稳定，60分钟后吸光度会漂移。

detailedSteps.en: **Read absorbance**: Measure absorbance at 595 nm using a plate reader or spectrophotometer. Blank with the 0 mg/mL standard.
detailedSteps.zh: **读取吸光度**: 使用酶标仪或分光光度计在595 nm处测量吸光度。以0 mg/mL标准品做空白校正。

detailedSteps.en: **Plot standard curve**: Plot A595 vs. BSA concentration (mg/mL). Fit a linear regression (R² should be ≥ 0.99). Use a quadratic fit if the range extends beyond 1.0 mg/mL.
detailedSteps.zh: **绘制标准曲线**: 以BSA浓度（mg/mL）为横轴，A595为纵轴绘制标准曲线。进行线性回归（R²应≥0.99）。若范围超过1.0 mg/mL，使用二次拟合。

detailedSteps.en: **Calculate concentrations**: Interpolate unknown sample concentrations from the standard curve. Multiply by the dilution factor. Average the triplicates and report mean ± SD.
detailedSteps.zh: **计算浓度**: 从标准曲线内插未知样品浓度。乘以稀释倍数。取三复孔平均值，报告均值 ± 标准差。

detailedSteps.en: ⚠️ **Troubleshooting**: Detergents (>0.1% SDS) and reducing agents interfere with Bradford. Use BCA assay for detergent-rich samples. Strong bases (>0.1 N NaOH) also interfere.
detailedSteps.zh: ⚠️ **故障排除**: 去污剂（>0.1% SDS）和还原剂会干扰Bradford检测。含去污剂的样品请改用BCA法。强碱（>0.1 N NaOH）也会干扰。

briefSteps.en: Prepare BSA standards → Dilute samples → Add Bradford reagent → Incubate 5 min RT → Read A595 → Plot standard curve → Calculate concentrations
briefSteps.zh: 制备BSA标准品 → 稀释样品 → 加入Bradford试剂 → 室温孵育5分钟 → 读取A595 → 绘制标准曲线 → 计算浓度

note.en: Diluted samples can be kept on ice for up to 1 h
note.zh: 稀释样品可在冰上保存最多1小时

name: Bulk Competent Cell Preparation (CaCl₂ Method)
nameCn: 大量感受态细胞制备（CaCl₂ 法）

components.name: Step 1: Inoculate bacteria from -80°C stock into LB, shake 250 rpm overnight at 37°C (no antibiotics).

note.en: If stock is >12 months old or efficiency is low, streak on blank LB plate and pick single colony to restart.
note.zh: 若甘油菌 >12 个月或效率下降，先划线 LB 平板挑单克隆重新开始。

components.name: Step 2: Next day — rinse autoclaved 1 L flasks with LB. Prewarm 150-200 mL LB per flask to 37°C. Dilute overnight culture 1:100. Grow 37°C 250 rpm until OD600 0.4-0.6 (~2.5 h).

note.en: Typical growth: OD 0.05 at 1 h, 0.25-0.28 at 2 h, 0.5-0.6 at 2.5 h. Optimal growth conditions are critical.

components.name: Step 3: Transfer to precooled flasks on ice, incubate 15 min. All subsequent steps on ice or in cold room.

note.en: CRITICAL: precool everything. Keep entire procedure at 0-4°C, preferably in cold room.
note.zh: 关键：预冷所有器具。全程 0-4°C，最好在冷室操作。

components.name: Step 5: Resuspend thoroughly in 50-100 mL ice-cold 0.1 M CaCl₂ (avoid vortex). Leave on ice 20-30 min.
Step 6: Spin 4000 rpm 10 min 4°C. Resuspend in 4 mL 0.1 M CaCl₂ per 200 mL culture. Add 4 mL 0.1 M CaCl₂ + 30% glycerol (final 15% glycerol). Leave on ice.
Step 7: Aliquot 50 µL or 200 µL into precooled 1.5 mL tubes. Flash-freeze in liquid nitrogen.
Step 8: Store at -80°C. Test efficiency with several aliquots.

notes.en: Transformation: thaw on ice, add DNA (<1/10 volume for ligation products, 50 pg-1 ng for plasmid), ice 30 min, heat shock 42°C 30-40 s, ice 5-10 min, add 1 mL LB, recover 37°C 1 h, plate 100-150 µL. Quick alternative (skip recovery): after heat shock + 5 min ice, add 100 µL LB, plate directly (5-10× lower efficiency but sufficient for simple cloning). Antibiotics: Ampicillin stock 50 mg/mL (1:1000). LB Broth: 25 g/L. LB Agar: 25 g LB + 15 g agar per L.
notes.zh: 转化：冰上融化，加 DNA（连接产物 <1/10 体积，质粒 50 pg-1 ng），冰 30 分钟，42°C 热激 30-40 秒，冰 5-10 分钟，加 1 mL LB，37°C 复苏 1 小时，涂板 100-150 µL。快速替代：热激后冰 5 分钟直接涂板（效率降低 5-10 倍但足够简单克隆）。

ref: Adapted from standard CaCl₂ competent cell protocol; Protocol by YW

usage.en: Bulk preparation of chemically competent E. coli (DH10B or similar) using CaCl₂ method, with heat-shock transformation protocol.
usage.zh: CaCl₂ 法大量制备化学感受态大肠杆菌（DH10B 或类似菌株），含热激转化流程。

label.en: Protocol — 2 days (overnight culture + preparation), hands-on: 4 hours
label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days (overnight culture + preparation)，实操: 4 hours

note.en: -80°C (up to 12 months)
note.zh: -80°C (最长 12 months)

name: CaCl₂ Competent Cell Preparation
nameCn: CaCl₂ 化学感受态细胞制备

components.name: 1. 过夜培养 DH5α/BL21 → 1:100 接种至 50 mL LB
5. 弃上清，冰冷 100 mM CaCl₂ 重悬
8. 冰冷 100 mM CaCl₂ + 15% 甘油 重悬
9. 分装 100 µL/管，液氮速冻，-80°C 保存

notes.en: Keep everything on ice throughout! Typical efficiency: 10⁶–10⁷ CFU/µg. Overnight incubation at 4°C can improve efficiency. For higher efficiency (>10⁸), use the Inoue method (MnCl₂/CaCl₂).
notes.zh: 全程冰上操作！效率通常 10⁶–10⁷ CFU/µg。过夜 4°C 孵育可提高效率。如需更高效率 (>10⁸)，使用 Inoue 法 (MnCl₂/CaCl₂)。

ref: Hanahan (1983) J Mol Biol 166:557–580; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

usage.en: Prepare chemically competent E. coli cells using CaCl₂ method for heat-shock transformation.
usage.zh: CaCl₂ 化学法制备大肠杆菌感受态细胞，用于热激转化。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 3 hours

note.en: Pre-chill to 4°C
note.zh: 预冷至 4°C

note.en: For freezing stock
note.zh: 用于冻存

note.en: For snap-freezing
note.zh: 速冻用

note.en: −80°C in aliquots (up to 6 months)
note.zh: −80°C in aliquots (最长 6 months)

detailedSteps.en: **Day 0**: Inoculate single colony into 5 mL LB. Grow O/N at 37°C with shaking
detailedSteps.zh: **前一天**: 挑单克隆接种 5 mL LB。37°C 振荡过夜

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1**: Dilute O/N culture 1:100 into 50 mL fresh LB in 250 mL flask
detailedSteps.zh: **当天**: 过夜菌液 1:100 接种至 250 mL 锥形瓶中 50 mL 新鲜 LB

detailedSteps.en: Grow at 37°C with vigorous shaking until OD₆₀₀ = 0.3–0.5 (~2–3 h). ⚠️ Do NOT overgrow!
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C 剧烈振荡至 OD₆₀₀ = 0.3–0.5（约 2–3 h）。⚠️ 不要过度生长！

detailedSteps.en: Transfer to pre-chilled 50 mL tube. Ice 15 min
detailedSteps.zh: 转移至预冷的 50 mL 管。冰浴 15 min

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge 3000×g, 10 min, 4°C. Decant supernatant completely
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 3000×g 离心 10 min。完全倒掉上清

detailedSteps.en: Gently resuspend pellet in 25 mL ice-cold 100 mM CaCl₂ (pipet gently — do NOT vortex!)
detailedSteps.zh: 用 25 mL 冰冷 100 mM CaCl₂ 轻柔重悬沉淀（轻柔吹打——不要涡旋！）

detailedSteps.en: Incubate on ice 30 min
detailedSteps.zh: 冰浴 30 min

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge 3000×g, 10 min, 4°C. Decant carefully
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 3000×g 离心 10 min。小心倒掉上清

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend in 2.5 mL ice-cold 100 mM CaCl₂ + 15% glycerol
detailedSteps.zh: 用 2.5 mL 冰冷 100 mM CaCl₂ + 15% 甘油 轻柔重悬

detailedSteps.en: Aliquot 100 µL per pre-chilled 1.5 mL tube. Snap-freeze in liquid N₂. Store -80°C
detailedSteps.zh: 分装 100 µL/预冷管。液氮速冻。-80°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Test efficiency**: Transform 1 ng pUC19, plate on LB + Amp. Count colonies next day
detailedSteps.zh: **效率测试**: 转化 1 ng pUC19，涂 LB + Amp 平板。次日计数菌落

briefSteps.en: Grow to OD 0.3–0.5 → ice 15 min → pellet → resuspend in cold CaCl₂ → ice 30 min → pellet → resuspend in CaCl₂ + glycerol → aliquot → snap-freeze
briefSteps.zh: 培养至 OD 0.3–0.5 → 冰浴 15 min → 离心 → 冷 CaCl₂ 重悬 → 冰浴 30 min → 离心 → CaCl₂ + 甘油重悬 → 分装 → 速冻

name: Calcium Phosphate Transfection

components.name: 1. 转染前一天铺板至 50–70% 汇合度
- 2× HBS: 280 mM NaCl, 50 mM HEPES, 1.5 mM Na₂HPO₄, pH 7.05
4. 逐滴将管 A 加入管 B，边滴边吹泡 (用巴氏管)
5. 室温静置 20 min (形成 DNA-Ca₃(PO₄)₂ 沉淀)
6. 逐滴加入培养皿，轻柔晃匀
9. 48–72 h 后收获 (蛋白表达 / 病毒上清)

notes.en: 2× HBS pH must be precisely 7.05 ± 0.02; deviations severely reduce efficiency. Optional glycerol shock: treat with 15% glycerol/PBS for 2 min at 8 h post-transfection, wash 2× PBS, replace medium. HEK293/293T efficiency can reach 80–90%. Preferred method for lentivirus packaging (low cost).
notes.zh: 2× HBS 的 pH 必须精确到 7.05 ± 0.02，偏差会严重影响效率！可选 glycerol shock: 转染后 8 h 用 15% 甘油/PBS 处理 2 min，PBS 洗 2 次，换新培养基。HEK293/293T 效率可达 80–90%。慢病毒包装首选此法 (成本低)。

ref: Kingston et al. (2003) Curr Protoc Mol Biol 9.1.1–9.1.11; Graham & van der Eb (1973) Virology 52:456–467

usage.en: Transfect mammalian cells using calcium phosphate co-precipitation.
usage.zh: 磷酸钙共沉淀法转染哺乳动物细胞。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 days，实操: 1 hour

note.en: Prepare fresh or store -20°C
note.zh: 现配或 -20°C 保存

note.en: ⚠️ pH 7.05 ± 0.05 is critical

detailedSteps.en: **Day 0**: Plate cells to 50–70% confluency by next morning (e.g., 4×10⁶ HEK293T per 10 cm dish)
detailedSteps.zh: **前一天**: 铺板至次日 50–70% 汇合度（如 HEK293T 4×10⁶/10 cm 皿）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Transfection**:
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 转染**:

detailedSteps.en: Change to fresh medium 1–2 h before transfection. Include 25 µM chloroquine (optional, boosts efficiency 2–3×)
detailedSteps.zh: 转染前 1–2 h 换新鲜培养基。可选加 25 µM 氯喹（提高效率 2–3 倍）

detailedSteps.en: Tube A: Mix 20 µg DNA + 50 µL 2.5M CaCl₂ + ddH₂O to 500 µL total
detailedSteps.zh: 管 A: 20 µg DNA + 50 µL 2.5M CaCl₂ + ddH₂O 补至 500 µL

detailedSteps.en: Tube B: Add 500 µL 2× HBS. Insert Pasteur pipet connected to pipet-aid, start bubbling air
detailedSteps.zh: 管 B: 加 500 µL 2× HBS。插入连接移液器的巴斯德吸管，开始吹泡

detailedSteps.en: Add Tube A dropwise to Tube B while continuously bubbling. This ensures fine precipitate formation
detailedSteps.zh: 逐滴将管 A 加入管 B，同时持续吹泡。这确保形成细小沉淀

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at RT 15–20 min. Solution should appear slightly turbid (fine precipitate)
detailedSteps.zh: 室温静置 15–20 min。溶液应略显浑浊（细小沉淀）

detailedSteps.en: ⚠️ If solution is clear → precipitate did not form (check 2× HBS pH!). If chunky/flocculent → precipitate too large (won't work)
detailedSteps.zh: ⚠️ 如果溶液澄清 → 未形成沉淀（检查 2× HBS pH！）。如果絮状/块状 → 沉淀太大（不会起效）

detailedSteps.en: Add dropwise to dish while swirling gently. Return to 37°C incubator
detailedSteps.zh: 边轻柔晃动培养皿边逐滴加入。放回 37°C 培养箱

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2**: Replace medium after 12–16 h. Fine granular precipitate on cells is normal and good
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天**: 12–16 h 后换液。细胞上的细颗粒状沉淀是正常的好现象

detailedSteps.en: **Day 3**: Harvest protein expression at 48 h or collect virus supernatant at 48–72 h
detailedSteps.zh: **第三天**: 48 h 收获蛋白表达或 48–72 h 收集病毒上清

briefSteps.en: Plate cells → mix DNA + CaCl₂ → drop into 2× HBS while bubbling → incubate 20 min → add to cells → O/N → change media → harvest 48–72h
briefSteps.zh: 铺板 → DNA + CaCl₂ 混合 → 逐滴加入 2× HBS 同时吹泡 → 20 min → 加至细胞 → 过夜 → 换液 → 48–72h 收获

name: CCK-8 Cell Proliferation / Viability Assay
nameCn: CCK-8 细胞增殖/活力检测

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate; allow overnight attachment

note.en: 100 µL complete medium/well. Seed density: 2,000–10,000 cells depending on doubling time (aim for ~60–70% confluency at endpoint). Fill outer-edge wells with PBS (not cells) to minimize edge effect evaporation.
note.zh: 每孔 100 µL 完全培养基。铺板密度：2,000–10,000 细胞（视倍增时间，终点时约 60–70% 汇合）。边缘孔加 PBS（不铺细胞）减少边缘效应蒸发。

components.name: 2. Add treatment/drug (Day 1); incubate 24/48/72 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂

note.en: Controls: (a) untreated cells, (b) blank (medium only, no cells), (c) solvent control. For long treatments (>48 h): refresh medium + drug at 48 h. Drug dilution: ≥8 concentrations, 0.5-log steps, to generate IC₅₀ curve.
note.zh: 对照：(a) 未处理细胞；(b) 空白孔（仅培养基）；(c) 溶剂对照。长时间处理（>48 h）：48 h 换液并重新给药。IC₅₀ 曲线：≥8 个浓度梯度，0.5 对数间隔。

components.name: 3. Add 10 µL CCK-8 reagent directly to medium; mix by pipetting once

note.en: Do NOT remove medium. Use multichannel pipette. Protect reagent from light. Avoid bubbles (interfere with reading). CCK-8 contains WST-8 tetrazolium salt.
note.zh: 不去除培养基直接加入。用多道移液器。试剂避光。避免产生气泡（影响读数）。CCK-8 含 WST-8 四唑盐。

components.name: 4. Incubate 1–4 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂; check color every 30 min after 1 h

note.en: Optimal: orange-yellow color; OD 0.6–1.5. Too dark (OD >2.0): dilute cells or reduce incubation. Incubation time should be consistent across all plates.
note.zh: 最佳：橙黄色；OD 0.6–1.5。过深（OD >2.0）：减少细胞数或缩短孵育时间。各板孵育时间必须一致。

note.en: No need to remove medium or add DMSO — non-destructive. Can re-incubate and re-read same plate at later timepoints.
note.zh: 无需去除培养基或加 DMSO——非破坏性。可继续孵育后重复读取同一培养板。

note.en: % Viability = (OD_treated − OD_blank) / (OD_control − OD_blank) × 100. IC₅₀: nonlinear regression (4-parameter logistic, GraphPad Prism log(inhibitor) vs normalized response).
note.zh: % 活力 = (OD处理 − OD空白) / (OD对照 − OD空白) × 100。IC₅₀：非线性回归（4 参数逻辑斯谛，GraphPad Prism log[inhibitor] vs 归一化响应）。

notes.en: CCK-8 advantages over MTT: (1) non-destructive (can re-read), (2) no DMSO solubilization step, (3) higher sensitivity, (4) no interference from culture medium. Interference: phenol-red (small, use reference wavelength), serum >15%, strong reducers. For suspension cells: centrifuge plate before reading (300×g 5 min).
notes.zh: CCK-8 优于 MTT：(1) 非破坏性（可重复读）；(2) 无需 DMSO 溶解；(3) 灵敏度更高；(4) 培养基干扰小。干扰因素：酚红（小，用参考波长校正）、血清 >15%、强还原剂。悬浮细胞：读板前离心（300×g 5 min）。

ref: Ishiyama et al. (1997) Talanta 44:1299–1305; Dojindo CCK-8 Technical Manual; Kurokawa et al. (1999) Anal Biochem 268:375–380

usage.en: Measure cell proliferation and viability using CCK-8 (WST-8) colorimetric assay.
usage.zh: CCK-8（WST-8）比色法检测细胞增殖和活力。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–3 days，实操: 1 hour

note.en: e.g., Dojindo CK04; store at 4°C protected from light
note.zh: 如 Dojindo CK04；4°C 避光保存

note.en: Tissue culture-treated, flat-bottom
note.zh: 细胞培养级，平底

note.en: Appropriate for cell line, with serum
note.zh: 适合细胞系的含血清培养基

note.en: 450 nm and 650 nm filters
note.zh: 450 nm 和 650 nm 滤光片

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Cell Seeding**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 细胞接种**

detailedSteps.en: **Seed cells**: Plate cells in 96-well plate at optimized density (typically 2,000–10,000 cells/well in 100 µL complete medium). Include blank wells (medium only, no cells) and untreated control wells. Seed in at least triplicate per condition
detailedSteps.zh: **接种细胞**: 以优化密度（通常 2,000–10,000 细胞/孔，100 µL 完全培养基）接种于 96 孔板。设置空白孔（仅培养基，无细胞）和未处理对照孔。每组至少 3 个重复

detailedSteps.en: **Incubate overnight**: Allow cells to attach at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 12–24 h
detailedSteps.zh: **过夜培养**: 37°C, 5% CO₂ 培养 12–24 h 使细胞贴壁

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Treatment**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 处理**

detailedSteps.en: **Add treatments**: Replace medium or add drug/stimulus at desired concentrations. For dose-response: use 6–8 concentrations in half-log dilutions. Final volume: 100 µL/well. ⚠️ Avoid bubbles — they cause inaccurate readings
detailedSteps.zh: **加药处理**: 换液或加入所需浓度的药物/刺激物。剂量-反应曲线：使用 6–8 个半对数稀释浓度。终体积：100 µL/孔。⚠️ 避免气泡——会导致读数不准

detailedSteps.en: **Incubate**: Culture for desired treatment time (24, 48, or 72 h depending on experimental design)
detailedSteps.zh: **孵育**: 按实验设计培养所需时间（24、48 或 72 h）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 3–4 — CCK-8 Detection**
detailedSteps.zh: **第 3–4 天 — CCK-8 检测**

detailedSteps.en: **Add CCK-8**: Add 10 µL CCK-8 reagent directly to each well (do not remove medium). ⚠️ Avoid touching the well walls — add to center of well. Use multichannel pipette for consistent timing
detailedSteps.zh: **加 CCK-8**: 每孔直接加 10 µL CCK-8 试剂（不需换液）。⚠️ 避免触碰孔壁——加到孔中央。使用多通道移液器保证一致性

detailedSteps.en: **Incubate**: Return plate to 37°C, 5% CO₂ incubator for 1–4 h (optimize for your cell line; typically 2 h). Color develops from orange to dark orange
detailedSteps.zh: **孵育**: 放回 37°C, 5% CO₂ 培养箱孵育 1–4 h（根据细胞系优化，通常 2 h）。颜色从浅橙变为深橙

detailedSteps.en: **Read plate**: Measure absorbance at 450 nm (reference wavelength 650 nm). Subtract blank well values
detailedSteps.zh: **读板**: 酶标仪测定 450 nm 吸光度（参考波长 650 nm）。减去空白孔数值

detailedSteps.en: **Calculate**: Cell viability (%) = (OD_treated − OD_blank) / (OD_control − OD_blank) × 100. For proliferation curves, plot OD450 vs. time. For IC50, fit dose-response curve with 4-parameter logistic regression
detailedSteps.zh: **计算**: 细胞活力 (%) = (OD_处理 − OD_空白) / (OD_对照 − OD_空白) × 100。增殖曲线绘制 OD450 vs 时间。IC50 用四参数 logistic 回归拟合剂量-反应曲线

briefSteps.en: Seed cells in 96-well plate → treat with drug/stimulus → add CCK-8 reagent → incubate 1–4 h → read OD450
briefSteps.zh: 96 孔板接种细胞 → 加药/刺激处理 → 加 CCK-8 试剂 → 孵育 1–4 h → 读取 OD450

note.en: Cells attach overnight before treatment
note.zh: 细胞过夜贴壁后再处理

name: Cell Counting (Hemocytometer)

components.name: 1. 胰酶消化 → 制备单细胞悬液
2. 取 10 µL 细胞悬液 + 10 µL 台盼蓝 (1:1)
components.note: 稀释因子 = 2; 密度过高再稀释

components.name: 3. 加盖玻片到血球计数板
components.note: 盖玻片两侧出现牛顿环

components.name: 4. 加 10 µL 混合液到计数室
components.note: 毛细作用自动填充, 勿溢出

components.name: 5. 10× 镜下计数四个大方格
components.note: 活细胞透明; 死细胞蓝色

components.name: 6. 计算浓度
components.note: cells/mL = (四格总数 / 4) × 稀释因子 × 10⁴

components.name: 7. 计算活率
components.note: Viability = 活细胞数 / 总细胞数 × 100%

notes.en: Trypan blue contact ≤5 min (otherwise live cells also stain). Ideal count: 100-200 cells per large square. Cells on grid lines: count top and left, not bottom and right. Clean hemocytometer with 70% ethanol; do not sonicate. Automated counters (Countess, TC20) are more accurate but need calibration.
notes.zh: 台盼蓝接触时间 ≤5 min（否则活细胞也会着色）。每格理想计数 100–200 个细胞。计数线上细胞：计上不计下，计左不计右。清洗计数板：70% 乙醇擦拭，勿用超声。自动计数仪（Countess, TC20）更准确但需校准。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th Ed, Ch. 21; Louis & Bhatt (2015) Methods Mol Biol 1235:31

usage.en: Count cells and assess viability using a hemocytometer with trypan blue exclusion.
usage.zh: 使用血球计数板和台盼蓝排斥法计数细胞并评估活力。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 15 minutes，实操: 15 minutes

note.en: With coverslip
note.zh: 带盖玻片
如 Gibco #15250061

note.en: 10× objective
note.zh: 10× 物镜

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare hemocytometer**: Clean hemocytometer and coverslip with 70% ethanol. Let dry. Moisten the edges of the hemocytometer and press coverslip firmly until Newton's rings appear (rainbow refraction pattern)
detailedSteps.zh: **准备计数板**: 用 70% 乙醇清洁血球计数板和盖玻片。晾干。湿润计数板边缘，按压盖玻片至出现牛顿环（彩虹衍射图案）

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare cell suspension**: Trypsinize adherent cells (or collect suspension cells), centrifuge 300×g 5 min, resuspend in appropriate volume of medium or PBS to get an estimated 5×10⁵–1×10⁶ cells/mL. Pipet up/down 10× to ensure single-cell suspension
detailedSteps.zh: **准备细胞悬液**: 胰酶消化贴壁细胞（或收集悬浮细胞），300×g 离心 5 min，用适量培养基或 PBS 重悬至估计 5×10⁵–1×10⁶ 细胞/mL。上下吹打 10 次确保单细胞悬液

detailedSteps.en: **Trypan blue staining**: Mix 10 µL cell suspension with 10 µL 0.4% Trypan blue (1:1 dilution, dilution factor = 2). Mix gently by pipetting 3×. ⚠️ Use within 3 min — prolonged exposure kills live cells
detailedSteps.zh: **台盼蓝染色**: 取 10 µL 细胞悬液与 10 µL 0.4% 台盼蓝混合（1:1 稀释，稀释因子 = 2）。轻柔吹打 3 次混匀。⚠️ 3 min 内使用——长时间接触会杀死活细胞

detailedSteps.en: **Load chamber**: Carefully pipet 10 µL of the mixture into the V-shaped groove on one side of the hemocytometer. Liquid fills by capillary action under the coverslip. ⚠️ Do not overfill — excess liquid raises the coverslip and skews the count
detailedSteps.zh: **加样**: 小心吸取 10 µL 混合液滴入计数板一侧的 V 形槽。液体通过毛细作用充满盖玻片下方。⚠️ 不可过量——多余液体会抬高盖玻片导致计数偏差

detailedSteps.en: **Focus**: Place hemocytometer on microscope stage. Focus at 10× magnification. Identify the 4 corner large squares (each 1 mm × 1 mm, subdivided into 16 smaller squares)
detailedSteps.zh: **对焦**: 将计数板放在显微镜载物台上。10× 物镜对焦。辨识 4 个角大方格（每个 1 mm × 1 mm，分为 16 个小方格）

detailedSteps.en: **Count cells**: Count all cells in 4 large corner squares. Live cells are bright/refractile; dead cells are blue. For cells touching gridlines: count top and left borders, exclude bottom and right. Ideal count: 100–200 cells per large square
detailedSteps.zh: **计数**: 计数 4 个大方格中的所有细胞。活细胞明亮有折光性；死细胞染蓝。压线细胞：计上不计下，计左不计右。每个大方格理想计数：100–200 个细胞

detailedSteps.en: **Calculate concentration**: Cells/mL = (total count in 4 squares / 4) × dilution factor × 10⁴. Example: 480 cells counted, dilution = 2 → (480/4) × 2 × 10⁴ = 2.4 × 10⁶ cells/mL
detailedSteps.zh: **计算浓度**: 细胞/mL = (4 格总计数 / 4) × 稀释因子 × 10⁴。例：计数 480 个，稀释因子 2 → (480/4) × 2 × 10⁴ = 2.4 × 10⁶ 细胞/mL

detailedSteps.en: **Calculate viability**: Viability (%) = (live cell count / total cell count) × 100. Acceptable viability for most experiments: >90%
detailedSteps.zh: **计算活率**: 活率 (%) = (活细胞计数 / 总细胞计数) × 100。大多数实验可接受活率：>90%

briefSteps.en: Prepare single-cell suspension → mix with Trypan blue → load hemocytometer → count cells in 4 large squares → calculate concentration
briefSteps.zh: 制备单细胞悬液 → 与台盼蓝混合 → 加载血球计数板 → 计数 4 个大方格 → 计算浓度

name: Cell Cycle Analysis (PI)

components.name: 4. PI staining: 50 µg/mL PI + 100 µg/mL RNase A

notes.en: RNase A essential (PI binds RNA). Gate singlets via FSC-H vs FSC-A. G1=2N, S=between, G2/M=4N. Fixed cells stable weeks at -20°C.
notes.zh: RNase A 必需（PI 也结合 RNA）。FSC-H vs FSC-A 门控去除双联体。G1=2N, S=中间, G2/M=4N。固定后 -20°C 可保存数周。

ref: Krishan (1975) J Cell Biol 66:188

usage.en: Analyze cell cycle distribution by PI staining of fixed cells and flow cytometry.
usage.zh: PI 染色固定细胞，流式细胞术分析细胞周期分布。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–5 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: 1 mg/mL stock in H₂O, store at 4°C protected from light
note.zh: 1 mg/mL 水溶液储液，4°C 避光保存

note.en: 10 mg/mL stock, DNase-free, store at -20°C
note.zh: 10 mg/mL 储液，无 DNase，-20°C 保存

note.en: Pre-chilled to -20°C
note.zh: 预冷至 -20°C

note.en: Nylon mesh
note.zh: 尼龙网

note.en: Fixed cells in 70% ethanol can be stored at -20°C for weeks
note.zh: 70% 乙醇固定的细胞可在 -20°C 保存数周

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest cells**: Collect 1–2×10⁶ cells per sample. For adherent cells: trypsinize briefly, collect in medium, combine with floating cells from supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: **收集细胞**: 每个样品收集 1–2×10⁶ 细胞。贴壁细胞：短暂胰酶消化，收集于培养基中，与上清中的悬浮细胞合并

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Centrifuge 300×g, 5 min, 4°C. Discard supernatant. Resuspend in 1 mL cold PBS. Centrifuge again
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 300×g 离心 5 min，4°C。弃上清。用 1 mL 预冷 PBS 重悬。再次离心

detailedSteps.en: **Fix**: Resuspend pellet in 300 µL cold PBS. While vortexing gently, add 700 µL ice-cold 100% ethanol drop-by-drop (final 70% ethanol). ⚠️ Add ethanol slowly while vortexing to prevent cell clumping
detailedSteps.zh: **固定**: 用 300 µL 预冷 PBS 重悬沉淀。轻柔涡旋同时逐滴加入 700 µL 冰冷 100% 乙醇（终浓度 70% 乙醇）。⚠️ 涡旋同时缓慢加入乙醇以防止细胞聚团

detailedSteps.en: **Incubate**: Fix at -20°C for at least 2 h (or overnight). Cells can be stored at -20°C for up to several weeks
detailedSteps.zh: **孵育**: -20°C 固定至少 2 h（或过夜）。固定后的细胞可在 -20°C 保存数周

detailedSteps.en: **Wash off ethanol**: Centrifuge fixed cells 500×g, 5 min, 4°C. Remove ethanol. Wash once with 1 mL cold PBS. Centrifuge again
detailedSteps.zh: **洗去乙醇**: 固定细胞 500×g 离心 5 min，4°C。去除乙醇。用 1 mL 预冷 PBS 洗涤一次。再次离心

detailedSteps.en: **RNase treatment**: Resuspend in 500 µL PI staining solution: 50 µg/mL PI + 100 µg/mL RNase A in PBS. ⚠️ RNase A is essential — PI binds both DNA and RNA; without RNase, RNA will produce artifactual peaks
detailedSteps.zh: **RNase 处理**: 重悬于 500 µL PI 染色液：PBS 中含 50 µg/mL PI + 100 µg/mL RNase A。⚠️ RNase A 必不可少——PI 同时结合 DNA 和 RNA；不加 RNase 会产生假峰

detailedSteps.en: **Stain**: Incubate 30 min at 37°C in the dark (or RT for 15 min). Protect from light
detailedSteps.zh: **染色**: 37°C 避光孵育 30 min（或室温 15 min）。注意避光

detailedSteps.en: **Filter**: Pass through 40 µm cell strainer to remove clumps before analysis
detailedSteps.zh: **过滤**: 上机前用 40 µm 细胞滤网过滤去除聚团

detailedSteps.en: **Flow cytometry**: Acquire on flow cytometer using PE channel (Ex 488 nm / Em 617 nm). Record FL2-A (area) vs FL2-W (width) for doublet discrimination. Collect ≥20,000 singlet events
detailedSteps.zh: **流式检测**: 使用 PE 通道（Ex 488 nm / Em 617 nm）上机检测。记录 FL2-A（面积）vs FL2-W（宽度）用于双联体去除。收集 ≥20,000 单细胞事件

detailedSteps.en: **Analyze**: Gate singlets using FSC-H vs FSC-A plot. Use Dean-Jett-Fox or Watson model in FlowJo/ModFit to assign G1 (2N), S (between 2N–4N), and G2/M (4N) populations
detailedSteps.zh: **分析**: 用 FSC-H vs FSC-A 散点图设门选取单细胞。在 FlowJo/ModFit 中用 Dean-Jett-Fox 或 Watson 模型分配 G1 (2N)、S (2N–4N 之间) 和 G2/M (4N) 群体

briefSteps.en: Harvest cells → fix in 70% ethanol → wash → RNase A treatment → PI staining → flow cytometry analysis
briefSteps.zh: 收集细胞 → 70% 乙醇固定 → 洗涤 → RNase A 处理 → PI 染色 → 流式细胞术分析

name: Cell Freezing (Cryopreservation)

components.name: 1. 选择 70–90% 汇合度、活力 >90% 的细胞
6. 冻存液重悬 (1–5×10⁶/mL)
components.note: 90% FBS + 10% DMSO; 或商用 CryoStor CS10

notes.en: Standard cryopreservation protocol. Controlled-rate freezing (-1°C/min) in 10% DMSO/90% FBS. Use Mr. Frosty or CoolCell. Transfer to liquid nitrogen within 24–48h. Essential for cell banking.
notes.zh: 细胞应处于对数生长期。10% DMSO/90% FBS 冻存液。-1°C/min 程序降温防止冰晶损伤。标记细胞系、代次、日期。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th ed.; ATCC Cell Culture Guide

usage.en: Cryopreserve mammalian cells for long-term storage in liquid nitrogen.
usage.zh: 冻存哺乳动物细胞，液氮长期保存。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes + overnight，实操: 30 minutes

note.en: -1°C/min controlled rate
note.zh: -1°C/min 程序降温

note.en: For counting
note.zh: 计数用

note.en: Cells can remain at -80°C for up to 3 months, but transfer to liquid nitrogen for long-term viability
note.zh: 细胞可在 -80°C 保存最多 3 个月，但建议转入液氮以保持长期活力

detailedSteps.en: Use cells at 70–90% confluence, in log-phase growth. Ensure viability >90% (trypan blue)
detailedSteps.zh: 选择 70–90% 汇合度、对数生长期细胞。确认活力 >90%（台盼蓝）

detailedSteps.en: Aspirate medium. Wash cells with PBS
detailedSteps.zh: 吸除培养基。PBS 洗涤细胞

detailedSteps.en: Add Trypsin-EDTA. Incubate at 37°C until cells detach (1–5 min depending on cell type)
detailedSteps.zh: 加入胰酶-EDTA。37°C 孵育至细胞脱落（1–5 min，视细胞类型）

detailedSteps.en: Neutralize with 2× volume complete medium. Transfer to centrifuge tube
detailedSteps.zh: 加 2 倍体积完全培养基中和。转移至离心管

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 200 × g for 5 min. Aspirate supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: 200 × g 离心 5 min。吸除上清

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend pellet in complete medium. Count cells using hemocytometer
detailedSteps.zh: 完全培养基重悬沉淀。血球计数板计数

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge again at 200 × g for 5 min. Remove supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: 再次 200 × g 离心 5 min。去除上清

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend in pre-chilled freezing medium at 1–5 × 10⁶ cells/mL
detailedSteps.zh: 预冷冻存液重悬，密度 1–5 × 10⁶ cells/mL

detailedSteps.en: Aliquot 1 mL per cryovial. Label: cell line, passage number, date, initials
detailedSteps.zh: 每管分装 1 mL。标记：细胞系、代次、日期、姓名缩写

detailedSteps.en: Place cryovials in Mr. Frosty (or CoolCell) at -80°C overnight. Provides -1°C/min cooling rate
detailedSteps.zh: 将冻存管放入 Mr. Frosty（或 CoolCell）-80°C 过夜。提供 -1°C/min 降温速率

detailedSteps.en: Transfer to liquid nitrogen within 24–48h for long-term storage. Record location in cell inventory
detailedSteps.zh: 24–48h 内转入液氮长期保存。在细胞库记录中登记位置

briefSteps.en: Trypsinize → count → centrifuge → resuspend in freezing medium → aliquot to cryovials → Mr. Frosty -80°C overnight → transfer to liquid nitrogen
briefSteps.zh: 消化 → 计数 → 离心 → 冻存液重悬 → 分装至冻存管 → Mr. Frosty -80°C 过夜 → 转液氮

name: Cell Passaging (Subculture)

components.name: 3. PBS 洗涤 1–2 次 (去除血清)
4. 加胰酶-EDTA (0.05–0.25%)
components.note: T75: 2–3 mL; 均匀覆盖底面

components.name: 5. 37°C 孵育 2–5 min
components.note: 轻拍瓶壁, 镜下确认脱落

components.name: 6. 加含血清培养基终止消化
7. 吹打混匀成单细胞悬液
8. 按比例接种到新瓶
components.note: 常用传代比: 1:3–1:10; 记录代数

components.name: 9. 补足培养基, 标记, 放入培养箱

notes.en: Over-confluence causes contact inhibition and phenotypic changes. Some cell lines are trypsin-sensitive (e.g., HEK293) — use Accutase or TrypLE instead. Suspension cells: dilute directly. Track passage number — characteristics may change after 20-30 passages. Freeze backup samples at each passage. Use Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺-free PBS.
notes.zh: 过度汇合会导致接触抑制和表型变化。部分细胞系对胰酶敏感（如 HEK293），用 Accutase 或 TrypLE 代替。悬浮细胞直接稀释传代。记录传代数——超过 20–30 代后细胞特性可能改变。每次传代预留样品冻存。用不含 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ 的 PBS。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th Ed, Ch. 13; ATCC Cell Culture Guide

usage.en: Subculture adherent mammalian cells by trypsinization and re-plating.
usage.zh: 通过胰酶消化传代贴壁哺乳动物细胞。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 20–30 minutes，实操: 20 minutes

note.en: Pre-warmed to 37°C; for sensitive cells use TrypLE or Accutase
note.zh: 预热至 37°C；敏感细胞用 TrypLE 或 Accutase

note.en: DMEM/RPMI + 10% FBS + 1% Pen/Strep, appropriate for cell line
note.zh: DMEM/RPMI + 10% FBS + 1% 青链霉素，适合细胞系

note.en: T-25 or T-75, tissue culture-treated
note.zh: T-25 或 T-75，细胞培养级

detailedSteps.en: **Check confluence**: Examine cells under microscope. Passage when cells reach 70–90% confluence (varies by cell line). ⚠️ Do not let cells become 100% confluent — contact inhibition alters phenotype
detailedSteps.zh: **检查汇合度**: 显微镜观察细胞。细胞达到 70–90% 汇合度时传代（因细胞系而异）。⚠️ 不要让细胞长至 100% 汇合——接触抑制会改变表型

detailedSteps.en: **Warm reagents**: Pre-warm PBS, trypsin-EDTA (0.05% or 0.25%), and complete medium to 37°C in water bath
detailedSteps.zh: **预热试剂**: 将 PBS、胰酶-EDTA（0.05% 或 0.25%）和完全培养基在 37°C 水浴中预热

detailedSteps.en: **Aspirate medium**: Remove spent culture medium by aspiration. Tilt flask and aspirate from the side opposite to cells
detailedSteps.zh: **吸除培养基**: 吸弃旧培养基。倾斜培养瓶，从无细胞一侧吸取

detailedSteps.en: **PBS wash**: Gently add 5 mL (T-25) or 10 mL (T-75) Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺-free PBS. Rock gently to wash away residual serum (which inhibits trypsin). Aspirate PBS
detailedSteps.zh: **PBS 洗涤**: 轻柔加入 5 mL (T-25) 或 10 mL (T-75) 不含 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ 的 PBS。轻摇洗去残余血清（血清会抑制胰酶）。吸去 PBS

detailedSteps.en: **Trypsinize**: Add 1 mL (T-25) or 2 mL (T-75) of 0.05% trypsin-EDTA. Tilt to cover entire surface. Incubate 2–5 min at 37°C. Check under microscope — cells should round up and detach. ⚠️ Do not over-trypsinize — damages membrane proteins
detailedSteps.zh: **胰酶消化**: 加入 1 mL (T-25) 或 2 mL (T-75) 0.05% 胰酶-EDTA。倾斜使其覆盖整个表面。37°C 孵育 2–5 min。镜下观察——细胞应变圆并脱落。⚠️ 不可过度消化——会损伤膜蛋白

detailedSteps.en: **Neutralize**: Add 3–5× volume of complete medium (contains 10% FBS to inactivate trypsin). Pipet up/down gently to dissociate clumps into single cells
detailedSteps.zh: **中和**: 加入 3–5 倍体积的完全培养基（含 10% FBS 灭活胰酶）。轻柔吹打使团块解散为单细胞

detailedSteps.en: **Centrifuge**: Transfer cell suspension to a 15 mL tube. Centrifuge 300×g, 5 min, RT
detailedSteps.zh: **离心**: 将细胞悬液转移至 15 mL 离心管。300×g 离心 5 min，室温

detailedSteps.en: **Resuspend**: Aspirate supernatant. Resuspend pellet in fresh complete medium. Count cells if needed (see hemocytometer protocol)
detailedSteps.zh: **重悬**: 吸去上清。用新鲜完全培养基重悬沉淀。如需计数（参见血球计数板方案）

detailedSteps.en: **Seed**: Seed into new flasks at desired split ratio (typically 1:3 to 1:10). Add fresh complete medium to final volume: 5 mL (T-25), 15 mL (T-75). Record passage number
detailedSteps.zh: **接种**: 按所需传代比（通常 1:3 至 1:10）接种至新培养瓶。加新鲜完全培养基至终体积：5 mL (T-25)、15 mL (T-75)。记录传代次数

detailedSteps.en: **Incubate**: Place in 37°C, 5% CO₂ humidified incubator. Check cell attachment after 4–6 h. Change medium next day if excessive debris is present
detailedSteps.zh: **培养**: 放入 37°C, 5% CO₂ 湿化培养箱。4–6 h 后检查细胞贴壁情况。如残留碎片较多，次日换液

briefSteps.en: Aspirate medium → PBS wash → trypsinize → neutralize → centrifuge → reseed at desired ratio
briefSteps.zh: 吸去培养基 → PBS 洗涤 → 胰酶消化 → 中和 → 离心 → 按所需比例重新接种

name: Cell Thawing (Recovery)

components.name: 4. 转移至 9 mL 预热培养基
components.note: 逐滴加入, 缓冲 DMSO 浓度变化

components.name: 5. 离心 200×g, 5 min (推荐) 或直接铺板
components.note: 大多数细胞系建议离心去 DMSO; 极脆弱细胞可跳过直接铺板

components.name: 6. 弃上清, 新鲜完全培养基重悬, 接种培养瓶
8. 次日换液去除残余 DMSO 和死细胞碎片
9. 恢复 1–2 代后开始实验

notes.en: Quick-thaw to recover frozen cells. Key is speed — DMSO is cytotoxic at 37°C. Most cell lines: centrifuge to remove DMSO. Very fragile cells (e.g., primary neurons): dilute directly without centrifugation. Check viability >90% after recovery. Allow 1–2 passages before experiments.
notes.zh: 关键是速度——DMSO 在 37°C 对细胞有毒。解冻至剩小冰晶即可。大多数细胞系建议离心去 DMSO；极脆弱细胞（如原代神经元）可直接稀释铺板。恢复后确认活力 >90%。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells; ATCC Cell Thawing Protocol

usage.en: Recover cryopreserved mammalian cells from liquid nitrogen storage.
usage.zh: 从液氮中复苏冻存的哺乳动物细胞。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 20 minutes，实操: 20 minutes

note.en: Pre-warmed medium
note.zh: 预热培养基

detailedSteps.en: Pre-warm complete medium to 37°C. Prepare flask with 9 mL medium
detailedSteps.zh: 预热完全培养基至 37°C。培养瓶中加 9 mL 培养基

detailedSteps.en: Retrieve cryovial from liquid nitrogen. Transport on dry ice
detailedSteps.zh: 从液氮中取出冻存管。干冰运输

detailedSteps.en: Thaw rapidly in 37°C water bath with gentle agitation. **Stop when a small ice crystal remains** (~1–2 min). Do not submerge cap
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C 水浴快速解冻，轻柔晃动。**留小冰晶时即停止**（约 1–2 min）。勿没过管盖

detailedSteps.en: Immediately transfer thawed cells to flask with 9 mL warm medium (dilutes DMSO 1:10)
detailedSteps.zh: 立即将解冻细胞转入含 9 mL 温热培养基的培养瓶（稀释 DMSO 1:10）

detailedSteps.en: Gently rock flask to mix. Do NOT centrifuge — some cell types are fragile post-thaw
detailedSteps.zh: 轻柔摇匀。不要离心——某些细胞解冻后很脆弱

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C, 5% CO₂ 培养

detailedSteps.en: After 6–8h (or next morning), check attachment. Replace medium to remove residual DMSO and dead cells
detailedSteps.zh: 6–8h 后（或次日早上）检查贴壁情况。换液去除残余 DMSO 和死细胞

detailedSteps.en: Allow cells to recover 1–2 passages before starting experiments. Confirm viability >90%
detailedSteps.zh: 恢复 1–2 代后开始实验。确认活力 >90%

briefSteps.en: Pre-warm medium → thaw in 37°C water bath → transfer to flask with medium → incubate → change medium after 6–8h → recover 1–2 passages
briefSteps.zh: 预热培养基 → 37°C 水浴解冻 → 转移至含培养基的培养瓶 → 培养 → 6–8h 后换液 → 恢复 1–2 代

name: ChIP Protocol (Chromatin IP)

components.name: 1. 交联: 1% 甲醛 10 min RT
3. 冷 PBS 洗 2×, 收细胞
5. 超声 (200–500 bp 片段)
components.note: Bioruptor: 30s on/30s off, 15–25 cycles, high; 探针超声: 10s pulse × 10, 30% amplitude; 需对每种细胞系优化

components.name: 8. 加抗体 + Protein A/G beads 4°C 过夜
11. 解交联: 65°C 过夜 + Proteinase K

notes.en: Optimize sonication conditions for each cell line. Positive control: H3 antibody; negative: IgG. Recommend ≥1×10⁶ cells. Express results as % Input or Fold Enrichment.
notes.zh: 超声条件需针对不同细胞系优化。阳性对照: H3 抗体；阴性对照: IgG。建议每次至少 1×10⁶ 细胞。结果用 % Input 或 Fold Enrichment 表示。

ref: Nelson et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:179–185; Collas (2010) Mol Biotechnol 45:87–100; Haring et al. (2007) Plant Methods 3:11

usage.en: Chromatin immunoprecipitation to study protein-DNA interactions at specific genomic loci.
usage.zh: 染色质免疫沉淀，研究特定基因组位点的蛋白-DNA 相互作用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3 days，实操: 8 hours

note.en: Methanol-free preferred
note.zh: 优选无甲醇型

note.en: Quench crosslinking
note.zh: 终止交联反应

note.en: Dynabeads or equivalent
note.zh: Dynabeads 或同类产品

note.en: 20 mg/mL stock
note.zh: 20 mg/mL 母液

note.en: 10 mg/mL
note.zh: 10 mg/mL

note.en: Lysate can be stored at -80°C
note.zh: 裂解液可 -80°C 保存

note.en: Sheared chromatin can be stored at -80°C for weeks
note.zh: 剪切后染色质可 -80°C 保存数周

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Crosslinking & Sonication**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 交联与超声**

detailedSteps.en: **Crosslink**: Add 37% formaldehyde directly to culture media to 1% final (270 µL per 10 mL media). Rock 10 min RT
detailedSteps.zh: **交联**: 向培养基中直接加入 37% 甲醛至终浓度 1%（每 10 mL 培养基加 270 µL）。室温摇 10 min

detailedSteps.en: **Quench**: Add 2.5 M glycine to 125 mM final. Rock 5 min RT
detailedSteps.zh: **终止**: 加 2.5 M 甘氨酸至终浓度 125 mM。室温摇 5 min

detailedSteps.en: Wash 2× cold PBS. Scrape cells in PBS + protease inhibitors. Pellet 800×g 5 min 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: 冷 PBS 洗 2 次。PBS + 蛋白酶抑制剂中刮下细胞。4°C 800×g 离心 5 min

detailedSteps.en: **Lysis**: Resuspend pellet in SDS Lysis Buffer (200 µL per 1×10⁶ cells). Incubate ice 10 min
detailedSteps.zh: **裂解**: 用 SDS Lysis Buffer 重悬沉淀（每 1×10⁶ 细胞 200 µL）。冰上 10 min

detailedSteps.en: **Sonication**: Shear chromatin to 200–500 bp. ⚠️ Must optimize! (e.g., Bioruptor: 30s on/30s off, 15–25 cycles)
detailedSteps.zh: **超声**: 将染色质剪切至 200–500 bp。⚠️ 必须优化条件！（如 Bioruptor: 30s 开/30s 关，15–25 个循环）

detailedSteps.en: 💡 Check shearing: take 10 µL aliquot, reverse crosslink (65°C + Proteinase K), run on 1.5% agarose gel
detailedSteps.zh: 💡 检查剪切效果：取 10 µL，解交联（65°C + Proteinase K），跑 1.5% 琼脂糖凝胶

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge 14,000×g, 10 min, 4°C. Transfer supernatant (= sheared chromatin)
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 14,000×g 离心 10 min。取上清（= 剪切后染色质）

detailedSteps.en: **Dilute**: Add 9 volumes ChIP Dilution Buffer (reduces SDS from 1% to 0.1%)
detailedSteps.zh: **稀释**: 加 9 倍体积 ChIP Dilution Buffer（将 SDS 从 1% 降至 0.1%）

detailedSteps.en: **Save Input**: Remove 1–10% as "Input" control → store at -20°C
detailedSteps.zh: **留 Input**: 取 1–10% 作为 Input 对照 → -20°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1–2 — Immunoprecipitation**
detailedSteps.zh: **第 1–2 天 — 免疫沉淀**

detailedSteps.en: **Pre-clear** (optional): Add 20 µL protein A/G beads, rotate 1 h at 4°C. Remove beads
detailedSteps.zh: **预清除**（可选）：加 20 µL protein A/G 磁珠，4°C 旋转 1 h。去除磁珠

detailedSteps.en: Add antibody (2–5 µg) + 30 µL protein A/G beads. Rotate overnight at 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: 加抗体（2–5 µg）+ 30 µL protein A/G 磁珠。4°C 旋转过夜

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2–3 — Washes & Elution**
detailedSteps.zh: **第 2–3 天 — 洗涤与洗脱**

detailedSteps.en: Wash sequentially (each 3–5 min, 4°C, rotation): Low-salt → High-salt → LiCl wash → 2× TE buffer
detailedSteps.zh: 依次洗涤（每次 3–5 min, 4°C 旋转）：低盐 → 高盐 → LiCl 洗 → 2× TE 缓冲液

detailedSteps.en: **Elute**: Add 250 µL elution buffer (1% SDS + 0.1 M NaHCO₃), vortex 15 min RT. Repeat. Pool eluates (500 µL total)
detailedSteps.zh: **洗脱**: 加 250 µL 洗脱液（1% SDS + 0.1 M NaHCO₃），室温涡旋 15 min。重复一次。合并洗脱液（共 500 µL）

detailedSteps.en: **Reverse crosslink**: Add NaCl to 200 mM final. Incubate 65°C overnight (or 65°C 4h). Also reverse-crosslink Input
detailedSteps.zh: **解交联**: 加 NaCl 至终浓度 200 mM。65°C 过夜（或 65°C 4h）。Input 同时解交联

detailedSteps.en: Add Proteinase K (20 µg/mL), 45°C, 1 h. Add RNase A, 37°C, 30 min
detailedSteps.zh: 加 Proteinase K（20 µg/mL），45°C 1 h。加 RNase A，37°C 30 min

detailedSteps.en: **Purify DNA**: Phenol-chloroform extraction or column purification (MinElute). Elute in 30 µL TE
detailedSteps.zh: **纯化 DNA**: 酚-氯仿抽提或柱纯化（MinElute）。30 µL TE 洗脱

detailedSteps.en: **Analysis**: qPCR (% Input method) or library prep for ChIP-seq
detailedSteps.zh: **分析**: qPCR（% Input 法）或建库做 ChIP-seq

briefSteps.en: Crosslink → lyse → sonicate → IP with antibody+beads → wash → elute → reverse crosslink → purify DNA → qPCR/seq
briefSteps.zh: 交联 → 裂解 → 超声 → 抗体+磁珠 IP → 洗涤 → 洗脱 → 解交联 → 纯化 DNA → qPCR/测序

name: Circulating Tumor Cell (CTC) Detection by PCR
nameCn: 循环肿瘤细胞 (CTC) PCR 检测方案

components.name: Step 1 (Blood collection): Harvest 100 µL cheek blood into 1.5 mL tube containing 4 µL EDTA solution.
Step 2 (RBC lysis): Add 400 µL 1× RBC lysis, RT 5 min. Add 700 µL DMEM to stop. Centrifuge 10,000 rcf 2 min. Remove supernatant.
Step 3 (DNA extraction): Adjust to 220 µL with PBS. Add 4 µL proteinase K + 200 µL Buffer AL. Vortex. Incubate 56°C 10 min (dry bath preferred over oven).
Step 4: Add 200 µL ethanol (96-100%). Mix by pipetting. Transfer to DNeasy spin column. Centrifuge ≥6000 g 1 min.
Step 5: Wash with 500 µL Buffer AW1 (spin 1 min), then 500 µL Buffer AW2 (spin 1 min). Dry spin 20,000 g 3 min.
Step 6: Transfer column to new tube. Air-dry 5 min. Elute with 35 µL Buffer AE (incubate 5 min RT, spin 1 min). Measure concentration on Nanodrop.
Step 7 (PCR): 2.5 µL 10× buffer + 0.5 µL dNTPs + 0.5 µL each primer (100 µM, 4× diluted) + 2.5 µL Q buffer + 15.5 µL H₂O + 1 µL Taq + 2 µL DNA = 25 µL total.
Step 8 (Cycling): 94°C 5 min → 12 cycles (94°C 45 s, 64→58°C touchdown -0.5°C/cycle 45 s, 72°C 60 s) → 35 cycles (94°C 45 s, 58°C 45 s, 72°C 60 s) → 72°C 10 min → 4°C hold.

note.en: Adjust 35 cycles to 30-45 based on DNA concentration.
note.zh: 根据 DNA 浓度调整 35 个循环为 30-45 个。

components.name: Step 9 (Gel): 2.5% agarose gel, 150 V for 30 min. Load 18 µL (3 µL 6× loading buffer + 8 µL sample + 7 µL H₂O) + 6 µL ladder.

note.en: Expected bands: Flox Pten ~1000 bp, wildtype ~814 bp, Cre'd-out ~210 bp.
note.zh: 预期条带：Flox Pten ~1000 bp, 野生型 ~814 bp, Cre 切除 ~210 bp。

notes.en: Touchdown PCR reduces non-specific amplification. The 210 bp Cre'd-out Pten band indicates presence of CTCs carrying the tumor-specific deletion. Cycle number (30-45) should be adjusted based on DNA yield from Nanodrop.
notes.zh: Touchdown PCR 降低非特异性扩增。210 bp Cre 切除 Pten 条带表明存在携带肿瘤特异性缺失的 CTC。循环数（30-45）根据 Nanodrop DNA 产量调整。

ref: Internal genotyping protocol (2024); QIAGEN DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit handbook

usage.en: Detects circulating tumor cells in mouse blood by PCR targeting Cre-excised (floxed) Pten allele. Distinguishes Flox Pten (~1000 bp), wildtype (~814 bp), and Cre'd-out (~210 bp) alleles.
usage.zh: 通过 PCR 检测小鼠血液中循环肿瘤细胞，靶向 Cre 切除的 Pten 等位基因。区分 Flox Pten (~1000 bp)、野生型 (~814 bp) 和 Cre 切除 (~210 bp)。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 2 hours

name: Clonogenic (Colony Formation) Assay

components.name: 1. Seed 200-1000 cells/well (6-well)
components.note: 高 PE 细胞 (HeLa): 200 cells; 低 PE 细胞: 500–1000; 先做预实验确定最佳密度

notes.en: Plating efficiency = colonies/cells × 100%. Surviving fraction = PE(treated)/PE(control). Triplicate.
notes.zh: 接种效率 = 克隆数/细胞数 × 100%。存活分数 = PE(处理)/PE(对照)。三重复。

ref: Franken et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:2315

usage.en: Measure the ability of single cells to form colonies (clonogenic survival assay).
usage.zh: 检测单个细胞形成克隆的能力（克隆形成实验）。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–3 weeks，实操: 2 hours

note.en: Tissue culture-treated
note.zh: 细胞培养级

note.en: Appropriate for cell line
note.zh: 适合细胞系

note.en: 0.5% in 25% methanol
For fixation
note.zh: 用于固定

note.en: Cells attach overnight before treatment
note.zh: 细胞过夜贴壁后再处理

note.en: Fixed and stained plates can be stored dry at RT indefinitely
note.zh: 固定染色后的板可室温干燥保存

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Seeding**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 接种**

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare single-cell suspension**: Trypsinize cells, count, and dilute to low density. Seed 200–2,000 cells per well in 6-well plates (optimize for each cell line — start with 500 cells/well). Add 2 mL complete medium per well
detailedSteps.zh: **准备单细胞悬液**: 胰酶消化细胞，计数后稀释至低密度。每孔接种 200–2,000 个细胞于 6 孔板（根据细胞系优化——初次可用 500 细胞/孔）。每孔加 2 mL 完全培养基

detailedSteps.en: **Allow attachment**: Incubate 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 4–6 h (or overnight) to allow cells to attach
detailedSteps.zh: **贴壁**: 37°C, 5% CO₂ 培养 4–6 h（或过夜）使细胞贴壁

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Treatment**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 处理**

detailedSteps.en: **Treat**: Add drug at desired concentrations (or irradiate for radiation survival curves). Include untreated control wells. For drugs: replace medium with drug-containing medium. Leave drug on for specified time (continuous or pulse treatment)
detailedSteps.zh: **处理**: 加入所需浓度药物（或照射用于放射存活曲线）。设置未处理对照孔。药物处理：换含药培养基。按需连续处理或脉冲处理

detailedSteps.en: **Days 2–14 — Colony Growth**
detailedSteps.zh: **第 2–14 天 — 克隆生长**

detailedSteps.en: **Culture**: Incubate for 10–14 days (until colonies are visible to naked eye, ~50 cells per colony). Replace medium every 3–4 days. ⚠️ Handle plates gently — do not disturb forming colonies
detailedSteps.zh: **培养**: 培养 10–14 天（直到肉眼可见克隆，每克隆约 50 个细胞）。每 3–4 天换液。⚠️ 轻拿轻放——不要扰动正在形成的克隆

detailedSteps.en: **Day 14+ — Fix and Stain**
detailedSteps.zh: **第 14 天+ — 固定和染色**

detailedSteps.en: **Remove medium**: Aspirate culture medium carefully. Wash once gently with PBS
detailedSteps.zh: **去除培养基**: 小心吸去培养基。用 PBS 轻柔洗涤一次

detailedSteps.en: **Fix**: Add 1 mL methanol (or 4% PFA) per well. Fix for 15 min at RT
detailedSteps.zh: **固定**: 每孔加 1 mL 甲醇（或 4% PFA）。室温固定 15 min

detailedSteps.en: **Stain**: Remove fixative. Add 1 mL 0.5% crystal violet in 25% methanol. Stain for 15–30 min at RT
detailedSteps.zh: **染色**: 去除固定液。加 1 mL 0.5% 结晶紫（溶于 25% 甲醇中）。室温染色 15–30 min

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Remove stain. Wash plates gently under running tap water until background is clear. Air dry inverted on paper towels
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 去除染液。在流水下轻柔冲洗至背景干净。倒扣在纸巾上晾干

detailedSteps.en: **Count colonies**: Count colonies with >50 cells (manually or using ImageJ/OpenCFU software). Calculate plating efficiency: PE = (colonies counted / cells seeded) × 100%. Surviving fraction: SF = PE_treated / PE_control
detailedSteps.zh: **计数克隆**: 计数含 >50 个细胞的克隆（手动或用 ImageJ/OpenCFU 软件）。计算接种效率：PE = (克隆数 / 接种细胞数) × 100%。存活分数：SF = PE_处理 / PE_对照

briefSteps.en: Seed cells at low density → treat → incubate 10–14 days → fix with methanol → stain with crystal violet → count colonies
briefSteps.zh: 低密度接种细胞 → 处理 → 培养 10–14 天 → 甲醇固定 → 结晶紫染色 → 计数克隆

name: Co-IP Protocol

components.name: 1. 裂解 (IP Lysis Buffer, 冰上 30 min)
4. 预清除: Protein A/G beads 1 h 4°C
5. 加目标抗体 (1–5 µg) 4°C 过夜
8. 加 2× Loading Buffer 煮沸洗脱
9. WB 检测 bait + prey 蛋白

notes.en: Negative control: matched isotype IgG. Do not use RIPA (SDS disrupts protein interactions). Adjust NP-40 concentration to interaction strength (0.1–1%). Recommend ≥500 µg total protein.
notes.zh: 阴性对照: 同种属 IgG。勿用 RIPA (SDS 会破坏互作)。裂解液中 NP-40 浓度根据互作强度调整 (0.1–1%)。建议每样 500 µg–2 mg 蛋白。

ref: Miernyk & Thelen (2008) Plant J 55:415–425; Kaboord & Bhatt (2008) Methods Mol Biol 424:349–364

usage.en: Co-immunoprecipitate interacting proteins to study protein-protein interactions.
usage.zh: 免疫共沉淀检测蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 4 hours

note.en: Magnetic preferred
note.zh: 推荐磁珠

note.en: 1–5 µg per IP
note.zh: 每次 IP 1–5 µg

note.en: Same species, negative control
note.zh: 同种属，阴性对照

note.en: Lysate can be stored at -80°C
note.zh: 裂解液可 -80°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Lysis**: Wash cells 1× cold PBS. Add IP Lysis Buffer (500 µL per 10-cm dish). ⚠️ Do NOT use RIPA — SDS disrupts interactions!
detailedSteps.zh: **裂解**: 冷 PBS 洗 1 次。加 IP Lysis Buffer（10 cm 皿每皿 500 µL）。⚠️ 不要用 RIPA——SDS 会破坏蛋白互作！

detailedSteps.en: Incubate on ice 30 min with occasional vortexing. Centrifuge 14,000×g, 15 min, 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: 冰上裂解 30 min，偶尔涡旋。4°C 14,000×g 离心 15 min

detailedSteps.en: **Quantify**: BCA assay. Use 500 µg – 2 mg total protein per IP. Save 5–10% as Input
detailedSteps.zh: **定量**: BCA 法。每次 IP 用 500 µg – 2 mg 总蛋白。留 5–10% 做 Input

detailedSteps.en: **Pre-clear**: Add 20 µL protein A/G beads, rotate 1 h at 4°C. Remove beads (reduces non-specific binding)
detailedSteps.zh: **预清除**: 加 20 µL protein A/G 磁珠，4°C 旋转 1 h。去除磁珠（减少非特异结合）

detailedSteps.en: **IP**: Add 1–5 µg target antibody. In parallel, set up IgG control with same amount of normal IgG. Rotate overnight 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: **IP**: 加 1–5 µg 目标抗体。同时设 IgG 对照（同量正常 IgG）。4°C 旋转过夜

detailedSteps.en: Add 30–50 µL protein A/G beads. Rotate 2–4 h at 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: 加 30–50 µL protein A/G 磁珠。4°C 旋转 2–4 h

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: 4–6× with cold IP Lysis Buffer. Each wash: add 500 µL, rotate 5 min 4°C, pellet beads
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 冷 IP Lysis Buffer 洗 4–6 次。每次：加 500 µL，4°C 旋转 5 min，收集磁珠

detailedSteps.en: 💡 For weak interactions: reduce washes to 3× and use gentler buffer (0.1% NP-40)
detailedSteps.zh: 💡 弱相互作用：减少洗涤至 3 次，使用更温和的缓冲液（0.1% NP-40）

detailedSteps.en: **Elute**: Add 40 µL 2× Laemmli buffer to beads. Boil 95°C 5 min. Collect supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: **洗脱**: 向磁珠加 40 µL 2× Laemmli buffer。95°C 煮沸 5 min。收集上清

detailedSteps.en: **WB**: Load IP eluate, IgG control, and Input. Probe for both bait and prey proteins
detailedSteps.zh: **WB 检测**: 上样 IP 洗脱液、IgG 对照和 Input。分别检测 bait 和 prey 蛋白

briefSteps.en: Lyse (mild buffer) → quantify → pre-clear → add Ab overnight → beads → wash → elute → WB for bait+prey
briefSteps.zh: 温和裂解 → 定量 → 预清除 → 加抗体过夜 → 磁珠 → 洗涤 → 洗脱 → WB 检测 bait+prey

name: Colony PCR Protocol

components.name: 1. 挑取单克隆至 PCR 管 (牙签/枪头)

notes.en: Initial 5 min denaturation at 95°C lyses bacteria to release template DNA. Use M13 universal primers (for pUC vectors) or gene-specific primers. Positive clones should be sequence-verified. Streak colonies onto a master plate in parallel.
notes.zh: 初始变性 5 min 用于裂解菌体释放模板。引物可用 M13 通用引物 (pUC 系列) 或基因特异引物。阳性克隆应送测序验证。同时划线保存菌落至新 LB 平板。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed.; Bergkessel & Guthrie (2013) Methods Enzymol 529:141–149

usage.en: Screen bacterial colonies for correct insert by direct PCR without plasmid isolation.
usage.zh: 菌落 PCR 直接筛选含正确插入片段的克隆，无需提质粒。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3 hours，实操: 1 hour

note.en: Commercial (e.g., NEB, Takara)
note.zh: 商品化（如 NEB、Takara）

note.en: M13 or gene-specific
note.zh: M13 通用引物或基因特异引物

note.en: M13 or gene-specific
note.zh: M13 通用引物或基因特异引物

note.en: For backup streaks
note.zh: 用于备份划线

note.en: 4°C or −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C or −20°C (最长 1 week)

detailedSteps.en: Prepare PCR master mix in a 1.5 mL tube: 12.5 µL 2× Taq mix, 1 µL each primer (10 µM), 10.5 µL water per reaction. Make N+1 reactions
detailedSteps.zh: 在 1.5 mL 管中配 PCR 体系：12.5 µL 2× Taq mix，各 1 µL 引物（10 µM），10.5 µL 水/反应。配 N+1 个反应

detailedSteps.en: Aliquot 25 µL into each PCR tube. Label tubes to match colony numbers
detailedSteps.zh: 每管分装 25 µL，标记与菌落编号对应

detailedSteps.en: Using a sterile pipette tip or toothpick, touch a single colony lightly
detailedSteps.zh: 用无菌枪头或牙签轻触单个菌落

detailedSteps.en: Dip the tip into the PCR tube and swirl briefly to release cells
detailedSteps.zh: 将枪头在 PCR 管中轻轻搅动释放细菌

detailedSteps.en: (Recommended) Streak the same tip onto a fresh replica plate. Label to match
detailedSteps.zh: （推荐）用同一枪头在备份平板上划线，标记编号

detailedSteps.en: Incubate replica plate at 37°C while PCR runs
detailedSteps.zh: PCR 运行时将备份板 37°C 培养

detailedSteps.en: Include negative control (no colony) and positive control (known template) if available
detailedSteps.zh: 设阴性对照（无菌落）和阳性对照（已知模板，如有）

detailedSteps.en: Run PCR: 95°C 10 min (lyses cells) → (95°C 30s, 55°C 30s, 72°C 1 min/kb) × 30 → 72°C 5 min → hold 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: PCR 程序: 95°C 10 min (裂解细菌) → (95°C 30s, 55°C 30s, 72°C 1 min/kb) × 30 → 72°C 5 min → 4°C 保持

detailedSteps.en: Add 5 µL of 6× loading dye to each 25 µL reaction
detailedSteps.zh: 每管加 5 µL 6× loading dye

detailedSteps.en: Run on 1% agarose gel alongside DNA ladder. Image: positive clones show band at expected insert size
detailedSteps.zh: 1% 琼脂糖凝胶电泳，加 DNA ladder。成像：阳性克隆在预期插入片段大小处有条带

detailedSteps.en: Inoculate 2–3 positive clones from replica plate into LB + antibiotic overnight, miniprep, and sequence-verify
detailedSteps.zh: 从备份板挑 2–3 个阳性克隆，接种到 LB + 抗生素过夜培养，提质粒，送测序验证

briefSteps.en: Set up PCR mix (25 µL): master mix + primers + water → pick colony with tip → dip in PCR tube → streak on replica plate → PCR: 95°C 10 min → 30 cycles → agarose gel → sequence positives
briefSteps.zh: 配 PCR 体系 (25 µL): master mix + 引物 + 水 → 枪头挑菌落 → 蘸入 PCR 管 → 划线到备份板 → PCR: 95°C 10 min → 30 个循环 → 琼脂糖凝胶 → 阳性送测序

name: Comet Assay (Alkaline)

components.name: 1. Embed cells in 0.5% LMP agarose on slides

notes.en: Detects SSBs, DSBs, alkali-labile sites. All steps 4°C and dim light. Metrics: % tail DNA, tail moment. Positive control: H₂O₂ 100 µM 10 min.
notes.zh: 检测 SSB、DSB、碱不稳定位点。全程 4°C 避光。指标：尾部 DNA 百分比、尾矩。阳性对照：H₂O₂ 100 µM 10 min。

ref: Singh et al. (1988) Exp Cell Res 175:184

usage.en: Detect DNA damage at the single-cell level using single-cell gel electrophoresis (comet assay).
usage.zh: 单细胞凝胶电泳（彗星实验）检测单个细胞 DNA 损伤。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 5 hours

note.en: 1% in PBS for base layer
note.zh: PBS 配制 1%，用于基底层

note.en: 0.5–1% in PBS, melted and cooled to 37°C
note.zh: PBS 配制 0.5–1%，融化后冷却至 37°C

note.en: 2.5 M NaCl, 100 mM EDTA, 10 mM Tris pH 10, 1% Triton X-100, 10% DMSO (fresh)
note.zh: 2.5 M NaCl, 100 mM EDTA, 10 mM Tris pH 10, 1% Triton X-100, 10% DMSO（现配）

note.en: 300 mM NaOH, 1 mM EDTA, pH >13, 4°C
note.zh: 300 mM NaOH, 1 mM EDTA, pH >13, 4°C

note.en: 0.4 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5
note.zh: 0.4 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5

note.en: 1:10,000 dilution in TE buffer
note.zh: TE 缓冲液中 1:10,000 稀释

note.en: Pre-coated with NMP agarose
note.zh: 预包被普通琼脂糖

note.en: Slides in lysis buffer can be stored at 4°C for up to 1 week
note.zh: 裂解液中的玻片可在 4°C 保存至多 1 周

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Slide Preparation and Lysis**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 制片和裂解**

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare base layer**: Dip frosted-end slides in 1% normal melting point (NMP) agarose in PBS. Let set at RT to form a thin base layer. Prepare fresh or use pre-coated slides
detailedSteps.zh: **制备基底层**: 将磨砂端玻片浸入 1% 普通琼脂糖（PBS 配制）。室温凝固形成薄底层。可用新制或预包被玻片

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare cell suspension**: Harvest cells (1–2×10⁵/mL). ⚠️ Keep cells on ice and dim light throughout — UV light causes DNA damage artifacts. Include positive control (100 µM H₂O₂, 10 min on ice)
detailedSteps.zh: **准备细胞悬液**: 收集细胞（1–2×10⁵/mL）。⚠️ 全程冰上操作并避光——紫外线会造成假阳性 DNA 损伤。设阳性对照（100 µM H₂O₂，冰上 10 min）

detailedSteps.en: **Embed cells**: Mix 75 µL cell suspension with 75 µL 1% low melting point (LMP) agarose (pre-cooled to 37°C) in PBS. Quickly pipet 75 µL onto the base layer. Cover with coverslip. Let gel at 4°C for 10 min
detailedSteps.zh: **包埋细胞**: 取 75 µL 细胞悬液与 75 µL 1% 低熔点 (LMP) 琼脂糖（PBS 配制，预冷至 37°C）混合。迅速取 75 µL 滴到基底层上。盖上盖玻片。4°C 凝固 10 min

detailedSteps.en: **Remove coverslip**: Gently slide off the coverslip. Add a third layer of 75 µL 0.5% LMP agarose. Cover with coverslip. Gel at 4°C for 10 min
detailedSteps.zh: **去盖玻片**: 轻柔滑掉盖玻片。加第三层 75 µL 0.5% LMP 琼脂糖。盖上盖玻片。4°C 凝固 10 min

detailedSteps.en: **Lyse**: Remove coverslips. Immerse slides in cold lysis solution (2.5 M NaCl, 100 mM EDTA, 10 mM Tris, pH 10, 1% Triton X-100, 10% DMSO — add Triton and DMSO fresh). Lyse at 4°C for at least 1 h (overnight preferred)
detailedSteps.zh: **裂解**: 去除盖玻片。将玻片浸入预冷裂解液（2.5 M NaCl, 100 mM EDTA, 10 mM Tris, pH 10, 1% Triton X-100, 10% DMSO——Triton 和 DMSO 现用现加）。4°C 裂解至少 1 h（推荐过夜）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Electrophoresis and Staining**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 电泳和染色**

detailedSteps.en: **Alkaline unwinding**: Transfer slides to electrophoresis tank. Fill with cold alkaline buffer (300 mM NaOH, 1 mM EDTA, pH >13). Incubate 20–60 min at 4°C in the dark to allow DNA unwinding
detailedSteps.zh: **碱性解旋**: 将玻片转移至电泳槽。加满预冷碱性缓冲液（300 mM NaOH, 1 mM EDTA, pH >13）。4°C 避光孵育 20–60 min 使 DNA 解旋

detailedSteps.en: **Electrophoresis**: Run at 25 V (~0.7 V/cm), 300 mA for 20–30 min at 4°C. ⚠️ Maintain consistent voltage and time across experiments for comparable results
detailedSteps.zh: **电泳**: 4°C 下 25 V（约 0.7 V/cm），300 mA 运行 20–30 min。⚠️ 实验间保持电压和时间一致以确保结果可比

detailedSteps.en: **Neutralize**: Drain excess buffer. Gently flood slides with 0.4 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 for 5 min. Repeat 3×
detailedSteps.zh: **中和**: 沥干多余缓冲液。轻柔加 0.4 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 浸润 5 min。重复 3 次

detailedSteps.en: **Stain**: Apply 50 µL of 1× SYBR Gold (or SYBR Green I, ethidium bromide 20 µg/mL, or propidium iodide 2.5 µg/mL) per slide. Cover with coverslip
detailedSteps.zh: **染色**: 每片玻片加 50 µL 1× SYBR Gold（或 SYBR Green I，或溴化乙锭 20 µg/mL，或碘化丙啶 2.5 µg/mL）。盖上盖玻片

detailedSteps.en: **Image**: View under fluorescence microscope (SYBR Gold: Ex 495 nm / Em 537 nm). Image 50–100 comets per sample using CCD camera at 20× magnification
detailedSteps.zh: **拍照**: 荧光显微镜下观察（SYBR Gold: Ex 495 nm / Em 537 nm）。20× 物镜，每样品拍摄 50–100 个彗星

detailedSteps.en: **Analyze**: Use CometScore or OpenComet (ImageJ plugin) software. Report: % tail DNA, olive tail moment, tail length. Compare treated vs. control using appropriate statistics (e.g., Kruskal-Wallis test)
detailedSteps.zh: **分析**: 使用 CometScore 或 OpenComet（ImageJ 插件）软件。报告：尾部 DNA 百分比、Olive 尾矩、尾长。处理组与对照组用适当统计方法比较（如 Kruskal-Wallis 检验）

briefSteps.en: Embed cells in LMP agarose on slides → lyse overnight → alkaline unwinding → electrophoresis → neutralize → stain with SYBR Gold → image and analyze
briefSteps.zh: 将细胞包埋于低熔点琼脂糖 → 裂解过夜 → 碱性解旋 → 电泳 → 中和 → SYBR Gold 染色 → 拍照分析

name: Coomassie Brilliant Blue Staining (SDS-PAGE)

components.name: 1. 固定：50% 甲醇 / 10% 乙酸, 30 min
components.note: 轻柔摇晃, 防止凝胶变形

components.name: 3. 脱色 I：50% 甲醇 / 10% 乙酸, 30 min
4. 脱色 II：5% 甲醇 / 7% 乙酸
components.note: 换液 2–3 次直到背景清晰; 加纸巾吸附色素加速

notes.en: Sensitivity: ~100 ng protein/band. For higher sensitivity use Colloidal Coomassie (Neuhoff method, ~10 ng) or silver stain (~1 ng). CBB G-250 (Colloidal) requires no fixation and has lower background. Microwave shortcut: stain 30s MW → rock 5 min → destain 30s MW → rock 5 min, complete in ~15 min. Store gel in 7% acetic acid or dry.
notes.zh: 灵敏度：~100 ng 蛋白/条带。更灵敏可用 Colloidal Coomassie (Neuhoff 法, ~10 ng) 或银染 (~1 ng)。CBB G-250 (Colloidal) 不需固定步骤且背景更低。微波加速法：染色液微波 30 s → 摇 5 min → 脱色液微波 30 s → 摇 5 min，可在 15 min 内完成。凝胶可保存在 7% 乙酸中或干燥保存。

ref: Neuhoff et al. (1988) Electrophoresis 9:255; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

usage.en: Visualize protein bands in SDS-PAGE gels using Coomassie Brilliant Blue staining.
usage.zh: 考马斯亮蓝染色可视化 SDS-PAGE 胶中的蛋白条带。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 hours，实操: 45 minutes

note.en: 0.1% in 50% methanol, 10% acetic acid
50% methanol, 10% acetic acid
40% methanol, 10% acetic acid
ACS grade
note.zh: 分析纯

note.en: ACS grade
note.zh: 分析纯

note.en: Pre-cast or hand-cast
note.zh: 预制或自制

note.en: Gel in fixation solution can remain overnight at RT
note.zh: 凝胶可在固定液中室温放置过夜

note.en: Stained gel in 7% acetic acid stable at 4°C for weeks
note.zh: 染色凝胶在 7% 乙酸中 4°C 可保存数周

detailedSteps.en: **Run SDS-PAGE**: Run gel electrophoresis until dye front reaches bottom (typically 1–1.5 h at 120 V). Include pre-stained protein marker
detailedSteps.zh: **SDS-PAGE 电泳**: 电泳至溴酚蓝前沿到达底部（通常 120 V，1–1.5 h）。加预染蛋白 Marker

detailedSteps.en: **Disassemble**: Carefully remove gel from glass plates. Cut a corner for orientation. Transfer to a clean container (e.g., plastic dish)
detailedSteps.zh: **拆胶**: 小心将凝胶从玻璃板取出。切一角作为方向标记。转移至干净容器（如塑料培养皿）

detailedSteps.en: **Fix** (optional but recommended): Immerse gel in fixation solution (50% methanol, 10% acetic acid) for 30 min with gentle rocking. This prevents protein diffusion and gives sharper bands
detailedSteps.zh: **固定**（推荐）：将凝胶浸入固定液（50% 甲醇, 10% 乙酸）中，轻摇 30 min。可防止蛋白扩散，使条带更清晰

detailedSteps.en: **Stain**: Remove fixative. Add Coomassie staining solution (0.1% Coomassie Brilliant Blue R-250, 50% methanol, 10% acetic acid). Stain 1 h at RT with gentle agitation (or 30 s microwave + 5 min rocking for rapid protocol)
detailedSteps.zh: **染色**: 去除固定液。加考马斯染色液（0.1% 考马斯亮蓝 R-250, 50% 甲醇, 10% 乙酸）。室温轻摇染色 1 h（快速法：微波 30 s + 摇 5 min）

detailedSteps.en: **Destain**: Remove stain solution. Add destaining solution (40% methanol, 10% acetic acid). Change destaining solution every 30 min until background is clear and bands are visible. Include a piece of Kimwipe or sponge to absorb excess dye
detailedSteps.zh: **脱色**: 去除染色液。加脱色液（40% 甲醇, 10% 乙酸）。每 30 min 更换脱色液，直至背景透明、条带清晰。放一块 Kimwipe 或海绵吸附多余染料

detailedSteps.en: **Final wash**: Replace destaining solution with water or 7% acetic acid for storage. Bands may sharpen further overnight in water
detailedSteps.zh: **终洗**: 将脱色液换为水或 7% 乙酸保存。在水中过夜条带可能更清晰

detailedSteps.en: **Image**: Scan gel using white-light transilluminator or flatbed scanner. Save as TIFF for quantification
detailedSteps.zh: **拍照**: 用白光透射仪或平板扫描仪扫描凝胶。保存为 TIFF 格式用于定量分析

detailedSteps.en: **Storage**: Store gel in sealed bag with 7% acetic acid at 4°C, or dry between cellophane sheets using a gel dryer (80°C, 1–2 h under vacuum)
detailedSteps.zh: **保存**: 凝胶密封袋中加 7% 乙酸 4°C 保存，或用凝胶干燥仪在赛璐玢纸间干燥（80°C，真空 1–2 h）

briefSteps.en: Run SDS-PAGE → fix gel → stain with Coomassie Blue → destain until bands visible → image
briefSteps.zh: SDS-PAGE 电泳 → 固定凝胶 → 考马斯亮蓝染色 → 脱色至条带可见 → 拍照

name: CRISPR sgRNA Cloning (pX459)

notes.en: pX459 (Addgene #62988) = Cas9 + puromycin. pLentiCRISPRv2 (#52961) for lentiviral. Include non-targeting control.
notes.zh: pX459 (Addgene #62988) = Cas9 + 嘌呤霉素。pLentiCRISPRv2 (#52961) 用于慢病毒。包含非靶向对照。

ref: Ran et al. (2013) Nat Protoc 8:2281

usage.en: Clone sgRNA oligos into CRISPR/Cas9 expression vectors for gene editing.
usage.zh: 将 sgRNA 寡核苷酸克隆到 CRISPR/Cas9 表达载体中进行基因编辑。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–5 days，实操: 4 hours

note.en: Addgene #62988 (SpCas9-2A-Puro)
note.zh: Addgene #62988 (SpCas9-2A-Puro)

note.en: NEB #R0539 or Thermo FD1014
note.zh: NEB #R0539 或 Thermo FD1014

note.en: NEB #M0202
note.zh: NEB #M0202

note.en: NEB #M0201
note.zh: NEB #M0201

note.en: Custom synthesized, desalted
note.zh: 定制合成，脱盐纯化

note.en: Or Stbl3 for lentiviral vectors
note.zh: 慢病毒载体用 Stbl3

note.en: 100 µg/mL ampicillin
note.zh: 100 µg/mL 氨苄青霉素

note.en: e.g., Qiagen #28704
note.zh: 如 Qiagen #28704

note.en: Gel-purified vector can be stored at -20°C
note.zh: 凝胶纯化载体可 -20°C 保存

note.en: Annealed oligos can be stored at -20°C for months
note.zh: 退火引物可 -20°C 保存数月

note.en: Miniprep DNA stable at -20°C
note.zh: 小提质粒 -20°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Oligo Design and Vector Digestion**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 引物设计和载体酶切**

detailedSteps.en: **Design sgRNA oligos**: Select 20 nt target sequence adjacent to PAM (NGG for SpCas9). Add BbsI overhangs: Forward: 5'-CACCG[20nt target]-3'; Reverse: 5'-AAAC[20nt reverse complement]C-3'. Order from oligo vendor
detailedSteps.zh: **设计 sgRNA 引物**: 选择 PAM（SpCas9 为 NGG）旁 20 nt 靶序列。加 BbsI 接头：正向：5'-CACCG[20nt 靶序列]-3'；反向：5'-AAAC[20nt 反向互补]C-3'。从引物公司订购

detailedSteps.en: **Digest vector**: Set up 30 µL reaction: 1 µg pX459 (or pLentiCRISPRv2) + 3 µL 10× CutSmart buffer + 1 µL BbsI (BpiI) + H₂O. Incubate 37°C, 1 h. Optional: add 1 µL CIP (alkaline phosphatase) for last 30 min to reduce background
detailedSteps.zh: **酶切载体**: 配制 30 µL 反应：1 µg pX459（或 pLentiCRISPRv2）+ 3 µL 10× CutSmart 缓冲液 + 1 µL BbsI (BpiI) + 水。37°C 孵育 1 h。可选：最后 30 min 加 1 µL CIP（碱性磷酸酶）降低背景

detailedSteps.en: **Gel purify vector**: Run digested vector on 1% agarose gel. Cut out the linearized vector band (~9 kb for pX459). Purify using gel extraction kit. Elute in 30 µL EB. Quantify by NanoDrop
detailedSteps.zh: **凝胶纯化载体**: 酶切产物跑 1% 琼脂糖胶。切下线性化载体条带（pX459 约 9 kb）。凝胶回收试剂盒纯化。30 µL EB 洗脱。NanoDrop 定量

detailedSteps.en: **Anneal oligos**: Mix 1 µL forward oligo (100 µM) + 1 µL reverse oligo (100 µM) + 1 µL 10× T4 Ligation Buffer + 0.5 µL T4 PNK + 6.5 µL H₂O. Program: 37°C 30 min → 95°C 5 min → ramp down to 25°C at 5°C/min
detailedSteps.zh: **退火引物**: 混合 1 µL 正向引物 (100 µM) + 1 µL 反向引物 (100 µM) + 1 µL 10× T4 连接缓冲液 + 0.5 µL T4 PNK + 6.5 µL 水。程序：37°C 30 min → 95°C 5 min → 以 5°C/min 降至 25°C

detailedSteps.en: **Dilute annealed oligos**: Dilute the annealed oligos 1:200 in nuclease-free H₂O (1 µL into 199 µL)
detailedSteps.zh: **稀释退火引物**: 将退火引物用无核酸酶水 1:200 稀释（1 µL 加入 199 µL）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1–2 — Ligation and Transformation**
detailedSteps.zh: **第 1–2 天 — 连接和转化**

detailedSteps.en: **Ligate**: Mix 50 ng digested vector + 1 µL diluted annealed oligos + 1 µL 10× T4 Ligation Buffer + 1 µL T4 DNA Ligase + H₂O to 10 µL. Incubate 16°C overnight (or RT 2 h for quick ligation). Include no-insert control
detailedSteps.zh: **连接**: 混合 50 ng 酶切载体 + 1 µL 稀释后退火引物 + 1 µL 10× T4 连接缓冲液 + 1 µL T4 DNA 连接酶 + 水补至 10 µL。16°C 过夜（或快速连接 RT 2 h）。设无 insert 对照

detailedSteps.en: **Transform**: Transform 2–5 µL ligation product into competent cells (DH5α or Stbl3 for lentiviral vectors). Heat-shock 42°C 45 s. Recover in SOC medium 37°C 1 h. Plate on LB + ampicillin (100 µg/mL). Incubate 37°C overnight
detailedSteps.zh: **转化**: 取 2–5 µL 连接产物转化感受态细胞（DH5α 或 Stbl3 用于慢病毒载体）。42°C 热激 45 s。SOC 培养基 37°C 复苏 1 h。涂 LB + 氨苄（100 µg/mL）平板。37°C 过夜培养

detailedSteps.en: **Day 3 — Screening**
detailedSteps.zh: **第三天 — 筛选**

detailedSteps.en: **Colony PCR**: Pick 4–8 colonies. Screen by colony PCR using U6 forward primer + sgRNA reverse oligo (expected band ~250 bp). Compare insert:no-insert colony ratio (should be >3:1)
detailedSteps.zh: **菌落 PCR**: 挑 4–8 个克隆。用 U6 正向引物 + sgRNA 反向引物做菌落 PCR（预期条带约 250 bp）。比较 insert:无 insert 克隆比（应 >3:1）

detailedSteps.en: **Miniprep**: Inoculate positive colonies into 3 mL LB + ampicillin. Grow overnight 37°C. Miniprep plasmid DNA next day
detailedSteps.zh: **质粒提取**: 将阳性克隆接种到 3 mL LB + 氨苄中。37°C 过夜培养。次日小提质粒 DNA

detailedSteps.en: **Sequence verify**: Send for Sanger sequencing using U6 primer. Confirm correct sgRNA insertion with no mutations. ⚠️ Do not proceed to transfection without sequence confirmation
detailedSteps.zh: **测序验证**: 用 U6 引物送 Sanger 测序。确认 sgRNA 正确插入且无突变。⚠️ 未经测序确认不要进行转染

briefSteps.en: Design sgRNA → anneal oligos → digest vector (BbsI) → ligate insert → transform → colony PCR → sequence verify
briefSteps.zh: 设计 sgRNA → 退火引物 → 酶切载体 (BbsI) → 连接 insert → 转化 → 菌落 PCR → 测序验证

name: CUT&RUN (Cleavage Under Targets and Release Using Nuclease)
nameCn: CUT&RUN 染色质靶向切割技术

components.name: 1. Harvest 5×10⁵–5×10⁶ cells (no crosslinking); pellet 600×g 3 min RT

note.en: Native conditions — no formaldehyde. Fresh or cryopreserved cells both OK. Low input possible (~5,000 cells).
note.zh: 天然条件——无需甲醛交联。新鲜或冻存细胞均可。最低 ~5,000 细胞。

components.name: 2. Wash 2× with Wash Buffer (20 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM spermidine, protease inhibitors)

note.en: 600×g 3 min RT. Keep cells at RT (not ice) at this stage.
note.zh: 600×g 3 min RT。此阶段保持 RT（非冰上）。

components.name: 3. Bind cells to ConA magnetic beads: 10 µL beads/5×10⁵ cells, RT 10 min, rotate

note.en: Bangs Labs BioMag ConA beads. Magnetically capture cells in subsequent steps.
note.zh: Bangs Labs BioMag ConA 磁珠。后续步骤磁性捕获细胞。

components.name: 4. Permeabilize: add 0.01% digitonin in Wash Buffer, 5 min RT

note.en: Digitonin permeabilizes plasma membrane; nuclear envelope stays intact (unlike NP-40 or Triton X-100).
note.zh: Digitonin 透化细胞膜，核膜保持完整（区别于 NP-40 / Triton X-100）。

components.name: 5. Primary antibody: 1 µg/rxn in Antibody Buffer (Wash + 0.01% digitonin + 2 mM EDTA), 4°C 2 h or overnight

note.en: EDTA prevents premature MNase cleavage. Use ChIP-grade validated Ab. Controls: IgG neg, H3K4me3 pos.
note.zh: EDTA 防止 MNase 提前切割。用 ChIP-grade 验证抗体。对照：IgG 阴性，H3K4me3 阳性。

components.name: 6. Wash 2× Dig-Wash (Wash + 0.01% digitonin); remove unbound Ab

note.en: Magnetic capture between washes.
note.zh: 磁性捕获后洗涤。

components.name: 7. Bind pA-MNase (700 ng/mL) in Dig-Wash, 4°C 1 h

note.en: For mouse primary Ab: use pA/G-MNase or bridge anti-mouse secondary.
note.zh: 小鼠一抗需用 pA/G-MNase 或桥接抗小鼠二抗。

components.name: 9. Activate MNase: add 2 mM CaCl₂, incubate 0°C ice-water bath 30 min

note.en: Ca²⁺ activates MNase → targeted DNA cleavage. 0°C is critical for controlled digestion. Longer = smaller fragments.
note.zh: Ca²⁺ 激活 MNase → 靶向 DNA 切割。0°C 是控制消化的关键。时间越长片段越小。

components.name: 10. Stop: add STOP Buffer (340 mM NaCl, 20 mM EDTA, 4 mM EGTA, 0.01% digitonin, RNase A 0.05 mg/mL, spike-in 25 pg/mL)

note.en: EDTA/EGTA chelates Ca²⁺. E. coli spike-in DNA for normalization (optional).
note.zh: EDTA/EGTA 螯合 Ca²⁺ 终止反应。E. coli spike-in DNA 用于标准化（可选）。

note.en: Cut fragments diffuse out of nuclei.
note.zh: 切割片段从核内扩散到上清。

note.en: Pellet = uncut chromatin.
note.zh: 沉淀 = 未切割染色质。

components.name: 13. DNA extraction: 0.1% SDS + Proteinase K 100 µg/mL, 50°C 1 h; SPRI beads or column cleanup

note.en: Elute in 20–50 µL TE or ddH₂O.
note.zh: 20–50 µL TE 或 ddH₂O 洗脱。

components.name: 14. Library prep for sequencing or qPCR validation

note.en: Bioanalyzer: expect mono/dinucleosome (150/300 bp). NEBNext Ultra II; 10–14 cycles PCR amplification.
note.zh: Bioanalyzer：预期单/双核小体模式（150/300 bp）。NEBNext Ultra II 建库；PCR 10–14 个循环。

notes.en: Advantages over ChIP: no crosslinking artifacts, very low background, works with ≥500 cells, no sonication. Key: 0.01% digitonin only (not Triton), MNase at 0°C. Validate new antibodies with known marks (H3K4me3, H3K27ac) first.
notes.zh: 相比 ChIP 优势：无交联伪影、极低背景、≥500 细胞即可、无需超声。关键：仅用 0.01% digitonin（非 Triton）；MNase 在 0°C 激活。新抗体先用已知修饰（H3K4me3、H3K27ac）验证。

ref: Skene & Henikoff (2017) eLife 6:e21856; Meers et al. (2019) eLife 8:e46314; Kaya-Okur et al. (2019) Nat Commun 10:1930

usage.en: Profile histone modifications and transcription factor binding using CUT&RUN (cleavage under targets and release using nuclease).
usage.zh: CUT&RUN 技术分析组蛋白修饰和转录因子结合谱。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 6 hours

note.en: Bangs Labs, BP531
note.zh: Bangs Labs, BP531

note.en: EpiCypher 15-1016 or homemade
note.zh: EpiCypher 15-1016或自制

note.en: Sigma S2626, store -20°C
note.zh: Sigma S2626，-20°C保存

note.en: EMD Millipore 300410
note.zh: EMD Millipore 300410

note.en: Roche cOmplete EDTA-free
note.zh: Roche cOmplete 无EDTA

note.en: Validated for CUT&RUN
note.zh: 经CUT&RUN验证

note.en: Same species as primary Ab
note.zh: 与一抗同种属

note.en: DNase-free
note.zh: 无DNase

note.en: E. coli DNA or yeast DNA for normalization
note.zh: 大肠杆菌或酵母DNA用于标准化

note.en: Molecular biology grade
note.zh: 分子生物学级

note.en: Zymo or Qiagen MinElute
note.zh: Zymo或Qiagen MinElute

note.en: After primary antibody binding, can store overnight at 4°C (standard protocol)
note.zh: 一抗结合后，可4°C过夜保存（标准方案）

note.en: Purified DNA can be stored at -20°C for weeks before library prep
note.zh: 纯化DNA可在-20°C保存数周后再建库

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Cell binding and antibody incubation**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 细胞结合和抗体孵育**

detailedSteps.en: **Activate ConA beads**: Wash 10 µL Concanavalin A-coated magnetic beads per sample with 1 mL Binding Buffer (20 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 10 mM KCl, 1 mM CaCl₂, 1 mM MnCl₂). Resuspend in 10 µL Binding Buffer.
detailedSteps.zh: **活化ConA磁珠**: 每个样品取10 µL刀豆蛋白A包被磁珠，用1 mL结合缓冲液（20 mM HEPES pH 7.5、10 mM KCl、1 mM CaCl₂、1 mM MnCl₂）洗涤。重悬于10 µL结合缓冲液中。

detailedSteps.en: **Bind cells**: Harvest 100,000–500,000 cells. Wash once with Wash Buffer (20 mM HEPES pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM spermidine, 1× protease inhibitors). Add cells to activated beads and rotate 10 min at RT.
detailedSteps.zh: **结合细胞**: 收获100,000-500,000个细胞。用洗涤缓冲液（20 mM HEPES pH 7.5、150 mM NaCl、0.5 mM亚精胺、1×蛋白酶抑制剂）洗涤一次。将细胞加入活化磁珠，室温旋转10分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Block and permeabilize**: Place tube on magnet, remove supernatant. Resuspend in 200 µL Antibody Buffer (Wash Buffer + 0.01% digitonin + 2 mM EDTA). Incubate 5 min at RT.
detailedSteps.zh: **封闭和透化**: 将管放在磁力架上，去除上清。重悬于200 µL抗体缓冲液（洗涤缓冲液 + 0.01%洋地黄皂苷 + 2 mM EDTA）中。室温孵育5分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Primary antibody**: Add primary antibody (1:50–1:100 dilution) in 200 µL Antibody Buffer. Include an IgG control. Incubate overnight at 4°C with gentle rotation.
detailedSteps.zh: **一抗孵育**: 在200 µL抗体缓冲液中加入一抗（1:50-1:100稀释）。设置IgG对照。4°C轻柔旋转过夜孵育。

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — pA-MNase digestion and DNA extraction**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — pA-MNase消化和DNA提取**

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Place on magnet, remove antibody solution. Wash 2× with 200 µL Dig-Wash Buffer (Wash Buffer + 0.01% digitonin).
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 放在磁力架上，去除抗体溶液。用200 µL Dig-Wash缓冲液（洗涤缓冲液 + 0.01%洋地黄皂苷）洗涤2次。

detailedSteps.en: **Add pA-MNase**: Resuspend beads in 200 µL Dig-Wash Buffer containing ~700 ng/mL pA-MNase (or pAG-MNase). Incubate 1 h at 4°C with rotation.
detailedSteps.zh: **加入pA-MNase**: 将磁珠重悬于含~700 ng/mL pA-MNase（或pAG-MNase）的200 µL Dig-Wash缓冲液中。4°C旋转孵育1小时。

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Remove unbound pA-MNase by washing 2× with 200 µL Dig-Wash Buffer.
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 用200 µL Dig-Wash缓冲液洗涤2次，去除未结合的pA-MNase。

detailedSteps.en: **Activate MNase**: Resuspend in 150 µL Dig-Wash Buffer. Add CaCl₂ to 2 mM final. Incubate exactly 30 min at 0°C (ice-water bath). ⚠️ Temperature and time are critical — over-digestion increases background.
detailedSteps.zh: **激活MNase**: 重悬于150 µL Dig-Wash缓冲液中。加入CaCl₂至终浓度2 mM。在0°C（冰水浴）中精确孵育30分钟。⚠️ 温度和时间至关重要——过度消化会增加背景。

detailedSteps.en: **Stop and release**: Add 150 µL 2× STOP Buffer (340 mM NaCl, 20 mM EDTA, 4 mM EGTA, 0.02% digitonin, 50 µg/mL RNase A, 50 pg/mL spike-in DNA). Incubate 30 min at 37°C to release CUT&RUN fragments.
detailedSteps.zh: **终止和释放**: 加入150 µL 2× STOP缓冲液（340 mM NaCl、20 mM EDTA、4 mM EGTA、0.02%洋地黄皂苷、50 µg/mL RNase A、50 pg/mL spike-in DNA）。37°C孵育30分钟释放CUT&RUN片段。

detailedSteps.en: **Collect fragments**: Place on magnet 5 min. Transfer supernatant containing released DNA fragments to a new tube.
detailedSteps.zh: **收集片段**: 放在磁力架上5分钟。将含有释放DNA片段的上清转移到新管中。

detailedSteps.en: **Extract DNA**: Add 1.5 µL 20% SDS (0.1% final) and 1.8 µL Proteinase K (20 mg/mL). Incubate 1 h at 50°C. Purify with phenol-chloroform extraction or spin columns. Elute in 30 µL 10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0.
detailedSteps.zh: **提取DNA**: 加入1.5 µL 20% SDS（终浓度0.1%）和1.8 µL蛋白酶K（20 mg/mL）。50°C孵育1小时。苯酚-氯仿提取或旋转柱纯化。用30 µL 10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0洗脱。

detailedSteps.en: **QC**: Run 2 µL on an Agilent Bioanalyzer or TapeStation. Expect a subnucleosomal peak (~150 bp for histone marks) or larger fragments for transcription factors. Quantify by Qubit.
detailedSteps.zh: **质控**: 取2 µL在Agilent Bioanalyzer或TapeStation上分析。组蛋白修饰应出现亚核小体峰（~150 bp），转录因子为较大片段。用Qubit定量。

briefSteps.en: Bind cells to ConA beads → Incubate with primary antibody → Add pA-MNase → Activate MNase with Ca²⁺ → Release & collect fragments → Extract DNA → Library prep or qPCR
briefSteps.zh: 将细胞结合到ConA磁珠 → 孵育一抗 → 加入pA-MNase → Ca²⁺激活MNase → 释放并收集片段 → 提取DNA → 建库或qPCR

name: CyTOF Combined Surface & Intracellular Staining
nameCn: CyTOF 联合表面和胞内染色方案

components.name: Step 1 (Optional stimulation): Stimulate/treat 1×10⁶ cells per sample. To stop signaling: add 16% PFA 1:10 (100 µL/tube), 10 min RT. Spin 600 g 6 min 4°C. Wash 3× with wash buffer.

note.en: PFA fixation before surface staining may affect some antibody epitopes.
note.zh: 表面染色前 PFA 固定可能影响部分抗体表位。

components.name: Step 2 (Surface staining): Resuspend ≤1.5M cells in 35-40 µL staining buffer. Add Ab mix (10-15 µL, total 50 µL). Incubate 30-60 min RT.
Step 3: Wash 2-3× with 1.5 mL wash buffer. Vortex to mix.
Step 4 (Optional viability): Stain with 1:500 Rh103 in PBS for 20 min, OR 25 µM cisplatin for 1 min.
Step 5 (Fixation): Add 300-500 µL 1.6% PFA in PBS. Incubate 10 min (or 1 h) RT. Spin, discard supernatant (no wash needed).
Step 6 (Permeabilization): Leave ~100 µL on pellet, break up by vortexing. Add cold 100% methanol (0.9 mL per 10⁶ cells, final 90%). Incubate 10 min 4°C (prefer -20°C for 20 min).

note.en: Can store at -20°C up to 24 h, or -80°C up to 1 month.
note.zh: 可 -20°C 保存 24 h，-80°C 保存 1 个月。

components.name: Step 7: Wash 2-4× with >1 mL wash buffer.

note.en: BSA precipitates in methanol — add >1 mL buffer to dissolve.
note.zh: BSA 在甲醇中沉淀——加 >1 mL 缓冲液溶解。

components.name: Step 8 (Intracellular staining): Resuspend in 35-40 µL buffer + Ab mix (10-15 µL), total exactly 50 µL. Incubate 30-60 min RT with gentle agitation.
Step 10 (Ir-intercalator): Add 0.5 mL of 1:1000 Ir-intercalator in PBS + 1.6% PFA. Incubate ≥30 min RT (preferred: overnight at 4°C).
Step 11: Wash 2× with wash buffer. Wash 1× with MilliQ water (use 0.1% BSA in MilliQ if cells stick to plastic). Filter through 35 µm cap. Add EQ beads for acquisition.

notes.en: Staining concentrations matter especially for phospho-proteins. Ab bank mixes are designed for 50 µL final volume. Some cells stick to plastic in MilliQ water wash — add 0.1% BSA. For autosampler: resuspend in 50 µL MilliQ, add 50 µL EQ beads, transfer to 96-deep-well plate. Ideal: 0.5M cells per injection of 400 µL.
notes.zh: 染色浓度对磷酸化蛋白尤其重要。抗体库配方按 50 µL 终体积设计。某些细胞在 MilliQ 水洗涤时粘壁——加 0.1% BSA。自动进样：50 µL MilliQ 重悬 + 50 µL EQ beads。最佳：0.5M 细胞/400 µL。

ref: Adapted from Fluidigm CyTOF protocol (AH Mar 2012, DM Mar 2015)

usage.en: Combined surface and intracellular staining protocol for mass cytometry (CyTOF) with optional stimulation, methanol permeabilization, and Ir-intercalator DNA staining.
usage.zh: 质谱流式（CyTOF）联合表面和胞内染色方案，包含可选刺激、甲醇通透和 Ir-intercalator DNA 染色。

label.en: Protocol — 6-8 hours (or overnight with Ir-intercalator), hands-on: 3 hours
label.zh: 实验方案 — 6-8 hours (or overnight with Ir-intercalator)，实操: 3 hours

materials.name: Wash buffer: PBS + 0.5% BSA + 0.02% sodium azide

note.en: -20°C in methanol (up to Up to 24 hours)
note.zh: -20°C in methanol (最长 Up to 24 hours)

note.en: -80°C in methanol (up to Up to 1 month)
note.zh: -80°C in methanol (最长 Up to 1 month)

note.en: 4°C in Ir-intercalator/PFA (up to Up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C in Ir-intercalator/PFA (最长 Up to 1 week)

name: Density Gradient Centrifugation (Principles and Applications)
nameCn: 密度梯度离心（原理与应用指南）

components.name: 1. Choose gradient medium based on application

note.en: Sucrose: osmotic, inert, inexpensive. Use for organelles (ER, Golgi, lysosomes), viruses, ribosomes. Percoll (colloidal silica): iso-osmotic at all densities, low viscosity, self-forming. Use for cells, mitochondria, synaptosomes. Ficoll: high MW polymer, low osmolality. Use for PBMCs, leukocytes. Iodixanol (OptiPrep): iso-osmotic and iso-osmolal at all densities. Best for most organelles and EV sub-populations.
note.zh: 蔗糖：高渗透压，惰性，便宜。用于细胞器（ER、Golgi、溶酶体）、病毒、核糖体。Percoll（胶体二氧化硅）：所有密度等渗，低黏度，可自动成梯度。用于细胞、线粒体、突触体。Ficoll：高分子聚合物，低渗透压。用于 PBMC、白细胞。碘克沙醇（OptiPrep）：所有密度等渗等渗透压。最适合大多数细胞器和 EV 亚群。

components.name: 2. Gradient mode selection: rate-zonal (velocity) vs isopycnic (equilibrium)

note.en: Rate-zonal: short spin; particles separate by size + sedimentation coefficient (S). Best for: particles of similar density but different size (ribosomes, RNA). Isopycnic: long spin until equilibrium; particles band at their buoyant density. Best for: organelles, viruses, DNA/RNA.
note.zh: 速率区带（velocity）：短时间离心；按大小 + 沉降系数（S 值）分离。最适合：密度相似但大小不同的颗粒（核糖体、RNA）。等密度（isopycnic）：长时间离心至平衡；颗粒在其浮力密度处成带。最适合：细胞器、病毒、DNA/RNA。

note.en: Pipette denser solution first (bottom of tube), carefully layer less dense solution on top using slow pipetting against tube wall. Chill tube on ice between layers. Use ≥3 steps for good resolution. Typical: 4 layers in 11 mL SW-41 Ti tube.
note.zh: 先加最高密度溶液（管底），沿管壁缓慢加入较低密度溶液。加层间冰上冷却。≥3 层获得良好分辨率。典型：11 mL SW-41 Ti 管中 4 层。

note.en: Use gradient maker (two-chamber device). Pour high-density into mixing chamber, low-density into reservoir; pump into tube from bottom with peristaltic pump. Or: freeze-thaw a step gradient once at −80°C → thaw at 4°C generates linear gradient.
note.zh: 使用梯度仪（双腔装置）。高密度液加入混合腔，低密度液加入储液腔；蠕动泵从管底注入。或：将阶梯梯度 −80°C 冻 1 次 → 4°C 解冻自动形成线性梯度。

components.name: 5. Load sample (volume ≤10% of gradient volume) gently on top or bottom

note.en: Top loading: standard for rate-zonal. Bottom loading (injection): better for equilibrium banding (uses underlayer needle). Sample in same buffer as lightest gradient layer.
note.zh: 顶部上样：速率区带标准方式。底部注射：平衡成带效果更好（用针头在底部注入）。样品用最轻一层梯度相同的缓冲液配制。

components.name: 6. Centrifuge: use swing-bucket rotor (SW-41 Ti for 11 mL; SW-28 for 38 mL)

note.en: SW-41 Ti: 100,000×g (25,000 rpm) = RCF at tube bottom. For rate-zonal: 20,000–40,000×g 1–3 h. For isopycnic: 100,000×g 16–18 h. Always 4°C. No brake.

components.name: 7. Fractionate from top: use fractionator, syringe, or pipette

note.en: Automated: BioComp Gradient Station. Manual: pipette from top in 0.5–1 mL fractions. Alternative: needle puncture at tube bottom, collect drops. Number fractions sequentially from top (#1) to bottom (#n).
note.zh: 自动：BioComp Gradient Station。手动：从顶部吸取 0.5–1 mL 组分。替代：底部针穿刺，收集滴液。组分从顶部（#1）至底部（#n）顺序编号。

components.name: 8. Analyze fractions: assay-specific markers, measure density (refractometer), then assay activity or WB

note.en: Measure refractive index (RI) of each fraction to calculate density. Plot RI vs fraction number to confirm gradient profile. Then assay by WB, enzyme activity, or qPCR depending on application.
note.zh: 用折光仪测量各组分折射率（RI），计算密度。绘制 RI vs 组分编号图确认梯度分布。然后根据应用进行 WB、酶活力或 qPCR 分析。

notes.en: Density reference: nuclei 1.30–1.45, mitochondria 1.18, lysosomes 1.10–1.12, ER 1.14–1.17, Golgi 1.08–1.10, plasma membrane 1.06–1.10, cytoplasm 1.06, exosomes 1.10–1.18 (varies). Rotor k-factor: lower = more gentle separation. Iodixanol (OptiPrep 60% w/v) is currently preferred for most applications over sucrose due to iso-osmolality.
notes.zh: 密度参考：细胞核 1.30–1.45、线粒体 1.18、溶酶体 1.10–1.12、ER 1.14–1.17、Golgi 1.08–1.10、质膜 1.06–1.10、细胞质 1.06、外泌体 1.10–1.18（可变）。转子 k 因子越低 = 分离越温和。碘克沙醇（OptiPrep 60% w/v）因等渗透压特性，目前优先于蔗糖用于大多数实验。

ref: Graham (2001) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.6.1; Bhatt (2021) STAR Protoc 2:100450; Rickwood et al. (1994) Preparative Centrifugation (IRL Press); Griffiths (2018) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 78:3.1.1

usage.en: Separate cellular components or particles by density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: 密度梯度离心分离细胞组分或颗粒。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–20 hours，实操: 2–4 hours

materials.name: Sucrose, Percoll, or Ficoll gradient solutions
Sample (cell lysate, organelle suspension, or blood)
Gradient maker or manual layering pipettes

note.en: 4°C, do not disturb (up to 2 hours)
note.zh: 4°C, do not disturb (最长 2 hours)

note.en: 4°C or −80°C depending on application (up to varies)
note.zh: 4°C or −80°C depending on application (最长 varies)

name: DNA Ligation (T4 Ligase)

components.name: Linearized vector
components.note: 去磷酸化可降低自连背景

components.name: Insert DNA
components.note: 摩尔比 vector:insert = 1:3–1:5 (粘性末端) 或 1:5–1:10 (平末端)

components.name: 10× T4 Ligase Buffer
components.note: 含 ATP, 勿反复冻融

components.name: 2a. 粘性末端：室温 10 min 或 16°C 过夜
2b. 平末端：16°C 过夜（或室温 2 h 用高浓度酶）
4. 转化 2–5 µL 连接产物
