note.en: Polymer-based (EnVision+, Dako) preferred over biotin-streptavidin (less background). Species-matched.
note.zh: 聚合物法（EnVision+，Dako）优于生物素-链霉亲和素（更低背景）。种属匹配。

components.name: 10. DAB development: apply DAB + H₂O₂, 2–10 min RT; monitor under microscope; stop in ddH₂O

note.en: Brown = positive signal. Do not over-develop. Fresh DAB only.
note.zh: 棕色 = 阳性信号。勿过度显色。DAB 需新鲜配制。

components.name: 11. Counterstain: Hematoxylin 1–5 min → differentiate in acid-alcohol → blue in running water 5 min

note.en: Harris or Mayer's Hematoxylin. Blue in tap water or Scott's Water (2 g MgSO₄ + 0.2 g NaHCO₃/L).
note.zh: Harris 或 Mayer 苏木精。自来水返蓝或 Scott's 水（2 g MgSO₄ + 0.2 g NaHCO₃/L）。

note.en: Each 2–5 min. Avoid air bubbles. Cure 24 h before imaging.
note.zh: 每步 2–5 min。避免气泡。封片后 24 h 再镜检。

notes.en: Controls: (1) positive tissue; (2) isotype control replacing primary Ab; (3) H&E on sequential section. Scoring: H-score = intensity(0–3) × %positive. Quantitative: QuPath/HALO software. For multiplex: Opal tyramide system (TSA amplification).
notes.zh: 对照：(1) 阳性组织；(2) 同型对照替代一抗；(3) 相邻切片 H&E。评分：H-score = 强度(0–3) × 阳性率。定量：QuPath/HALO 图像分析。多重免疫组化：Opal tyramide 系统（TSA 信号放大）。

ref: Ramos-Vara & Miller (2014) Vet Pathol 51:42–87; Taylor & Rudbeck (2013) Dako Education Guide; Shi et al. (1991) J Histochem Cytochem 39:741

usage.en: Detect protein expression in paraffin-embedded tissue sections using immunohistochemistry.
usage.zh: 免疫组化检测石蜡包埋组织切片中的蛋白表达。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 4 hours

materials.name: FFPE tissue sections on charged slides

note.en: 4–5 µm sections on Superfrost Plus slides
note.zh: 4-5 µm切片，Superfrost Plus载玻片

note.en: Histology grade
note.zh: 组织学级

note.en: For dehydration/rehydration
note.zh: 用于脱水/复水

note.en: For heat-induced antigen retrieval
note.zh: 用于热诱导抗原修复

note.en: Prepare fresh
note.zh: 新鲜配制

note.en: From same species as secondary Ab
note.zh: 与二抗同源种属

note.en: IHC-validated, with datasheet dilution
note.zh: IHC验证，按说明书稀释

note.en: Match host species of primary Ab
note.zh: 匹配一抗宿主种属

note.en: Vector Labs SK-4100 or equivalent
note.zh: Vector Labs SK-4100或同等品

note.en: For nuclear counterstain
note.zh: 用于核复染

note.en: Permanent, xylene-based
note.zh: 永久封片，二甲苯基

note.en: After primary Ab incubation overnight at 4°C is the standard protocol (not an extra stop)
note.zh: 一抗4°C过夜孵育是标准步骤（非额外暂停点）

note.en: Mounted slides can be stored at RT indefinitely
note.zh: 封片后的载玻片可室温无限期保存

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Deparaffinization to primary antibody**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 脱蜡至一抗孵育**

detailedSteps.en: **Deparaffinize**: Bake slides at 60°C for 30 min. Immerse in xylene 3 × 5 min. Rehydrate through graded ethanol: 100% (2 × 3 min), 95% (2 × 3 min), 70% (1 × 3 min), then distilled water 2 × 3 min.
detailedSteps.zh: **脱蜡**: 60°C烘烤切片30分钟。浸入二甲苯3 × 5分钟。梯度乙醇复水：100%（2 × 3分钟）、95%（2 × 3分钟）、70%（1 × 3分钟），然后蒸馏水2 × 3分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Antigen retrieval**: Heat-induced: Submerge in 10 mM sodium citrate buffer pH 6.0 (or EDTA pH 9.0 depending on antibody). Microwave until boiling, then maintain at sub-boiling for 10 min. Cool 20 min at RT. ⚠️ Do not let slides dry at any point.
detailedSteps.zh: **抗原修复**: 热诱导修复：浸入10 mM柠檬酸钠缓冲液pH 6.0（或EDTA pH 9.0，取决于抗体）。微波加热至沸腾，然后维持亚沸腾10分钟。室温冷却20分钟。⚠️ 切片在任何时候都不能干燥。

detailedSteps.en: **Block endogenous peroxidase**: Incubate in 3% H₂O₂ in methanol for 10 min at RT. Wash 3 × 5 min in PBS.
detailedSteps.zh: **封闭内源性过氧化物酶**: 在3% H₂O₂甲醇溶液中室温孵育10分钟。PBS洗涤3 × 5分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Block non-specific binding**: Apply blocking solution (5% normal serum from the species of the secondary Ab + 1% BSA in PBS) for 1 h at RT in a humidified chamber.
detailedSteps.zh: **封闭非特异性结合**: 在湿盒中加入封闭液（5%二抗来源种属的正常血清 + 1% BSA的PBS溶液）室温孵育1小时。

detailedSteps.en: **Primary antibody**: Dilute primary Ab in antibody diluent (1% BSA in PBS or commercial diluent). Apply to sections. Incubate overnight at 4°C in humidified chamber. Include negative control (isotype IgG at same concentration).
detailedSteps.zh: **一抗**: 用抗体稀释液（1% BSA的PBS溶液或商品化稀释液）稀释一抗。加于切片上。4°C湿盒中过夜孵育。设置阴性对照（相同浓度的同型IgG）。

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Detection and mounting**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 检测和封片**

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Remove primary Ab. Wash 3 × 5 min in PBS + 0.1% Tween-20 (PBST).
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 去除一抗。用PBS + 0.1% Tween-20（PBST）洗涤3 × 5分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Secondary antibody**: Apply biotinylated or HRP-conjugated secondary Ab (1:200–1:500 in 1% BSA/PBS). Incubate 30–60 min at RT.
detailedSteps.zh: **二抗**: 加入生物素化或HRP偶联二抗（1:200-1:500，1% BSA/PBS稀释）。室温孵育30-60分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Signal amplification (if using biotin)**: Wash 3 × 5 min PBST. Apply streptavidin-HRP (ABC kit, per manufacturer) for 30 min at RT.
detailedSteps.zh: **信号放大（如使用生物素）**: PBST洗涤3 × 5分钟。加入链霉亲和素-HRP（ABC试剂盒，按厂家说明）室温孵育30分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Chromogen detection**: Wash 3 × 5 min PBST. Apply DAB substrate (prepare fresh per kit instructions). Monitor color development under microscope (30 s – 5 min). ⚠️ Stop reaction immediately by immersing in distilled water when desired intensity is reached.
detailedSteps.zh: **显色检测**: PBST洗涤3 × 5分钟。加入DAB底物（按试剂盒说明新鲜配制）。显微镜下观察显色（30秒-5分钟）。⚠️ 达到所需强度时立即浸入蒸馏水终止反应。

detailedSteps.en: **Counterstain**: Immerse in Mayer's hematoxylin for 1–2 min. Rinse in running tap water 5 min. Dip in 0.1% sodium bicarbonate (bluing) briefly. Rinse.
detailedSteps.zh: **复染**: 浸入Mayer's苏木精1-2分钟。流水冲洗5分钟。短暂浸入0.1%碳酸氢钠（返蓝）。冲洗。

detailedSteps.en: **Dehydrate and mount**: Dehydrate through graded ethanol (70%, 95%, 100% × 2, each 2 min), clear in xylene 2 × 3 min. Mount with permanent mounting medium (e.g., DPX or Permount). Air dry.
detailedSteps.zh: **脱水和封片**: 梯度乙醇脱水（70%、95%、100% × 2，每次2分钟），二甲苯透明2 × 3分钟。用永久封片介质（如DPX或Permount）封片。晾干。

detailedSteps.en: **Image**: Examine under brightfield microscope. DAB = brown positive staining; hematoxylin = blue nuclear counterstain. Capture images at consistent exposure settings.
detailedSteps.zh: **成像**: 在明场显微镜下检查。DAB = 棕色阳性染色；苏木精 = 蓝色核复染。在一致的曝光设置下采集图像。

briefSteps.en: Deparaffinize → Antigen retrieval → Block → Primary Ab overnight → Secondary Ab → DAB/chromogen → Counterstain → Mount → Image
briefSteps.zh: 脱蜡 → 抗原修复 → 封闭 → 一抗过夜 → 二抗 → DAB/显色 → 复染 → 封片 → 成像

name: Immunoprecipitation (IP)

components.name: 1. 裂解细胞 (IP Lysis Buffer + protease inhibitors)
components.note: 冰上 30 min, 间歇涡旋

components.name: 3. 定量 → 取 500 µg–1 mg 总蛋白
4. 预清除 (Protein A/G beads, 4°C, 1 h)
components.note: 去除非特异结合; 可选

components.name: 6. 加抗体 (1–5 µg) → 4°C 旋转孵育 2–4 h 或过夜
7. 加 Protein A/G beads (20–40 µL) → 4°C 旋转 1–2 h
8. 洗涤 3–5 次 (Lysis Buffer, 4°C)
components.note: 每次 1 mL, 旋转 5 min, 磁力架吸附

components.name: 9. 洗脱: 2× SDS Loading Buffer, 95°C 5 min
10. Western Blot 检测
components.note: IP 样品 + Input + IgG 对照

notes.en: Controls: (1) Normal IgG (same species) negative control; (2) Input positive control. For Co-IP: use mild lysis buffer (avoid SDS). Ab light/heavy chain interference in WB: use Clean-Blot IP Detection Reagent or crosslink Ab to beads. Magnetic beads have lower background than agarose. Endogenous IP is more physiologically relevant than overexpression IP.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) Normal IgG (同种属) 阴性对照; (2) Input 阳性对照。共免疫沉淀 (Co-IP)：使用温和裂解液（避免 SDS）。抗体轻链/重链干扰 WB 检测：用 Clean-Blot IP Detection Reagent 或交联抗体到 beads。磁珠比琼脂糖珠背景更低。内源性 IP 比 overexpression IP 更有生理意义。

ref: Harlow & Lane (1988) Antibodies: A Laboratory Manual; Cell Signaling Technology IP Protocol

usage.en: Immunoprecipitate a target protein from cell lysates using antibody-bead capture.
usage.zh: 抗体-磁珠捕获法从细胞裂解液中免疫沉淀靶蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 4 hours

note.en: 100× stock, add fresh
note.zh: 100× 母液，现用现加

note.en: e.g. Dynabeads, Pierce
note.zh: 如 Dynabeads、Pierce

note.en: 1–5 µg per IP
note.zh: 每次 IP 1–5 µg

note.en: Species-matched isotype control
note.zh: 同种属同型对照

note.en: Clarified lysate can be snap-frozen and stored at −80°C
note.zh: 澄清裂解液可速冻后 −80°C 保存

note.en: Antibody-lysate can incubate overnight at 4°C (standard practice)
note.zh: 抗体-裂解液 4°C 过夜孵育（标准操作）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Cell Lysis & Antibody Binding**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 细胞裂解与抗体结合**

detailedSteps.en: **Cell lysis**: Wash cells 1× with ice-cold PBS. Add 500–1000 µL IP Lysis Buffer (+ 1× protease inhibitors + 1× phosphatase inhibitors if studying phosphoproteins). Incubate on ice 30 min, vortex briefly every 10 min
detailedSteps.zh: **细胞裂解**: 用冰冷 PBS 洗 1 次。加 500–1000 µL IP 裂解缓冲液（+ 1× 蛋白酶抑制剂 + 1× 磷酸酶抑制剂（若研究磷酸化蛋白））。冰上 30 min，每 10 min 短暂涡旋

detailedSteps.en: **Clarify lysate**: Centrifuge 16,000×g, 15 min, 4°C. Transfer supernatant to a new pre-chilled tube. Measure protein concentration by BCA/Bradford
detailedSteps.zh: **澄清裂解液**: 16,000×g, 4°C 离心 15 min。上清转入预冷新管。BCA/Bradford 测蛋白浓度

detailedSteps.en: **Save input**: Remove 5–10% of lysate (50 µg) as input control. Add 1× Laemmli buffer, boil 5 min, store at −20°C
detailedSteps.zh: **留取input**: 取 5–10% 裂解液（50 µg）作为 input 对照。加 1× Laemmli 缓冲液，煮沸 5 min，−20°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Pre-clear (optional)**: Add 20 µL Protein A/G agarose to remaining lysate (500 µg–2 mg). Rotate 4°C, 30 min. Spin 2,500×g, 2 min. Transfer supernatant to new tube
detailedSteps.zh: **预清除（可选）**: 向剩余裂解液（500 µg–2 mg）中加 20 µL Protein A/G 琼脂糖珠。4°C 旋转 30 min。2,500×g 离心 2 min。上清转入新管

detailedSteps.en: **Add antibody**: Add 1–5 µg target antibody (or species-matched IgG control to a parallel tube). Rotate 4°C overnight (or 2 h minimum)
detailedSteps.zh: **加抗体**: 加 1–5 µg 目标抗体（另设一管加同种属 IgG 对照）。4°C 旋转过夜（最少 2 h）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Capture, Wash & Elution**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 捕获、洗涤与洗脱**

detailedSteps.en: **Capture**: Add 30–50 µL pre-washed Protein A/G magnetic beads (or agarose). Rotate 4°C, 1–2 h
detailedSteps.zh: **捕获**: 加 30–50 µL 预洗 Protein A/G 磁珠（或琼脂糖珠）。4°C 旋转 1–2 h

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Place on magnet (or spin 2,500×g, 1 min). Remove supernatant. Wash 3–5× with 1 mL ice-cold IP Lysis Buffer. ⚠️ For stringent wash, use RIPA for the last wash
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 上磁力架（或 2,500×g 离心 1 min），去上清。用 1 mL 冰冷 IP 裂解缓冲液洗 3–5 次。⚠️ 最后一次可用 RIPA 严格洗涤

detailedSteps.en: **Final wash**: Wash 1× with ice-cold PBS to remove detergent
detailedSteps.zh: **最终洗涤**: 用冰冷 PBS 洗 1 次以去除去垢剂

detailedSteps.en: **Elute**: Add 40–60 µL 2× Laemmli buffer. Boil 95°C, 5 min (or 70°C, 10 min to reduce IgG heavy chain dissociation). Collect eluate on magnet/by spinning
detailedSteps.zh: **洗脱**: 加 40–60 µL 2× Laemmli 缓冲液。95°C 煮沸 5 min（或 70°C 10 min 以减少 IgG 重链解离）。磁力架/离心收集洗脱液

detailedSteps.en: **Western blot**: Load IP eluate, IgG control, and input on SDS-PAGE. Proceed with standard WB protocol
detailedSteps.zh: **Western blot**: 上样 IP 洗脱液、IgG 对照和 input。按标准 WB 流程进行

briefSteps.en: Lyse cells → pre-clear → incubate with antibody → capture on beads → wash → elute → analyze by WB
briefSteps.zh: 裂解细胞 → 预清除 → 抗体孵育 → 磁珠/琼脂糖珠捕获 → 洗涤 → 洗脱 → WB分析

name: Inclusion Body Solubilization and Protein Refolding
nameCn: 包涵体溶解与蛋白复性

components.name: 1. Isolate inclusion bodies: lyse cells, wash pellet 3× with wash buffer

note.en: Lyse in lysis_buffer_mild + 1% Triton X-100. Sonicate 3× 30 s on ice. Centrifuge 15,000×g 15 min 4°C. Keep pellet. Wash pellet 3× with wash buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 0.5% Triton X-100) then 1× without Triton. Pellet = purified inclusion bodies.
note.zh: lysis_buffer_mild + 1% Triton X-100 裂解。冰上超声 3× 30 s。15,000×g 15 min 4°C。保留沉淀。洗涤缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、0.5% Triton X-100）洗 3 次，再无 Triton 洗 1 次。沉淀 = 纯化的包涵体。

components.name: 2. Solubilize: resuspend inclusion body pellet in denaturing buffer

note.en: Denaturing buffer: 6 M GuHCl (or 8 M urea), 50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 100 mM NaCl, 10 mM β-ME (or 5 mM DTT). Resuspend at 5–20 mg/mL. Stir/rotate at RT 1–2 h until completely dissolved (solution clears).
note.zh: 变性缓冲液：6 M 盐酸胍（或 8 M 尿素）、50 mM Tris pH 8.0、100 mM NaCl、10 mM β-ME（或 5 mM DTT）。5–20 mg/mL 重悬。RT 搅拌 1–2 h 至完全溶解（溶液变透明）。

note.en: Remove insoluble debris. Supernatant = denatured soluble protein. Check purity by SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: 去除不溶性碎片。上清 = 变性可溶蛋白。SDS-PAGE 检测纯度。

components.name: 4. Optional: Ni-NTA purification under denaturing conditions

note.en: Bind buffer: 6 M GuHCl, 50 mM NaH₂PO₄ pH 8.0, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM imidazole. Wash: same + 20 mM imidazole. Elute: same + 250 mM imidazole. Pool eluted fractions.
note.zh: 结合缓冲液：6 M GuHCl、50 mM NaH₂PO₄ pH 8.0、300 mM NaCl、10 mM imidazole。洗涤：同上 + 20 mM imidazole。洗脱：同上 + 250 mM imidazole。合并洗脱组分。

note.en: Dilute protein dropwise into 50–100× volume ice-cold refolding buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 150 mM NaCl, 0.5 mM oxidized glutathione, 5 mM reduced glutathione, 10% glycerol) with constant stirring. Final protein: 0.01–0.1 mg/mL. Stir 4°C, 12–24 h.
note.zh: 蛋白逐滴加入 50–100 倍体积的冰冷复性缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0、150 mM NaCl、0.5 mM 氧化型谷胱甘肽、5 mM 还原型谷胱甘肽、10% 甘油），持续搅拌。终浓度 0.01–0.1 mg/mL。4°C 搅拌 12–24 h。

components.name: 6. Refolding Method B: Stepwise dialysis (higher yield)

note.en: Dialyze denatured protein against decreasing denaturant: 4 M → 2 M → 1 M → 0.5 M → 0 M urea in refolding buffer. Each step: 4°C, ≥4 h (or overnight). Slow removal of denaturant allows gradual refolding. protein_dialysis tubing or Slide-A-Lyzer.
note.zh: 变性蛋白对梯度去变性剂透析：4 M → 2 M → 1 M → 0.5 M → 0 M 尿素复性缓冲液。每步：4°C，≥4 h（或过夜）。缓慢去除变性剂促进逐步复性。protein_dialysis 透析袋或 Slide-A-Lyzer。

components.name: 7. Remove aggregates: centrifuge 20,000×g 30 min 4°C; filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Aggregated/misfolded protein pellets. Supernatant = soluble refolded protein. SEC (sec_purification) can separate properly folded monomers from misfolded aggregates.
note.zh: 聚集/错误折叠蛋白在沉淀中。上清 = 可溶复性蛋白。SEC（sec_purification）可分离正确折叠单体和错误折叠聚集体。

components.name: 8. Concentrate and verify activity: Amicon Ultra, then functional assay

note.en: protein_concentration_amicon. Verify folding: SEC (single peak), CD spectroscopy, thermal shift assay (DSF), enzyme activity assay. Typical refolding yield: 5–30% of total denatured protein.
note.zh: protein_concentration_amicon 浓缩。验证折叠：SEC（单峰）、CD 光谱、热迁移分析（DSF）、酶活力测定。典型复性产率：变性蛋白总量的 5–30%。

notes.en: Key factors affecting refolding: (1) Protein concentration during refolding (lower = better, ≤0.1 mg/mL); (2) Redox pair (GSH:GSSG 5:0.5 mM for disulfide-containing proteins); (3) Temperature (4°C preferred); (4) Additives: L-arginine (0.4–0.8 M) dramatically reduces aggregation (Tsumoto et al. 2004). Screen conditions with small-scale (1 mL) refolding trials before scale-up.
notes.zh: 影响复性的关键因素：(1) 复性时蛋白浓度（越低越好，≤0.1 mg/mL）；(2) 氧化还原对（含二硫键蛋白用 GSH:GSSG 5:0.5 mM）；(3) 温度（首选 4°C）；(4) 添加剂：L-精氨酸（0.4–0.8 M）显著减少聚集（Tsumoto et al. 2004）。大规模复性前先做小规模（1 mL）条件筛选。

ref: Singh & Bhatt (2015) Microb Cell Fact 14:41; Tsumoto et al. (2004) Biotechnol Prog 20:1301; Clark (2001) Curr Opin Biotechnol 12:202–207

usage.en: Solubilize and refold proteins from bacterial inclusion bodies using denaturant dilution or dialysis.
usage.zh: 变性剂稀释或透析法溶解和复性细菌包涵体蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 days，实操: 6 hours

materials.name: Solubilization buffer (6–8 M urea or guanidine HCl)

note.en: −80°C in denaturant (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C in denaturant (最长 1 month)

note.en: 4°C or −80°C with glycerol (up to varies)
note.zh: 4°C or −80°C with glycerol (最长 varies)

name: Ion Exchange Chromatography (IEX)

components.name: 1. Choose ion exchange type based on protein pI

note.en: Anion exchange (Q/DEAE): protein pI < buffer pH → protein (−) binds to resin (+). Cation exchange (SP/CM): protein pI > buffer pH → protein (+) binds to resin (−). For unknown pI: run at two pH values.
note.zh: 阴离子交换（Q/DEAE）：蛋白 pI < 缓冲液 pH → 蛋白带负电结合正电树脂。阳离子交换（SP/CM）：蛋白 pI > 缓冲液 pH → 蛋白带正电结合负电树脂。pI 未知时：在两个 pH 条件下试运行。

components.name: 2. Prepare sample: dialyze into low-salt IEX buffer; centrifuge 20,000×g 20 min; filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Anion: 20 mM Tris pH 8.0. Cation: 20 mM sodium acetate pH 5.5 or 20 mM MES pH 6.0. Conductivity <5 mS/cm for binding.
note.zh: 阴离子：20 mM Tris pH 8.0。阳离子：20 mM 醋酸钠 pH 5.5 或 20 mM MES pH 6.0。电导率 <5 mS/cm 以确保结合。

note.en: Flow rate: 1–2 mL/min (1 mL column) or 2–5 mL/min (5 mL column). Monitor A280 baseline stable.
note.zh: 流速：1–2 mL/min（1 mL 柱）或 2–5 mL/min（5 mL 柱）。监测 A280 基线稳定。

components.name: 4. Load sample: apply at 0.5–1 mL/min; collect flow-through for SDS-PAGE

note.en: Loading at ≤1 mL/min maximizes binding. Capacity: ~20 mg protein/mL resin (depends on charge/size).
note.zh: 上样流速 ≤1 mL/min 以最大化结合。容量：约 20 mg 蛋白/mL 树脂（取决于电荷/大小）。

components.name: 5. Wash: 5–10 CV binding buffer until A280 returns to baseline

note.en: Removes loosely bound contaminants.
note.zh: 去除弱结合的杂蛋白。

components.name: 6. Elute with linear gradient: 0–100% elution buffer over 20 CV

note.en: Elution buffer: binding buffer + 1 M NaCl. Gradient: 0→100% over 20 CV (e.g., 0→500 mM NaCl). Collect 1 mL fractions. Alternative: step gradient (0, 100, 250, 500 mM).
note.zh: 洗脱缓冲液：结合缓冲液 + 1 M NaCl。梯度：0→100% 20 CV（如 0→500 mM NaCl）。收集 1 mL 组分。也可阶梯梯度（0、100、250、500 mM）。

components.name: 7. Pool peak fractions; verify by SDS-PAGE

note.en: Pool symmetric peak. Asymmetric = multiple species.
note.zh: 合并对称峰。不对称 = 多种组分。

components.name: 8. Dialyze or desalting to remove salt for storage

note.en: dialysis_buffer_generic or HiTrap Desalting. Add 10% glycerol for storage.
note.zh: dialysis_buffer_generic 或 HiTrap Desalting 脱盐。加 10% 甘油保存。

notes.en: IEX is excellent for separating proteins by surface charge. Typically used after IMAC/GST (polishing step). Binding capacity: 10–40 mg/mL resin. Resolution depends on gradient length (longer = better). Run at 4°C for labile proteins. Buffer pH should be ≥1 pH unit away from protein pI for strong binding.
notes.zh: IEX 非常适合按表面电荷分离蛋白。通常在 IMAC/GST 后使用（精修步骤）。结合容量：10–40 mg/mL 树脂。分辨率取决于梯度长度（越长越好）。不稳定蛋白在 4°C 运行。缓冲液 pH 应距离蛋白 pI ≥1 个 pH 单位以确保强结合。

ref: GE Healthcare Ion Exchange Chromatography Manual; Shukla & Cramer (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 67:8.2.1

usage.en: Separate proteins by charge using anion or cation exchange chromatography.
usage.zh: 阴离子/阳离子交换层析按电荷分离蛋白质。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Q Sepharose or SP Sepharose resin

note.en: Strong anion/cation exchanger; HiTrap prepacked recommended
note.zh: 强阴离子/阳离子交换剂；推荐HiTrap预装柱

note.en: For anion exchange Buffer A
note.zh: 用于阴离子交换缓冲液A

note.en: For cation exchange Buffer A
note.zh: 用于阳离子交换缓冲液A

note.en: For elution gradient
note.zh: 用于洗脱梯度

note.en: For buffer and sample filtration
note.zh: 用于缓冲液和样品过滤

note.en: Or gravity flow for manual runs
note.zh: 或重力流用于手动操作

note.en: Amicon Ultra, appropriate MWCO
note.zh: Amicon Ultra，适当截留分子量

note.en: Sample in Buffer A can be stored at 4°C overnight
note.zh: 缓冲液A中的样品可4°C过夜保存

note.en: Pooled fractions can be stored at 4°C overnight before concentration
note.zh: 合并的组分可4°C过夜保存后再浓缩

detailedSteps.en: **Choose resin based on pI**: If protein pI < 7, use anion exchange (Q Sepharose) at pH 8.0 (protein is negative, binds). If pI > 7, use cation exchange (SP Sepharose) at pH 6.0 (protein is positive, binds). Buffer pH should be ≥1 unit from pI.
detailedSteps.zh: **根据pI选择树脂**: 若蛋白pI < 7，使用阴离子交换（Q Sepharose），pH 8.0（蛋白带负电，可结合）。若pI > 7，使用阳离子交换（SP Sepharose），pH 6.0（蛋白带正电，可结合）。缓冲液pH应与pI相差≥1个单位。

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare buffers**: Buffer A (binding): 20 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 (anion exchange) or 20 mM MES pH 6.0 (cation exchange), no salt. Buffer B (elution): Buffer A + 1 M NaCl. Filter (0.22 µm) and degas both buffers.
detailedSteps.zh: **制备缓冲液**: 缓冲液A（结合）：20 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0（阴离子交换）或20 mM MES pH 6.0（阳离子交换），无盐。缓冲液B（洗脱）：缓冲液A + 1 M NaCl。两种缓冲液均需0.22 µm过滤并脱气。

detailedSteps.en: **Equilibrate column**: Pack column or use pre-packed (e.g., HiTrap Q/SP, 1–5 mL). Wash with 5 column volumes (CV) Buffer B, then equilibrate with 10 CV Buffer A until pH and conductivity stabilize.
detailedSteps.zh: **平衡柱**: 装柱或使用预装柱（如HiTrap Q/SP，1-5 mL）。用5倍柱体积(CV)缓冲液B洗涤，然后用10 CV缓冲液A平衡直至pH和电导率稳定。

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare sample**: Dialyze or buffer-exchange protein sample into Buffer A (must be low ionic strength, <50 mM NaCl). Filter through 0.22 µm. ⚠️ High salt in sample will prevent binding.
detailedSteps.zh: **制备样品**: 将蛋白样品透析或缓冲液交换至缓冲液A（必须低离子强度，<50 mM NaCl）。0.22 µm过滤。⚠️ 样品中高盐会阻碍结合。

detailedSteps.en: **Load sample**: Apply protein at flow rate 0.5–1 mL/min (for 1 mL column). Collect flow-through for analysis. ⚠️ Do not exceed resin binding capacity (~20–40 mg/mL resin for strong exchangers).
detailedSteps.zh: **上样**: 以0.5-1 mL/min流速（1 mL柱）加载蛋白。收集流穿液用于分析。⚠️ 不要超过树脂结合容量（强交换剂~20-40 mg/mL树脂）。

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Wash with 10 CV Buffer A to remove unbound proteins. Monitor A280 until baseline returns.
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 用10 CV缓冲液A洗涤去除未结合蛋白。监测A280直至回到基线。

detailedSteps.en: **Elute — gradient**: Apply a linear gradient from 0% to 100% Buffer B over 20 CV (0–1 M NaCl). Collect 0.5–1 mL fractions. Monitor A280 and conductivity.
detailedSteps.zh: **洗脱——梯度**: 在20 CV内从0%至100%缓冲液B进行线性梯度洗脱（0-1 M NaCl）。收集0.5-1 mL组分。监测A280和电导率。

detailedSteps.en: **Identify target fractions**: Run peak fractions on SDS-PAGE. Pool fractions containing target protein at desired purity.
detailedSteps.zh: **鉴定目标组分**: 将峰值组分进行SDS-PAGE。合并含有目标蛋白且纯度达标的组分。

detailedSteps.en: **Concentrate if needed**: Use centrifugal concentrators (appropriate MWCO). Measure final protein concentration by Bradford or A280.
detailedSteps.zh: **必要时浓缩**: 使用离心浓缩管（适当MWCO）。用Bradford或A280测定最终蛋白浓度。

detailedSteps.en: **Column regeneration**: Wash with 5 CV 1 M NaCl, then 5 CV Buffer A. For storage, wash with 5 CV 20% ethanol. Store at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: **柱再生**: 用5 CV 1 M NaCl洗涤，然后5 CV缓冲液A。储存时用5 CV 20%乙醇洗涤。4°C保存。

briefSteps.en: Calculate protein pI → Choose resin (anion/cation) → Equilibrate column → Load sample → Wash → Gradient elute with NaCl → Collect fractions → SDS-PAGE analysis
briefSteps.zh: 计算蛋白pI → 选择树脂（阴离子/阳离子）→ 平衡柱 → 上样 → 洗涤 → NaCl梯度洗脱 → 收集组分 → SDS-PAGE分析

name: Lentiviral Functional Titer (Infectious Units/mL)
nameCn: 慢病毒功能性滴度测定（感染单位/mL）

components.name: 1. Day 0: Seed HEK293T or HeLa cells in 24-well plate

note.en: 1×10⁵ cells/well (HEK293T) or 0.5×10⁵ (HeLa). Cells should be 20–30% confluent at time of infection (exponential growth). Avoid antibiotics.
note.zh: HEK293T：每孔 1×10⁵；HeLa：0.5×10⁵。感染时细胞汇合度 20–30%（指数生长期）。不加抗生素。

components.name: 2. Day 1: Prepare serial dilutions of virus (10-fold series)

note.en: In complete medium: undiluted, 1:10, 1:100, 1:1,000, 1:10,000. Add polybrene (8 µg/mL final). Infect in duplicate wells per dilution. Total volume: 500 µL/well.
note.zh: 完全培养基中：原液、1:10、1:100、1:1,000、1:10,000。加 Polybrene（终浓度 8 µg/mL）。每稀释度双复孔感染。每孔总体积 500 µL。

note.en: Increases transduction efficiency 2–5×. Preferred for hard-to-infect cells.
note.zh: 感染效率提高 2–5 倍。推荐用于难感染细胞。

components.name: 4. Day 2 (24 h): replace medium with fresh complete medium (remove virus)

note.en: Remove virus-containing medium to reduce toxicity.
note.zh: 去除含病毒培养基以减少毒性。

components.name: 5. Day 4–5 (72–96 h post-transduction): harvest cells for analysis

note.en: GFP/reporter virus: analyze by flow cytometry. Antibiotic resistance: fix at 72 h, select with antibiotic for 7 days, count colonies.
note.zh: GFP/报告基因病毒：流式细胞仪分析。抗生素抗性：72 h 固定，抗生素筛选 7 天，克隆计数。

note.en: Count % GFP+ cells (FITC channel). Gate on live cells (FSC/SSC + DAPI-). Use dilutions where 1–20% cells are GFP+ (linear range, MOI ≤0.2 ensures single integration).
note.zh: 计数 GFP+ 细胞百分比（FITC 通道）。门控活细胞（FSC/SSC + DAPI-）。使用 1–20% GFP+ 的稀释度（线性范围，MOI ≤0.2 确保单次整合）。

note.en: IU/mL = (% GFP+ / 100) × total cell count × dilution factor / volume infected (mL). Example: 10% GFP+, 10⁵ cells, 1:1,000 dilution, 0.5 mL → (0.10 × 10⁵ × 1,000) / 0.5 = 2×10⁷ IU/mL.

notes.en: Functional titer reports true infectious units (transducing units, TU). More accurate than p24 ELISA for biological experiments. Use MOI ≤0.2 for titer calculation (Poisson distribution: ensures single integration events). For non-GFP vectors, use qPCR-based titer: measure proviral DNA copies per cell at 72 h post-transduction.
notes.zh: 功能性滴度报告真实感染单位（转导单位，TU）。生物学实验比 p24 ELISA 更准确。计算滴度时 MOI ≤0.2（泊松分布确保单次整合事件）。非 GFP 载体可用 qPCR 法：72 h 后测每个细胞中病毒 DNA 拷贝数。

ref: Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505; Geraerts et al. (2006) Gene Ther 13:1294–1299; Salmon & Trono (2006) Curr Protoc Hum Genet 12.10.1

usage.en: Determine functional lentiviral titer by serial dilution and colony counting or antibiotic selection.
usage.zh: 连续稀释法通过菌落计数或抗生素筛选测定慢病毒功能性滴度。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–5 days，实操: 3 hours

name: Lentiviral Titer Determination by p24 ELISA
nameCn: 慢病毒滴度测定（p24 ELISA 法）

components.name: 1. Prepare standard: serial dilutions of p24 antigen (0–2,000 pg/mL)

note.en: Use kit-provided p24 standard. Typical 8-point curve: 2000, 1000, 500, 250, 125, 62.5, 31.25, 0 pg/mL in assay diluent. Prepare fresh each time.
note.zh: 使用试剂盒提供的 p24 标准品。典型 8 点曲线：2000、1000、500、250、125、62.5、31.25、0 pg/mL（用稀释液配制）。每次新鲜配制。

components.name: 2. Lyse virus: add Triton X-100 to virus sample (final 0.5%); incubate RT 1 h

note.en: Lysis disrupts viral envelope and releases p24 from intact virions. Mix gently. Dilute sample in assay diluent: test 1:10, 1:100 dilutions to fall within standard curve range.
note.zh: 裂解破坏病毒包膜，释放完整病毒颗粒中的 p24。轻柔混合。用稀释液稀释样品：测试 1:10、1:100 稀释，使读数落在标准曲线范围内。

components.name: 3. Coat ELISA plate: add anti-p24 capture antibody (2 µg/mL, 100 µL/well), 4°C overnight

note.en: Or use pre-coated kit plates (skip this step). Coating buffer: 0.05 M carbonate pH 9.6. Seal plate.
note.zh: 或使用试剂盒预包被板（跳过此步）。包被缓冲液：0.05 M 碳酸盐 pH 9.6。封板。

components.name: 4. Block: 200 µL/well 5% BSA in PBS-T; RT 1 h; wash 3× PBST

note.en: PBST: PBS + 0.05% Tween-20. Washing: 300 µL/well, 3×; flick and blot each wash.
note.zh: PBST：PBS + 0.05% Tween-20。洗涤：每孔 300 µL，3 次；每次甩干并吸干。

components.name: 5. Add standards and samples (100 µL/well); RT 2 h or 4°C overnight

note.en: Duplicates for all. Shake plate gently at 150 rpm during incubation (orbital shaker).
note.zh: 所有样品做双复孔。孵育期间轻摇（150 rpm，摇床）。

components.name: 6. Wash 5× PBST; add detection antibody (anti-p24-HRP, 100 µL/well); RT 1 h

note.en: Dilute HRP-conjugated secondary per kit instructions (typically 1:1,000–1:5,000 in blocking buffer).
note.zh: 按试剂盒说明稀释 HRP 偶联二抗（通常封闭液 1:1,000–1:5,000）。

components.name: 7. Wash 5× PBST; add TMB substrate (100 µL/well); RT 15–30 min (dark)

note.en: Monitor color development (blue). Stop when highest standard is deep blue (~OD 2.0 at 450 nm).
note.zh: 监测显色（蓝色）。最高标准品显深蓝色时终止（450 nm OD ~2.0）。

components.name: 8. Stop reaction: add 50 µL 2 M H₂SO₄ (solution turns yellow)

note.en: Read A₄₅₀ nm within 30 min of stopping.
note.zh: 终止后 30 min 内读取 A₄₅₀ nm。

components.name: 9. Calculate titer: read pg/mL from standard curve; convert to IU/mL

note.en: Conversion: 1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁶–10⁷ IU (varies by vector/envelope). Accurate IU requires functional titer (lentiviral_titer_functional). ng/mL → pg/µL; multiply by dilution factor.
note.zh: 转换：1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁶–10⁷ IU（随载体/包膜变化）。精确 IU 需功能性滴度（lentiviral_titer_functional）。ng/mL → pg/µL；乘以稀释倍数得原液浓度。

notes.en: p24 ELISA measures total physical particles (infectious + non-infectious). Ratio of physical particles to infectious units: ~100:1. Recommended kits: Alliance HIV-1 p24 ANTIGEN ELISA (Perkin Elmer), INNOTEST HIV Antigen mAb. Typical unconcentrated lentiviral supernatant: 50–200 ng/mL p24 = ~5×10⁷–2×10⁸ physical particles/mL.
notes.zh: p24 ELISA 测定物理颗粒总数（含感染性和非感染性）。物理颗粒与感染单位比例约 100:1。推荐试剂盒：Alliance HIV-1 p24 ANTIGEN ELISA（Perkin Elmer）、INNOTEST HIV Antigen mAb。典型未浓缩慢病毒上清：50–200 ng/mL p24 ≈ 5×10⁷–2×10⁸ 物理颗粒/mL。

ref: Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505; Geraerts et al. (2006) Gene Ther 13:1294–1299; Perkin Elmer Alliance p24 ELISA kit manual

usage.en: Quantify lentiviral particles using p24 capsid protein ELISA.
usage.zh: p24 衣壳蛋白 ELISA 定量慢病毒颗粒数。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 3 hours

name: Lentivirus Production & Transduction

components.name: 1. Day −1: Seed 4×10⁶ HEK293T cells in 10 cm dish (DMEM + 10% FBS)

note.en: Cells should be 70–80% confluent on Day 0. Do not use antibiotics (impairs transfection).
note.zh: Day 0 细胞汇合度应为 70–80%。不用抗生素（影响转染效率）。

note.en: DNA ratio: Transfer vector : psPAX2 : pMD2.G = 4:3:1 (µg). E.g., 10 µg : 7.5 µg : 2.5 µg per 10 cm dish. Total DNA: 20 µg. Dilute in 500 µL Opti-MEM.
note.zh: 质粒比例：转移载体 : psPAX2 : pMD2.G = 4:3:1（µg）。10 cm 皿：10 µg : 7.5 µg : 2.5 µg。总 DNA：20 µg。加入 500 µL Opti-MEM 稀释。

components.name: 3. Day 0: Prepare transfection reagent (PEI or Lipo2000)

note.en: PEI (1 mg/mL linear PEI, MW 25,000): add 60 µL (3:1 PEI:DNA ratio by µg) to 500 µL Opti-MEM; mix 5 min RT. Add PEI+Opti-MEM to DNA+Opti-MEM; mix gently; incubate 20 min RT. Add dropwise to cells.
note.zh: PEI（1 mg/mL 线性 PEI，MW 25,000）：60 µL PEI（PEI:DNA = 3:1 质量比）加入 500 µL Opti-MEM，RT 5 min。PEI+Opti-MEM 加入 DNA+Opti-MEM，轻柔混合，RT 20 min。逐滴加入细胞。

components.name: 4. Day 1 (16–18 h): Replace medium with 12 mL fresh DMEM + 10% FBS + 10 mM HEPES

note.en: HEPES stabilizes virus at neutral pH. Medium change reduces transfection reagent toxicity. Do gently to avoid detaching 293T cells.
note.zh: HEPES 在中性 pH 下稳定病毒。换液减少转染试剂毒性。操作要轻柔，避免 293T 细胞脱落。

components.name: 5. Day 2 (48 h): First harvest — collect all supernatant; add 12 mL fresh medium

note.en: Filter through 0.45 µm PES membrane (NOT nitrocellulose — binds VSV-G). Keep harvest at 4°C or process immediately.
note.zh: 0.45 µm PES 膜过滤（不用硝酸纤维素膜——会结合 VSV-G）。上清 4°C 保存或立即处理。

components.name: 6. Day 3 (72 h): Second harvest — collect supernatant; pool with Day 2

note.en: Pool Day 2 + Day 3 harvests. Day 3 typically higher titer.
note.zh: 合并 Day 2 + Day 3 上清。Day 3 通常滴度更高。

components.name: 7. Concentrate virus (optional): 10,000×g 4°C 16 h (ultracentrifuge) or PEG precipitation

note.en: Ultracentrifugation: 25,000 rpm (SW-28 rotor) 2 h 4°C; resuspend pellet in PBS + 1% BSA. PEG-it (System Bio): add 1:4 PEG-it, 4°C overnight, 1,500×g 30 min 4°C.
note.zh: 超速离心：25,000 rpm（SW-28 转头）4°C 2 h；沉淀用 PBS + 1% BSA 重悬。PEG-it 沉淀：1:4 PEG-it，4°C 过夜，1,500×g 4°C 30 min。

components.name: 8. Titer determination: p24 ELISA or functional titer (IU/mL)

note.en: See lentiviral_titer_p24 or lentiviral_titer_functional. Typical unconcentrated: 10⁶–10⁷ IU/mL; concentrated: 10⁸–10⁹ IU/mL.
note.zh: 参见 lentiviral_titer_p24 或 lentiviral_titer_functional。未浓缩：10⁶–10⁷ IU/mL；浓缩后：10⁸–10⁹ IU/mL。

components.name: 9. Transduce target cells: virus + polybrene (8 µg/mL); MOI 0.3–5

note.en: MOI 0.3–1 for stable integration (low MOI ensures single integration). MOI 5–10 for transient or high-expression needs. Spinoculation optional (800×g 30 min RT) to increase efficiency.
note.zh: MOI 0.3–1 用于稳转（低 MOI 确保单拷贝整合）。MOI 5–10 用于瞬时或高表达需求。离心感染（800×g 30 min RT）可选，提高效率。

components.name: 10. Day 2 post-transduction: replace medium; Day 3+: add selection (Puromycin 1–2 µg/mL)

note.en: Kill curve: first establish Puromycin kill curve in untransduced cells (48–72 h for clean kill). GFP-virus: verify by flow cytometry before antibiotic selection.
note.zh: 先在未转导细胞中建立嘌呤霉素杀灭曲线（48–72 h 彻底杀灭）。GFP 病毒：抗生素筛选前先用流式细胞仪验证。

components.name: 11. Store virus: −80°C in single-use aliquots; avoid freeze-thaw

note.en: VSV-G lentivirus loses ~50% titer per freeze-thaw cycle. Add 10% trehalose or sucrose as cryoprotectant.
note.zh: VSV-G 慢病毒每次冻融损失约 50% 滴度。可加 10% 海藻糖或蔗糖作冻存保护剂。

notes.en: BSL-2 work: use BSL-2 practices for VSV-G pseudotyped virus. HEK293T must be >85% confluent at transfection. P24 ELISA: 1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁷ IU/mL (approximate). Typical issues: low titer → check psPAX2/pMD2.G ratio, 293T health; no selection → confirm antibiotic resistance in plasmid.
notes.zh: 生物安全：VSV-G 假型慢病毒需 BSL-2 操作。转染时 HEK293T 需 >85% 汇合度。P24 ELISA：1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁷ IU/mL（近似）。常见问题：滴度低→检查包装质粒比例、293T 细胞状态；无筛选→确认质粒含抗生素耐药基因。

ref: Tiscornia et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:241–245; Mochizuki et al. (1998) J Virol 72:8873; Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505

usage.en: Produce lentiviral particles by transient transfection of HEK293T cells with packaging plasmids.
usage.zh: 瞬时转染 HEK293T 细胞生产慢病毒颗粒。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 5–7 days，实操: 3 hours

note.en: For transfection complex
note.zh: 用于转染复合物

note.en: Or PEI (1:3 DNA:PEI ratio)
note.zh: 或 PEI（DNA:PEI = 1:3）

note.en: 15 µg per 10 cm dish
note.zh: 每 10 cm 皿 15 µg

note.en: 10 µg
note.zh: 10 µg

note.en: 5 µg
note.zh: 5 µg

note.en: For transduction
note.zh: 用于转导

note.en: For selection
note.zh: 用于筛选

note.en: PES or PVDF
note.zh: PES 或 PVDF

note.en: Filtered virus can be aliquoted and snap-frozen in liquid nitrogen. Store at -80°C (titer drops ~50% per freeze-thaw cycle)
note.zh: 过滤后的病毒可分装并液氮速冻。-80°C 保存（每次冻融滴度下降约 50%）

detailedSteps.en: **Day -1**: Plate 4×10⁶ HEK293T cells in 10 cm dish with 7 mL complete DMEM. Cells should be 70-80% confluent at transfection
detailedSteps.zh: **Day -1**: 在 10 cm 皿中接种 4×10⁶ HEK293T 细胞，加 7 mL 完全 DMEM。转染时细胞应 70-80% 汇合

detailedSteps.en: **Day 0**: Prepare DNA mix in 15 mL tube: 750 µL Opti-MEM + 15 µg transfer plasmid + 10 µg psPAX2 + 5 µg pMD2.G + 60 µL P3000 reagent
detailedSteps.zh: **Day 0**: 在 15 mL 管中配制 DNA 混合物：750 µL Opti-MEM + 15 µg 转移质粒 + 10 µg psPAX2 + 5 µg pMD2.G + 60 µL P3000 试剂

detailedSteps.en: In separate tube: 750 µL Opti-MEM + 45 µL Lipofectamine 3000. Mix well
detailedSteps.zh: 另取一管：750 µL Opti-MEM + 45 µL Lipofectamine 3000。混匀

detailedSteps.en: Combine DNA and Lipofectamine tubes. Mix gently by inversion
detailedSteps.zh: 合并 DNA 管和 Lipofectamine 管。轻柔颠倒混匀

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at room temperature for 15 min
detailedSteps.zh: 室温孵育 15 min

detailedSteps.en: Add transfection complex drop-wise onto cells. Swirl gently to distribute
detailedSteps.zh: 将转染复合物逐滴加入细胞。轻柔旋转使其均匀分布

detailedSteps.en: Incubate overnight (~16h) at 37°C, 5% CO₂
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C, 5% CO₂ 过夜孵育（约 16h）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1**: Aspirate medium. Replace with 5 mL fresh DMEM + 10 mM HEPES
detailedSteps.zh: **Day 1**: 吸去培养基。换 5 mL 新鲜 DMEM + 10 mM HEPES

detailedSteps.en: **Day 3** (48h post-transfection): Collect supernatant into 50 mL tube
detailedSteps.zh: **Day 3**（转染后 48h）：收集上清至 50 mL 管

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 2,000 rpm, 4°C, 5 min to remove cell debris
detailedSteps.zh: 2,000 rpm, 4°C 离心 5 min 去除细胞碎片

detailedSteps.en: Filter through 0.45 µm PES filter. Virus can be used immediately or stored at 4°C for 24h
detailedSteps.zh: 0.45 µm PES 滤膜过滤。病毒可立即使用或 4°C 保存 24h

detailedSteps.en: **Transduction** — Seed target cells at 1-4×10⁵/well in 6-well plate (Day 0)
detailedSteps.zh: **转导** — 在 6 孔板中接种靶细胞 1-4×10⁵/孔（Day 0）

detailedSteps.en: Day 1: Replace medium with 2 mL virus-containing supernatant + 8 µg/mL Polybrene
detailedSteps.zh: Day 1: 换液为 2 mL 含病毒上清 + 8 µg/mL Polybrene

detailedSteps.en: Day 2: Replace virus medium with fresh complete medium
detailedSteps.zh: Day 2: 将病毒培养基换为新鲜完全培养基

detailedSteps.en: Day 4: Begin puromycin selection (1 µg/mL). Continue for 72h
detailedSteps.zh: Day 4: 开始 puromycin 筛选（1 µg/mL）。持续 72h

detailedSteps.en: Day 7+: Maintain selection. Passage at least 2× before removing from BSL-2
detailedSteps.zh: Day 7+: 维持筛选。至少传代 2 次后方可移出 BSL-2

briefSteps.en: Plate HEK293T → transfect (Lipo3000 + transfer + psPAX2 + pMD2.G) → collect virus 48h → filter 0.45 µm → transduce target cells + Polybrene → puromycin select
briefSteps.zh: 接种 HEK293T → 转染 (Lipo3000 + 转移质粒 + psPAX2 + pMD2.G) → 48h 收毒 → 0.45 µm 过滤 → 病毒 + Polybrene 感染靶细胞 → puromycin 筛选

name: Lipofection Transfection Protocol

components.name: 1. 转染前一天铺板 (60–80% 汇合度)
2. 管 A: 质粒 DNA in Opti-MEM
6. 6–8 h 后换新鲜完全培养基

notes.en: siRNA: 25–50 pmol per well + 5 µL Lipo RNAiMAX. Switching to serum-free medium before transfection improves efficiency.
notes.zh: siRNA 转染: 每孔 25–50 pmol siRNA + 5 µL Lipo RNAiMAX。转染前换无血清培养基效果更好。DNA:Lipo 比例需优化 (1:2–1:4)。

ref: Dalby et al. (2004) Methods 33:95–103; Bhatt et al. (2012) Methods Mol Biol 869:29–40; Thermo Fisher Lipofectamine Protocol

usage.en: Introduce exogenous DNA or RNA into mammalian cells using lipid-based transfection.
usage.zh: 脂质体法将外源 DNA 或 RNA 导入哺乳动物细胞。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 days，实操: 1 hour

note.en: Serum-free media for complex formation
note.zh: 无血清培养基，用于复合物形成

note.en: Or RNAiMAX for siRNA
note.zh: 或 RNAiMAX（用于 siRNA）

note.en: Endotoxin-free prep
note.zh: 无内毒素制备

note.en: For recovery after transfection
note.zh: 转染后恢复培养用

detailedSteps.en: **Day before**: Plate cells to reach 60–80% confluency at transfection. Do NOT use antibiotics in plating media
detailedSteps.zh: **前一天**: 铺板使转染时达到 60–80% 汇合度。铺板培养基不要加抗生素

detailedSteps.en: 💡 Cell density matters: too sparse = toxicity; too confluent = low efficiency. Optimize for each cell line
detailedSteps.zh: 💡 细胞密度很关键：太稀 = 毒性大；太密 = 效率低。每个细胞系需优化

detailedSteps.en: **Tube A — DNA mix**: For each well of 6-well plate: 2.5 µg DNA + 125 µL Opti-MEM. Mix gently
detailedSteps.zh: **管 A — DNA 混合**: 6 孔板每孔：2.5 µg DNA + 125 µL Opti-MEM。轻柔混匀

detailedSteps.en: **Tube B — Lipid mix**: 7.5 µL Lipofectamine 2000 (or 3.75 µL Lipo 3000 + 5 µL P3000) + 125 µL Opti-MEM
detailedSteps.zh: **管 B — 脂质混合**: 7.5 µL Lipofectamine 2000（或 3.75 µL Lipo 3000 + 5 µL P3000）+ 125 µL Opti-MEM

detailedSteps.en: Incubate each tube 5 min RT
detailedSteps.zh: 各管室温孵育 5 min

detailedSteps.en: **Combine**: Add tube A into tube B (NOT the reverse). Mix gently. Incubate 15–20 min RT. Solution may become slightly cloudy
detailedSteps.zh: **混合**: 将管 A 加入管 B（不要反过来）。轻柔混匀。室温 15–20 min。溶液可能会轻微浑浊

detailedSteps.en: Add complex dropwise to cells. Rock plate gently to distribute
detailedSteps.zh: 将复合物逐滴加入细胞。轻摇培养板使其均匀分布

detailedSteps.en: **Replace media**: After 6–8 h, replace with fresh complete media (with serum, optional antibiotics)
detailedSteps.zh: **换液**: 6–8 h 后换新鲜完全培养基（含血清，可选抗生素）

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest**: Check expression at 24 h (reporter), 48 h (protein), or 72 h (maximum protein accumulation)
detailedSteps.zh: **收样**: 24 h 检查表达（报告基因），48 h（蛋白），72 h（蛋白积累最大化）

detailedSteps.en: 💡 **siRNA transfection**: Use Lipofectamine RNAiMAX instead. 25–50 pmol siRNA per 6-well. Knockdown peaks at 48–72 h
detailedSteps.zh: 💡 **siRNA 转染**: 改用 Lipofectamine RNAiMAX。6 孔板每孔 25–50 pmol siRNA。敲低高峰在 48–72 h

briefSteps.en: Plate cells → mix DNA/Opti-MEM (tube A) → mix Lipo/Opti-MEM (tube B) → combine A+B → add to cells → replace media 6h → harvest 24–72h
briefSteps.zh: 铺板 → DNA/Opti-MEM 混合(管A) → Lipo/Opti-MEM 混合(管B) → A+B 混合 → 加入细胞 → 6h 换液 → 24–72h 收样

name: Lysosome Isolation by Differential and Density Gradient Centrifugation
nameCn: 溶酶体分离（差速离心 + 密度梯度法）

components.name: 1. Seed 5×10⁷–1×10⁸ cells; wash 2× ice-cold PBS; scrape on ice

note.en: Use HeLa, HEK293, fibroblasts or liver tissue (100–200 mg). Scale up for low-yield cell types. Pre-chill all equipment at 4°C overnight.
note.zh: 使用 HeLa、HEK293、成纤维细胞或肝组织（100–200 mg）。低产量细胞类型需放大规模。所有器材 4°C 预冷过夜。

components.name: 2. Resuspend in 1 mL cold sucrose_gradient_homog buffer (250 mM sucrose, 10 mM HEPES pH 7.4)

note.en: Per 5×10⁷ cells. Include protease inhibitors + 1 mM PMSF.
note.zh: 每 5×10⁷ 细胞用 1 mL。加蛋白酶抑制剂 + 1 mM PMSF。

components.name: 3. Lyse cells with Dounce homogenizer: 25–30 strokes with tight pestle, 4°C

note.en: Monitor lysis by trypan blue (~80% cells ruptured, nuclei intact). Syringe method: 25G needle × 10 passes. Do NOT sonicate (destroys lysosomes).
note.zh: 台盼蓝监测裂解（~80% 细胞破裂，核完整）。注射器法：25G 针头 × 10 次。不可超声（会破坏溶酶体）。

note.en: Keep postnuclear supernatant (PNS). Save 100 µL PNS as total homogenate control.
note.zh: 保留核后上清（PNS）。保存 100 µL PNS 作为总匀浆对照。

note.en: Pellet = mitochondria-rich. Supernatant = post-mitochondrial supernatant (PMS).
note.zh: 沉淀富含线粒体。上清 = 线粒体后上清（PMS）。

note.en: Pellet contains lysosomes, ER fragments, mitochondrial contaminants. Supernatant = cytosol + microsomes.
note.zh: 沉淀含溶酶体、ER 碎片、线粒体污染物。上清 = 细胞质 + 微粒体。

components.name: 7. Resuspend crude pellet in 0.5 mL 250 mM sucrose buffer; layer on Percoll/sucrose gradient

note.en: Step gradient (bottom to top in 10 mL SW-41 tube): 2 mL 2.0 M sucrose → 3 mL 1.3 M → 3 mL 0.86 M → 2 mL 0.25 M → load sample on top. OR: use 20% Percoll in sucrose buffer, self-generate gradient at 40,000×g 30 min 4°C.
note.zh: 阶梯梯度（从下到上，10 mL SW-41 管）：2 mL 2.0 M 蔗糖 → 3 mL 1.3 M → 3 mL 0.86 M → 2 mL 0.25 M → 顶部加样。或：20% Percoll 溶于蔗糖缓冲液，40,000×g 30 min 4°C 自动成梯度。

components.name: 8. Ultracentrifuge: 30,000×g (25,000 rpm SW-41), 60 min, 4°C, slow brake

note.en: Lysosome density: 1.10–1.12 g/mL → bands between 0.86 M and 1.3 M layers. Mitochondria (1.18 g/mL) pellet. ER (1.07 g/mL) bands higher. Collect 0.5–1 mL fractions from top.
note.zh: 溶酶体密度 1.10–1.12 g/mL → 在 0.86 M 和 1.3 M 层间成带。线粒体（1.18 g/mL）沉底。ER（1.07 g/mL）成带位置更高。从顶部收集 0.5–1 mL 组分。

components.name: 9. Identify lysosome fractions: assay β-hexosaminidase or LAMP1 western blot

note.en: β-hexosaminidase activity assay: add 10 µL fraction + 90 µL substrate (4-methylumbelliferyl-2-acetamido-2-deoxy-β-D-glucopyranoside, 1 mM in citrate buffer pH 4.5), 37°C 30 min → stop with 1 M Glycine pH 10.5 → read fluorescence Ex 365/Em 450. Western blot: LAMP1 (lysosomal), Cathepsin D.
note.zh: β-半乳糖苷酶活性法：10 µL 组分 + 90 µL 底物（4-甲基伞形酮 β-D-氨基葡萄糖苷，1 mM 柠檬酸缓冲液 pH 4.5），37°C 30 min → 1 M 甘氨酸 pH 10.5 终止 → 荧光（Ex 365/Em 450）。Western blot：LAMP1（溶酶体）、Cathepsin D。

components.name: 10. Pool lysosome fractions; dilute 5× with PBS; re-pellet 17,000×g 20 min 4°C

note.en: Removes sucrose/Percoll from lysosome fraction. Resuspend in desired assay buffer. Yield: ~1–5 µg lysosome protein per 10⁷ cells. Use immediately or flash-freeze in liquid N₂.
note.zh: 去除溶酶体组分中的蔗糖/Percoll。用目标实验缓冲液重悬。产量：~1–5 µg 溶酶体蛋白/10⁷ 细胞。立即使用或液氮快速冷冻。

notes.en: Alternative method: LysoIP (Ballabio lab, Nat Methods 2019) — express TMEM192-HA, immunoprecipitate with anti-HA beads (10 min, 4°C); rapid and specific but requires stable cell line. Marker verification: LAMP1/LAMP2 (membrane), Cathepsin B/D (luminal), ATP6V1A (vacuolar ATPase). Purity assessment: minimize mitochondrial (COX IV) and ER (PDI) markers.
notes.zh: 替代法：LysoIP（Ballabio 实验室，Nat Methods 2019）——表达 TMEM192-HA，anti-HA 磁珠免疫沉淀（4°C 10 min）；快速特异但需要稳转细胞系。标记蛋白验证：LAMP1/LAMP2（膜）、Cathepsin B/D（腔内）、ATP6V1A（液泡 ATPase）。纯度评估：尽量减少线粒体（COX IV）和 ER（PDI）标记。

ref: Graham (2001) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.9.1; Abu-Remaileh et al. (2017) Science 358:807–813 (LysoIP); Walkley (2009) J Inherit Metab Dis 32:181

usage.en: Isolate lysosome-enriched fractions by differential and density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: 差速和密度梯度离心分离富集溶酶体组分。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 6 hours

note.en: Keep on ice, process immediately (up to 1 hour)
note.zh: Keep on ice, process immediately (最长 1 hour)

note.en: −80°C (up to 1 month)
note.zh: −80°C (最长 1 month)

name: Mitochondria Isolation by Differential Centrifugation
nameCn: 差速离心法分离线粒体

components.name: 1. Collect tissue (0.5–2 g liver/heart) or cells (≥5×10⁷); keep ice-cold

note.en: All steps at 4°C. Pre-chill all tools, buffers, centrifuge rotors.
note.zh: 全程 4°C 操作。预冷所有工具、缓冲液、离心转头。

note.en: Transfer to Dounce homogenizer, 5–10 mL buffer/g tissue.
note.zh: 转入 Dounce 匀浆器，每克组织加 5–10 mL 缓冲液。

note.en: Gentle, even pressure. Over-homogenization destroys mitochondria. Cells: N₂ cavitation (1,000 psi, 10 min, 4°C) or 25G syringe needle × 10 strokes.
note.zh: 轻柔均匀推拉。过度匀浆破坏线粒体。细胞：氮气空化（1,000 psi，10 min，4°C）或 25G 针头 × 10 次。

note.en: Keep supernatant (PNS). Discard pellet (nuclei, unbroken cells). Repeat if pellet is large.
note.zh: 保留上清（PNS）。弃沉淀（核、未破碎细胞）。沉淀大时重复一次。

note.en: Supernatant = cytoplasmic fraction. Pellet = crude mitochondria.
note.zh: 上清 = 细胞质组分。沉淀 = 粗线粒体。

components.name: 6. Wash: resuspend pellet in 5 mL buffer; repeat 7,000×g spin (×2–3)

note.en: Pellet becomes tighter and less brownish with each wash.
note.zh: 每次洗涤后沉淀更紧实、颜色更浅（去除肌红蛋白和细胞色素 c）。

components.name: 7. Optional: Percoll gradient for pure mitochondria

note.en: 18%/30% Percoll gradient in buffer. 95,000×g 30 min 4°C (SW-41 Ti). Mitochondria at 18/30% interface. Wash 2× at 6,000×g 10 min.
note.zh: 18%/30% Percoll 梯度（缓冲液配制）。95,000×g 30 min 4°C（SW-41 Ti 转头）。线粒体在 18/30% 界面。6,000×g 洗 2 次。

components.name: 8. Resuspend in assay buffer (without BSA for functional assays); quantify by BCA

note.en: 1–10 mg/mL protein. Integrity: cytochrome c oxidase activity ± detergent.
note.zh: 蛋白浓度 1–10 mg/mL。完整性验证：细胞色素 c 氧化酶活性（± 去污剂）。

components.name: 9. Functional integrity check: OCR (Seahorse/Clark electrode) or JC-1/TMRM

note.en: Healthy mito: JC-1 red aggregates; depolarized: green monomers. Use within 4–6 h of isolation.
note.zh: 健康线粒体：JC-1 红色聚集体；去极化：绿色单体。分离后 4–6 h 内使用。

notes.en: Differential centrifugation gives ~70% pure mitochondria. For functional studies, Percoll gradient recommended. Keep at 4°C; use within 4–6 h. WB markers: VDAC/TOMM20 (outer membrane), HSP60 (matrix), cytochrome c (IMS).
notes.zh: 差速离心纯度约 70%。功能性实验推荐 Percoll 梯度纯化。4°C 保存，4–6 h 内使用。WB 标记：VDAC/TOMM20（外膜）、HSP60（基质）、细胞色素 c（膜间隙）。

ref: Frezza et al. (2007) Nat Protoc 2:287–295; Wieckowski et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:1582–1590

usage.en: Isolate intact mitochondria from cells or tissues by differential centrifugation.
usage.zh: 差速离心从细胞或组织中分离完整线粒体。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 3 hours

note.en: 220 mM in isolation buffer
note.zh: 分离缓冲液中220 mM

note.en: 70 mM in isolation buffer
note.zh: 分离缓冲液中70 mM

note.en: pH adjusted to 7.0 with NaOH
note.zh: 用NaOH调pH至7.0

note.en: Sigma A7030, 0.2% in isolation buffer
note.zh: Sigma A7030，分离缓冲液中0.2%

note.en: Roche cOmplete EDTA-free
note.zh: Roche cOmplete 无EDTA

note.en: 2 mL or 7 mL, tight-fitting pestle (B pestle)
note.zh: 2 mL或7 mL，紧密研杵（B型研杵）

note.en: Crude mitochondria can be snap-frozen in liquid N₂ and stored at -80°C, but membrane potential is lost — only suitable for protein/lipid analysis, not functional assays
note.zh: 粗线粒体可液氮速冻-80°C保存，但膜电位会丧失——仅适用于蛋白/脂质分析，不适用于功能性检测

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest cells**: Collect 2–5 × 10⁷ cells by scraping (adherent) or centrifugation (suspension) at 300 × g for 5 min at 4°C. Wash once with ice-cold PBS.
detailedSteps.zh: **收获细胞**: 刮取（贴壁）或300 × g离心5分钟（悬浮）收集2-5 × 10⁷个细胞，4°C。用冰冷PBS洗涤一次。

detailedSteps.en: **Resuspend in isolation buffer**: Resuspend pellet in 2 mL Mitochondria Isolation Buffer (MIB: 220 mM mannitol, 70 mM sucrose, 10 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 1 mM EGTA, 0.2% BSA, 1× protease inhibitors). Keep on ice. ⚠️ BSA in buffer scavenges free fatty acids that damage mitochondria.
detailedSteps.zh: **重悬于分离缓冲液**: 将沉淀重悬于2 mL线粒体分离缓冲液（MIB：220 mM甘露醇、70 mM蔗糖、10 mM HEPES pH 7.4、1 mM EGTA、0.2% BSA、1×蛋白酶抑制剂）中。保持冰上。⚠️ 缓冲液中的BSA可清除损害线粒体的游离脂肪酸。

detailedSteps.en: **Homogenize**: Pass cells through a Dounce homogenizer (tight pestle) 30–40 strokes on ice. Alternatively, use a 25G needle (10 passes) or nitrogen cavitation (100 psi, 20 min). Check lysis under microscope — aim for >80% broken cells with intact nuclei.
detailedSteps.zh: **匀浆**: 在冰上使用Dounce匀浆器（紧密研杵）研磨30-40次。或者用25G针头（10次通过）或氮气空化（100 psi，20分钟）。显微镜下检查裂解——目标>80%细胞破碎但细胞核完整。

detailedSteps.en: **Low-speed spin 1**: Centrifuge homogenate at 800 × g for 10 min at 4°C to pellet nuclei, unbroken cells, and large debris. Transfer supernatant (S1) to a clean tube. Save pellet (P1).
detailedSteps.zh: **低速离心1**: 4°C、800 × g离心匀浆液10分钟，沉淀细胞核、未破碎细胞和大碎片。将上清（S1）转移至干净管中。保留沉淀（P1）。

detailedSteps.en: **Low-speed spin 2 (optional)**: Re-centrifuge S1 at 800 × g for 5 min to remove residual nuclear contamination.
detailedSteps.zh: **低速离心2（可选）**: 将S1再次800 × g离心5分钟，去除残余核污染。

detailedSteps.en: **High-speed spin**: Centrifuge S1 at 10,000 × g for 15 min at 4°C. The pellet (P2) is the crude mitochondrial fraction. Save supernatant (S2 = cytosolic fraction).
detailedSteps.zh: **高速离心**: 4°C、10,000 × g离心S1 15分钟。沉淀（P2）为粗线粒体组分。保留上清（S2 = 胞浆组分）。

detailedSteps.en: **Wash mitochondria**: Gently resuspend P2 in 1 mL MIB (without BSA). Centrifuge at 10,000 × g for 10 min at 4°C. Repeat once.
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤线粒体**: 轻柔地将P2重悬于1 mL MIB（不含BSA）中。4°C、10,000 × g离心10分钟。重复一次。

detailedSteps.en: **Resuspend**: Resuspend final mitochondrial pellet in 100–200 µL MIB (without BSA). Keep on ice for immediate use.
detailedSteps.zh: **重悬**: 将最终线粒体沉淀重悬于100-200 µL MIB（不含BSA）中。冰上保存以立即使用。

detailedSteps.en: **Quantify**: Measure protein concentration by Bradford assay. Typical yield: 0.5–2 mg protein from 5 × 10⁷ cells.
detailedSteps.zh: **定量**: 用Bradford法测定蛋白浓度。典型产量：5 × 10⁷个细胞约0.5-2 mg蛋白。

detailedSteps.en: **QC by Western blot**: Probe fractions (P1, P2, S2) for mitochondrial markers (VDAC/porin, COX IV, Tom20) and purity markers: nuclear (Lamin B1, histone H3), cytosolic (GAPDH, tubulin), ER (calnexin). Enrichment in mito markers with depletion of others confirms purity.
detailedSteps.zh: **Western blot质控**: 对各组分（P1、P2、S2）检测线粒体标记物（VDAC/porin、COX IV、Tom20）和纯度标记物：核（Lamin B1、组蛋白H3）、胞浆（GAPDH、微管蛋白）、内质网（钙联蛋白）。线粒体标记物富集且其他标记物缺失确认纯度。

briefSteps.en: Harvest cells → Homogenize in isotonic buffer → Low-speed spin (remove nuclei/debris) → High-speed spin (pellet mitochondria) → Wash → Resuspend → QC by Western blot
briefSteps.zh: 收获细胞 → 等渗缓冲液匀浆 → 低速离心（去除细胞核/碎片）→ 高速离心（沉淀线粒体）→ 洗涤 → 重悬 → Western blot质控

name: Mouse Genotyping PCR Workflow
nameCn: 小鼠基因分型 PCR 流程

components.name: Step 1 (Tail lysis): Spin plate 3000 rpm, 4°C, 3 min to position tails. Prepare fresh lysis buffer: 17.5 µL 10 M NaOH + 14 µL 0.5 M EDTA + H₂O to 10 mL (per 130 tails). Add 75 µL per well.

note.en: Scale down to 5 mL for 65 tails.
note.zh: 65 个样本可缩至 5 mL。

components.name: Step 2: Seal plate. Run 'Tail-Lyse' thermal cycler protocol (~46 min).
Step 3: Spin 1000 rpm, 4°C, 1 min. Add 75 µL 40 mM Tris-HCl. Mix with pipette. Seal. Spin 1000 rpm, 4°C, 2 min. Store plate at 4°C.
Step 4 (Master mix): Prepare gene-specific master mix. Add Taq polymerase last.

note.en: Do NOT vortex or shake enzymes!
note.zh: 绝对不要涡旋或摇晃酶！

components.name: Step 5 (PCR setup): Add 22.5 µL master mix + Taq per well. Add 2.5 µL lysate sample. Seal and spin down briefly.
Step 6: Run PCR program (~2.5 h). Store at 4°C.
Step 7 (Gel): Prepare 2% agarose-TAE gel (4 g agarose + 200 mL TAE + 5 µL EtBr for large gel). Some genes need 3%.

note.en: Check gene-specific gel % requirements.
note.zh: 查阅各基因所需凝胶浓度。

components.name: Step 8: Load 20 µL sample per well (8 µL 100 bp ladder in middle well). Run at 150-200 V for 15-20 min.
Step 9 (Imaging): Select 'Nucleic Acids / Ethidium Bromide', optimize 'Faint Bands', Filter 1. Position gel, run protocol, invert to view.

notes.en: Lysis buffer composition: ~17.5 mM NaOH + ~0.7 mM EDTA. After lysis, Tris-HCl neutralizes the NaOH. Master mix recipes are gene-specific — refer to genotyping database for primer sequences and PCR conditions. Some genes (2C-TCR, Pygo2) require overnight high-quality DNA isolation with proteinase K instead of quick alkaline lysis.
notes.zh: 裂解液组成：约 17.5 mM NaOH + 0.7 mM EDTA。裂解后 Tris-HCl 中和 NaOH。Master mix 配方因基因而异——参考基因分型数据库获取引物序列和 PCR 条件。某些基因（如 2C-TCR、Pygo2）需过夜 proteinase K 高质量 DNA 提取。

ref: Adapted from standard alkaline tail lysis protocol

usage.en: Complete workflow for mouse genotyping from tail lysis through PCR and gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 小鼠基因分型完整流程：尾巴裂解 → PCR → 琼脂糖凝胶电泳。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 2 hours

name: MTT Cell Viability Assay

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate (5,000–10,000 cells/well, 100 µL)

note.en: Add PBS to all outer-edge wells (replace medium) to prevent evaporation. Triplicate wells per condition. Allow cells to attach overnight at 37°C, 5% CO₂.
note.zh: 96 孔板边缘孔加 PBS（替代培养基）防蒸发。每组处理设三复孔。37°C 5% CO₂ 过夜贴壁。

note.en: Dilute drugs in complete medium. Include: (a) untreated control, (b) blank (medium only, no cells), (c) solvent control (DMSO ≤0.1%). Volume per well: 100 µL. Refresh medium at 48 h if treatment >48 h.
note.zh: 药物用完全培养基稀释。设置：(a) 未处理对照；(b) 空白（仅培养基，无细胞）；(c) 溶剂对照（DMSO ≤0.1%）。每孔 100 µL。处理超过 48 h 时在 48 h 换液。

components.name: 3. Prepare MTT stock: 5 mg/mL in PBS; filter-sterilize (0.22 µm); protect from light

note.en: Store at 4°C (≤4 weeks) or −20°C (months). MTT is light-sensitive (keep foil-covered). Warm to 37°C before use. Do NOT use if solution is purple (pre-reduced).
note.zh: 4°C 保存（≤4 周）或 −20°C（数月）。MTT 避光（锡纸包裹）。使用前温热至 37°C。如溶液已变紫色（预还原）则弃用。

components.name: 4. Add 10 µL MTT stock (5 mg/mL) to each well; final 0.5 mg/mL

note.en: Use multi-channel pipette. Add directly to medium — do NOT remove medium first. Mix gently by pipetting once.
note.zh: 用多道移液器加入。直接加入培养基中——不要先去除培养基。轻柔吸打一次混匀。

components.name: 5. Incubate 2–4 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂ (monitor purple crystal formation)

note.en: Stop when crystals visible under microscope but medium still orange (2–4 h typical). Over-incubation: crystals dissolve back, false low readings. Under-incubation: insufficient signal.
note.zh: 显微镜可见紫色结晶且培养基仍呈橙色时终止（通常 2–4 h）。过度孵育：结晶重溶，读数假低。孵育不足：信号不够。

components.name: 6. Remove ALL medium carefully by aspiration (do not disturb crystals)

note.en: Tilt plate, aspirate from corner of well. Residual phenol-red medium interferes with absorbance. Blot plate on paper towel gently.
note.zh: 倾斜培养板，从孔角吸液。残余酚红培养基会干扰吸光度。将板轻扣在纸巾上吸干。

components.name: 7. Add 100–150 µL DMSO per well; shake 10 min RT to dissolve crystals

note.en: Orbital shaker 150–200 rpm. Crystals should fully dissolve (solution homogeneous purple). If crystals persist: warm plate to 37°C briefly.
note.zh: 150–200 rpm 振荡器。结晶应完全溶解（溶液均匀紫色）。结晶未溶：短暂温热至 37°C。

components.name: 8. Read absorbance at 570 nm (reference: 630–650 nm) within 30 min

note.en: OD must be read within 30 min (DMSO-formazan degrades). Reference wavelength corrects for plate/background. % Viability = (OD_treated − OD_blank) / (OD_control − OD_blank) × 100.
note.zh: 30 min 内读数（DMSO-甲臜降解）。参考波长校正背景。% 活力 = (OD处理 − OD空白) / (OD对照 − OD空白) × 100。

notes.en: MTT is endpoint assay — cells are killed by DMSO. For non-destructive repeated measurement use CCK-8 (cck8_proliferation) or resazurin_assay. MTT can give false positives with: strong reducing agents (NAC, ascorbic acid, β-ME), high serum, some antioxidants. Verify cytotoxicity with morphology (phase contrast) or trypan blue.
notes.zh: MTT 是终点法——DMSO 杀死细胞。需重复测量同一孔用 CCK-8（cck8_proliferation）或 resazurin_assay。假阳性干扰物：强还原剂（NAC、维生素 C、β-ME）、高血清、抗氧化剂。结合形态学（相差显微镜）或台盼蓝验证细胞毒性。

ref: Mosmann (1983) J Immunol Methods 65:55–63; van Meerloo et al. (2011) Methods Mol Biol 731:237–245; Stockert et al. (2012) Acta Histochem 114:785–796

usage.en: Measure cell viability and proliferation using MTT colorimetric assay.
usage.zh: MTT 比色法检测细胞活力和增殖。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–3 days，实操: 2 hours

note.en: Solubilization
note.zh: 溶解结晶用

note.en: Seeded 24h prior
note.zh: 提前 24h 接种

note.en: 570 nm
note.zh: 570 nm 波长

detailedSteps.en: Seed cells in 96-well plate at 5,000–10,000 cells/well in 100 µL medium. Include blank wells (medium only)
detailedSteps.zh: 96 孔板接种细胞，每孔 5,000–10,000 个/100 µL。设空白孔（仅培养基）

detailedSteps.en: Incubate 24h at 37°C, 5% CO₂ to allow attachment
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C, 5% CO₂ 孵育 24h 使细胞贴壁

detailedSteps.en: Add drug/treatment at desired concentrations. Include vehicle control
detailedSteps.zh: 加入药物/处理至目标浓度。设溶剂对照

detailedSteps.en: Incubate for treatment duration (24–72h)
detailedSteps.zh: 孵育处理时间（24–72h）

detailedSteps.en: Add 10 µL MTT solution (5 mg/mL) to each well (final 0.5 mg/mL)
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔加 10 µL MTT 溶液（5 mg/mL），终浓度 0.5 mg/mL

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C for 2–4h. Purple formazan crystals should be visible under microscope
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C 孵育 2–4h。显微镜下应可见紫色甲臜结晶

detailedSteps.en: Carefully remove medium from each well (aspirate or invert plate onto paper towel)
detailedSteps.zh: 小心去除各孔培养基（吸除或倒扣于纸巾上）

detailedSteps.en: Add 100 µL DMSO to each well to dissolve formazan crystals
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔加 100 µL DMSO 溶解甲臜结晶

detailedSteps.en: Shake plate gently for 10 min (or orbital shaker) until crystals are fully dissolved
detailedSteps.zh: 轻柔振荡 10 min（或摇床）至结晶完全溶解

detailedSteps.en: Read absorbance at 570 nm (reference 690 nm). Calculate viability: % = (OD_treated / OD_control) × 100
detailedSteps.zh: 570 nm 读数（参考 690 nm）。计算活力: % = (OD处理 / OD对照) × 100

briefSteps.en: Seed cells → treat → add MTT → incubate 2–4h → remove medium → add DMSO → shake → read OD570
briefSteps.zh: 接种细胞 → 处理 → 加 MTT → 孵育 2–4h → 去培养基 → 加 DMSO → 振荡 → 读 OD570

name: Multi-Color Flow Cytometry Surface & Intracellular Staining
nameCn: 多色流式细胞术（表面 + 胞内蛋白染色）

components.name: 1. Prepare single-cell suspension; count and adjust to 2–5×10⁶/mL

note.en: Dissociate tissue with gentleMACS or collagenase/trypsin. Pellet: 400×g 5 min. Resuspend in FACS buffer (facs_buffer). Aliquot 100 µL (2–5×10⁵ cells) per staining tube.
note.zh: 组织用 gentleMACS 或胶原酶/胰酶解离。400×g 5 min 沉淀。FACS 缓冲液重悬。每管分 100 µL（2–5×10⁵ 细胞）。

components.name: 2. Fc block: add anti-FcγIII/II receptor (BD Fc Block, 5 µg/mL), 15 min, 4°C

note.en: Prevents non-specific binding of antibodies to Fc receptors on monocytes/macrophages/NK cells. For human cells: CD16/CD32 block. For mouse: 2.4G2 clone. Omit for epithelial/cancer cell lines.
note.zh: 防止单核细胞/巨噬细胞/NK 细胞 Fc 受体非特异性结合。人细胞：CD16/CD32 封闭。小鼠：2.4G2 克隆。上皮/肿瘤细胞系可省略。

components.name: 3. Viability dye staining: add Live/Dead dye (DAPI 1 µg/mL or Zombie dye), 15–30 min, RT or 4°C

note.en: Must stain before surface antibodies (in PBS only — no serum/BSA). DAPI (UV), 7-AAD (PE channel), Live/Dead Aqua (DAPI channel), Zombie dyes (various). Dead cells = high staining.
note.zh: 必须在表面抗体染色前进行（仅用 PBS——不含血清/BSA）。DAPI（UV 激发）、7-AAD（PE 通道）、Live/Dead Aqua（DAPI 通道）、Zombie 染料（多种）。死细胞染色强。

components.name: 4. Surface antibody staining: add antibody cocktail in FACS buffer (50–100 µL/tube), 20–30 min, 4°C, dark

note.en: Pre-titrate each antibody (typical: 0.1–1 µg/mL). Keep cold throughout. Label/mark tubes. Prepare single-color controls and FMO (fluorescence minus one) controls.
note.zh: 每种抗体需预先滴定（通常 0.1–1 µg/mL）。全程保持冷冻。准备单色对照和 FMO（少一荧光）对照。

components.name: 5. Wash 2×: add 3 mL FACS buffer; 400×g 5 min 4°C; decant; repeat

note.en: Decant briskly or aspirate. Do not disrupt pellet. Residual wash is OK.
note.zh: 快速倾倒或抽吸。勿破坏沉淀。少量残余洗液无影响。

components.name: 6. For surface-only panel: fix in 100 µL 1–4% PFA, 20 min RT, wash 2×

note.en: Skip fixation if: (a) running live cells, (b) calcium flux assay, (c) sorting for downstream culture. Fixed cells: stable ≥48 h at 4°C in dark.
note.zh: 如需活细胞（钙流、分选后培养）则跳过固定。固定细胞：4°C 避光稳定 ≥48 h。

components.name: 7. Intracellular staining (if needed): fix+permeabilize with Cytofix/Cytoperm or FoxP3 buffer set

note.en: Cytofix/Cytoperm (BD): 4°C 20 min, wash 2× in Perm/Wash, then add intracellular Ab (cytokines, Ki67) in Perm/Wash, 30 min 4°C. For transcription factors (FoxP3, T-bet): FoxP3/Transcription Factor Staining Buffer Set (eBioscience), 4°C overnight.
note.zh: Cytofix/Cytoperm（BD）：4°C 20 min，Perm/Wash 洗 2 次，胞内抗体（细胞因子、Ki67）加入 Perm/Wash，4°C 30 min。转录因子（FoxP3、T-bet）：FoxP3/转录因子染色缓冲液套装（eBioscience），4°C 过夜。

components.name: 8. Final wash: 2× FACS buffer; resuspend in 200–500 µL FACS buffer; run on cytometer

note.en: Run within 4 h for best results. Acquire ≥10,000 cells (lymphocytes) or 50,000 events in gate of interest. Set voltages using unstained controls.
note.zh: 4 h 内上机效果最佳。采集 ≥10,000 个细胞（淋巴细胞）或门内 ≥50,000 个事件。用无染色对照设置电压。

notes.en: Panel design rules: (1) brightest fluorochrome (PE, APC) for lowest-expression markers; (2) avoid spectral overlap of similar channels; (3) tandem dyes degrade (use fresh, avoid freeze-thaw). Compensation: required for all multicolor panels. Use UltraComp eBeads or anti-mouse Igκ beads for compensation controls. Analysis: FlowJo, FCS Express, Cytobank.
notes.zh: 面板设计原则：(1) 最亮荧光素（PE、APC）用于低表达标记；(2) 避免相邻通道光谱重叠；(3) 串联染料易降解（新鲜使用，避免冻融）。补偿校正：多色面板必须做。用 UltraComp eBeads 或抗小鼠 Igκ 磁珠做补偿对照。分析软件：FlowJo、FCS Express、Cytobank。

ref: Mahnke & Roederer (2007) Clin Lab Med 27:469–485; Chattopadhyay et al. (2014) Nat Protoc 9:147–154; Cossarizza et al. (2021) Eur J Immunol 51:2708

usage.en: Perform multi-parameter flow cytometry staining panel for immunophenotyping.
usage.zh: 多参数流式染色 panel 进行免疫表型分析。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 4–6 hours，实操: 3 hours

note.en: 4°C in dark (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C in dark (最长 1 week)

name: Multiple Immunofluorescence Protocol (FFPE & Frozen)
nameCn: 多重免疫荧光染色方案（石蜡切片及冰冻切片）

components.name: Section A — FFPE Deparaffinize: 3×5 min xylene → 2×5 min 100% EtOH → 5 min 95% → 1 min 70% → 1 min 50% → 2×5 min dH₂O.
Section B — Antigen Unmasking: Place in citrate buffer pH 6.0. Pressure cooker: 95°C 30 min (slow cook, vent open), then 115°C 1 min (close vent). Cool ≥30 min before opening.

note.en: For frozen fixed tissue: rewarm 20 min RT, then go to staining. For unfixed frozen: fix with 4% PFA 15 min, wash 3×5 min TBST.
note.zh: 冰冻固定组织：室温复温 20 分钟后直接染色。未固定冰冻：4% PFA 固定 15 分钟，TBST 洗 3×5 分钟。

components.name: Section C Step 1: Wash in dH₂O 5 min.
Step 2: Draw rectangle around tissue with liquid blocker pen.
Step 4: Block with 100-200 µL blocking buffer for 1 h.

note.en: Choose blocking serum from host species of secondary antibody (e.g. goat serum for goat anti-rabbit/mouse secondaries).
note.zh: 封闭血清选二抗的宿主（如山羊二抗用山羊血清封闭）。

components.name: Step 5: Apply 100 µL primary antibody mixture (in antibody dilution buffer) overnight at 4°C in dark humid box.
Step 7: Apply 100 µL fluorochrome-conjugated secondary antibody mixture, 1-2 h at RT in dark.
Step 9 (if using conjugated primary Ab): After secondary staining, incubate conjugated primary antibody 1-2 h RT in dark, then wash 3×5 min TBST.
Step 10: Aspirate liquid outside tissue. Apply 20 µL anti-fade mounting medium along rectangle margin. Carefully place coverslip (avoid bubbles). Seal with nail polish.
Step 11: Image after ≥4 h. Best results: cure overnight at RT. Long-term storage: 4°C protected from light.

notes.en: Panel design: ensure primary antibodies are from different host species (or use directly conjugated primaries). Match secondary antibodies to primary host species. Cannot use goat serum blocking if a primary antibody is raised in goat. Do not let sections dry at any point — use humid box with water during all incubations.
notes.zh: 面板设计：确保一抗来自不同宿主（或使用直接标记一抗）。二抗与一抗宿主匹配。一抗是山羊来源时不能用山羊血清封闭。整个过程切勿让切片干燥——所有孵育使用加水的避光湿盒。

ref: Adapted from Cell Signaling Technology IF Guide; multiplex IF best practices (2019)

usage.en: Multiplex immunofluorescence staining of FFPE or frozen tissue sections with multiple primary antibodies and fluorochrome-conjugated secondaries in a single tissue section.
usage.zh: FFPE 或冰冻切片的多重免疫荧光染色方案，在同一组织切片上使用多种一抗和荧光标记二抗。

label.en: Protocol — 2 days (overnight primary antibody), hands-on: 3-4 hours
label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days (overnight primary antibody)，实操: 3-4 hours

materials.name: Citrate unmasking buffer (10 mM sodium citrate pH 6.0)
Antibody dilution buffer: 1% BSA + 0.3% Triton X-100 in PBS, pH 8
Blocking buffer: 5% normal goat serum in TBST (or 2-5% FBS + 0.3% Triton in PBS)

note.en: 4°C overnight in humidity chamber (up to Required overnight)
note.zh: 4°C overnight in humidity chamber (最长 Required overnight)

note.en: 4°C protected from light (up to Weeks)
note.zh: 4°C protected from light (最长 Weeks)

name: Mycoplasma Detection by PCR

components.name: 6. 判读: ~270 bp 条带 = 阳性

notes.en: Fast, sensitive PCR-based detection of mycoplasma contamination in cell cultures. Uses universal primers GPO-3/MGSO targeting 16S rRNA gene. Positive result: ~270 bp band. Test every cell line every 2-4 weeks.
notes.zh: 快速灵敏的 PCR 法检测细胞培养支原体污染。使用靶向 16S rRNA 基因的通用引物 GPO-3/MGSO。阳性结果：约 270 bp 条带。每 2-4 周检测一次。

ref: van Kuppeveld et al. (1994) Appl Environ Microbiol 60:149-152; Young et al. (2010) Nat Protoc 5:929-934

usage.en: Detect mycoplasma contamination in cell cultures by PCR amplification of mycoplasma 16S rRNA genes.
usage.zh: PCR 扩增支原体 16S rRNA 基因检测细胞培养物支原体污染。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 1 hour

note.en: 48-72h conditioned
note.zh: 48-72h 条件培养基

note.en: Standard Taq, not HF
note.zh: 普通 Taq，非高保真

note.en: GPO-3: 5'-GGGAGCAAACAGGATTAGATACCCT-3'
note.zh: GPO-3 引物

note.en: MGSO: 5'-TGCACCATCTGTCACTCTGTTAACCTC-3'
note.zh: MGSO 引物

note.en: For detection of ~270 bp band
note.zh: 检测约 270 bp 条带

detailedSteps.en: Collect 1 mL conditioned medium from cells cultured 48-72h without medium change. Use supernatant (mycoplasma is extracellular)
detailedSteps.zh: 收集 1 mL 未换液培养 48-72h 的条件培养基。使用上清（支原体为胞外寄生）

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 250 × g for 5 min to pellet cells. Transfer supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: 250 × g 离心 5 min 沉淀细胞。转移上清

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge supernatant at 15,000 × g for 10 min. Discard supernatant. Resuspend pellet in 50 µL ddH₂O
detailedSteps.zh: 上清 15,000 × g 离心 10 min。弃上清。用 50 µL ddH₂O 重悬沉淀

detailedSteps.en: Boil at 95°C for 10 min to lyse mycoplasma and release DNA. Quick-spin
detailedSteps.zh: 95°C 煮沸 10 min 裂解支原体释放 DNA。快速离心

detailedSteps.en: Set up PCR: 12.5 µL Taq 2× Master Mix + 1 µL GPO-3 primer (10 µM) + 1 µL MGSO primer (10 µM) + 2 µL template (boiled supernatant) + 8.5 µL ddH₂O
detailedSteps.zh: 配制 PCR：12.5 µL Taq 2× Master Mix + 1 µL GPO-3 引物 (10 µM) + 1 µL MGSO 引物 (10 µM) + 2 µL 模板（煮沸上清）+ 8.5 µL ddH₂O

detailedSteps.en: Include positive control (known contaminated DNA or synthetic template) and negative control (ddH₂O)
detailedSteps.zh: 设阳性对照（已知污染 DNA 或合成模板）和阴性对照（ddH₂O）

detailedSteps.en: PCR cycling: 94°C 5 min → 35 cycles of (94°C 30s → 55°C 30s → 72°C 30s) → 72°C 5 min
detailedSteps.zh: PCR 程序：94°C 5 min → 35 个循环（94°C 30s → 55°C 30s → 72°C 30s）→ 72°C 5 min

detailedSteps.en: Run products on 2% agarose gel with 100 bp ladder. Look for band at ~270 bp
detailedSteps.zh: 2% 琼脂糖凝胶电泳，加 100 bp ladder。观察 ~270 bp 处条带

detailedSteps.en: **Interpretation**: Band at ~270 bp = POSITIVE (contaminated). No band = NEGATIVE. Positive control must show band for valid test. If contaminated: discard cells, bleach hood, check medium and reagents
detailedSteps.zh: **判读**：~270 bp 条带 = 阳性（污染）。无条带 = 阴性。阳性对照必须出带才有效。若污染：丢弃细胞，漂白超净台，检查培养基和试剂

briefSteps.en: Collect conditioned medium → pellet mycoplasma → boil to lyse → PCR (GPO-3/MGSO) → 2% agarose gel → ~270 bp band = positive
briefSteps.zh: 收集条件培养基 → 离心沉淀支原体 → 煮沸裂解 → PCR (GPO-3/MGSO) → 2% 琼脂糖凝胶 → ~270 bp 条带 = 阳性

name: Mycoplasma Testing and Cell Authentication (STR Profiling)
nameCn: 支原体检测与细胞鉴定（STR 图谱分析）

components.name: 1. Mycoplasma PCR: collect 1 mL conditioned medium (48–72 h culture)

note.en: From 70–90% confluent culture, 48–72 h without medium change. Centrifuge 250×g 5 min to pellet cells. Keep supernatant. Boil 100 µL supernatant 10 min at 95°C → template.
note.zh: 70–90% 汇合度培养物，48–72 h 不换液。250×g 5 min 去除细胞。保留上清。取 100 µL 上清 95°C 煮 10 min → 模板。

note.en: Use mycoplasma_pcr protocol. Universal primers targeting 16S rRNA: Forward 5'-GGGAGCAAACAGGATTAGATACCCT-3', Reverse 5'-TGCACCATCTGTCACTCTGTTAACCTC-3'. Product: ~280 bp (positive). Positive control: MycoAlert PLUS or spiked DNA.
note.zh: 参考 mycoplasma_pcr。通用引物靶向 16S rRNA：正向/反向引物（见英文）。产物：~280 bp（阳性）。阳性对照：MycoAlert PLUS 或阳性 DNA。

components.name: 3. Agarose gel: run 2% gel; check for ~280 bp amplicon

note.en: Positive: band at ~280 bp → contamination confirmed. Negative: no band → clean. Repeat test monthly.
note.zh: 阳性：~280 bp 条带 → 确认污染。阴性：无条带 → 无污染。建议每月检测一次。

note.en: Faster (20 min): measures mycoplasma enzymes in supernatant. Add 100 µL MycoAlert Reagent to 100 µL supernatant; read luminescence (Reading A). Add 100 µL MycoAlert Substrate; incubate 10 min; read again (Reading B). Ratio B/A < 0.9 = negative; 0.9–1.2 = borderline; >1.2 = positive.
note.zh: 更快（20 min）：检测上清中支原体酶活性。100 µL MycoAlert 试剂 + 100 µL 上清；读数（A）。加 100 µL 底物；10 min；再读数（B）。比值 B/A < 0.9 = 阴性；0.9–1.2 = 可疑；>1.2 = 阳性。

components.name: 5. If positive: treat with Plasmocin (InvivoGen) 25 µg/mL × 2 weeks OR discard and thaw clean stock

note.en: BM Cyclin (Roche): treatment 1 (3 days) → treatment 2 (4 days) × 2 cycles. Verify clearance by re-testing 2 weeks after treatment ends. If persistent: discard cells entirely.
note.zh: BM Cyclin（Roche）：处理 1（3 天）→ 处理 2（4 天）× 2 个循环。停药 2 周后重新检测确认清除。持续阳性：彻底丢弃细胞。

components.name: 6. STR profiling for cell authentication (send to service)

note.en: Collect ≥10⁶ cells; extract gDNA (genomic_dna_extraction). Send to service (ATCC, DSMZ, or in-house). Compare STR profile against ATCC/DSMZ/Cellosaurus database (≥80% match = same cell line). Must authenticate before publication.
note.zh: 收集 ≥10⁶ 细胞；提取 gDNA（genomic_dna_extraction）。送检服务（ATCC、DSMZ 或自行检测）。比对 STR 图谱数据库（≥80% 匹配 = 同一细胞系）。发表前必须鉴定。

notes.en: ICCLC/NIH require mycoplasma testing before publication. Test every cell line monthly. Cross-contamination of cell lines (especially HeLa) is widespread — STR authentication is mandatory per NIH/ATCC guidelines. Common mycoplasma species: M. hyorhinis, M. arginini, M. orale, Acholeplasma laidlawii.
notes.zh: ICCLC/NIH 要求发表前进行支原体检测。每月检测所有细胞系。细胞系交叉污染（特别是 HeLa）普遍存在——NIH/ATCC 指南要求 STR 鉴定。常见支原体：M. hyorhinis、M. arginini、M. orale、Acholeplasma laidlawii。

ref: Drexler & Uphoff (2002) Cytotechnology 39:75–90; Young et al. (2010) Nat Protoc 5:929–937; ATCC Cell Line Authentication Technical Bulletin; Reid et al. (2017) Int J Cancer 140:1209

usage.en: Test cell cultures for mycoplasma contamination using PCR or biochemical assay.
usage.zh: PCR 或生化法检测细胞培养物是否存在支原体污染。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Cell culture supernatant (48 h without antibiotics)

name: Ngn2 Induced Neuron Differentiation from Human ES/iPS Cells
nameCn: Ngn2 诱导人 ES/iPS 细胞神经元分化方案

components.name: Day -1: Coat matrigel ≥1 h. Split ES/iPS with accutase (1 mL/well 6-well, check at 3 min). Collect, spin 1000 rpm 5 min, count. Plate 30-45k cells/mL in mTeSR + Thiazovivin. Infect with lentivirus (TetO-Ngn2-Puro + Ubi-rtTA).

note.en: Cell density depends on cell line fragility. For H1: 0.5-1M per 24-well plate.
note.zh: 密度取决于细胞系脆弱程度。H1: 0.5-1M/24 孔板。

components.name: Day 0: Switch to N2 medium + BDNF (10 ng/mL) + NT3 (10 ng/mL) + Laminin (0.2 µg/mL) + Doxycycline (2 µg/mL).
Day 1: Add Puromycin (1 µg/mL) to N2 medium with BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox.
Day 3: Add glia (1 confluent T75 glia for 2-3 × 24-well plates) in B27 medium + BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox + Ara-C (2 µM).
Day 4-7: Change half B27 medium (with BDNF/NT3/Laminin/Dox/Ara-C) every 2-3 days.
Day 7-10: Change half medium with neuronal growth medium + Ara-C (± Dox).
Day 10-21: Add neuronal growth medium to 1 mL, change 1/3 medium weekly.
After Day 21: Change ≥75% medium at least once per week for maintenance.

notes.en: N2 medium: DMEM/F12 + 1× N2 supplement + 1× NEAA. B27 medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27. Neuronal growth medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS. Glia can be p0 or p1, dissociated with trypsin. Virus volume may need optimization per batch (~0.3 µL concentrated virus per well of 24-well).
notes.zh: N2 培养基：DMEM/F12 + 1× N2 + 1× NEAA。B27 培养基：Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27。神经元生长液：Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS。胶质细胞用 p0 或 p1，胰蛋白酶消化。病毒用量需按批次优化。

usage.en: Doxycycline-inducible Ngn2 overexpression protocol for rapid generation of glutamatergic neurons from human ES or iPS cells, with glia co-culture for maturation.
usage.zh: 多西环素诱导 Ngn2 过表达方案，从人 ES 或 iPS 细胞快速生成谷氨酸能神经元，配合胶质细胞共培养促进成熟。

label.en: Protocol — 21+ days, hands-on: Intermittent, ~30 min per media change
label.zh: 实验方案 — 21+ days，实操: Intermittent, ~30 min per media change

materials.name: Neuronal growth medium: Neurobasal-A + 1× Glutamax + 1× B27 + 5% FBS

note.en: Neurons on glia, B27 medium (up to Continue culture)
note.zh: Neurons on glia, B27 medium (最长 Continue culture)

name: Northern Blot

components.name: 1. RNA 提取 + 定量 (5–30 µg total RNA)
2. 变性琼脂糖凝胶（1.2% + 甲醛）
3. RNA 变性：65°C 15 min + 冰上
6. 毛细转印至尼龙膜 (过夜, 20× SSC)
8. 预杂交 (42°C, 1 h)
components.note: 含 50% 甲酰胺的杂交液

components.name: 9. 杂交 (探针 + 杂交液, 42°C 过夜)
components.note: DIG 标记或 ³²P 标记探针

components.name: 10. 低严格洗涤 (2× SSC/0.1% SDS, RT, 2×5 min)
12. 检测（放射自显影 / DIG 化学发光）

notes.en: Use RNase-free reagents and equipment throughout. Run formaldehyde gel in fume hood. DIG-labeled probes are safer than radioactive, slightly less sensitive. Positive control: housekeeping gene (GAPDH, β-actin). RNA quality assessed by 28S/18S ratio (~2:1).
notes.zh: 所有操作使用 RNase-free 试剂和器具。甲醛凝胶在通风橱中操作。DIG 标记探针比放射性标记更安全，灵敏度稍低。阳性对照：管家基因（GAPDH, β-actin）。RNA 质量可通过 28S/18S 比值（~2:1）评估。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, Ch. 7; Alwine et al. (1977) PNAS 74:5350

usage.en: Detect specific RNA transcripts by size separation on denaturing gel, membrane transfer, and hybridization.
usage.zh: Northern blot 检测特定 RNA 转录本：变性胶分离、转膜、杂交。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 8 hours

note.en: High-quality, RIN > 7
note.zh: 高质量，RIN > 7

note.en: Molecular biology grade, use in fume hood
note.zh: 分子生物学级，通风橱中使用

note.en: e.g. Hybond-N+, Amersham
note.zh: 如 Hybond-N+, Amersham

note.en: ULTRAhyb or Church buffer
note.zh: ULTRAhyb 或 Church 缓冲液

note.en: ³²P, DIG, or biotin-labeled
note.zh: ³²P、DIG 或生物素标记

note.en: For radioactive detection
note.zh: 用于放射性检测

note.en: UV-crosslinked membrane can be stored dry at RT or −20°C for months
note.zh: UV交联后的膜可室温或 −20°C 干燥保存数月

note.en: Hybridization can proceed overnight (standard)
note.zh: 杂交可过夜进行（标准操作）

note.en: Washed membrane can be wrapped in plastic wrap and exposed later
note.zh: 洗涤后的膜可用保鲜膜包裹后延后曝光

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Gel Electrophoresis & Transfer**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 凝胶电泳与转膜**

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare RNA**: Use 5–30 µg total RNA per lane. Measure concentration and check integrity (RIN > 7 or clear 28S/18S bands on agarose). ⚠️ Work RNase-free: use DEPC-treated water, clean surfaces with RNaseZap
detailedSteps.zh: **准备RNA**: 每泳道 5–30 µg 总 RNA。测浓度并检查完整性（RIN > 7 或琼脂糖凝胶上清晰 28S/18S 条带）。⚠️ 无 RNase 操作：用 DEPC 水，RNaseZap 擦拭台面

detailedSteps.en: **Denature RNA**: Mix RNA with 2× RNA Loading Dye containing formamide and formaldehyde. Heat 65°C, 15 min. Snap-cool on ice 5 min. Add 1 µL EtBr (10 mg/mL) per sample
detailedSteps.zh: **RNA变性**: RNA 与含甲酰胺和甲醛的 2× RNA 上样缓冲液混合。65°C 加热 15 min。冰上速冷 5 min。每样加 1 µL EtBr（10 mg/mL）

detailedSteps.en: **Cast denaturing gel**: Prepare 1.2% agarose in 1× MOPS buffer + 6.6% formaldehyde. Pour in fume hood. Let solidify 30 min
detailedSteps.zh: **制变性凝胶**: 1× MOPS 缓冲液中制 1.2% 琼脂糖 + 6.6% 甲醛。通风橱中灌胶。凝固 30 min

detailedSteps.en: **Electrophoresis**: Load denatured RNA. Run at 3–5 V/cm in 1× MOPS running buffer for 2–3 h. Check separation under UV
detailedSteps.zh: **电泳**: 上样变性 RNA。1× MOPS 电泳缓冲液中 3–5 V/cm 跑 2–3 h。UV 下检查分离

detailedSteps.en: **Photograph gel**: Document gel with UV to confirm RNA quality and equal loading (compare 28S/18S rRNA intensity)
detailedSteps.zh: **拍照**: UV 下拍照记录凝胶，确认 RNA 质量及上样均一性（比较 28S/18S rRNA 强度）

detailedSteps.en: **Capillary transfer**: Set up overnight transfer to nylon membrane (positively charged, e.g. Hybond-N+) using 20× SSC. Stack: wick → gel (face down) → membrane → filter papers → paper towels → weight
detailedSteps.zh: **毛细转移**: 用 20× SSC 组装过夜转膜至带正电尼龙膜（如 Hybond-N+）。顺序：引液纸 → 凝胶（面朝下）→ 膜 → 滤纸 → 纸巾 → 重物

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Crosslink & Hybridization**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 交联与杂交**

detailedSteps.en: **Disassemble & crosslink**: Remove membrane. Rinse briefly in 2× SSC. UV crosslink at 120 mJ/cm² (or bake 80°C, 2 h). Mark RNA side. ⚠️ Do not let membrane dry before crosslinking
detailedSteps.zh: **拆装并交联**: 取出膜，2× SSC 短暂漂洗。UV 交联 120 mJ/cm²（或 80°C 烘烤 2 h）。标记 RNA 面。⚠️ 交联前勿让膜干燥

detailedSteps.en: **Pre-hybridize**: Place membrane in hybridization tube with 10 mL pre-warmed hybridization buffer (e.g. ULTRAhyb or Church buffer). Incubate 42°C (or 68°C for Church), 1–2 h with rotation
detailedSteps.zh: **预杂交**: 膜放入杂交管，加 10 mL 预热杂交缓冲液（如 ULTRAhyb 或 Church 缓冲液）。42°C（Church 用 68°C）旋转孵育 1–2 h

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare probe**: Label antisense probe (³²P-dCTP random priming for radioactive, or DIG/biotin for non-radioactive). Denature at 95°C, 5 min; snap-cool on ice
detailedSteps.zh: **制备探针**: 标记反义探针（放射性用 ³²P-dCTP 随机引物标记，非放射性用 DIG/biotin）。95°C 变性 5 min；冰上速冷

detailedSteps.en: **Hybridize**: Add denatured probe to hybridization buffer (final ~1×10⁶ cpm/mL for ³²P). Incubate overnight at 42°C (ULTRAhyb) or 68°C (Church) with rotation
detailedSteps.zh: **杂交**: 将变性探针加入杂交液（³²P 终浓度 ~1×10⁶ cpm/mL）。42°C（ULTRAhyb）或 68°C（Church）旋转过夜杂交

detailedSteps.en: **Day 3 — Wash & Detection**
detailedSteps.zh: **第三天 — 洗涤与检测**

detailedSteps.en: **Low-stringency wash**: 2× SSC / 0.1% SDS, RT, 5 min × 2
detailedSteps.zh: **低严格洗涤**: 2× SSC / 0.1% SDS，室温 5 min × 2 次

detailedSteps.en: **High-stringency wash**: 0.1× SSC / 0.1% SDS, 42–68°C, 15–30 min × 2. ⚠️ Adjust stringency based on probe homology
detailedSteps.zh: **高严格洗涤**: 0.1× SSC / 0.1% SDS，42–68°C，15–30 min × 2 次。⚠️ 根据探针同源性调整严格度

detailedSteps.en: **Detection**: For ³²P: expose to phosphor screen 4–24 h, scan on PhosphorImager. For DIG: follow chemiluminescent detection kit. For biotin: streptavidin-HRP + ECL
detailedSteps.zh: **检测**: ³²P：磷屏曝光 4–24 h，PhosphorImager 扫描。DIG：按化学发光检测试剂盒操作。Biotin：链霉亲和素-HRP + ECL

detailedSteps.en: **Strip & re-probe (optional)**: Strip membrane in boiling 0.1% SDS, 15 min. Verify by re-exposing. Re-probe with loading control (e.g. GAPDH, 18S)
detailedSteps.zh: **剥离与重探（可选）**: 沸腾 0.1% SDS 中剥离膜 15 min。重新曝光验证。用内参探针（如 GAPDH、18S）重探

briefSteps.en: Extract RNA → denature → run formaldehyde gel → transfer to membrane → UV crosslink → hybridize probe → wash → detect
briefSteps.zh: 提取RNA → 变性 → 甲醛凝胶电泳 → 转膜 → UV交联 → 探针杂交 → 洗涤 → 检测

name: Patient-Derived Xenograft (PDX) Subcutaneous Implantation

components.name: Step 1 (Thaw frozen tissue): Roll vial between hands 10-15 s. Thaw in 37°C water bath until small ice crystal remains (~2 min). Spray with 70% ethanol.

note.en: Wear eye protection — vials may explode from LN₂ storage.
note.zh: 戴护目镜——液氮储存的冻存管可能爆裂。

components.name: Step 2 (Wash): Pour tissue into 50 mL tube. Slowly add 10 mL culture medium. Mix gently. Spin 200 g, 5 min, RT. Remove supernatant. Repeat wash once.

note.en: Add medium slowly to prevent osmotic shock.
note.zh: 缓慢加培养基防止渗透冲击。

components.name: Step 3: Resuspend in 0.5 mL PBS. Keep on ice. ~0.5 cm³ tissue per implant.
Step 4: Anesthetize mouse — ketamine 10 mg/mL, 100 µL per 10 g body weight (IP), or isoflurane per institutional protocol.
Step 5: Shave between shoulder blades. Spray shaved area with 70% ethanol.
Step 6: Make 2-3 mm skin incision. Insert curved mosquito forceps 1-1.5 cm into deep fascia toward flank.
Step 7: Implant ~0.5 cm³ prepared tumor tissue into pocket. Collect spilled cells with 1 mL syringe (no needle) and inject into pocket.
Step 8: Close with 1-2 wound clips. Monitor 24 h for distress or missing clips. Remove clips at 10-14 days (manual restraint only).
Step 9 (Propagation): Harvest tumors at ≤1.5 cm longest dimension (3-12 weeks). Clean tumor of connective/necrotic tissue. Cut into ~0.5 cm³ pieces. Implant into new recipients.

Step 10 (Freezing): Cut tumor into ~0.5 cm³ pieces. Place in cryovials with 1.5 mL freezing medium (50% FBS + 40% DMEM + 10% DMSO). Slow-freeze in Nalgene container at -80°C overnight, then transfer to liquid nitrogen.

notes.en: Tumor growth varies by xenograft line (3-12 weeks to 1.5 cm). Monitor twice weekly. Save representative tissue for histology (formalin), protein/RNA (snap freeze), and OCT embedding. Freezing medium: 50% FBS, 40% DMEM, 10% DMSO — prepare fresh.
notes.zh: 肿瘤生长因品系而异（3-12 周至 1.5 cm）。每周检查两次。保留代表性组织用于组织学（福尔马林）、蛋白/RNA（速冻）和 OCT 包埋。冻存液：50% FBS、40% DMEM、10% DMSO——现配现用。

ref: Adapted from NCI PDXNet recommendations; JoVE Protocol 54393

usage.en: Subcutaneous implantation of frozen or fresh patient-derived tumor xenograft tissue into immunodeficient mice, with propagation and tissue banking procedures.
usage.zh: 将冻存或新鲜的 PDX 肿瘤组织皮下移植到免疫缺陷小鼠，包括传代和组织冻存流程。

label.en: Protocol — 2-3 hours, hands-on: 30 min per mouse
label.zh: 实验方案 — 2-3 hours，实操: 30 min per mouse

materials.name: Sterile surgical tools, clean surgical blades
1 mL syringe (no needle, for spilled cells)
Cryogenic vials and freezing container (Nalgene Cryo 1°C)

note.en: Keep tissue on ice in PBS (up to 1-2 hours)
note.zh: Keep tissue on ice in PBS (最长 1-2 hours)

note.en: Liquid nitrogen (up to Years)
note.zh: Liquid nitrogen (最长 Years)

name: PBMC Isolation by Density Gradient Centrifugation (Ficoll)
nameCn: 密度梯度离心法分离 PBMC（外周血单个核细胞）

components.name: 1. Collect blood into EDTA or heparin tube; process within 2 h at RT

note.en: EDTA: 1.8 mg/mL (purple-top Vacutainer). Heparin: 10–20 U/mL (green-top). Do NOT use SST (serum-separator) or clotted blood. Keep at RT (not on ice — cold causes platelet/lymphocyte aggregation).
note.zh: EDTA（紫色管）或肝素（绿色管）采血管。禁用 SST（血清分离管）或已凝固血液。室温保存（不可冰上——冷藏导致血小板/淋巴细胞聚集）。采血后 2 h 内处理。

components.name: 2. Dilute blood 1:1 with RT DPBS (without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺)
