note.en: Dilution reduces viscosity and improves separation. Use DPBS at RT (not cold). Gently invert to mix. 20 mL diluted blood is typical starting volume.
note.zh: 稀释降低黏度，改善分离效果。用室温 DPBS（不用冷的）。轻柔颠倒混匀。典型起始体积：20 mL 稀释血液。

components.name: 3. Add Ficoll-Paque (1.077 g/mL) to conical tube: 10 mL Ficoll per 20 mL diluted blood

note.en: Warm Ficoll-Paque to RT (critical — cold Ficoll gives poor separation). For SepMate tubes (Stem Cell Tech): add Ficoll first, then pour blood on top — faster and cleaner. Use 15 mL Ficoll for 50 mL tube; 3 mL for 15 mL tube.
note.zh: Ficoll-Paque 必须恢复至室温（关键——冷的会导致分离失败）。SepMate 管（Stem Cell Tech）：先加 Ficoll 再倒血液——更快更干净。50 mL 管用 15 mL Ficoll；15 mL 管用 3 mL。

components.name: 4. Layer diluted blood slowly over Ficoll (do not mix layers)

note.en: Tilt tube 45°; pipette diluted blood down the tube wall so it floats gently on top of Ficoll. Two distinct layers must be visible. Alternatively, underlay Ficoll under blood using a long needle.
note.zh: 将管倾斜 45°，沿管壁缓慢加入稀释血液，使其轻轻漂浮在 Ficoll 上方。必须可见明显两层界面。也可用长针在血液下方注入 Ficoll（倒置法）。

components.name: 5. Centrifuge: 400×g, 30–35 min, RT (no brake, no acceleration ramp)

note.en: CRITICAL: acceleration = 9 (slow), brake = 0 (NO BRAKE). Deceleration with brake disrupts the density interface. RT (18–25°C). Most centrifuges: set to slowest decel (0 or 1).
note.zh: 关键：加速度 = 9（慢速），刹车 = 0（无刹车）。刹车会扰乱密度界面。室温（18–25°C）。大多数离心机：设置最慢减速（0 或 1）。

note.en: Top: plasma + platelets. Buffy coat (white ring at Ficoll interface): PBMCs. Ficoll layer: granulocytes settling. Pellet (red): erythrocytes + granulocytes. PBMC band may be thin — collect carefully.
note.zh: 顶层：血浆 + 血小板。白膜层（Ficoll 界面白色环）：PBMC。Ficoll 层：粒细胞。红色沉淀：红细胞 + 粒细胞。PBMC 带可能较薄——小心收集。

components.name: 7. Collect buffy coat (PBMC layer): insert pipette just above Ficoll interface; aspirate 2–4 mL

note.en: Collect in a clean 15 or 50 mL tube. Taking ≤1 mL of Ficoll is acceptable. Avoid disturbing lower layers.
note.zh: 收集到干净的 15 或 50 mL 管中。带入少量（≤1 mL）Ficoll 可接受。避免扰动下层。

components.name: 8. Wash 1: add 40 mL RT DPBS; 300×g 10 min RT (WITH brake); decant supernatant

note.en: This wash removes residual Ficoll and platelets. Pellet should be white/cream (PBMCs). If red → erythrocyte contamination → add 2 mL ACK lysis buffer (150 mM NH₄Cl, 10 mM KHCO₃, 0.1 mM EDTA, pH 7.2), 5 min RT.
note.zh: 此步去除残余 Ficoll 和血小板。沉淀应为白色/奶油色（PBMC）。如偏红 → 红细胞污染 → 加 2 mL ACK 裂解液（150 mM NH₄Cl、10 mM KHCO₃、0.1 mM EDTA，pH 7.2），RT 5 min。

components.name: 9. Wash 2: resuspend in 10 mL DPBS; 200×g 10 min RT; decant

note.en: Second wash at lower g-force to remove most remaining platelets (platelets sediment at higher g, are discarded with supernatant).
note.zh: 第二次洗涤用较低离心力去除残余血小板（血小板在较高 g 时沉淀，随上清丢弃）。

components.name: 10. Resuspend in RPMI-1640 + 10% FBS or DPBS; count and assess viability

note.en: cell_counting_hemocytometer with trypan blue. Typical yield: 1–2×10⁶ PBMCs/mL blood. Viability should be >90%. PBMC composition: ~80% lymphocytes (T, B, NK), ~15% monocytes, ~5% dendritic cells.
note.zh: cell_counting_hemocytometer 台盼蓝计数。典型产量：每毫升血液 1–2×10⁶ PBMC。活率应 >90%。PBMC 组成：约 80% 淋巴细胞（T、B、NK）、约 15% 单核细胞、约 5% 树突状细胞。

notes.en: Critical success factors: (1) Fresh blood at RT throughout; (2) Ficoll at RT; (3) NO BRAKE on centrifuge deceleration; (4) Careful harvesting of buffy coat. For cryopreservation: resuspend at 10–20×10⁶ cells/mL in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO (cell_freezing); rapid cooling in Mr. Frosty to −80°C; transfer to liquid N₂. For immediate downstream: proceed to magnetic bead depletion (MACS), activation, or flow staining (flow_panel_staining).
notes.zh: 成功关键因素：(1) 全程血液保持室温；(2) Ficoll 恢复至室温；(3) 离心减速无刹车；(4) 小心收集白膜层。冻存：10–20×10⁶ cells/mL 重悬于 90% FBS + 10% DMSO（cell_freezing），Mr. Frosty 缓慢降温至 −80°C，后转液氮。下游实验：磁珠分选（MACS）、细胞激活或流式染色（flow_panel_staining）。

ref: Boyum (1968) Scand J Clin Lab Invest Suppl 97:77–89; Ulmer et al. (1984) Immunobiology 166:238–250; Kleiveland (2015) Handbook of Cell Biology; STEMCELL Technologies EasySep Manual

usage.en: Isolate peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) from whole blood by Ficoll density gradient centrifugation.
usage.zh: Ficoll 密度梯度离心从全血中分离外周血单个核细胞（PBMC）。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 hours，实操: 2 hours

materials.name: Whole blood (anticoagulated with EDTA or heparin)

note.en: Cryopreserve in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO → liquid N₂ (up to indefinite)
note.zh: Cryopreserve in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO → liquid N₂ (最长 indefinite)

name: Plasmid Maxiprep (Alkaline Lysis)

components.name: 1. 过夜培养 100–500 mL LB + 抗性
3. 重悬 (Buffer P1/Resuspension)
components.note: 含 RNase A, 彻底重悬无颗粒

components.name: 4. 碱裂解 (Buffer P2/Lysis)
components.note: 轻柔翻转 4–6 次, 室温 ≤5 min

components.name: 5. 中和 (Buffer P3/Neutralization)
components.note: 立即翻转混匀, 冰上 15–20 min

components.name: 12. 70% 乙醇洗涤 → 风干 → TE 溶解

notes.en: Typical yield: 100 mL high-copy plasmid culture → 500-1000 µg DNA. Endotoxin-free plasmid for transfection/in vivo use requires endotoxin removal column. Avoid excessive vortexing to prevent genomic DNA contamination.
notes.zh: 典型产量：100 mL 高拷贝质粒 → 500–1000 µg DNA。Endotoxin-free 质粒用于转染/体内实验需使用 endotoxin removal column。避免过度涡旋导致基因组 DNA 污染。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd Ed; QIAGEN Plasmid Purification Handbook

usage.en: Isolate large-scale, high-purity plasmid DNA from E. coli cultures for transfection.
usage.zh: 大量提取高纯度质粒 DNA，用于转染等应用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: e.g. Ampicillin 100 mg/mL
note.zh: 如氨苄青霉素 100 mg/mL

note.en: Anion-exchange gravity column
note.zh: 阴离子交换重力柱

note.en: Equilibration buffer (kit)
note.zh: 平衡缓冲液（试剂盒）

note.en: Wash buffer (kit)
note.zh: 洗涤缓冲液（试剂盒）

note.en: Elution buffer (kit)
note.zh: 洗脱缓冲液（试剂盒）

note.en: Molecular biology grade
note.zh: 分子生物学级

note.en: Ice-cold
note.zh: 冰冷

note.en: Overnight culture grows while you sleep (Day 1→2)
note.zh: 过夜培养（第一天→第二天）

note.en: Neutralized lysate can be stored at −20°C before column
note.zh: 中和裂解液可在上柱前 −20°C 保存

note.en: DNA pellet in 70% ethanol can be stored at −20°C
note.zh: DNA沉淀在70%乙醇中可 −20°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Overnight Culture**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 过夜培养**

detailedSteps.en: **Inoculate**: Pick a single colony into 200–500 mL LB + appropriate antibiotic (e.g. 100 µg/mL ampicillin). Grow 37°C, 225 rpm, 12–16 h. ⚠️ Do not exceed 16 h — overgrowth reduces yield and increases genomic DNA contamination
detailedSteps.zh: **接种**: 挑单克隆至 200–500 mL LB + 相应抗生素（如 100 µg/mL 氨苄青霉素）。37°C, 225 rpm 培养 12–16 h。⚠️ 勿超过 16 h——过度生长降低产量并增加基因组 DNA 污染

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Harvest & Purification**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 收菌与纯化**

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest**: Centrifuge 6,000×g, 15 min, 4°C. Pour off supernatant. Drain well
detailedSteps.zh: **收菌**: 6,000×g, 4°C 离心 15 min。倒弃上清。充分沥干

detailedSteps.en: **Resuspend**: Add 10 mL Buffer P1 (50 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0, 10 mM EDTA, 100 µg/mL RNase A). Vortex until no clumps remain
detailedSteps.zh: **重悬**: 加 10 mL Buffer P1（50 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0、10 mM EDTA、100 µg/mL RNase A）。涡旋至无颗粒

detailedSteps.en: **Lyse**: Add 10 mL Buffer P2 (200 mM NaOH, 1% SDS). Invert 6× gently. Incubate RT, 5 min. ⚠️ Do not vortex or exceed 5 min — shears genomic DNA
detailedSteps.zh: **裂解**: 加 10 mL Buffer P2（200 mM NaOH, 1% SDS）。轻柔颠倒 6 次。室温 5 min。⚠️ 勿涡旋或超过 5 min——会剪切基因组 DNA

detailedSteps.en: **Neutralize**: Add 10 mL ice-cold Buffer P3 (3 M KOAc, pH 5.5). Invert 6× immediately. White precipitate forms. Incubate on ice 20 min
detailedSteps.zh: **中和**: 加 10 mL 冰冷 Buffer P3（3 M KOAc, pH 5.5）。立即颠倒 6 次。出现白色沉淀。冰上 20 min

detailedSteps.en: **Clarify**: Centrifuge 20,000×g, 30 min, 4°C. Transfer clear supernatant through cheesecloth or syringe filter to a new tube
detailedSteps.zh: **澄清**: 20,000×g, 4°C 离心 30 min。将澄清上清通过纱布或注射器过滤器转入新管

detailedSteps.en: **Equilibrate column**: Apply 10 mL Buffer QBT to QIAGEN-tip 500 (or equivalent anion-exchange column). Allow to drain by gravity
detailedSteps.zh: **平衡柱**: 向 QIAGEN-tip 500（或等效阴离子交换柱）加 10 mL Buffer QBT。重力流排液

detailedSteps.en: **Bind**: Apply cleared lysate to column. Allow to drain by gravity (~30 min)
detailedSteps.zh: **结合**: 将澄清裂解液加至柱上。重力流排液（~30 min）

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Wash column 2× with 30 mL Buffer QC. Allow to drain completely
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 用 30 mL Buffer QC 洗柱 2 次。完全排液

detailedSteps.en: **Elute**: Elute DNA with 15 mL Buffer QF (1.25 M NaCl, 50 mM Tris pH 8.5, 15% isopropanol) into a clean 50 mL tube
detailedSteps.zh: **洗脱**: 用 15 mL Buffer QF（1.25 M NaCl、50 mM Tris pH 8.5、15% 异丙醇）洗脱 DNA 至干净 50 mL 管

detailedSteps.en: **Precipitate**: Add 10.5 mL (0.7 vol) isopropanol. Mix. Centrifuge 15,000×g, 30 min, 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: **沉淀**: 加 10.5 mL（0.7 倍体积）异丙醇。混匀。15,000×g, 4°C 离心 30 min

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Wash pellet with 5 mL 70% ethanol. Spin 15,000×g, 10 min, 4°C. Remove ethanol carefully
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 用 5 mL 70% 乙醇洗沉淀。15,000×g, 4°C 离心 10 min。小心去除乙醇

detailedSteps.en: **Air-dry & resuspend**: Air-dry 10 min. Resuspend in 200–500 µL TE buffer or nuclease-free water. Let dissolve 10 min at RT. ⚠️ For transfection, use endotoxin-free water and verify A260/280 ≥ 1.8
detailedSteps.zh: **风干与重悬**: 风干 10 min。加 200–500 µL TE 缓冲液或无核酸酶水重悬。室温溶解 10 min。⚠️ 转染用途需用无内毒素水，确认 A260/280 ≥ 1.8

detailedSteps.en: **Quantify**: Measure by NanoDrop. Typical yield: 500–2000 µg from 500 mL culture. Check A260/280 (1.8–2.0) and A260/230 (> 2.0)

briefSteps.en: Grow overnight culture → pellet bacteria → alkaline lysis → neutralize → column bind → wash → elute → precipitate → resuspend
briefSteps.zh: 过夜培养 → 收菌 → 碱裂解 → 中和 → 柱结合 → 洗涤 → 洗脱 → 沉淀 → 重悬

name: Plasmid Miniprep (Alkaline Lysis)

components.name: 3. 250 µL Buffer P2 裂解 (颠倒混匀)
4. 350 µL Buffer P3 中和 (颠倒混匀)
7. 加 0.7 倍体积异丙醇沉淀
10. 风干 → 30–50 µL TE/H₂O 溶解

notes.en: Dilute to 1× before use. Classic alkaline lysis method. Yields 5–20 µg from 3 mL overnight culture. A260/280 should be 1.8–2.0 for pure DNA.
notes.zh: 经典碱裂解法。3 mL 过夜培养物可获 5–20 µg 质粒 DNA。A260/280 应为 1.8–2.0。如需更高纯度，使用商业柱提试剂盒。

ref: Birnboim & Doly (1979) Nucleic Acids Res 7:1513–1523; Sambrook & Russell (2001)

usage.en: Isolate small-scale plasmid DNA from E. coli cultures using alkaline lysis.
usage.zh: 碱裂解法小量提取大肠杆菌质粒 DNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes，实操: 30 minutes

note.en: For DNA precipitation
note.zh: 用于 DNA 沉淀

note.en: For wash
note.zh: 洗涤用

note.en: For elution
note.zh: 用于洗脱

note.en: Bacterial pellet can be stored at -20°C
note.zh: 菌体沉淀可 -20°C 保存

note.en: DNA pellet in 70% ethanol can be stored at -20°C for months
note.zh: DNA 沉淀在 70% 乙醇中可 -20°C 保存数月

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest**: Centrifuge 1.5–3 mL overnight culture at 6,000 × g for 2 min. Discard supernatant
detailedSteps.zh: **收菌**: 1.5–3 mL 过夜培养物 6,000 × g 离心 2 min，弃上清

detailedSteps.en: **Resuspend**: Add 250 µL Buffer P1. Pipet up and down until no clumps remain
detailedSteps.zh: **重悬**: 加 250 µL Buffer P1，反复吹打至无团块

detailedSteps.en: **Lyse**: Add 250 µL Buffer P2. Mix by inverting 6–8 times. **Do NOT vortex.** Solution should become clear and viscous (≤5 min)
detailedSteps.zh: **裂解**: 加 250 µL Buffer P2，颠倒混匀 6–8 次。**不可涡旋！** 溶液应变透明粘稠（≤5 min）

detailedSteps.en: **Neutralize**: Add 350 µL ice-cold Buffer P3. Mix immediately by inverting 6–8 times. White precipitate forms
detailedSteps.zh: **中和**: 加 350 µL 冰冷 Buffer P3，立即颠倒混匀 6–8 次。形成白色沉淀

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 13,000 × g for 10 min at room temperature
detailedSteps.zh: 室温 13,000 × g 离心 10 min

detailedSteps.en: Transfer supernatant (~800 µL) to a clean tube. **Avoid the white pellet**
detailedSteps.zh: 转移上清（约 800 µL）至新管。**避免吸到白色沉淀**

detailedSteps.en: **Precipitate**: Add 0.7 volumes (~560 µL) isopropanol. Mix by inversion
detailedSteps.zh: **沉淀**: 加 0.7 倍体积（约 560 µL）异丙醇，颠倒混匀

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 13,000 × g for 15 min. DNA pellet may be visible
detailedSteps.zh: 13,000 × g 离心 15 min。DNA 沉淀可能可见

detailedSteps.en: Carefully remove supernatant without disturbing the pellet
detailedSteps.zh: 小心去除上清，勿触碰沉淀

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Add 500 µL 70% ethanol. Centrifuge 5 min at 13,000 × g
Remove ethanol completely. Air-dry pellet 5–10 min (do not over-dry)
detailedSteps.zh: 完全去除乙醇。风干沉淀 5–10 min（不要过度干燥）

detailedSteps.en: **Dissolve**: Add 30–50 µL TE buffer or ddH₂O to pellet
detailedSteps.zh: **溶解**: 加 30–50 µL TE 缓冲液或 ddH₂O 溶解沉淀

detailedSteps.en: **QC**: Measure concentration by NanoDrop. A260/280 should be 1.8–2.0
detailedSteps.zh: **质检**: NanoDrop 测浓度。A260/280 应为 1.8–2.0

detailedSteps.en: Store at -20°C
detailedSteps.zh: -20°C 保存

briefSteps.en: Pellet bacteria → resuspend in P1 → lyse with P2 → neutralize with P3 → centrifuge → precipitate DNA with isopropanol → wash with 70% ethanol → dissolve in TE/H₂O
briefSteps.zh: 离心收菌 → P1 重悬 → P2 裂解 → P3 中和 → 离心 → 异丙醇沉淀 DNA → 70% 乙醇洗涤 → TE/水溶解

name: Protein Concentration by Centrifugal Ultrafiltration (Amicon Ultra)
nameCn: 离心超滤浓缩蛋白（Amicon Ultra）

note.en: MWCO should be 3–6× smaller than protein MW. Common: 3 kDa (peptides/small proteins), 10 kDa (general), 30 kDa (>60 kDa proteins), 50 kDa (>100 kDa). Amicon Ultra-4 (4 mL), Ultra-15 (15 mL), Ultra-0.5 (0.5 mL) available.
note.zh: MWCO 应为蛋白 MW 的 1/3–1/6。常用：3 kDa（多肽/小蛋白）、10 kDa（通用）、30 kDa（>60 kDa 蛋白）、50 kDa（>100 kDa）。可选 Amicon Ultra-4（4 mL）、Ultra-15（15 mL）、Ultra-0.5（0.5 mL）。

components.name: 2. Pre-wet membrane: add 500 µL storage buffer; spin 2 min at 4,000×g; discard

note.en: Removes glycerol storage solution from new membranes. Some protocols skip this step.
note.zh: 去除新膜上的甘油储存液。部分方案可跳过此步。

components.name: 3. Load protein sample into concentrator (do not exceed max volume)

note.en: Max fill: 4 mL (Ultra-4), 15 mL (Ultra-15). Leave 10% headspace. Apply sample gently (do not pipette directly onto membrane).
note.zh: 最大体积：Ultra-4 为 4 mL，Ultra-15 为 15 mL。留 10% 空间。轻柔加样（勿直接往膜上吸打）。

note.en: Do NOT exceed 4,000×g (damages membrane). 4°C preferred for protein stability. Check volume every 5–10 min — do not let membrane go dry (protein aggregates irreversibly on dry membrane).
note.zh: 不超过 4,000×g（损坏膜）。4°C 保护蛋白稳定性。每 5–10 min 检查一次体积——绝不让膜干燥（蛋白会不可逆地聚集在干膜上）。

components.name: 5. Continue centrifugation until desired volume reached

note.en: Typical: 50-fold concentration takes ~30–60 min. Stop at ≥50 µL (Amicon Ultra-4) to allow easy recovery. Mix gently by pipetting up/down every 15–20 min to prevent boundary layer effect.
note.zh: 典型 50 倍浓缩约 30–60 min。停在 ≥50 µL（Ultra-4）以便回收。每 15–20 min 轻柔吸打混匀，防止边界层效应。

note.en: Invert device, place in recovery tube, spin 2 min at 1,000×g. Typical recovery: 90–95%. Rinse membrane with 20–50 µL buffer for maximum recovery.
note.zh: 倒置装置，放入回收管，1,000×g 离心 2 min。典型回收率：90–95%。用 20–50 µL 缓冲液冲洗膜，最大化回收。

components.name: 7. Buffer exchange (optional): dilute 10× in new buffer, repeat concentration (×3 cycles)

note.en: 3 cycles of 10× dilution + concentration removes >99.9% of original buffer components. Equivalent to dialysis but much faster (30 min vs 6–12 h).
note.zh: 3 次 10 倍稀释 + 浓缩循环，去除 >99.9% 原缓冲液成分。效果等同透析，但速度快（30 min vs 6–12 h）。

components.name: 8. Quantify concentrated protein (BCA or Bradford); run SDS-PAGE QC

note.en: Compare before and after by SDS-PAGE to check for aggregation or protein loss.
note.zh: 浓缩前后 SDS-PAGE 对比，检查是否有聚集或蛋白损失。

notes.en: Troubleshooting: Slow filtration → protein aggregating on membrane (reduce concentration, add mild detergent 0.01% Tween-20, or switch to lower MWCO). Protein in filtrate → wrong MWCO or membrane integrity issue. Sticky proteins: add BSA 0.1% carrier, or use PES membranes instead of regenerated cellulose.
notes.zh: 排查：过滤慢→蛋白在膜上聚集（降低浓度、加 0.01% Tween-20 或换更小 MWCO）；蛋白在滤液中→MWCO 选错或膜破损；粘性蛋白：加 0.1% BSA 载体蛋白，或换 PES 膜替代再生纤维素膜。

ref: Millipore Amicon Ultra User Guide; Wingfield (2015) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 80:A.3F.1

usage.en: Concentrate and buffer-exchange proteins using Amicon centrifugal ultrafiltration units.
usage.zh: Amicon 超滤离心管浓缩和换液蛋白质。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 hours，实操: 1 hour

note.en: 4°C (short) or −80°C with glycerol (long) (up to varies)
note.zh: 4°C (short) or −80°C with glycerol (long) (最长 varies)

name: Protein Dialysis and Buffer Exchange

components.name: 1. Prepare dialysis tubing or membrane device

note.en: Tubing: boil in 2% NaHCO₃ + 1 mM EDTA 10 min, rinse thoroughly. Slide-A-Lyzer: soak in buffer 2 min. MWCO: 3.5 kDa (<20 kDa protein), 12–14 kDa (most proteins), 50 kDa (large complexes).
note.zh: 透析袋：2% NaHCO₃ + 1 mM EDTA 煮 10 min，彻底冲洗。Slide-A-Lyzer：缓冲液浸泡 2 min。MWCO：3.5 kDa（<20 kDa 蛋白）、12–14 kDa（大多数蛋白）、50 kDa（大型复合体）。

note.en: Sample expands ~10–20% by osmosis. Seal securely.
note.zh: 渗透作用导致样品膨胀 ~10–20%。密封牢固。

components.name: 3. Dialyze change 1: 500 mL buffer, 2 h, 4°C, gentle stirring

note.en: ≥200× volume ratio. Slow stir bar (no foam = no protein denaturation).
note.zh: ≥200 倍体积比。慢速搅拌（无泡沫 = 无蛋白变性）。

components.name: 4. Dialyze change 2: fresh 500 mL buffer, 2 h, 4°C

note.en: Each change removes >90% of target small molecule.
note.zh: 每次换液去除 >90% 的目标小分子。

note.en: Add 10% glycerol to final buffer if storing at −80°C.
note.zh: 若需 −80°C 保存，末次透析液加 10% 甘油。

note.en: Volume may increase. Quantify: Bradford or BCA. Concentrate if needed: Amicon Ultra (4,000×g, 4°C).
note.zh: 体积可能增加。Bradford 或 BCA 定量。如需浓缩：Amicon Ultra（4,000×g，4°C）。

notes.en: Faster alternatives: (a) HiTrap Desalting column (5 mL, 5 min on AKTA); (b) Amicon Ultra centrifugal filter + dilution (3 cycles removes >99.9%); (c) ZebaSpin Desalting Column (2 min spin). Amicon: do not let protein dry on membrane.
notes.zh: 更快替代方案：(a) HiTrap Desalting 脱盐柱（5 mL，AKTA 5 min）；(b) Amicon Ultra 离心浓缩管 + 稀释换液（3 次去除 >99.9%）；(c) ZebaSpin 脱盐柱（2 min）。Amicon 注意勿让蛋白干在膜上。

ref: Scopes (1994) Protein Purification 3rd ed.; Wingfield (2001) Curr Protoc Protein Sci A.3B.1; ThermoFisher Slide-A-Lyzer Manual

usage.en: Remove small molecules, exchange buffer, or desalt proteins by dialysis.
usage.zh: 透析法去除小分子、换液或蛋白脱盐。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 6–12 hours，实操: 1 hour

note.en: Choose MWCO ≤ ½ protein MW. SnakeSkin or Slide-A-Lyzer (Thermo)
note.zh: 选择截留分子量≤蛋白MW的½。SnakeSkin或Slide-A-Lyzer（Thermo）

note.en: 2 per tube, weighted
note.zh: 每管2个，加重型

note.en: For membrane preparation
note.zh: 用于膜准备

note.en: 1 mM for membrane preparation
note.zh: 1 mM用于膜准备

note.en: 500× sample volume, pre-chilled
note.zh: 500×样品体积，预冷

note.en: For gentle agitation during dialysis
note.zh: 透析时轻柔搅拌用

note.en: Amicon Ultra, if concentration needed
note.zh: Amicon Ultra，如需浓缩

note.en: Overnight dialysis is standard; sample is stable in buffer at 4°C
note.zh: 过夜透析是标准步骤；样品在4°C缓冲液中稳定

note.en: Aliquoted protein at -80°C for long-term storage
note.zh: 分装蛋白-80°C长期保存

detailedSteps.en: **Choose membrane MWCO**: Select a molecular weight cutoff ≤ ½ the molecular weight of your protein. Common choices: 3.5 kDa for small proteins, 10 kDa for most proteins, 20 kDa for large proteins.
detailedSteps.zh: **选择膜截留分子量**: 选择≤蛋白分子量½的截留分子量。常用选择：小蛋白3.5 kDa，大多数蛋白10 kDa，大蛋白20 kDa。

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare dialysis membrane**: Cut tubing to appropriate length (allow ~2× sample volume). Boil in 2% sodium bicarbonate + 1 mM EDTA for 10 min. Rinse thoroughly with distilled water. Store in 20% ethanol at 4°C until use. For Slide-A-Lyzer cassettes, hydrate in buffer for 2 min.
detailedSteps.zh: **准备透析膜**: 剪取适当长度的透析管（留~2×样品体积）。在2%碳酸氢钠 + 1 mM EDTA中煮沸10分钟。用蒸馏水充分冲洗。使用前在20%乙醇中4°C保存。Slide-A-Lyzer盒式透析，在缓冲液中水化2分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare dialysis buffer**: Use ≥500× sample volume of target buffer (e.g., 500 mL buffer for 1 mL sample). Common: PBS pH 7.4, or 20 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 + 150 mM NaCl. Pre-chill to 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: **准备透析缓冲液**: 使用≥500×样品体积的目标缓冲液（如1 mL样品用500 mL缓冲液）。常用：PBS pH 7.4，或20 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 + 150 mM NaCl。预冷至4°C。

detailedSteps.en: **Load sample**: Clamp one end of tubing, load sample using a pipette, remove air bubbles, clamp the other end. Leave room for volume increase due to osmosis. For cassettes, inject sample through port with syringe.
detailedSteps.zh: **加载样品**: 夹住管的一端，用移液器加入样品，去除气泡，夹住另一端。留出空间以应对渗透引起的体积增大。盒式透析用注射器通过端口注入样品。

detailedSteps.en: **Dialyze — Round 1**: Place loaded membrane into first beaker of pre-chilled dialysis buffer. Stir gently with magnetic stirrer at 4°C for 2–4 h.
detailedSteps.zh: **透析——第一轮**: 将装载好的膜放入第一杯预冷透析缓冲液中。4°C磁力搅拌器轻柔搅拌2-4小时。

detailedSteps.en: **Buffer change 1**: Transfer membrane to fresh pre-chilled buffer (same volume). Dialyze 2–4 h at 4°C with stirring.
detailedSteps.zh: **第一次换液**: 将膜转移至新鲜预冷缓冲液（同体积）。4°C搅拌透析2-4小时。

detailedSteps.en: **Buffer change 2**: Transfer to final fresh buffer. Dialyze overnight at 4°C with stirring. ⚠️ Three buffer changes achieve >99.99% exchange for small molecules.
detailedSteps.zh: **第二次换液**: 转移至最后一份新鲜缓冲液。4°C搅拌过夜透析。⚠️ 三次换液可实现小分子>99.99%的交换。

detailedSteps.en: **Recover sample**: Remove membrane from buffer. Open clamp carefully over a clean tube and collect sample. Rinse inside of tubing with small volume of buffer if needed. ⚠️ Sample volume may have increased 10–20% due to osmosis.
detailedSteps.zh: **回收样品**: 从缓冲液中取出膜。在干净管上小心打开夹子收集样品。必要时用少量缓冲液冲洗管内壁。⚠️ 由于渗透作用，样品体积可能增加10-20%。

detailedSteps.en: **Measure concentration**: Determine protein concentration by Bradford assay or A280. Calculate recovery (typically 80–95%). If concentration is too low, use centrifugal concentrator.
detailedSteps.zh: **测定浓度**: 用Bradford法或A280测定蛋白浓度。计算回收率（通常80-95%）。若浓度过低，使用离心浓缩管。

detailedSteps.en: **Store**: Aliquot, add glycerol to 10% if desired for -80°C storage. Snap-freeze in liquid N₂.
detailedSteps.zh: **保存**: 分装，如需-80°C保存可加入甘油至10%。液氮速冻。

briefSteps.en: Prepare dialysis membrane → Load sample → Dialyze against buffer (3 changes) → Recover sample → Measure concentration → Store
briefSteps.zh: 准备透析膜 → 加载样品 → 对缓冲液透析（换液3次）→ 回收样品 → 测定浓度 → 保存

name: Proximity Ligation Assay (PLA)

notes.en: Each fluorescent dot = one interaction (<40 nm). Include single-Ab controls. Quantify dots per cell with ImageJ.
notes.zh: 每个荧光点 = 一次互作（<40 nm）。包含单抗体对照。用 ImageJ 定量每细胞点数。

ref: Söderberg et al. (2006) Nat Methods 3:995

usage.en: Detect protein-protein interactions in situ using proximity ligation assay (PLA/Duolink).
usage.zh: 原位邻近连接实验（PLA/Duolink）检测蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 5 hours

note.en: 0.1–0.5% in PBS for permeabilization
note.zh: 0.1–0.5% PBS 溶液用于透化

note.en: Includes blocking solution, antibody diluent, PLA probes, ligation, amplification reagents, wash buffers, mounting medium
note.zh: 包含封闭液、抗体稀释液、PLA探针、连接、扩增试剂、洗涤缓冲液、封片剂

note.en: Mouse anti-target (validated for IF)
note.zh: 鼠抗目标蛋白（IF验证）

note.en: Rabbit anti-target (validated for IF)
note.zh: 兔抗目标蛋白（IF验证）

note.en: For 37°C incubations
note.zh: 用于37°C孵育

note.en: Primary antibodies incubate overnight at 4°C (standard)
note.zh: 一抗 4°C 过夜孵育（标准操作）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Fixation & Primary Antibodies**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 固定与一抗**

detailedSteps.en: **Fix cells**: Remove media, wash 1× PBS. Fix with 4% PFA at RT for 15 min (or −20°C methanol 10 min for nuclear targets)
detailedSteps.zh: **固定细胞**: 去培养基，PBS 洗 1 次。4% PFA 室温固定 15 min（核内靶点可用 −20°C 甲醇 10 min）

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Wash 3× with PBS, 5 min each on shaker
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: PBS 洗 3 次，每次 5 min，摇床上

detailedSteps.en: **Permeabilize**: Incubate with 0.1–0.5% Triton X-100 in PBS, RT, 10 min
detailedSteps.zh: **透化**: 0.1–0.5% Triton X-100/PBS 室温孵育 10 min

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Wash 2× with PBS, 5 min each
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: PBS 洗 2 次，每次 5 min

detailedSteps.en: **Block**: Add Duolink Blocking Solution. Incubate 37°C, 1 h in humidified chamber
detailedSteps.zh: **封闭**: 加 Duolink 封闭液。37°C 湿盒中孵育 1 h

detailedSteps.en: **Primary antibodies**: Dilute two primary antibodies (from different host species, e.g. mouse + rabbit) in Duolink Antibody Diluent. Apply to cells. Incubate 4°C overnight in humidified chamber. ⚠️ Antibodies must be from different species
detailedSteps.zh: **一抗**: 用 Duolink 抗体稀释液稀释两种一抗（来自不同宿主，如鼠 + 兔）。加至细胞。4°C 湿盒过夜。⚠️ 两种抗体必须来自不同物种

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — PLA Probes, Ligation & Amplification**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — PLA探针、连接与扩增**

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Remove antibodies. Wash 2× with Duolink Wash Buffer A, 5 min each, RT
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 去除抗体。Duolink Wash Buffer A 洗 2 次，每次 5 min，室温

detailedSteps.en: **PLA probes**: Dilute PLUS and MINUS PLA probes 1:5 in Duolink Antibody Diluent. Apply to cells. Incubate 37°C, 1 h in humidified chamber
detailedSteps.zh: **PLA探针**: 用 Duolink 抗体稀释液 1:5 稀释 PLUS 和 MINUS PLA 探针。加至细胞。37°C 湿盒 1 h

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Wash 2× with Wash Buffer A, 5 min each, RT
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: Wash Buffer A 洗 2 次，每次 5 min，室温

detailedSteps.en: **Ligation**: Dilute Duolink Ligation stock 1:5 in water, add ligase 1:40. Apply to cells. Incubate 37°C, 30 min
detailedSteps.zh: **连接**: Duolink 连接母液用水 1:5 稀释，加连接酶 1:40。加至细胞。37°C 30 min

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Wash 2× with Wash Buffer A, 2 min each, RT
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: Wash Buffer A 洗 2 次，每次 2 min，室温

detailedSteps.en: **Amplification**: Dilute Duolink Amplification stock 1:5 in water, add polymerase 1:80. Apply to cells. Incubate 37°C, 100 min. ⚠️ Protect from light from this step onward
detailedSteps.zh: **扩增**: Duolink 扩增母液用水 1:5 稀释，加聚合酶 1:80。加至细胞。37°C 100 min。⚠️ 从此步骤开始避光

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Wash 2× with 1× Wash Buffer B, 10 min each, RT, in the dark
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 1× Wash Buffer B 避光洗 2 次，每次 10 min，室温

detailedSteps.en: **Final wash**: Wash 1× with 0.01× Wash Buffer B, 1 min
detailedSteps.zh: **末洗**: 0.01× Wash Buffer B 洗 1 次，1 min

detailedSteps.en: **Mount**: Apply Duolink In Situ Mounting Medium with DAPI. Coverslip. Seal edges with nail polish. ⚠️ Store slides at −20°C in dark; image within 1 week for best signal
detailedSteps.zh: **封片**: 加 Duolink In Situ 含 DAPI 封片剂。盖盖玻片。指甲油封边。⚠️ 玻片 −20°C 避光保存；1 周内成像信号最佳

detailedSteps.en: **Image**: Acquire on fluorescence or confocal microscope. PLA signals appear as discrete fluorescent dots. Quantify dots per cell using ImageJ/FIJI (Analyze Particles)
detailedSteps.zh: **成像**: 荧光或共聚焦显微镜采集。PLA 信号为离散荧光点。用 ImageJ/FIJI（Analyze Particles）量化每细胞荧光点数

briefSteps.en: Fix → permeabilize → block → primary antibodies → PLA probes → ligation → amplification → mount → image
briefSteps.zh: 固定 → 透化 → 封闭 → 一抗 → PLA探针 → 连接 → 扩增 → 封片 → 成像

name: Recombinant Protein Expression in E. coli
nameCn: 大肠杆菌重组蛋白表达

note.en: Heat shock (heat_shock_transformation): 42°C 30 s → 2 min ice → 200 µL SOC → 37°C 45 min. Plate on LB+antibiotic agar, 37°C overnight.
note.zh: 热激（heat_shock_transformation）：42°C 30 s → 2 min 冰 → 200 µL SOC → 37°C 45 min。涂 LB+抗生素平板，37°C 过夜。

components.name: 2. Inoculate starter culture: 5–10 mL LB+antibiotic, 37°C, 200 rpm, overnight

note.en: Pick single colony. Grow 12–16 h.
note.zh: 挑单克隆。培养 12–16 h。

components.name: 3. Dilute 1:50–1:100 into expression medium (LB or TB), shake 37°C 200 rpm

note.en: 10 mL starter into 500 mL TB (tb_media) in 2 L flask. TB gives ~2× higher cell density than LB.
note.zh: 10 mL 过夜培养物加入 500 mL TB（tb_media），2 L 摇瓶。TB 培养密度比 LB 高 ~2 倍。

components.name: 4. Monitor OD₆₀₀; at OD 0.6–0.8 cool to induction temperature

note.en: Soluble: cool to 18°C (~15 min ice-water bath). High yield/inclusion body: stay at 37°C.
note.zh: 可溶表达：降温至 18°C（~15 min 冰水浴）。高产量/包涵体：保持 37°C。

note.en: Soluble: 0.1–0.5 mM, 18°C, 16–20 h overnight. Inclusion body: 1 mM, 37°C, 3–4 h. Test conditions for new proteins!
note.zh: 可溶：0.1–0.5 mM IPTG，18°C，16–20 h 过夜。包涵体：1 mM IPTG，37°C，3–4 h。新蛋白务必先做条件摸索！

note.en: Discard supernatant. Pellets storable at −80°C (weeks–months). Weigh pellet.
note.zh: 弃上清。菌体沉淀可 −80°C 保存数周至数月。称量湿重。

components.name: 7. Check expression: SDS-PAGE on pre/post-induction samples

note.en: Take 1 mL at OD 0.6 (T=0) and post-induction. Pellet → SDS buffer → boil 5 min. Expect new band at target MW.
note.zh: 分别取 OD 0.6 时（T=0）和诱导后各 1 mL。离心收菌 → SDS 上样缓冲液 → 煮 5 min。应见目标 MW 新带。

components.name: 8. Solubility check: lyse aliquot → 20,000×g 10 min 4°C → SDS-PAGE pellet vs supernatant

note.en: Protein in pellet = inclusion body. Try: lower temp (16°C), less IPTG (0.05 mM), co-express chaperones (GroEL/ES, DnaK), or different strains (Rosetta, SoluBL21, ArcticExpress).
note.zh: 蛋白在沉淀 = 包涵体。试：更低温度（16°C）、更少 IPTG（0.05 mM）、共表达分子伴侣（GroEL/ES、DnaK）、或换菌株（Rosetta、SoluBL21、ArcticExpress）。

note.en: See his_tag_purification or gst_tag_purification.
note.zh: 参见 his_tag_purification 或 gst_tag_purification。

notes.en: Troubleshooting: Low expression → verify plasmid, antibiotic. Insoluble → lower temp, auto-induction (ZYM-5052), solubility tags (MBP, SUMO, NusA). Proteolysis → protease inhibitors, BL21 strain. Codon optimization for eukaryotic genes.
notes.zh: 排查：表达低→检查质粒、抗生素；包涵体→降温、自诱导培养基（ZYM-5052）、可溶性标签（MBP、SUMO、NusA）；降解→加蛋白酶抑制剂、用 BL21 菌株。真核基因注意密码子优化。

ref: Rosano & Ceccarelli (2014) Front Microbiol 5:172; Studier (2005) Protein Expr Purif 41:207–234; Graslund et al. (2008) Nat Methods 5:135–146

usage.en: Express recombinant proteins in E. coli using IPTG induction.
usage.zh: 通过 IPTG 诱导在大肠杆菌中表达重组蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 days，实操: 4 hours

note.en: Or Rosetta/SHuffle as needed
note.zh: 或按需用 Rosetta/SHuffle

note.en: pET, pGEX, pMAL series, etc.
note.zh: pET、pGEX、pMAL 系列等

note.en: Match to plasmid resistance marker
note.zh: 与质粒抗性标记匹配

note.en: Filter-sterilized, store at −20°C
note.zh: 过滤除菌，−20°C 保存

note.en: 50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM imidazole (for His-tag)
note.zh: 50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM 咪唑（His-tag）

note.en: 1 mg/mL final
note.zh: 终浓度 1 mg/mL

note.en: Add fresh, 1 mM final
note.zh: 现配现用，终浓度 1 mM

note.en: EDTA-free for IMAC purification
note.zh: 无EDTA，用于IMAC纯化

note.en: Transformation plates at 4°C for up to 1 week
note.zh: 转化平板4°C保存最长1周

note.en: Expression can proceed overnight at 16°C for soluble protein
note.zh: 可溶蛋白可16°C过夜表达

note.en: Cell pellet can be flash-frozen and stored at −80°C for weeks
note.zh: 菌体可速冻后 −80°C 保存数周

note.en: Clarified lysate can be stored at −80°C briefly if needed
note.zh: 澄清裂解液如需可短期 −80°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Transformation & Starter Culture**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 转化与起始培养**

detailedSteps.en: **Transform**: Transform expression plasmid into BL21(DE3) (or Rosetta, BL21-CodonPlus for rare codons, SHuffle for disulfide bonds) by heat shock. Plate on LB + antibiotic. Incubate 37°C overnight
detailedSteps.zh: **转化**: 将表达质粒热激转化入 BL21(DE3)（或 Rosetta、BL21-CodonPlus 用于稀有密码子，SHuffle 用于二硫键蛋白）。涂 LB + 抗生素平板。37°C 过夜

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Starter & Expression Culture**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 起始培养与表达培养**

detailedSteps.en: **Starter culture**: Pick a single colony into 5–10 mL LB + antibiotic. Grow 37°C, 250 rpm, overnight (or 6–8 h)
detailedSteps.zh: **起始培养**: 挑单克隆至 5–10 mL LB + 抗生素。37°C, 250 rpm 培养过夜（或 6–8 h）

detailedSteps.en: **Inoculate**: Dilute starter 1:100 into fresh 200 mL–1 L LB (or 2×YT/TB for higher density) + antibiotic in baffled flask. ⚠️ Use ≤ 1/5 flask volume for adequate aeration
detailedSteps.zh: **接种**: 起始培养液 1:100 稀释至新鲜 200 mL–1 L LB（或 2×YT/TB 获更高密度）+ 抗生素。挡板瓶。⚠️ 培养体积 ≤ 瓶容量 1/5 以保证通气

detailedSteps.en: **Grow**: Shake 37°C, 250 rpm until OD₆₀₀ = 0.4–0.6 (mid-log phase, typically 2–3 h). ⚠️ Monitor OD carefully — inducing too early or too late reduces yield
detailedSteps.zh: **生长**: 37°C, 250 rpm 振荡至 OD₆₀₀ = 0.4–0.6（对数中期，通常 2–3 h）。⚠️ 密切监测 OD——过早或过晚诱导均降低产量

detailedSteps.en: **Pre-induction sample**: Take 1 mL sample for SDS-PAGE analysis. Pellet, resuspend in 100 µL 1× Laemmli buffer. Boil 5 min. Store at −20°C
detailedSteps.zh: **诱导前取样**: 取 1 mL 样品用于 SDS-PAGE 分析。离心，100 µL 1× Laemmli 缓冲液重悬。煮沸 5 min。−20°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Induce**: Add IPTG to final concentration 0.1–1 mM (optimize: start with 0.5 mM). For soluble protein, consider: lower temperature (16–25°C) + longer time (16–20 h) + lower IPTG (0.1–0.2 mM)
detailedSteps.zh: **诱导**: 加 IPTG 至终浓度 0.1–1 mM（优化：从 0.5 mM 开始）。为获可溶蛋白，考虑：低温（16–25°C）+ 长时间（16–20 h）+ 低 IPTG（0.1–0.2 mM）

detailedSteps.en: **Express**: Standard: 37°C, 3–4 h. Soluble: 16°C, 16–20 h (or 25°C, 4–6 h). Take 1 mL post-induction sample for SDS-PAGE
detailedSteps.zh: **表达**: 标准：37°C, 3–4 h。可溶性：16°C, 16–20 h（或 25°C, 4–6 h）。取 1 mL 诱导后样品用于 SDS-PAGE

detailedSteps.en: **Day 3 — Harvest & Lysis**
detailedSteps.zh: **第三天 — 收菌与裂解**

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest**: Centrifuge 5,000×g, 15 min, 4°C. Discard supernatant. Pellet can be flash-frozen in liquid N₂ and stored at −80°C
detailedSteps.zh: **收菌**: 5,000×g, 4°C 离心 15 min。弃上清。菌体可液氮速冻后 −80°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Resuspend**: Resuspend pellet in 10 mL Lysis Buffer per 500 mL culture (50 mM Tris pH 8.0, 300 mM NaCl, 10 mM imidazole for His-tag; add 1 mM PMSF + 1 mg/mL lysozyme + 1× protease inhibitors). Incubate on ice 30 min
detailedSteps.zh: **重悬**: 每 500 mL 培养用 10 mL 裂解缓冲液（His-tag：50 mM Tris pH 8.0、300 mM NaCl、10 mM 咪唑；加 1 mM PMSF + 1 mg/mL 溶菌酶 + 1× 蛋白酶抑制剂）重悬菌体。冰上 30 min

detailedSteps.en: **Sonicate**: Sonicate on ice — 30 s ON / 30 s OFF, 6–10 cycles, 40% amplitude. ⚠️ Keep on ice to prevent protein denaturation. Solution should become less viscous and more translucent
detailedSteps.zh: **超声破碎**: 冰上超声——30 s 开 / 30 s 关，6–10 个循环，40% 振幅。⚠️ 保持冰上防止蛋白变性。溶液应变得不黏稠且更透明

detailedSteps.en: **Clarify**: Centrifuge 20,000×g, 30 min, 4°C. Collect supernatant (soluble fraction). Save pellet for inclusion body analysis if protein is insoluble. Take samples of both for SDS-PAGE
detailedSteps.zh: **澄清**: 20,000×g, 4°C 离心 30 min。收集上清（可溶部分）。若蛋白不可溶，保留沉淀做包涵体分析。上清和沉淀各取样做 SDS-PAGE

detailedSteps.en: **Proceed to purification**: Load clarified lysate onto appropriate affinity column (Ni-NTA for His-tag, glutathione for GST-tag). Follow the relevant purification protocol
detailedSteps.zh: **进行纯化**: 将澄清裂解液上适当亲和柱（His-tag 用 Ni-NTA，GST-tag 用谷胱甘肽柱）。按相应纯化方案操作

detailedSteps.en: **SDS-PAGE check**: Run pre-induction, post-induction, soluble, insoluble, flow-through, wash, and elution fractions on SDS-PAGE to confirm expression and purification. Stain with Coomassie
detailedSteps.zh: **SDS-PAGE检查**: 跑诱导前、诱导后、可溶、不可溶、穿透液、洗涤液和洗脱液各组分 SDS-PAGE，确认表达和纯化。考马斯蓝染色

briefSteps.en: Transform → starter culture → inoculate large culture → grow to OD 0.4–0.6 → induce with IPTG → harvest → lyse → purify
briefSteps.zh: 转化 → 起始培养 → 接种大培养 → 生长至OD 0.4–0.6 → IPTG诱导 → 收菌 → 裂解 → 纯化

name: Resazurin (alamarBlue) Cell Viability Assay

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate; overnight attachment

note.en: 5,000–20,000 cells/well, 100 µL complete medium. Fill edge wells with PBS. For bacteria/yeast: use 200 µL/well. Same edge-effect precautions as MTT/CCK-8.
note.zh: 每孔 5,000–20,000 细胞，100 µL 完全培养基。边缘孔加 PBS。细菌/酵母用 200 µL/孔。与 MTT/CCK-8 相同的边缘效应注意事项。

components.name: 2. Prepare resazurin stock: 0.15 mg/mL (440 µM) in PBS; filter-sterilize 0.22 µm

note.en: Stock: dissolve 1.5 mg resazurin sodium salt (MW 251.17) in 10 mL PBS. Sterile filter. Store 4°C in dark (stable 3 months) or −20°C long-term. Solution should be dark blue/purple (oxidized = non-fluorescent).
note.zh: 母液：1.5 mg 刃天青钠盐（MW 251.17）溶于 10 mL PBS。0.22 µm 过滤除菌。4°C 避光保存（稳定 3 个月）或 −20°C 长期保存。溶液应为深蓝/紫色（氧化态 = 无荧光）。

note.en: Same controls as MTT: untreated cells, blank (medium only), solvent control. For multi-timepoint: plate separate plates per timepoint.
note.zh: 与 MTT 相同对照：未处理细胞、空白孔（仅培养基）、溶剂对照。多时间点测定：每个时间点单独铺板。

components.name: 4. Add resazurin: 10 µL of 0.15 mg/mL stock per 100 µL medium (final 0.015 mg/mL = 10% v/v)

note.en: OR: use commercial alamarBlue (BioRad) at 10% v/v directly. Do NOT remove medium. Wrap plate in foil.
note.zh: 或：直接用商品化 alamarBlue（BioRad）按 10% v/v 加入。不去除培养基。用锡纸包裹培养板。

components.name: 5. Incubate 1–4 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂ (or overnight for slow metabolizers)

note.en: Monitor color shift: blue → pink/red = reduction by viable cells. Optimal: 20–40% reduction at midpoint. Bacteria/yeast: 2–6 h at appropriate growth temperature.
note.zh: 监测颜色变化：蓝色→粉红/红色 = 活细胞还原。最佳：中间时间点还原率 20–40%。细菌/酵母：在适当生长温度下 2–6 h。

components.name: 6A. Fluorometric reading (preferred): Ex 560 nm / Em 590 nm

note.en: 10–100× more sensitive than absorbance. Use black-sided clear-bottom 96-well plates. Gain: set to give RFU ~50,000–100,000 for controls.
note.zh: 灵敏度比比色法高 10–100 倍。使用黑边透明底 96 孔板。增益：设定使对照孔 RFU 约 50,000–100,000。

note.en: Less sensitive but works with standard plate reader. % Reduction = [(εox at 600 × A570) − (εox at 570 × A600)] / [(εred at 570 × A600_control) − (εred at 600 × A570_control)] × 100. Or use simplified: OD570/OD600 ratio.
note.zh: 灵敏度较低但普通酶标仪即可。公式见英文（需使用摩尔吸收系数）。简化版：OD570/OD600 比值。

note.en: % Viability = (RFU_treated − RFU_blank) / (RFU_control − RFU_blank) × 100. Non-destructive: can remove 10 µL aliquot for reading, return plate to incubator, re-read at later timepoints.
note.zh: % 活力 = (RFU处理 − RFU空白) / (RFU对照 − RFU空白) × 100。非破坏性：取 10 µL 读完后放回孵育箱，可在不同时间点重复读取。

notes.en: Key advantages: (1) Fully non-destructive — can continue culturing after reading; (2) Fluorometric mode: highly sensitive for low cell numbers (100–500 cells); (3) Works with all cell types including primary cells, bacteria, yeast, fungi. Pitfalls: some compounds (quinones, flavonoids) directly reduce resazurin (false positive) — confirm with alternative assay. Stable endpoint: resorufin (pink) is stable for hours; fully reduced = colorless (false low if over-reduced).
notes.zh: 关键优势：(1) 完全非破坏性——读取后可继续培养；(2) 荧光模式灵敏度极高，适合低细胞数（100–500 个细胞）；(3) 适用于所有细胞类型，包括原代细胞、细菌、酵母、真菌。注意：某些化合物（醌类、黄酮类）可直接还原刃天青（假阳性）——用其他方法验证。终点稳定：resorufin（粉红色）稳定数小时；过度还原会变无色（假阴性）。

ref: O'Brien et al. (2000) Eur J Biochem 267:5421–5426; Rampersad (2012) Sensors 12:12347–12360; alamarBlue Assay User Guide (BioRad #BUL0012)

usage.en: Measure cell viability and proliferation using resazurin (alamarBlue) fluorometric assay.
usage.zh: 刃天青（alamarBlue）荧光法检测细胞活力和增殖。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–3 days，实操: 1 hour

materials.name: Microplate reader (fluorescence: Ex 560 nm / Em 590 nm, or absorbance 570/600 nm)

name: Restriction Enzyme Digestion

components.name: DNA template
components.note: 质粒 0.5–1 µg; 基因组 DNA 5–10 µg

components.name: Restriction Enzyme(s)
components.note: 5–10 U per µg DNA; 体积 ≤10% 总反应 (避免甘油抑制)

components.name: 2. 37°C 孵育 1–2 h（或按酶推荐温度）
3. 热灭活 65°C 20 min（如适用）
components.note: 部分酶不可热灭活，需柱纯化

notes.en: For double digestion, confirm buffer compatibility (NEB recommends rCutSmart universal buffer). Star activity: avoid excess enzyme, prolonged incubation, high glycerol. Methylation-sensitive enzymes (DpnI cuts only methylated DNA, used for template removal). Some sticky ends may need blunting (Klenow) before ligation.
notes.zh: 双酶切时确认 buffer 兼容性（NEB 推荐使用 rCutSmart 通用 buffer）。Star activity：避免过量酶、长时间孵育、高甘油浓度。甲基化敏感酶（DpnI 仅切甲基化 DNA，用于去除模板）。部分粘性末端可能需要补平（Klenow）后连接。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; NEB Technical Reference: Restriction Enzymes

usage.en: Cut DNA at specific recognition sites using restriction endonucleases.
usage.zh: 限制性内切酶在特定识别位点切割 DNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 hours，实操: 20 minutes

note.en: 5–20 U per reaction, store at −20°C
note.zh: 每反应 5–20 U，−20°C 保存

note.en: Enzyme-specific or CutSmart (NEB)
note.zh: 酶特异性缓冲液或 CutSmart（NEB）

note.en: 0.5–1 µg plasmid or 5–10 µg gDNA
note.zh: 质粒 0.5–1 µg 或 gDNA 5–10 µg

note.en: For reaction setup
note.zh: 用于配反应体系

note.en: Phosphatase for vector dephosphorylation
note.zh: 磷酸酶用于载体去磷酸化

note.en: 0.8–1.5%, TAE buffer
note.zh: 0.8–1.5%，TAE缓冲液

note.en: 1 kb or 100 bp as appropriate
note.zh: 1 kb 或 100 bp，视需要选择

note.en: Digest can incubate overnight at 37°C for genomic DNA applications
note.zh: 基因组DNA酶切可37°C过夜

note.en: Heat-inactivated digest can be stored at −20°C
note.zh: 热灭活后的酶切产物可 −20°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Plan digest**: Check enzyme(s) on NEB/manufacturer website for compatible buffer, optimal temperature, methylation sensitivity, and star activity conditions. For double digests, use NEBcloner or Double Digest Finder
detailedSteps.zh: **规划酶切**: 在 NEB/厂商网站查酶的兼容缓冲液、最适温度、甲基化敏感性及星号活性条件。双酶切用 NEBcloner 或 Double Digest Finder

detailedSteps.en: **Set up reaction**: In a 1.5 mL tube on ice, combine: DNA (0.5–1 µg plasmid or 5–10 µg gDNA), 5 µL 10× reaction buffer, 1–2 µL restriction enzyme (5–20 U), nuclease-free water to 50 µL. ⚠️ Enzyme should be ≤ 10% of total volume (glycerol inhibition)
detailedSteps.zh: **配反应体系**: 冰上 1.5 mL 管中加：DNA（质粒 0.5–1 µg 或 gDNA 5–10 µg）、5 µL 10× 反应缓冲液、1–2 µL 限制酶（5–20 U）、无核酸酶水补至 50 µL。⚠️ 酶体积 ≤ 总体积 10%（甘油抑制）

detailedSteps.en: **Mix gently**: Pipet up and down or flick tube. Do not vortex. Quick-spin
detailedSteps.zh: **轻柔混匀**: 吹打或弹管。勿涡旋。快速离心

detailedSteps.en: **Incubate**: 37°C (or enzyme-specific temperature), 1 h for analytical digest, 1–4 h for preparative digest. For genomic DNA Southern blot digests: overnight at 37°C with additional enzyme added after 2 h
detailedSteps.zh: **孵育**: 37°C（或酶特异温度），分析性酶切 1 h，制备性酶切 1–4 h。基因组 DNA Southern 酶切：37°C 过夜，2 h 后追加酶

detailedSteps.en: **Heat-inactivate**: 65°C, 20 min (for most enzymes) or 80°C, 20 min (for some enzymes — check datasheet). Some enzymes cannot be heat-inactivated — purify by column or phenol-chloroform
detailedSteps.zh: **热灭活**: 65°C 20 min（多数酶）或 80°C 20 min（部分酶——查说明书）。某些酶无法热灭活——需柱纯化或酚氯仿纯化

detailedSteps.en: **Add phosphatase (optional)**: For vector preparation, add 1 µL CIP/SAP/rSAP and incubate 37°C, 30 min to prevent self-ligation
detailedSteps.zh: **加磷酸酶（可选）**: 载体制备时，加 1 µL CIP/SAP/rSAP，37°C 30 min，防止自连

detailedSteps.en: **Gel verification**: Load 5 µL on 0.8–1.5% agarose gel alongside uncut DNA and ladder. Confirm expected fragment sizes. Complete digestion shows no uncut band
detailedSteps.zh: **凝胶验证**: 取 5 µL 上 0.8–1.5% 琼脂糖凝胶，同时跑未切 DNA 和 ladder。确认片段大小符合预期。完全酶切应无未切条带

detailedSteps.en: **Purify (if needed)**: For downstream cloning, purify digested DNA by column cleanup or gel extraction to remove enzyme, buffer salts, and small fragments
detailedSteps.zh: **纯化（如需）**: 用于后续克隆时，柱纯化或凝胶回收去除酶、缓冲盐和小片段

briefSteps.en: Set up reaction (DNA + enzyme + buffer) → incubate 37°C → heat-inactivate → verify on gel
briefSteps.zh: 配反应体系（DNA+酶+缓冲液）→ 37°C孵育 → 热灭活 → 凝胶验证

name: RNA Agarose Gel Electrophoresis (Denaturing)
nameCn: RNA 琼脂糖凝胶电泳（变性条件）

note.en: Wipe gel tank, comb, tray with RNase Away (RNaseZap). Use RNase-free water (DEPC-treated or nuclease-free). Wear gloves throughout.
note.zh: 用 RNase Away（RNaseZap）擦拭电泳槽、梳子、胶托。使用 RNase-free 水（DEPC 水或无核酸酶水）。全程戴手套。

components.name: 2. Prepare 1% formaldehyde agarose gel (50 mL, fume hood)

note.en: Melt 0.5 g agarose in 40 mL DEPC-ddH₂O; cool to 55°C. Add: 5 mL 10× MOPS buffer + 5 mL 37% formaldehyde (fume hood!). Mix, pour immediately, let solidify 30 min RT. Formaldehyde denatures RNA secondary structure.
note.zh: 0.5 g 琼脂糖溶于 40 mL DEPC 水；冷至 55°C。通风橱中加：5 mL 10× MOPS 缓冲液 + 5 mL 37% 甲醛。混合后立即倒胶，RT 凝固 30 min。甲醛变性 RNA 二级结构。

components.name: 3. Prepare RNA samples: denature with formaldehyde loading buffer

note.en: Mix: RNA (0.5–5 µg) + 5× formaldehyde loading buffer (formamide:formaldehyde:10×MOPS = 500:165:100 µL, + 35 µL DEPC water + 1 µg/mL EtBr). Heat 65°C 15 min; chill on ice 2 min. Add 1 µL 6× DNA loading dye.
note.zh: 混合：RNA（0.5–5 µg）+ 5× 甲醛上样缓冲液（甲酰胺:甲醛:10×MOPS = 500:165:100 µL，+ 35 µL DEPC 水 + 1 µg/mL EtBr）。65°C 15 min 变性；冰 2 min 急冷。加 1 µL 6× DNA 上样缓冲液。

components.name: 4. Pre-run gel in 1× MOPS running buffer, 5 min at 100 V

note.en: MOPS buffer must be fresh (yellowing indicates degradation). Fill tank until buffer just covers gel.
note.zh: MOPS 缓冲液需新鲜配制（变黄表示降解）。缓冲液液面刚好覆盖凝胶。

components.name: 5. Load samples + RNA ladder (e.g., 0.2–10 kb); run at 80 V, ~1.5 h

note.en: Constant voltage 80 V. Running in fume hood recommended (formaldehyde fumes). BPB should run 2/3 of gel.
note.zh: 恒压 80 V。推荐在通风橱中电泳（甲醛挥发）。BPB 跑至凝胶 2/3 处。

note.en: Intact total RNA: 28S band ~2× intensity of 18S. Degraded RNA: smear below 18S, no discrete bands. mRNA appears as smear 0.5–10 kb. Note: 28S (4,718 bp), 18S (1,868 bp) for human.
note.zh: 完整总 RNA：28S 带约为 18S 的 2 倍亮度。降解 RNA：18S 以下有拖尾，无清晰条带。mRNA 呈 0.5–10 kb 弥散带。参考：人类 28S（4,718 bp）、18S（1,868 bp）。

notes.en: Alternative (faster): non-denaturing 1% agarose gel in 1× TAE — suitable for checking RNA integrity only (not size accuracy). Bioanalyzer (Agilent 2100) or TapeStation is more sensitive and quantitative (RIN score). Discard gel and buffer containing formaldehyde in hazardous waste.
notes.zh: 替代方案（更快）：1% 琼脂糖凝胶 1× TAE 非变性电泳——仅用于检查 RNA 完整性（尺寸不准确）。Bioanalyzer（Agilent 2100）或 TapeStation 更灵敏定量（RIN 评分）。含甲醛的凝胶和缓冲液作为危险废弃物处置。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning 3rd ed. Ch. 7.14; Masek et al. (2005) Electrophoresis 26:4709

usage.en: Assess RNA integrity and size by denaturing formaldehyde agarose gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 变性甲醛琼脂糖胶电泳检测 RNA 完整性和大小。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 hours，实操: 1.5 hours

name: RNA Column Extraction (Silica-based)

components.name: 1. 裂解：加 Buffer RLT + β-ME，涡旋
2. 匀浆（组织用匀浆器/针头 5–10 次）
3. 加等体积 70% 乙醇，混匀
4. 转移至 RNeasy 柱，离心 15 s ≥8,000×g
6. On-column DNase I 消化（可选）
components.note: 加 80 µL DNase I mix, 室温 15 min

components.name: 8. 洗涤 Buffer RPE 2× (500 µL)
components.note: 第二次离心 2 min 干燥膜

components.name: 9. 洗脱：30–50 µL RNase-free H₂O
components.note: 静置 1 min → 离心, 可重复一次提高产量

notes.en: Fast (~30 min) and reproducible. Lower yield than TRIzol but higher purity, ideal for RT-qPCR/RNA-seq. Small RNAs (<200 nt, including miRNA) require miRNA enrichment column. Tissue must be stored in RNAlater or flash-frozen in liquid nitrogen.
notes.zh: 快速（~30 min）且重现性好。产量低于 TRIzol，但纯度高，适合 RT-qPCR/RNA-seq。小量 RNA（<200 nt, 含 miRNA）需用 miRNA enrichment column。组织需在 RNAlater 中保存或液氮速冻。

ref: QIAGEN RNeasy Mini Handbook; Chomczynski & Sacchi (2006) Nat Protoc 1:581

usage.en: Extract total RNA from cells or tissues using silica column-based purification.
usage.zh: 硅胶柱法从细胞或组织中提取总 RNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes，实操: 30 minutes

note.en: Includes RLT, RW1, RPE buffers, spin columns
note.zh: 含 RLT、RW1、RPE 缓冲液、离心柱

note.en: Add 10 µL per 1 mL RLT before use
note.zh: 使用前每 1 mL RLT 加 10 µL

note.en: RNase-Free DNase Set (QIAGEN) or equivalent
note.zh: 无 RNase DNase Set（QIAGEN）或等效品

note.en: For homogenization (optional)
note.zh: 用于匀浆（可选）

note.en: Prepared with RNase-free water
note.zh: 用无RNase水配制

note.en: For elution
note.zh: 用于洗脱

note.en: Lysate in RLT can be stored at −80°C before column binding
note.zh: RLT裂解液可在柱结合前 −80°C 保存

note.en: Purified RNA should be stored at −80°C; avoid repeated freeze-thaw
note.zh: 纯化RNA应 −80°C 保存；避免反复冻融

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest cells**: Aspirate media. Wash 1× with ice-cold PBS. For adherent cells (≤ 5×10⁶): add 350 µL Buffer RLT + 1% β-mercaptoethanol directly to well. For suspension cells: pellet 300×g, 5 min, then lyse. ⚠️ Work quickly — RNA degrades rapidly
detailedSteps.zh: **收获细胞**: 吸去培养基。冰冷 PBS 洗 1 次。贴壁细胞（≤ 5×10⁶）：直接加 350 µL Buffer RLT + 1% β-巯基乙醇。悬浮细胞：300×g 离心 5 min 后裂解。⚠️ 快速操作——RNA 降解极快

detailedSteps.en: **Homogenize**: Pass lysate through QIAshredder column (spin 16,000×g, 2 min) or vortex vigorously 1 min. For tissue: use rotor-stator homogenizer
detailedSteps.zh: **匀浆**: 裂解液过 QIAshredder 柱（16,000×g 离心 2 min）或剧烈涡旋 1 min。组织：用转子-定子匀浆器

detailedSteps.en: **Add ethanol**: Add 1 volume (350 µL) 70% ethanol to homogenized lysate. Mix by pipetting (do not spin)
detailedSteps.zh: **加乙醇**: 加 1 倍体积（350 µL）70% 乙醇至匀浆裂解液。吹打混匀（勿离心）

detailedSteps.en: **Bind to column**: Transfer up to 700 µL to RNeasy spin column. Centrifuge 8,000×g, 15 s. Discard flow-through
detailedSteps.zh: **柱结合**: 将最多 700 µL 转入 RNeasy 离心柱。8,000×g 离心 15 s。弃流出液

detailedSteps.en: **Wash (RW1)**: Add 350 µL Buffer RW1. Centrifuge 8,000×g, 15 s. Discard flow-through
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤(RW1)**: 加 350 µL Buffer RW1。8,000×g 离心 15 s。弃流出液

detailedSteps.en: **On-column DNase digest**: Mix 10 µL DNase I + 70 µL Buffer RDD. Apply 80 µL directly onto membrane. Incubate RT, 15 min. ⚠️ Critical for RT-qPCR applications
detailedSteps.zh: **柱上DNase消化**: 混合 10 µL DNase I + 70 µL Buffer RDD。将 80 µL 直接加到膜上。室温 15 min。⚠️ RT-qPCR 应用必须做此步

detailedSteps.en: **Wash (RW1)**: Add 350 µL Buffer RW1. Centrifuge 8,000×g, 15 s. Discard flow-through
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤(RW1)**: 加 350 µL Buffer RW1。8,000×g 离心 15 s。弃流出液

detailedSteps.en: **Wash (RPE) — first**: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE. Centrifuge 8,000×g, 15 s. Discard flow-through
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤(RPE) — 第一次**: 加 500 µL Buffer RPE。8,000×g 离心 15 s。弃流出液

detailedSteps.en: **Wash (RPE) — second**: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE. Centrifuge 8,000×g, 2 min. ⚠️ This longer spin is essential to dry the membrane — residual ethanol inhibits RT-qPCR
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤(RPE) — 第二次**: 加 500 µL Buffer RPE。8,000×g 离心 2 min。⚠️ 延长离心时间以彻底干燥膜——残余乙醇抑制 RT-qPCR

detailedSteps.en: **Dry column**: Transfer column to a new collection tube. Centrifuge 16,000×g, 1 min to eliminate any residual buffer
detailedSteps.zh: **干燥柱**: 将柱转入新收集管。16,000×g 离心 1 min 彻底去除残余缓冲液

detailedSteps.en: **Elute**: Place column in a new 1.5 mL tube. Add 30–50 µL RNase-free water directly onto membrane. Stand 1 min. Centrifuge 8,000×g, 1 min. For maximum concentration, re-apply eluate to column and spin again
detailedSteps.zh: **洗脱**: 柱转入新 1.5 mL 管。加 30–50 µL 无 RNase 水直接加到膜上。静置 1 min。8,000×g 离心 1 min。若需最大浓度，将洗脱液重新过柱再离心

detailedSteps.en: **Quantify & QC**: Measure by NanoDrop (A260/280 ≥ 2.0, A260/230 ≥ 1.8). Check integrity on Bioanalyzer/TapeStation (RIN ≥ 7) or 1% agarose gel (sharp 28S/18S bands, 2:1 ratio)
detailedSteps.zh: **定量与质控**: NanoDrop 测量（A260/280 ≥ 2.0，A260/230 ≥ 1.8）。Bioanalyzer/TapeStation 检测完整性（RIN ≥ 7）或 1% 琼脂糖凝胶（清晰 28S/18S 条带，比值 2:1）

briefSteps.en: Lyse cells → homogenize → add ethanol → bind to silica column → wash → DNase digest on column → wash → elute RNA
briefSteps.zh: 裂解细胞 → 匀浆 → 加乙醇 → 硅胶柱结合 → 洗涤 → 柱上DNase消化 → 洗涤 → 洗脱RNA

name: RNA-seq Library Preparation (PolyA Selection)

note.en: trizol_extraction or rna_column_extraction. Bioanalyzer RIN ≥7.0 (≥8 preferred). Nanodrop: A260/280 ≥2.0, A260/230 ≥1.8. Qubit RNA HS for accurate quantification.
note.zh: trizol_extraction 或 rna_column_extraction。Bioanalyzer RIN ≥7.0（≥8 优选）。Nanodrop：A260/280 ≥2.0、A260/230 ≥1.8。Qubit RNA HS 精确定量。

components.name: 2. Input: 100 ng–1 µg total RNA (optimal 500 ng)

note.en: Degraded RNA: use RiboZero rRNA depletion instead of polyA. Single-cell: 10× Chromium or Smart-seq2.
note.zh: 降解 RNA：用 RiboZero rRNA 去除替代 polyA。单细胞：10× Chromium 或 Smart-seq2。

components.name: 3. PolyA selection: oligo-dT magnetic beads, 65°C 5 min → RT 5 min → wash × 2 → elute 80°C 2 min; repeat once

note.en: 2× binding buffer: 10 mM Tris pH 7.5, 500 mM LiCl, 1 mM EDTA. Double selection reduces rRNA contamination to <5%.
note.zh: 2× 结合缓冲液：10 mM Tris pH 7.5、500 mM LiCl、1 mM EDTA。双次选择将 rRNA 污染降至 <5%。

components.name: 4. Fragmentation: 94°C, 2–8 min in First Strand Buffer

note.en: Target 150–300 bp inserts for Illumina short-read. Stop with 0.5 M EDTA. 2 min → ~300 bp; 8 min → ~130 bp.
note.zh: 目标片段 150–300 bp（Illumina 短读）。0.5 M EDTA 终止。2 min → ~300 bp；8 min → ~130 bp。

components.name: 5. First-strand cDNA: random hexamers + RT (SuperScript III/IV)

note.en: 65°C 5 min (denature) → ice 1 min → add RT mix (1× FS Buffer, 5 mM DTT, RNaseOUT, RT enzyme) → 25°C 10 min → 50°C 50 min → 70°C 15 min → RNase H 37°C 20 min.
note.zh: 65°C 5 min（变性）→ 冰 1 min → 加 RT 混合物（1× FS 缓冲液、5 mM DTT、RNaseOUT、逆转录酶）→ 25°C 10 min → 50°C 50 min → 70°C 15 min → RNase H 37°C 20 min。

components.name: 6. Second-strand cDNA: DNA Pol I + E. coli ligase + RNase H, 16°C 2.5 h

note.en: For strand-specific: replace dTTP with dUTP. Purify with 1.8× AMPure XP (SPRI) beads.
note.zh: 链特异性建库：将 dTTP 替换为 dUTP。1.8× AMPure XP（SPRI）磁珠纯化。

note.en: End repair: T4 DNA Pol + T4 PNK + Klenow, 30°C 30 min. dA-tailing: Klenow (exo-), 37°C 30 min. Purify 1× AMPure XP.
note.zh: 末端修复：T4 DNA Pol + T4 PNK + Klenow，30°C 30 min。加 A 尾：Klenow（exo-），37°C 30 min。1× AMPure XP 纯化。

components.name: 8. Adapter ligation: dual-index Y-adapters, T4 ligase, RT 15 min

note.en: Adapter:insert 10:1 molar. Heat inactivate 65°C 10 min. Size select: 0.8× then 0.2× AMPure XP (removes adapter-dimers at ~130 bp).
note.zh: 接头:插入片段 10:1 摩尔比。65°C 10 min 灭活。双面选择：0.8× + 0.2× AMPure XP（去除 ~130 bp 接头二聚体）。

note.en: 8 cycles for 500 ng input; 12–14 for <100 ng. KAPA HiFi or Q5 polymerase. 1× AMPure XP cleanup.
note.zh: 500 ng 投入量 8 个循环；<100 ng 用 12–14 个循环。KAPA HiFi 或 Q5 聚合酶。1× AMPure XP 纯化。

note.en: Expect ~280–350 bp (insert + adapters). No adapter-dimer (<1% at 130 bp). Qubit dsDNA HS + NEBNext Library Quant qPCR. Sequence: 20–50 M 150 bp PE reads/sample.
note.zh: 预期 ~280–350 bp（插入片段 + 接头）。无接头二聚体（130 bp 处 <1%）。Qubit dsDNA HS + NEBNext Library Quant qPCR 定量。测序：每样品 2,000–5,000 万条 150 bp PE reads。

notes.en: Strand-specific: replace dTTP with dUTP, then UNG digest before PCR → preserves strand info. Low input (<10 ng): Smart-seq2 or NEBNext Single Cell. rRNA depletion (RiboZero) for degraded RNA or non-polyA transcripts (lncRNA, histone mRNA).
notes.zh: 链特异性：第二链合成 dTTP→dUTP，PCR 前 UNG 酶切 → 保留链信息。低投入（<10 ng）：Smart-seq2 或 NEBNext Single Cell。降解 RNA 或非 polyA 转录本：RiboZero rRNA 去除。

ref: Illumina TruSeq Stranded mRNA Reference Guide 15031047; Adiconis et al. (2013) Nat Methods 10:623–629

usage.en: Prepare strand-specific RNA-seq libraries for next-generation sequencing.
usage.zh: 链特异性 RNA-seq 文库构建，用于下一代测序。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 8 hours

note.en: 100 ng – 1 µg, DNase-treated
note.zh: 100 ng - 1 µg，DNase处理过

note.en: NEBNext Poly(A) or Illumina
note.zh: NEBNext Poly(A)或Illumina

note.en: Invitrogen 18080093
note.zh: Invitrogen 18080093

note.en: 50 µM stock
note.zh: 50 µM储液

note.en: Include dUTP for strand-specific
note.zh: 链特异性方案含dUTP

note.en: Beckman Coulter A63881
note.zh: Beckman Coulter A63881

note.en: Illumina TruSeq or NEBNext
note.zh: Illumina TruSeq或NEBNext

note.en: NEB M0202 or included in kit
note.zh: NEB M0202或试剂盒中包含

note.en: KAPA HiFi or NEBNext Q5
note.zh: KAPA HiFi或NEBNext Q5

note.en: For final library quantification
note.zh: 用于最终文库定量

note.en: Murine RNase inhibitor, 40 U/µL
note.zh: 鼠RNase抑制剂，40 U/µL

note.en: For RNA QC and library size
note.zh: 用于RNA质控和文库大小评估

note.en: Purified ds-cDNA can be stored at -20°C overnight
note.zh: 纯化的双链cDNA可-20°C过夜保存

note.en: Final libraries can be stored at -20°C for weeks before sequencing
note.zh: 最终文库可-20°C保存数周后再测序

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — RNA QC and library construction**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — RNA质控和文库构建**

detailedSteps.en: **RNA QC**: Assess RNA quality on Bioanalyzer/TapeStation — require RIN ≥ 7 for polyA selection. Quantify by Qubit RNA HS. Start with 100 ng – 1 µg total RNA. ⚠️ Use RNase-free tips, tubes, and water throughout.
detailedSteps.zh: **RNA质控**: 在Bioanalyzer/TapeStation上评估RNA质量——polyA选择要求RIN ≥ 7。用Qubit RNA HS定量。起始100 ng - 1 µg总RNA。⚠️ 全程使用无RNase的枪头、管和水。

detailedSteps.en: **mRNA enrichment**: Add oligo-dT magnetic beads to total RNA. Heat to 65°C for 5 min to denature, cool to RT to allow polyA binding. Place on magnet, wash 2× with wash buffer. Elute mRNA with 15 µL elution buffer at 80°C for 2 min.
detailedSteps.zh: **mRNA富集**: 向总RNA中加入oligo-dT磁珠。65°C加热5分钟变性，冷却至室温使polyA结合。放置磁力架，用洗涤缓冲液洗涤2次。80°C 2分钟用15 µL洗脱缓冲液洗脱mRNA。

detailedSteps.en: **Fragmentation**: Add fragmentation buffer (divalent cations in Tris buffer). Incubate at 94°C for exactly 8 min (for ~200 bp inserts) or adjust time for desired size. ⚠️ Timing is critical — too long = very short fragments, too short = poor cluster density.
detailedSteps.zh: **片段化**: 加入片段化缓冲液（Tris缓冲液中的二价阳离子）。94°C精确孵育8分钟（用于~200 bp插入片段），或调整时间以获得所需大小。⚠️ 时间至关重要——太长=片段过短，太短=簇密度低。

detailedSteps.en: **First strand cDNA synthesis**: Add random hexamer primers, dNTPs, first strand buffer, RNase inhibitor, and reverse transcriptase (SuperScript III/IV). Incubate: 25°C for 10 min (primer annealing), 42°C for 50 min (extension), 70°C for 15 min (inactivation).
detailedSteps.zh: **第一链cDNA合成**: 加入随机六聚体引物、dNTPs、第一链缓冲液、RNase抑制剂和反转录酶（SuperScript III/IV）。孵育：25°C 10分钟（引物退火）、42°C 50分钟（延伸）、70°C 15分钟（失活）。

detailedSteps.en: **Second strand synthesis**: Add second strand buffer (with dUTP for strand-specific protocols), DNA Pol I, and RNase H. Incubate at 16°C for 1 h. The dUTP incorporation marks the second strand for later removal.
detailedSteps.zh: **第二链合成**: 加入第二链缓冲液（链特异性方案含dUTP）、DNA Pol I和RNase H。16°C孵育1小时。dUTP掺入标记第二链以便后续去除。

detailedSteps.en: **Purify double-stranded cDNA**: Clean up with 1.8× AMPure XP beads. Elute in 50 µL nuclease-free water.
detailedSteps.zh: **纯化双链cDNA**: 用1.8× AMPure XP磁珠纯化。50 µL无核酸酶水洗脱。

detailedSteps.en: **End repair**: Add End Repair Mix (T4 DNA polymerase, Klenow, T4 PNK). Incubate 30 min at 20°C. Purify with 1.8× AMPure XP beads.
detailedSteps.zh: **末端修复**: 加入末端修复混合液（T4 DNA聚合酶、Klenow、T4 PNK）。20°C孵育30分钟。用1.8× AMPure XP磁珠纯化。

detailedSteps.en: **A-tailing**: Add dATP and Klenow fragment (exo-). Incubate 30 min at 37°C. This adds a single 3' A overhang for adapter ligation.
detailedSteps.zh: **加A尾**: 加入dATP和Klenow片段（exo-）。37°C孵育30分钟。在3'端添加单个A突出以便接头连接。

detailedSteps.en: **Adapter ligation**: Add diluted indexed adapters (use 1:10 dilution for <100 ng input) and T4 DNA Ligase. Incubate 15 min at 20°C. ⚠️ For multiplexing, use unique dual index (UDI) adapters to prevent index hopping.
detailedSteps.zh: **接头连接**: 加入稀释的索引接头（<100 ng起始量用1:10稀释）和T4 DNA连接酶。20°C孵育15分钟。⚠️ 多重测序时使用唯一双索引（UDI）接头防止索引跳转。

detailedSteps.en: **Size selection**: Perform double-sided size selection with AMPure XP: first 0.6× to remove large fragments (discard beads), then 0.2× additional (0.8× total) to capture 200–500 bp fragments. Elute in 20 µL.
detailedSteps.zh: **大小选择**: 用AMPure XP进行双侧大小选择：首先0.6×去除大片段（丢弃磁珠），然后额外0.2×（总共0.8×）捕获200-500 bp片段。20 µL洗脱。

detailedSteps.en: **PCR amplification**: Add PCR master mix and universal/index primers. Cycle: 98°C 30 s; then 10–15 cycles of 98°C 10 s, 60°C 30 s, 72°C 30 s; final extension 72°C 5 min. ⚠️ Minimize cycles to reduce PCR duplicates — use 10 cycles for ≥100 ng input, up to 15 for low input.
detailedSteps.zh: **PCR扩增**: 加入PCR预混液和通用/索引引物。循环：98°C 30秒；然后10-15个循环的98°C 10秒、60°C 30秒、72°C 30秒；最终延伸72°C 5分钟。⚠️ 尽量减少循环数以降低PCR重复——≥100 ng起始量用10个循环，低起始量最多15个。

detailedSteps.en: **Final cleanup**: Purify with 0.8× AMPure XP beads. Elute in 20 µL 10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0.
detailedSteps.zh: **最终纯化**: 用0.8× AMPure XP磁珠纯化。用20 µL 10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0洗脱。

detailedSteps.en: **Library QC**: Run 1 µL on Bioanalyzer/TapeStation (expect peak at 300–400 bp including adapters). Quantify by Qubit dsDNA HS and qPCR (KAPA Library Quant). Libraries should be 2–20 nM for sequencing.
detailedSteps.zh: **文库质控**: 取1 µL在Bioanalyzer/TapeStation上分析（期望峰值在300-400 bp含接头）。用Qubit dsDNA HS和qPCR（KAPA Library Quant）定量。文库浓度应为2-20 nM用于测序。

briefSteps.en: QC RNA → mRNA enrichment (polyA) or rRNA depletion → Fragment → Reverse transcribe → 2nd strand synthesis → End repair → A-tail → Adapter ligation → PCR amplification → Library QC
briefSteps.zh: RNA质控 → mRNA富集（polyA）或rRNA去除 → 片段化 → 反转录 → 第二链合成 → 末端修复 → 加A尾 → 接头连接 → PCR扩增 → 文库质控

name: RT-qPCR Protocol
nameCn: 实时荧光定量 PCR 流程

notes.en: Reference genes: GAPDH / ACTB / 18S rRNA. Analysis: 2^(−ΔΔCt) method. ≥3 technical replicates, ≥3 biological replicates. Primer efficiency should be 90–110%.
notes.zh: 内参基因: GAPDH / ACTB / 18S rRNA。分析: 2^(-ΔΔCt) 法。技术重复 ≥3，生物学重复 ≥3。引物效率应在 90–110%。NTC (no template control) 必需。

ref: Bustin et al. (2009) Clin Chem 55:611–622 (MIQE Guidelines); Livak & Schmittgen (2001) Methods 25:402–408

usage.en: Quantify gene expression or DNA copy number by real-time quantitative PCR.
usage.zh: 实时定量 PCR 定量基因表达或 DNA 拷贝数。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 1 hour

note.en: See TRIzol extraction protocol
note.zh: 参见 TRIzol 提取方案

note.en: e.g., SuperScript IV, PrimeScript
note.zh: 如 SuperScript IV, PrimeScript

note.en: Or TaqMan probes
note.zh: 或 TaqMan 探针

note.en: Tm 58–62°C, product 80–200 bp
GAPDH / ACTB / 18S rRNA
note.zh: GAPDH / ACTB / 18S rRNA

note.en: cDNA can be stored at -20°C for months
note.zh: cDNA 可 -20°C 保存数月

detailedSteps.en: **RNA quality check**: Measure A260/280 (should be ~2.0). A260/230 >1.7. Optionally check on agarose gel (28S:18S ~2:1)
**DNase treatment** (recommended): Use TURBO DNase or on-column DNase. Heat-inactivate 75°C 5 min or use DNase removal reagent
detailedSteps.zh: **DNase 处理**（推荐）：用 TURBO DNase 或柱上 DNase。75°C 5 min 热灭活或用 DNase 去除试剂

detailedSteps.en: **Reverse transcription**: Use 500 ng–2 µg RNA per 20 µL reaction. Use oligo-dT + random hexamer mix for best coverage
detailedSteps.zh: **反转录**: 每 20 µL 反应体系用 500 ng–2 µg RNA。Oligo-dT + 随机六聚体混合引物效果最好

detailedSteps.en: RT program: 25°C 5 min → 42–50°C 30–60 min → 85°C 5 min (inactivation). Store cDNA at -20°C
detailedSteps.zh: RT 程序：25°C 5 min → 42–50°C 30–60 min → 85°C 5 min（灭活）。cDNA -20°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **Dilute cDNA**: 1:5 to 1:20 with nuclease-free H₂O (typically 1:10). Include –RT control (no reverse transcriptase)
detailedSteps.zh: **稀释 cDNA**: 用无核酸酶水 1:5 至 1:20 稀释（通常 1:10）。设置 –RT 对照（不加逆转录酶）

detailedSteps.en: **qPCR setup (20 µL)**: 10 µL 2× SYBR Master Mix + 0.4 µL Fw primer (10 µM) + 0.4 µL Rv primer (10 µM) + 2 µL cDNA + 7.2 µL H₂O
detailedSteps.zh: **qPCR 体系 (20 µL)**: 10 µL 2× SYBR Master Mix + 0.4 µL Fw 引物 (10 µM) + 0.4 µL Rv 引物 (10 µM) + 2 µL cDNA + 7.2 µL H₂O

detailedSteps.en: ⚠️ Set up on ice. Include NTC (no template control) for every primer pair. Technical replicates ≥3
detailedSteps.zh: ⚠️ 冰上操作。每对引物设 NTC（无模板对照）。技术重复 ≥3

detailedSteps.en: **Cycling**: 95°C 10 min (polymerase activation) → [95°C 15 s → 60°C 60 s] × 40 cycles → Melt curve: 60°C→95°C
**Melt curve analysis**: Single peak = specific product ✓. Multiple peaks = non-specific or primer dimers ✗
detailedSteps.zh: **溶解曲线分析**: 单峰 = 特异性产物 ✓。多峰 = 非特异或引物二聚体 ✗

detailedSteps.en: **Primer efficiency**: Make 5-point serial dilution of cDNA (1:4). Plot Ct vs log(dilution). Slope should be -3.2 to -3.5 (efficiency 90–110%)
detailedSteps.zh: **引物效率**: 做 5 点 cDNA 梯度稀释（1:4）。Ct vs log(稀释) 作图。斜率应为 -3.2 ~ -3.5（效率 90–110%）

detailedSteps.en: **Analysis**: ΔCt = Ct(target) – Ct(reference). ΔΔCt = ΔCt(treated) – ΔCt(control). Fold change = 2^(-ΔΔCt)
detailedSteps.zh: **分析**: ΔCt = Ct(目标) – Ct(内参)。ΔΔCt = ΔCt(处理组) – ΔCt(对照组)。倍数变化 = 2^(-ΔΔCt)

detailedSteps.en: Bio reps ≥3. Stats: t-test on ΔCt values (NOT fold changes). Report as mean ± SEM
detailedSteps.zh: 生物学重复 ≥3。统计：对 ΔCt 值做 t 检验（不是倍数变化）。报告 mean ± SEM

briefSteps.en: Extract RNA → DNase → RT → dilute cDNA → qPCR (SYBR) → melt curve → analyze by 2^(-ΔΔCt)
briefSteps.zh: RNA 提取 → DNase → 反转录 → 稀释 cDNA → qPCR (SYBR) → 溶解曲线 → 2^(-ΔΔCt) 分析

name: Sandwich ELISA

notes.en: 7-point standard curve + blank. High-binding plates. Wash 3-5× PBST between steps. R² > 0.99.
notes.zh: 7 点标准曲线 + 空白。高结合力板。每步间用 PBST 洗 3-5 次。R² > 0.99。

ref: Engvall & Perlmann (1971) Immunochemistry 8:871

usage.en: Quantify target protein in samples using sandwich ELISA with capture and detection antibody pair.
usage.zh: 夹心 ELISA 法定量样品中的靶蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1 day，实操: 4 hours

note.en: e.g., Corning #9018 or Nunc MaxiSorp
note.zh: 如 Corning #9018 或 Nunc MaxiSorp

note.en: Purified, matched pair with detection antibody
note.zh: 纯化的，与检测抗体配对

note.en: Matched pair with capture antibody
note.zh: 与捕获抗体配对

note.en: e.g., R&D Systems DY998
note.zh: 如 R&D Systems DY998

note.en: For standard curve
note.zh: 用于标准曲线

note.en: e.g., R&D Systems DY999
note.zh: 如 R&D Systems DY999

note.en: e.g., R&D Systems DY994
note.zh: 如 R&D Systems DY994

note.en: 0.05 M carbonate-bicarbonate pH 9.6 or PBS
note.zh: 0.05 M 碳酸盐缓冲液 pH 9.6 或 PBS

note.en: PBS + 0.05% Tween-20
note.zh: PBS + 0.05% Tween-20

note.en: 1% BSA in PBS
note.zh: 1% BSA-PBS

note.en: Coated plate can be stored sealed at 4°C for up to 1 week
note.zh: 包被好的板密封后 4°C 可保存至多 1 周

note.en: Blocked plate can be stored sealed at 4°C overnight
note.zh: 封闭后的板密封 4°C 可过夜保存

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Plate Coating**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 包被**

detailedSteps.en: **Coat plate**: Dilute capture antibody to working concentration (typically 1–10 µg/mL) in coating buffer (0.05 M carbonate-bicarbonate buffer pH 9.6 or PBS). Add 100 µL/well to high-binding 96-well ELISA plate. Incubate overnight at 4°C (or 2 h at 37°C)
detailedSteps.zh: **包被**: 用包被缓冲液（0.05 M 碳酸盐缓冲液 pH 9.6 或 PBS）将捕获抗体稀释至工作浓度（通常 1–10 µg/mL）。加 100 µL/孔于高结合力 96 孔 ELISA 板。4°C 过夜孵育（或 37°C 2 h）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Assay**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 检测**

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Discard coating solution. Wash 3× with 300 µL/well PBST (PBS + 0.05% Tween-20). Blot plate on paper towels between washes
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 弃包被液。用 300 µL/孔 PBST（PBS + 0.05% Tween-20）洗涤 3 次。每次洗涤间在纸巾上扣干

detailedSteps.en: **Block**: Add 200 µL/well blocking buffer (1% BSA in PBS, or 5% non-fat milk in PBS). Incubate 1–2 h at RT with gentle rocking. Wash 3× PBST
detailedSteps.zh: **封闭**: 每孔加 200 µL 封闭液（1% BSA-PBS 或 5% 脱脂奶粉-PBS）。室温轻摇孵育 1–2 h。PBST 洗涤 3 次

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare standards**: Prepare 7-point 2-fold serial dilution of recombinant protein standard in assay diluent (1% BSA-PBS). Include blank (diluent only). Dilute samples as needed in same diluent
detailedSteps.zh: **配制标准品**: 用检测稀释液（1% BSA-PBS）将重组蛋白标准品做 7 点 2 倍梯度稀释。设空白对照（仅稀释液）。样品用相同稀释液适当稀释

detailedSteps.en: **Add samples and standards**: Add 100 µL/well of standards and samples in duplicate. Incubate 2 h at RT (or overnight at 4°C for higher sensitivity). Wash 5× PBST
detailedSteps.zh: **加样品和标准品**: 每孔加 100 µL 标准品和样品，双复孔。室温孵育 2 h（或 4°C 过夜提高灵敏度）。PBST 洗涤 5 次

detailedSteps.en: **Detection antibody**: Add 100 µL/well biotinylated detection antibody at working concentration (typically 0.5–2 µg/mL in 1% BSA-PBS). Incubate 1 h at RT. Wash 5× PBST
detailedSteps.zh: **检测抗体**: 每孔加 100 µL 生物素化检测抗体工作浓度（通常 1% BSA-PBS 中 0.5–2 µg/mL）。室温孵育 1 h。PBST 洗涤 5 次

detailedSteps.en: **Enzyme conjugate**: Add 100 µL/well Streptavidin-HRP (diluted per manufacturer's instructions, typically 1:200–1:1000 in 1% BSA-PBS). Incubate 30 min at RT. Wash 5× PBST. ⚠️ Wash thoroughly — residual conjugate causes high background
detailedSteps.zh: **酶标结合物**: 每孔加 100 µL Streptavidin-HRP（按说明书稀释，通常 1% BSA-PBS 中 1:200–1:1000）。室温孵育 30 min。PBST 洗涤 5 次。⚠️ 充分洗涤——残留结合物导致高背景

detailedSteps.en: **Substrate**: Add 100 µL/well TMB substrate. Incubate 5–20 min at RT in the dark. Blue color develops proportionally to analyte concentration
detailedSteps.zh: **底物显色**: 每孔加 100 µL TMB 底物。室温避光孵育 5–20 min。蓝色深浅与分析物浓度成正比

detailedSteps.en: **Stop reaction**: Add 50 µL/well 2 N H₂SO₄ (stop solution). Color changes from blue to yellow. ⚠️ Add stop solution in same order and timing as substrate for consistent development time
detailedSteps.zh: **终止反应**: 每孔加 50 µL 2 N H₂SO₄（终止液）。颜色由蓝变黄。⚠️ 终止液加入顺序和时间应与底物一致，确保显色时间均匀

detailedSteps.en: **Read plate**: Measure OD at 450 nm (reference 570 nm) within 30 min of stopping. Subtract blank OD. Plot standard curve and calculate sample concentrations using 4-parameter logistic fit. R² should be >0.99
detailedSteps.zh: **读板**: 终止后 30 min 内测定 OD450（参考波长 570 nm）。减去空白 OD。绘制标准曲线，用四参数 logistic 拟合计算样品浓度。R² 应 >0.99

briefSteps.en: Coat plate with capture antibody → block → add samples/standards → detection antibody → enzyme conjugate → substrate → stop → read OD450
briefSteps.zh: 包被捕获抗体 → 封闭 → 加样品/标准品 → 检测抗体 → 酶标结合物 → 底物显色 → 终止 → 读取 OD450

name: Sanger Sequencing Sample Preparation

components.name: 1. Prepare DNA template: miniprep or PCR product

note.en: Plasmid (miniprep): 100–500 ng/µL recommended. PCR product: must be gel-purified (gel_extraction) or ExoSAP-IT cleaned (incubate PCR product with ExoSAP-IT 37°C 15 min → 80°C 15 min inactivate). Residual primers/dNTPs interfere with sequencing.
note.zh: 质粒（miniprep）：100–500 ng/µL。PCR 产物：必须胶回收纯化（gel_extraction）或 ExoSAP-IT 处理（37°C 15 min → 80°C 15 min 灭活）。残留引物/dNTP 会干扰测序。

note.en: Most providers require 3.2 pmol/µL (= 3.2 µM). Common universal primers: M13F (-20): 5'-GTAAAACGACGGCCAGT-3'; M13R: 5'-CAGGAAACAGCTATGAC-3'; T7: 5'-TAATACGACTCACTATA-3'; SP6: 5'-ATTTAGGTGACACTATAG-3'. Custom primers: Tm 55–65°C, length 18–24 nt, GC content 40–60%.
note.zh: 多数服务商要求 3.2 pmol/µL（= 3.2 µM）。通用引物：M13F (-20)、M13R、T7、SP6（见英文）。自定义引物：Tm 55–65°C，长度 18–24 nt，GC 40–60%。

note.en: Premix submission (Genewiz/Azenta): 5 µL DNA (100–500 ng plasmid or 5–20 ng/100 bp PCR) + 5 µL primer (3.2 pmol/µL) = 10 µL total. Tube-only submission: DNA and primer in separate tubes. Follow provider-specific guidelines.
note.zh: 预混提交（Genewiz/Azenta）：5 µL DNA（100–500 ng 质粒或 5–20 ng/100 bp PCR）+ 5 µL 引物（3.2 pmol/µL）= 10 µL。独立管提交：DNA 和引物分管。按服务商说明操作。

components.name: 4. Label tubes clearly; keep on ice; submit same day

note.en: Label with date, sample ID, primer name. Avoid freeze-thaw of sequencing samples. Most sequencing services: results in 24–48 h.
note.zh: 清晰标注日期、样品编号、引物名称。避免冻融。多数测序服务 24–48 h 出结果。

components.name: 5. Analyze results: align chromatogram to expected sequence

note.en: Tools: Benchling, SnapGene Viewer, 4Peaks, ApE. BLAST against reference. Check: (a) expected insert present, (b) correct reading frame, (c) no frame-shift mutations from PCR. Reliable reads typically start at bp 50–100, end at bp 700–900.
note.zh: 工具：Benchling、SnapGene Viewer、4Peaks、ApE。BLAST 比对参考序列。检查：(a) 预期插入片段存在；(b) 正确阅读框；(c) 无 PCR 引入移码突变。可靠读取通常从第 50–100 bp 开始，到第 700–900 bp 结束。

notes.en: Read length: typical Sanger = 700–1,000 bp per reaction. For long inserts: design primers every 600–700 bp (primer walking). Troubleshooting: no reads → check DNA purity (A260/280 ≥1.8, no salt/ethanol contamination); noisy reads → secondary structure (use DMSO additive); short reads → primer-template mismatch.
notes.zh: 读取长度：典型 Sanger = 700–1,000 bp/反应。长插入片段：每 600–700 bp 设计一个引物（引物步进法）。排查：无读取→检查 DNA 纯度（A260/280 ≥1.8，无盐/乙醇污染）；噪声大→二级结构（加 DMSO 添加剂）；读取短→引物-模板不匹配。

ref: Sanger et al. (1977) PNAS 74:5463–5467; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning 3rd ed.; Genewiz/Azenta Sequencing Guidelines

usage.en: Prepare DNA samples and primers for Sanger sequencing submission.
usage.zh: 准备 DNA 样品和引物，提交 Sanger 测序。

label.en: Protocol — 30 minutes + 24–48 h service, hands-on: 30 minutes
label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 minutes + 24–48 h service，实操: 30 minutes

materials.name: 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes or strip tubes

note.en: 4°C (short) or −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: 4°C (short) or −20°C (最长 1 week)

name: Silver Stain (SDS-PAGE)

components.name: 1. Fix gel: 50% MeOH + 12% AcOH + 0.05% formaldehyde, ≥1 h (overnight OK), RT

note.en: Fix in 200 mL fixer per standard mini gel. Removes SDS and stops protein migration. Minimum 1 h; overnight improves sensitivity.
note.zh: 每块标准 mini 胶用 200 mL 固定液。去除 SDS 并停止蛋白迁移。最少 1 h；过夜固定可提高灵敏度。

note.en: Removes acetic acid and most methanol. Fresh EtOH each wash.
note.zh: 去除乙酸和大部分甲醇。每次用新鲜乙醇。

components.name: 3. Sensitize: 0.02% Na₂S₂O₃ (sodium thiosulfate) in water, exactly 1 min, RT

note.en: CRITICAL: exactly 1 min. Sensitization enhances silver binding to proteins. Immediately wash 3 × 20 s ddH₂O after.
note.zh: 关键：精确计时 1 min。增强银与蛋白的结合。立即用 ddH₂O 洗 3 × 20 s。

note.en: Rapid rinses only — do not over-wash here.
note.zh: 快速冲洗——此步不可过长。

components.name: 5. Silver impregnation: 0.2% AgNO₃ + 0.075% formaldehyde, 20 min, 4°C or RT

note.en: Prepare fresh: 0.2 g AgNO₃/100 mL ddH₂O + 75 µL 37% formaldehyde. 4°C gives more uniform staining. Protect from light.
note.zh: 新鲜配制：0.2 g AgNO₃/100 mL 水 + 75 µL 37% 甲醛。4°C 染色更均匀。避光操作。

note.en: Removes unbound silver. Do not over-rinse.
note.zh: 去除未结合的银。不可过长冲洗。

components.name: 7. Develop: 6% Na₂CO₃ + 0.05% formaldehyde + 0.0004% Na₂S₂O₃, RT; monitor until bands appear

note.en: Develop time: 30 s – 10 min. Monitor carefully — over-development gives dark background. Fresh developer required. Swirl gently throughout.
note.zh: 显影时间：30 s – 10 min。仔细监控——过度显影导致背景过深。需新鲜配制显影液。轻柔摇动。

components.name: 8. Stop: 50% MeOH + 12% AcOH, 10 min; rinse 3 × ddH₂O, 5 min each

note.en: Immediately add stop solution as soon as desired staining intensity is reached. Final rinse in ddH₂O before imaging.
note.zh: 达到所需染色强度后立即加终止液。成像前用 ddH₂O 末次冲洗。

components.name: 9. Image gel on white-light transilluminator or scanner

note.en: Use flatbed scanner (600 dpi minimum) or gel documentation system with white light. For densitometry: Image Lab or ImageJ.
note.zh: 用平板扫描仪（至少 600 dpi）或凝胶成像系统（白光）拍照。密度扫描：Image Lab 或 ImageJ。

notes.en: Sensitivity: 1–10 ng protein/band (10–100× more sensitive than Coomassie). MS-compatible silver stain: omit glutaraldehyde and formaldehyde (use Shevchenko MS-compatible protocol: sensitizer = sodium thiosulfate, developer = Na₂CO₃ only). Interference: keratin (skin) gives false bands — wear gloves, use clean reagents. Contamination with dust/fingerprints ruins gel.
notes.zh: 灵敏度：1–10 ng 蛋白/条带（比考马斯蓝灵敏 10–100 倍）。质谱兼容银染：省去戊二醛和甲醛（用 Shevchenko MS 兼容方案：仅用硫代硫酸钠增敏，Na₂CO₃ 显影）。干扰：角蛋白（皮肤来源）产生假阳性条带——戴手套，使用清洁试剂。灰尘/指纹会损坏结果。

ref: Shevchenko et al. (1996) Anal Chem 68:850–858; Blum et al. (1987) Electrophoresis 8:93–99; Mortz et al. (2001) Proteomics 1:1359

usage.en: See notes for usage.
usage.zh: 详见备注。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 3 hours

note.en: 50% MeOH/12% AcOH at RT (up to overnight)
note.zh: 50% MeOH/12% AcOH at RT (最长 overnight)

name: Single Colony Picking and Screening

components.name: 1. Prepare transformation plates: use LB agar + appropriate antibiotic

note.en: Plate density: 50–200 colonies/plate is ideal. Too dense (>500) → colonies too small; too sparse → wasted space. Cool agar to 55°C before pouring (25 mL/plate for 10 cm). Pre-warm plates at 37°C 30 min before use.
note.zh: 理想菌落密度：50–200 个/板。过密（>500）菌落太小；过稀浪费空间。琼脂冷至 55°C 后倒板（10 cm 皿约 25 mL）。用前 37°C 预热 30 min。

note.en: Add 40 µL X-gal (20 mg/mL in DMF) + 4 µL IPTG (100 mM) per plate; spread, let dry 30 min. White colonies = insert present; blue = self-ligation/empty vector. Requires lacZα vectors (pUC, pGEM, pBlueScript).
note.zh: 每板加 40 µL X-gal（20 mg/mL in DMF）+ 4 µL IPTG（100 mM）；涂抹，晾干 30 min。白色 = 含插入片段；蓝色 = 自连/空载体。需要 lacZα 载体（pUC、pGEM、pBlueScript）。

note.en: Move plates to 4°C after 16 h if not picking immediately — colonies stop growing and are easier to distinguish. Blue-white screen: return to 4°C 1–2 h to develop color.
note.zh: 16 h 后如不立即挑取，移至 4°C——菌落停止生长，更易分辨。蓝白筛选：返回 4°C 1–2 h 充分显色。

components.name: 4. Prepare culture tubes: 1.5–2 mL LB + antibiotic per clone

note.en: Use 14 mL round-bottom or 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes. Label carefully. Prepare 10–24 clones per ligation to ensure ≥1 correct clone.
note.zh: 使用 14 mL 圆底管或 1.5 mL Eppendorf 管。认真标记。每次连接挑 10–24 个克隆以确保 ≥1 个正确克隆。

components.name: 5. Pick colonies with sterile toothpick or 10 µL pipette tip

note.en: Touch colony center with toothpick tip. Inoculate tube AND streak onto numbered grid on a fresh LB+antibiotic plate (master plate). Master plate: incubate 37°C overnight, store at 4°C as backup.
note.zh: 用牙签或 10 µL 枪头尖端触碰菌落中心。同时接种培养管并在备用板（主板）上划线编号。主板：37°C 过夜，4°C 保存备用。

note.en: Eppendorf tubes: tape closed at angle, place in shaker. Round-bottom: use at 45° angle in rack.
note.zh: Eppendorf 管：斜插入摇床。圆底管：45° 角放置。

components.name: 7. Screen by colony PCR or diagnostic restriction digest

note.en: Colony PCR (colony_pcr): take 1 µL of overnight culture as template; use vector-based primers (M13/T7/SP6) or gene-specific primers flanking insert. Expect correct band size. Restriction digest: miniprep first, then diagnostic digest with 1–2 enzymes that distinguish insert orientation/size.
note.zh: 菌落 PCR（colony_pcr）：取 1 µL 过夜培养液作模板；用载体通用引物（M13/T7/SP6）或跨插入片段的基因特异引物。预期正确条带大小。限制酶消化：先 miniprep，再用 1–2 种酶进行诊断性酶切，区分插入方向/大小。

components.name: 8. Select positive clones; send for Sanger sequencing

note.en: sanger_sequencing_prep. Send miniprep DNA (50–100 ng/µL) + sequencing primer. Verify full insert sequence, no PCR errors. Select 2–3 positive + sequencing-confirmed clones.
note.zh: sanger_sequencing_prep。送 miniprep DNA（50–100 ng/µL）+ 测序引物。验证完整插入序列，无 PCR 错误。选择 2–3 个阳性且测序确认的克隆。

components.name: 9. Prepare glycerol stocks from confirmed positive clones

note.en: bacterial_glycerol_stock: 1 mL overnight culture + 1 mL 50% glycerol → store −80°C. Label with: clone ID, date, insert, antibiotic.
note.zh: bacterial_glycerol_stock：1 mL 过夜培养液 + 1 mL 50% 甘油 → −80°C 保存。标注：克隆编号、日期、插入片段、抗生素。

notes.en: Colony number vs insert probability: ligation efficiency ~20–50% with directional cloning; ~5–15% without blue-white selection. Colony appearance timing: Amp resistance ~ 12 h; Kan/Cm ~ 14–16 h. White colonies in blue-white: ~50% correct by PCR; confirm all positives by sequencing.
notes.zh: 菌落数 vs 插入概率：定向克隆连接效率约 20–50%；无蓝白筛选约 5–15%。菌落出现时间：Amp 约 12 h；Kan/Cm 约 14–16 h。蓝白筛选白色菌落约 50% PCR 阳性；测序确认所有候选。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed. Ch. 1; Green & Sambrook (2012) Molecular Cloning 4th ed.; Ausubel et al. Current Protocols in Molecular Biology Unit 1.5

usage.en: Pick isolated bacterial colonies for liquid culture and downstream analysis.
usage.zh: 挑取单克隆菌落进行液体培养和下游分析。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 1 hour

name: siRNA-Mediated Gene Knockdown
nameCn: siRNA 基因沉默（RNAi 干扰）

components.name: 1. Design siRNA: order 2–3 independent siRNAs per target gene

note.en: 19–21 nt duplex with 2 nt 3' overhangs. Sources: Qiagen, Dharmacon, IDT. Resuspend 20 µM in RNase-free water; store −80°C.
note.zh: 19–21 nt 双链，3' 端 2 nt 突出。来源：Qiagen、Dharmacon、IDT。RNase-free 水溶解至 20 µM；−80°C 保存。

components.name: 2. Day 0: seed cells in antibiotic-free media

note.en: 24-well: 5–8×10⁴ cells; 6-well: 2–4×10⁵; 10 cm: 1.5–2×10⁶. Target 40–70% confluency at transfection.
Tube A: 3 µL RNAiMAX + 47 µL Opti-MEM, 5 min RT. Tube B: 1 µL siRNA (20 µM) + 49 µL Opti-MEM. Combine A+B, mix gently, 20 min RT. [24-well scale; final siRNA ~20 nM].
note.zh: 管 A：3 µL RNAiMAX + 47 µL Opti-MEM，RT 5 min。管 B：1 µL siRNA（20 µM）+ 49 µL Opti-MEM。A+B 混合，轻混，RT 20 min。[24 孔规模；siRNA 终浓度 ~20 nM]。

components.name: 4. Add complex dropwise to cells; gentle plate rocking

note.en: Remove old media; add 400 µL fresh (no antibiotics) + 100 µL complex = 500 µL total. Do NOT change media for 6 h.
note.zh: 去旧培养基；加 400 µL 新鲜培养基（无抗生素）+ 100 µL 复合物 = 500 µL。6 h 内不换液。

note.en: 48 h: fast-turnover proteins. 72 h: most targets. 96 h + re-transfection at 48 h: stable proteins.
note.zh: 48 h：快速周转蛋白。72 h：大多数靶标。96 h + 48 h 时再转染：稳定蛋白。

note.en: qpcr_protocol for mRNA (≥70% reduction expected). wb_protocol for protein (≥60% reduction). Include siNC + siGAPDH controls.
note.zh: qpcr_protocol 检测 mRNA（预期 ≥70% 下调）。wb_protocol 检测蛋白（预期 ≥60% 下调）。对照：siNC + siGAPDH。

note.en: Proliferation: cck8_proliferation; Migration: scratch_assay/transwell_migration; Apoptosis: annexin_v_apoptosis.
note.zh: 增殖：cck8_proliferation；迁移：scratch_assay / transwell_migration；凋亡：annexin_v_apoptosis。

notes.en: Controls: (1) siNC (non-targeting); (2) siGAPDH (positive KD); (3) untreated; (4) lipid-only (toxicity). Toxicity high? Reduce RNAiMAX to 1.5 µL/well. Hard-to-transfect cells: Nucleofection, electroporation, or lentiviral shRNA.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) siNC（非靶向）；(2) siGAPDH（阳性 KD）；(3) 未处理；(4) 仅脂质体（毒性）。毒性大？减少 RNAiMAX 至 1.5 µL/孔。难转染细胞：核转染、电穿孔或慢病毒 shRNA。

ref: Elbashir et al. (2001) Nature 411:494–498; Reynolds et al. (2004) Nat Biotechnol 22:326; Qiagen siRNA Transfection Handbook

usage.en: Knock down target gene expression using small interfering RNA (siRNA) transfection.
usage.zh: 小干扰 RNA（siRNA）转染敲低靶基因表达。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 days，实操: 2 hours

note.en: 25 nmol, HPLC-purified. Design using Dharmacon, IDT, or Sigma tools
note.zh: 25 nmol，HPLC纯化。使用Dharmacon、IDT或Sigma工具设计

note.en: Same provider as targeting siRNA
note.zh: 与靶向siRNA同一供应商

note.en: Thermo 13778150
note.zh: Thermo 13778150

note.en: Thermo 31985070
note.zh: Thermo 31985070

note.en: DMEM/RPMI + 10% FBS, no pen/strep
note.zh: DMEM/RPMI + 10% FBS，不加青/链霉素

note.en: For RNA extraction
note.zh: 用于RNA提取

note.en: + protease/phosphatase inhibitors
note.zh: + 蛋白酶/磷酸酶抑制剂

note.en: Reverse transcriptase, SYBR Green or TaqMan, primers
note.zh: 反转录酶、SYBR Green或TaqMan、引物

note.en: After seeding, cells incubate overnight at 37°C (standard protocol)
note.zh: 铺板后细胞37°C过夜培养（标准步骤）

note.en: RNA in RLT/TRIzol can be stored at -80°C; protein lysate at -80°C
note.zh: RLT/TRIzol中的RNA可-80°C保存；蛋白裂解液-80°C保存

detailedSteps.en: **Day 0 — Seed cells**
detailedSteps.zh: **第0天 — 铺板细胞**

detailedSteps.en: **Seed cells**: Plate cells in antibiotic-free complete medium to reach 60–80% confluence at the time of transfection (next day). For a 6-well plate: 2–3 × 10⁵ cells/well in 2 mL medium. For 24-well: 0.5–1 × 10⁵ cells/well in 0.5 mL. ⚠️ No antibiotics — they increase toxicity with lipofection.
detailedSteps.zh: **铺板细胞**: 将细胞铺板于不含抗生素的完全培养基中，使转染时（次日）达到60-80%融合度。6孔板：2-3 × 10⁵细胞/孔，2 mL培养基。24孔板：0.5-1 × 10⁵细胞/孔，0.5 mL。⚠️ 不加抗生素——脂质体转染时抗生素会增加毒性。

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Transfection**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 转染**
