detailedSteps.en: **Prepare siRNA complexes**: For each well of a 6-well plate: Tube A — dilute 25 pmol siRNA (final 5 nM) in 150 µL Opti-MEM. Tube B — dilute 7.5 µL Lipofectamine RNAiMAX in 150 µL Opti-MEM. Incubate each 5 min at RT.
detailedSteps.zh: **制备siRNA复合物**: 6孔板每孔：A管——25 pmol siRNA（终浓度5 nM）稀释于150 µL Opti-MEM中。B管——7.5 µL Lipofectamine RNAiMAX稀释于150 µL Opti-MEM中。各室温孵育5分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Form lipoplexes**: Combine Tube A + Tube B (300 µL total). Mix gently. Incubate 15–20 min at RT to form siRNA-lipid complexes.
detailedSteps.zh: **形成脂质复合物**: 合并A管 + B管（总共300 µL）。轻柔混匀。室温孵育15-20分钟形成siRNA-脂质复合物。

detailedSteps.en: **Transfect**: Add 300 µL complex dropwise to each well. Rock plate gently. Include controls: (1) Non-targeting siRNA (same concentration), (2) Untransfected cells, (3) Lipofectamine-only (mock). Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂.
detailedSteps.zh: **转染**: 将300 µL复合物逐滴加入每孔。轻柔晃动板。设置对照：(1)非靶向siRNA（相同浓度），(2)未转染细胞，(3)仅脂质体（模拟转染）。37°C、5% CO₂孵育。

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1–3 — Incubation and monitoring**
detailedSteps.zh: **第1-3天 — 孵育和监测**

detailedSteps.en: **Monitor**: Check cells daily for morphology and viability. Replace medium 6–24 h post-transfection if toxicity is observed. Maximum knockdown typically at 48–72 h for mRNA, 72–96 h for protein.
detailedSteps.zh: **监测**: 每天检查细胞形态和活力。如观察到毒性，转染后6-24小时更换培养基。mRNA敲低通常在48-72小时最大，蛋白在72-96小时。

detailedSteps.en: **Day 3 — Harvest and validate**
detailedSteps.zh: **第三天 — 收获和验证**

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest for RNA**: Aspirate medium. Lyse directly in well with 350 µL RLT buffer (+ 1% β-mercaptoethanol) or TRIzol. Extract RNA using RNeasy or TRIzol protocol.
detailedSteps.zh: **收获RNA**: 吸去培养基。直接在孔中用350 µL RLT缓冲液（+ 1% β-巯基乙醇）或TRIzol裂解。用RNeasy或TRIzol方案提取RNA。

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest for protein**: In parallel wells, wash with cold PBS, lyse with RIPA buffer + protease/phosphatase inhibitors. Scrape, collect, sonicate briefly, centrifuge 16,000 × g 10 min 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: **收获蛋白**: 在平行孔中，用冷PBS洗涤，用RIPA缓冲液 + 蛋白酶/磷酸酶抑制剂裂解。刮取，收集，短暂超声，4°C 16,000 × g离心10分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Validate by RT-qPCR**: Reverse transcribe RNA → qPCR with gene-specific primers and housekeeping gene (GAPDH, ACTB, or 18S). Calculate knockdown efficiency by ΔΔCt method. Expect ≥70% reduction.
detailedSteps.zh: **RT-qPCR验证**: 反转录RNA → 用基因特异性引物和管家基因（GAPDH、ACTB或18S）进行qPCR。用ΔΔCt法计算敲低效率。期望≥70%降低。

detailedSteps.en: **Validate by Western blot**: Run protein lysates on SDS-PAGE, transfer, blot for target protein and loading control (β-actin, GAPDH, or total protein stain). Quantify band intensity.
detailedSteps.zh: **Western blot验证**: 蛋白裂解液SDS-PAGE，转膜，检测目标蛋白和内参（β-actin、GAPDH或总蛋白染色）。定量条带强度。

briefSteps.en: Design/order siRNA → Seed cells → Complex siRNA with lipofectamine → Transfect → Incubate 48–72 h → Harvest → Validate knockdown by RT-qPCR & Western blot
briefSteps.zh: 设计/订购siRNA → 铺板细胞 → siRNA与脂质体复合 → 转染 → 孵育48-72小时 → 收获 → RT-qPCR和Western blot验证敲低

name: Site-Directed Mutagenesis (Q5/KLD)

components.name: 2. Q5 反向 PCR 扩增

notes.en: Introduce point mutations, insertions, or deletions into plasmid DNA. Based on inverse PCR with phosphorylation, ligation, and DpnI digestion of template in a single KLD step.
notes.zh: 在质粒 DNA 中引入点突变、插入或缺失。基于反向 PCR，在单一 KLD 步骤中完成磷酸化、连接和 DpnI 消化模板。

ref: NEB Q5 SDM Kit Protocol E0554 (protocols.io doi:10.17504/protocols.io.bddei23e)

usage.en: Introduce specific point mutations into plasmid DNA by site-directed mutagenesis.
usage.zh: 定点突变在质粒 DNA 中引入特定点突变。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2 days，实操: 2 hours

note.en: Or similar HF polymerase
note.zh: 或类似高保真聚合酶

note.en: Design with NEBaseChanger
note.zh: 用 NEBaseChanger 设计

note.en: Kinase + Ligase + DpnI
note.zh: 激酶 + 连接酶 + DpnI

note.en: 4°C (up to overnight)
note.zh: 4°C (最长 overnight)

note.en: Transform immediately or store at −20°C (up to 1 week)
note.zh: Transform immediately or store at −20°C (最长 1 week)

detailedSteps.en: Design mutagenic primers using NEBaseChanger (nebasechanger.neb.com). Primers should be back-to-back on the template
detailedSteps.zh: 使用 NEBaseChanger (nebasechanger.neb.com) 设计突变引物。引物应在模板上背靠背排列

detailedSteps.en: Set up PCR: 12.5 µL Q5 2× Master Mix + 1.25 µL forward primer (10 µM) + 1.25 µL reverse primer (10 µM) + 1 µL template (1-25 ng) + 9 µL ddH₂O
detailedSteps.zh: 配制 PCR 体系：12.5 µL Q5 2× Master Mix + 1.25 µL 正向引物 (10 µM) + 1.25 µL 反向引物 (10 µM) + 1 µL 模板 (1-25 ng) + 9 µL ddH₂O

detailedSteps.en: PCR cycling: 98°C 30s initial denaturation → 25 cycles of (98°C 10s → Tm°C 10-30s → 72°C 20-30s/kb) → 72°C 2 min final extension → hold 4°C
detailedSteps.zh: PCR 程序：98°C 30s 初始变性 → 25 个循环（98°C 10s → Tm°C 10-30s → 72°C 20-30s/kb）→ 72°C 2 min 终延伸 → 4°C 保持

detailedSteps.en: Check PCR product on 1% agarose gel. Should see a single band at expected size
detailedSteps.zh: 1% 琼脂糖凝胶检测 PCR 产物。应看到预期大小的单一条带

detailedSteps.en: Set up KLD reaction: 1 µL PCR product + 5 µL KLD Buffer (2×) + 1 µL KLD Enzyme Mix (10×) + 3 µL ddH₂O
detailedSteps.zh: 配制 KLD 反应：1 µL PCR 产物 + 5 µL KLD Buffer (2×) + 1 µL KLD Enzyme Mix (10×) + 3 µL ddH₂O

detailedSteps.en: Mix by pipetting. Incubate at room temperature for 5 min
detailedSteps.zh: 吹打混匀。室温孵育 5 min

detailedSteps.en: Transform 5 µL KLD mix into 50 µL competent cells. Ice 30 min → heat shock 42°C 30s → ice 5 min
detailedSteps.zh: 取 5 µL KLD 混合物转化 50 µL 感受态细胞。冰浴 30 min → 42°C 热激 30s → 冰浴 5 min

detailedSteps.en: Add 950 µL SOC. Shake at 37°C for 1h
detailedSteps.zh: 加 950 µL SOC。37°C 振荡 1h

detailedSteps.en: Plate 50-100 µL on selective plates. Incubate overnight at 37°C
detailedSteps.zh: 取 50-100 µL 涂板。37°C 过夜培养

detailedSteps.en: Pick 2-4 colonies for sequencing. Typical mutagenesis efficiency: >80%
detailedSteps.zh: 挑 2-4 个克隆送测序。典型突变效率：>80%

briefSteps.en: Design back-to-back mutagenic primers → Q5 inverse PCR → KLD reaction (5 min RT) → transform → sequence-verify
briefSteps.zh: 设计背靠背突变引物 → Q5 反向 PCR → KLD 反应（RT 5 min）→ 转化 → 测序验证

name: Size Exclusion Chromatography (SEC / Gel Filtration)
nameCn: 分子排阻色谱（SEC / 凝胶过滤）蛋白纯化

components.name: 1. Prepare sample: ≥1 mg/mL, centrifuge 20,000×g 20 min 4°C, filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Remove aggregates before injection. Analytical: ≤500 µL; preparative: ≤5 mL (16/60 column).
note.zh: 进样前去除聚集体。分析型：≤500 µL；制备型：≤5 mL（16/60 柱）。

components.name: 2. Select SEC column by MW range

note.en: Superdex 75 (3–70 kDa), Superdex 200 (10–600 kDa), Superose 6 (5–5,000 kDa). Analytical: 10/300 GL (24 mL). Preparative: 16/60 (120 mL) or 26/60 (320 mL).
note.zh: Superdex 75（3–70 kDa）、Superdex 200（10–600 kDa）、Superose 6（5–5,000 kDa）。分析型：10/300 GL（24 mL）。制备型：16/60（120 mL）。

note.en: Flow rate: 0.4–0.5 mL/min (10/300 GL); 1.0–1.5 mL/min (16/60). Pressure limit: 1.5–1.8 MPa. Monitor A280 baseline stability.

components.name: 4. Inject sample via clean sample loop

note.en: Rinse loop with water then running buffer before injection. Inject at 0.5 mL/min.
note.zh: 上样环先用水再用运行缓冲液冲洗。0.5 mL/min 注入。

components.name: 5. Run: 1.2 CV at constant flow; collect 0.5 mL (analytical) or 1–2 mL (preparative) fractions

note.en: Monitor A280 (protein), A260 (nucleic acids). V₀ ≈ 0.35 CV; Vt ≈ CV.
note.zh: 监测 A280（蛋白）、A260（核酸）。V₀ ≈ 0.35 CV；Vt ≈ CV。

components.name: 6. Pool symmetric peak fractions; verify by SDS-PAGE

note.en: Asymmetric tailing = aggregation or multiple species. Only pool the main symmetric peak.
note.zh: 不对称拖尾 = 聚集体或多组分。仅合并对称峰组分。

components.name: 7. Optional: run MW calibration standards (first time per column)

note.en: GE LMW/HMW kit. Plot log(MW) vs Kav = (Ve−V₀)/(Vt−V₀). Couple with SEC-MALS for absolute MW.
note.zh: GE LMW/HMW 校准套装。绘 log(MW) vs Kav = (Ve−V₀)/(Vt−V₀)。联用 SEC-MALS 可测绝对分子量。

components.name: 8. Clean column: 1 CV 2 M NaCl, re-equilibrate; store in 20% EtOH at 4°C

note.en: Never run column dry. Monthly: 0.5 CV 0.5 M NaOH for biofilm removal (check column compatibility).
note.zh: 切勿让柱子跑干。每月：0.5 CV 0.5 M NaOH 清除生物膜（需确认柱子兼容性）。

notes.en: SEC is gold-standard polishing step. Separates by hydrodynamic radius. Excellent for: removing aggregates, determining oligomeric state, buffer exchange. Keep sample:column volume ≤1–2% for best resolution. Run at 4°C for labile proteins.
notes.zh: SEC 是蛋白精修的金标准。按流体力学半径分离。适合去除聚集体、确定寡聚状态、换液。样品:柱体积 ≤1–2% 以获最佳分辨率。不稳定蛋白在 4°C 进行。

ref: Wyatt et al. (2017) Nat Protoc 12:1683–1701; GE Healthcare SEC Application Note 18-1114-02

usage.en: Separate proteins by size using size-exclusion (gel filtration) chromatography.
usage.zh: 分子筛（凝胶过滤）层析按蛋白质大小分离。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: Superdex 75/200 or Superose 6, 10/300 GL or 16/600
note.zh: Superdex 75/200或Superose 6，10/300 GL或16/600

note.en: 20 mM Tris pH 7.5 + 150 mM NaCl or PBS, filtered and degassed
note.zh: 20 mM Tris pH 7.5 + 150 mM NaCl或PBS，过滤脱气

note.en: With UV, conductivity detectors and fraction collector
note.zh: 配备UV、电导率检测器和馏分收集器

note.en: Amicon Ultra, MWCO ≤ ½ target MW
note.zh: Amicon Ultra，MWCO ≤ 目标MW的½

note.en: For sample and buffer
note.zh: 用于样品和缓冲液

note.en: Bio-Rad 1511901 (optional)
note.zh: Bio-Rad 1511901（可选）

note.en: Concentrated sample in running buffer can be stored at 4°C overnight (or -80°C with glycerol for longer)
note.zh: 流动缓冲液中浓缩的样品可4°C过夜保存（或加甘油-80°C更长期保存）

note.en: Pooled fractions can be stored at 4°C overnight before further use
note.zh: 合并的组分可4°C过夜保存后再使用

detailedSteps.en: **Choose column**: Select resin based on target MW range. Superdex 75: 3–70 kDa. Superdex 200: 10–600 kDa. Superose 6: 5–5,000 kDa. Use prepacked columns (10/300 GL = 24 mL, or 16/600 = 120 mL).
detailedSteps.zh: **选择柱**: 根据目标分子量范围选择树脂。Superdex 75：3-70 kDa。Superdex 200：10-600 kDa。Superose 6：5-5,000 kDa。使用预装柱（10/300 GL = 24 mL，或16/600 = 120 mL）。

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare running buffer**: Use the same buffer for column equilibration and elution (isocratic). Typical: 20 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl (or PBS). Filter (0.22 µm) and degas thoroughly. ⚠️ Include 150 mM NaCl minimum to prevent non-specific interactions.
detailedSteps.zh: **准备流动缓冲液**: 柱平衡和洗脱使用同一缓冲液（等度）。典型：20 mM Tris-HCl pH 7.5、150 mM NaCl（或PBS）。0.22 µm过滤并充分脱气。⚠️ 至少含150 mM NaCl以防止非特异性相互作用。

detailedSteps.en: **Equilibrate column**: Wash with 2 CV of running buffer at recommended flow rate (0.5 mL/min for 10/300, 1.0 mL/min for 16/600). Monitor A280, conductivity, and pressure.
detailedSteps.zh: **平衡柱**: 以推荐流速（10/300用0.5 mL/min，16/600用1.0 mL/min）用2 CV流动缓冲液洗涤。监测A280、电导率和压力。

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare sample**: Concentrate protein to ≤ 10 mg/mL in running buffer using centrifugal concentrator. Sample volume must be ≤ 2% of column volume (≤ 500 µL for 10/300, ≤ 2.5 mL for 16/600). Centrifuge at 16,000 × g for 10 min at 4°C to remove aggregates. ⚠️ Sample volume is the most critical parameter for resolution.
detailedSteps.zh: **制备样品**: 用离心浓缩管将蛋白浓缩至≤10 mg/mL的流动缓冲液中。样品体积必须≤柱体积的2%（10/300≤500 µL，16/600≤2.5 mL）。4°C 16,000 × g离心10分钟去除聚集体。⚠️ 样品体积是影响分辨率的最关键参数。

detailedSteps.en: **Load sample**: Inject sample via injection loop or directly onto column. Start run immediately.
detailedSteps.zh: **上样**: 通过进样环或直接注入样品至柱上。立即开始运行。

detailedSteps.en: **Elution**: Run 1.5 CV of buffer at constant flow rate. Collect fractions (0.5 mL for 10/300, 2 mL for 16/600). Large proteins elute first (void volume ~8 mL for 10/300).
detailedSteps.zh: **洗脱**: 以恒定流速运行1.5 CV缓冲液。收集组分（10/300用0.5 mL，16/600用2 mL）。大蛋白先洗脱（10/300空隙体积~8 mL）。

detailedSteps.en: **Analyze fractions**: Check A280 chromatogram for peaks. Run peak fractions on SDS-PAGE. Symmetric peak = monodisperse. Shoulder or asymmetry may indicate aggregates or contaminants.
detailedSteps.zh: **分析组分**: 检查A280色谱图的峰。将峰值组分进行SDS-PAGE。对称峰 = 单分散。肩峰或不对称可能表示聚集体或杂质。

detailedSteps.en: **Pool and concentrate**: Combine fractions containing pure target protein. Concentrate with centrifugal concentrators if needed. Measure final concentration.
detailedSteps.zh: **合并浓缩**: 合并含有纯目标蛋白的组分。必要时用离心浓缩管浓缩。测定最终浓度。

detailedSteps.en: **Calibrate (optional)**: Run MW standards (e.g., Bio-Rad gel filtration standard) to generate a log(MW) vs. elution volume plot. Estimate the apparent MW of your protein.
detailedSteps.zh: **校准（可选）**: 运行分子量标准品（如Bio-Rad凝胶过滤标准品）绘制log(MW) vs. 洗脱体积图。估算蛋白的表观分子量。

detailedSteps.en: **Column storage**: Wash with 2 CV running buffer, then 2 CV 20% ethanol for storage. Store at 4°C. ⚠️ Never let the column run dry.
detailedSteps.zh: **柱保存**: 用2 CV流动缓冲液洗涤，然后2 CV 20%乙醇保存。4°C储存。⚠️ 绝不能让柱干燥。

briefSteps.en: Choose column (by MW range) → Equilibrate → Concentrate sample → Load ≤2% CV → Isocratic elution → Collect fractions → SDS-PAGE/Western → Pool and concentrate
briefSteps.zh: 选择柱（按分子量范围）→ 平衡 → 浓缩样品 → 上样≤2% CV → 等度洗脱 → 收集组分 → SDS-PAGE/Western → 合并浓缩

name: Soft Agar Colony Formation

components.name: 4. Stain with crystal violet or MTT

notes.en: Gold standard for anchorage-independent growth. Noble agar at exactly 42°C. Colony >50 µm scored.
notes.zh: 锚定非依赖性生长金标准。Noble 琼脂精确 42°C。克隆 >50 µm 计数。

ref: Borowicz et al. (2014) J Vis Exp 92:e51998

usage.en: Assess anchorage-independent growth as a hallmark of transformation using soft agar colony formation assay.
usage.zh: 软琼脂克隆形成实验评估细胞的锚定非依赖性生长（转化标志）。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–4 weeks，实操: 2 hours

note.en: Difco-grade, autoclave before use
note.zh: Difco 级，使用前高压灭菌

note.en: 2× DMEM/RPMI + 20% FBS + 2× Pen/Strep
note.zh: 2× DMEM/RPMI + 20% FBS + 2× 青链霉素

note.en: Tissue culture treated
note.zh: 组织培养处理

note.en: To ensure single-cell suspension
note.zh: 确保单细胞悬液

note.en: For maintaining molten agar
note.zh: 保持琼脂融化状态

note.en: Solidified base layer plates can be stored at 37°C in incubator for up to 24 h before adding top layer
note.zh: 凝固底层板可37°C培养箱保存最多24 h后再加上层

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Plating**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 铺板**

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare agar stocks**: Autoclave 1% and 0.7% Noble Agar (or low-melt agarose) in water. Keep molten in 42°C water bath. Pre-warm 2× complete medium to 42°C
detailedSteps.zh: **制备琼脂母液**: 高压灭菌 1% 和 0.7% Noble Agar（或低熔点琼脂糖）水溶液。42°C 水浴保温。2× 完全培养基预热至 42°C

detailedSteps.en: **Base layer**: Mix equal volumes 1% agar and 2× medium (final: 0.5% agar in 1× medium). Pour 1.5 mL/well (6-well plate) or 3 mL/60 mm dish. Let solidify RT, 30 min. ⚠️ Surface must be flat and bubble-free
detailedSteps.zh: **底层**: 等体积混合 1% 琼脂和 2× 培养基（终：0.5% 琼脂/1× 培养基）。每孔 1.5 mL（6 孔板）或每皿 3 mL（60 mm 皿）。室温凝固 30 min。⚠️ 表面必须平整无气泡

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare cells**: Trypsinize and count cells. Prepare single-cell suspension at 2× desired density (typically 5,000–10,000 cells/well for most lines). ⚠️ Must be single-cell — filter through 40 µm strainer if needed
detailedSteps.zh: **准备细胞**: 胰酶消化并计数。制备 2× 目标密度的单细胞悬液（多数细胞系 5,000–10,000 细胞/孔）。⚠️ 必须为单细胞——必要时过 40 µm 滤器

detailedSteps.en: **Top layer**: Mix equal volumes of 0.7% agar (42°C) and 2× cell suspension (final: 0.35% agar + cells in 1× medium). Quickly pour 1.5 mL on top of solidified base layer. ⚠️ Work fast — agar solidifies quickly. Ensure agar is ≤ 42°C to avoid killing cells
detailedSteps.zh: **上层**: 等体积混合 0.7% 琼脂（42°C）和 2× 细胞悬液（终：0.35% 琼脂 + 细胞/1× 培养基）。迅速在底层上倒入 1.5 mL。⚠️ 快速操作——琼脂凝固快。确保琼脂 ≤ 42°C 以免杀死细胞

detailedSteps.en: **Solidify**: Let plates sit at RT 30 min until top layer solidifies. Transfer to 37°C, 5% CO₂ incubator
detailedSteps.zh: **凝固**: 室温静置 30 min 至上层凝固。转入 37°C、5% CO₂ 培养箱

detailedSteps.en: **Days 2–28 — Culture**
**Maintain**: Feed every 3–4 days by adding 200 µL fresh 1× complete medium on top. Do not let agar dry out. Culture for 2–4 weeks until colonies are visible (> 50 µm)
detailedSteps.zh: **维持培养**: 每 3–4 天在上层加 200 µL 新鲜 1× 完全培养基。勿让琼脂干燥。培养 2–4 周至集落可见（> 50 µm）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 21–28 — Staining & Analysis**
detailedSteps.zh: **第21–28天 — 染色与分析**

detailedSteps.en: **Stain**: Add 500 µL of 0.005% Crystal Violet (or 1 mg/mL MTT in PBS, incubate 4 h at 37°C for viable colonies) on top. Incubate RT, 1 h or 37°C, 4 h (MTT)
detailedSteps.zh: **染色**: 加 500 µL 0.005% 结晶紫（或 1 mg/mL MTT/PBS，37°C 4 h 染活细胞集落）。室温 1 h 或 37°C 4 h（MTT）

detailedSteps.en: **Image**: Photograph entire wells using flatbed scanner or stereomicroscope
detailedSteps.zh: **成像**: 用平板扫描仪或体视显微镜拍摄全孔图像

detailedSteps.en: **Count colonies**: Count colonies > 50 µm (or > 100 µm) using ImageJ (threshold → analyze particles) or manually. Report as colony forming efficiency (%) = (colonies / cells plated) × 100
detailedSteps.zh: **计数集落**: 计数 > 50 µm（或 > 100 µm）集落，用 ImageJ（阈值 → analyze particles）或手动计数。报告克隆形成效率（%）=（集落数/接种细胞数）× 100

briefSteps.en: Pour base agar layer → mix cells in top agar layer → culture 2–4 weeks → stain colonies → count/image
briefSteps.zh: 铺底层琼脂 → 细胞混入上层琼脂 → 培养2–4周 → 染色 → 计数/成像

name: Southern Blot

components.name: 1. Digest 10 µg gDNA with restriction enzyme O/N
4. Capillary transfer to nylon membrane O/N

notes.en: Classic DNA detection. Named after Edwin Southern. Church buffer for hybridization. Use DIG-labeled probes for non-radioactive.
notes.zh: 经典 DNA 检测方法。以 Edwin Southern 命名。Church 缓冲液杂交。非放射性可用 DIG 标记探针。

ref: Southern (1975) J Mol Biol 98:503

usage.en: Detect specific genomic DNA sequences by restriction digestion, gel separation, transfer, and hybridization.
usage.zh: Southern blot：限制性酶切、胶分离、转膜、杂交检测特定基因组 DNA 序列。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3 days，实操: 8 hours

note.en: Intact, high MW
note.zh: 完整高分子量

note.en: High-fidelity preferred
note.zh: 优选高保真酶

note.en: TAE buffer, wide comb
note.zh: TAE缓冲液，宽齿梳

note.en: Positively charged nylon
note.zh: 带正电尼龙膜

note.en: 0.5 M Na₂HPO₄ pH 7.2, 7% SDS, 1 mM EDTA
note.zh: 0.5 M Na₂HPO₄ pH 7.2, 7% SDS, 1 mM EDTA

note.en: e.g. DECAprime II, Megaprime
note.zh: 如 DECAprime II、Megaprime

note.en: For probe labeling
note.zh: 用于探针标记

note.en: For radioactive detection
note.zh: 用于放射性检测

note.en: 0.5 M NaOH, 1.5 M NaCl
note.zh: 0.5 M NaOH, 1.5 M NaCl

note.en: 0.5 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 1.5 M NaCl
note.zh: 0.5 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 1.5 M NaCl

note.en: Digestion can run overnight at 37°C
note.zh: 酶切可37°C过夜

note.en: Transfer runs overnight (12–18 h)
note.zh: 转膜过夜（12–18 h）

note.en: UV-crosslinked membrane can be stored dry at RT or −20°C for months
note.zh: UV交联膜可室温或 −20°C 干燥保存数月

note.en: Hybridization runs overnight at 65°C
note.zh: 杂交65°C过夜

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Digestion & Gel**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 酶切与电泳**

detailedSteps.en: **Digest gDNA**: Digest 10 µg high-quality genomic DNA with appropriate restriction enzyme(s) overnight at 37°C in 50–100 µL total volume. Add 10 U enzyme at start + 10 U more after 2 h. ⚠️ Ensure complete digestion — incomplete yields confusing band patterns
detailedSteps.zh: **酶切gDNA**: 10 µg 高质量基因组 DNA 用适当限制酶 37°C 过夜酶切，总体积 50–100 µL。起始加 10 U 酶，2 h 后追加 10 U。⚠️ 确保完全酶切——不完全会导致条带混乱

detailedSteps.en: **Run gel**: Load digested DNA on 0.8% agarose/TAE gel (use wide-tooth comb). Run at 1–2 V/cm overnight (or 5 V/cm, 4–5 h). Include DNA size marker
detailedSteps.zh: **电泳**: 酶切 DNA 上 0.8% 琼脂糖/TAE 凝胶（用宽齿梳）。1–2 V/cm 过夜（或 5 V/cm, 4–5 h）。加 DNA 分子量标记

detailedSteps.en: **Photograph**: Image gel with ruler alongside size markers for documentation
detailedSteps.zh: **拍照**: 凝胶与尺子和分子量标记一起拍照记录

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Transfer**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 转膜**

detailedSteps.en: **Depurinate (optional, for fragments > 10 kb)**: Soak gel in 0.25 M HCl, 10–15 min with gentle shaking. Rinse with water
detailedSteps.zh: **脱嘌呤（可选，> 10 kb 片段）**: 凝胶浸泡于 0.25 M HCl，轻摇 10–15 min。水冲洗

detailedSteps.en: **Denature**: Soak gel in denaturation solution (0.5 M NaOH, 1.5 M NaCl), 30 min × 2 with gentle agitation
detailedSteps.zh: **变性**: 凝胶浸泡于变性液（0.5 M NaOH、1.5 M NaCl），轻摇 30 min × 2 次

detailedSteps.en: **Neutralize**: Soak gel in neutralization solution (0.5 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5, 1.5 M NaCl), 15 min × 2
detailedSteps.zh: **中和**: 凝胶浸泡于中和液（0.5 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5、1.5 M NaCl），15 min × 2 次

detailedSteps.en: **Capillary transfer**: Set up overnight transfer to nylon membrane (Hybond-N+) using 20× SSC. Stack: reservoir → wick → gel (face down) → membrane → 3MM paper → paper towels → glass plate → 500 g weight. Transfer 12–18 h
detailedSteps.zh: **毛细转膜**: 用 20× SSC 组装过夜转膜至尼龙膜（Hybond-N+）。顺序：液槽 → 引液纸 → 凝胶（面朝下）→ 膜 → 3MM 滤纸 → 纸巾 → 玻璃板 → 500 g 重物。转膜 12–18 h

detailedSteps.en: **Day 3 — Crosslink & Hybridization**
detailedSteps.zh: **第三天 — 交联与杂交**

detailedSteps.en: **Disassemble & crosslink**: Remove membrane. Mark wells and orientation. Rinse in 2× SSC. UV crosslink 120 mJ/cm² (Stratalinker auto-crosslink)
detailedSteps.zh: **拆装与交联**: 取出膜。标记孔位和方向。2× SSC 漂洗。UV 交联 120 mJ/cm²（Stratalinker 自动交联）

detailedSteps.en: **Pre-hybridize**: Place membrane in hybridization tube. Add 20 mL pre-warmed Church buffer (0.5 M Na₂HPO₄ pH 7.2, 7% SDS, 1 mM EDTA) or commercial hybridization buffer. Incubate 65°C, 1–2 h with rotation
detailedSteps.zh: **预杂交**: 膜放入杂交管。加 20 mL 预热 Church 缓冲液（0.5 M Na₂HPO₄ pH 7.2、7% SDS、1 mM EDTA）或商品化杂交缓冲液。65°C 旋转 1–2 h

detailedSteps.en: **Label probe**: Random-prime label DNA probe with ³²P-dCTP (or DIG). Denature at 95°C, 5 min; snap-cool on ice. Add to hybridization buffer (~1–2×10⁶ cpm/mL)
detailedSteps.zh: **标记探针**: 随机引物标记 DNA 探针（³²P-dCTP 或 DIG）。95°C 变性 5 min；冰上速冷。加入杂交液（~1–2×10⁶ cpm/mL）

detailedSteps.en: **Hybridize**: Incubate overnight at 65°C with rotation
detailedSteps.zh: **杂交**: 65°C 旋转过夜杂交

detailedSteps.en: **Day 4 — Wash & Detection**
detailedSteps.zh: **第四天 — 洗涤与检测**

detailedSteps.en: **Low-stringency wash**: 2× SSC / 0.1% SDS, RT, 15 min × 2
detailedSteps.zh: **低严格洗涤**: 2× SSC / 0.1% SDS，室温 15 min × 2 次

detailedSteps.en: **High-stringency wash**: 0.5× SSC / 0.1% SDS, 65°C, 15–30 min × 2. For higher stringency: 0.1× SSC / 0.1% SDS
detailedSteps.zh: **高严格洗涤**: 0.5× SSC / 0.1% SDS，65°C, 15–30 min × 2 次。更高严格度：0.1× SSC / 0.1% SDS

detailedSteps.en: **Detect**: Wrap membrane in plastic wrap. Expose to phosphor screen 4–48 h (or X-ray film). Scan on PhosphorImager. For DIG: follow chemiluminescent detection protocol
detailedSteps.zh: **检测**: 保鲜膜包裹膜。磷屏曝光 4–48 h（或 X 光胶片）。PhosphorImager 扫描。DIG：按化学发光检测方案操作

detailedSteps.en: **Strip & re-probe (optional)**: Strip in boiling 0.1% SDS, 15 min, or 0.4 M NaOH, 30 min at 45°C. Verify stripping by re-exposure. Re-probe with different probe or loading control
detailedSteps.zh: **剥离与重探（可选）**: 沸腾 0.1% SDS 15 min 或 0.4 M NaOH 45°C 30 min 剥离。重新曝光验证。更换探针或内参重探

briefSteps.en: Digest gDNA → run gel → denature → capillary transfer → UV crosslink → hybridize probe → wash → detect
briefSteps.zh: 酶切gDNA → 凝胶电泳 → 变性 → 毛细转膜 → UV交联 → 探针杂交 → 洗涤 → 检测

name: Stable Cell Line Generation (Antibiotic Selection + Single Clone Isolation)
nameCn: 稳定细胞系建立（抗生素筛选 + 单克隆分离）

components.name: 1. Establish kill curve for parental cells (before transfection/transduction)

note.en: Seed 2×10⁵ cells/well in 6-well plate. Next day, add antibiotic at 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 8 µg/mL (Puro) or 0, 100, 200, 400, 800 µg/mL (G418). Check daily × 7 days. Optimal = lowest dose achieving 100% kill by day 3–5 (Puro) or day 7–10 (G418).
note.zh: 6 孔板每孔接种 2×10⁵ 细胞。次日加抗生素梯度：Puromycin 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 8 µg/mL 或 G418 0, 100, 200, 400, 800 µg/mL。每日观察 × 7 天。最佳浓度 = 第 3–5 天（Puro）或第 7–10 天（G418）实现 100% 杀灭的最低浓度。

components.name: 2. Transfect or transduce cells with expression construct

note.en: Plasmid: cell_transfection (Lipofectamine/PEI). Lentivirus: lentivirus_production (MOI 0.3–1 for single integration). Wait 48 h before adding selection.
note.zh: 质粒：cell_transfection（Lipofectamine/PEI）。慢病毒：lentivirus_production（MOI 0.3–1 确保单拷贝整合）。48 h 后开始加筛选药物。

components.name: 3. Begin selection: add antibiotic at kill-curve concentration; change medium every 2–3 days

note.en: Puromycin: typical 1–2 µg/mL; kills in 24–48 h (fast-acting). G418 (Geneticin): typical 200–800 µg/mL; kills in 5–7 days. Hygromycin: 100–400 µg/mL; 3–5 days. Blasticidin: 2–10 µg/mL; 3–5 days. Remove dead cells by medium change.
note.zh: Puromycin：通常 1–2 µg/mL；24–48 h 杀灭（快速）。G418：200–800 µg/mL；5–7 天杀灭。Hygromycin：100–400 µg/mL；3–5 天。Blasticidin：2–10 µg/mL；3–5 天。换液去除死细胞。

components.name: 4. Maintain selection 7–14 days until resistant colonies appear

note.en: Colonies visible by eye at ~100+ cells. Avoid disturbing plates. If too many colonies → high starting MOI; if none → kill curve, DNA quality, or transfection efficiency.
note.zh: 菌落生长至 ~100+ 细胞时肉眼可见。避免移动培养皿。过多 → 初始 MOI 过高；无菌落 → 检查杀灭曲线、DNA 质量、转染效率。

components.name: 5. Pick single clones (Method A: cloning ring)

note.en: Wash plate with PBS. Place autoclaved glass cloning ring (8 mm dia.) over isolated colony; seal with sterile silicone grease. Add 50 µL trypsin inside ring, 3–5 min 37°C. Transfer dissociated cells to 24-well plate well (500 µL complete medium).
note.zh: PBS 洗板。灭菌玻璃克隆环（8 mm）对准单个克隆放置，无菌硅脂密封。环内加 50 µL 胰酶，37°C 3–5 min。转移解离细胞到 24 孔板（500 µL 完全培养基）。

note.en: Trypsinize mixed population, count, dilute to 0.5 cells/well in 96-well plate (200 µL/well). Seed multiple plates (200+ wells needed for ~50 clones). Mark wells with single cell by microscopy next day. Expand single-cell wells over 2–3 weeks.
note.zh: 胰酶消化混合细胞，计数，稀释至 0.5 个细胞/孔接种 96 孔板（200 µL/孔）。铺多板（200+ 孔获得 ~50 个克隆）。次日显微镜标记单细胞孔。2–3 周扩增。

note.en: Sort single cells directly into 96-well plate (complete medium + 20% FBS conditioned medium). GFP+ gating if reporter available. Pre-coat wells with poly-D-lysine for poorly adherent cells. ~30–50% survival for most cell lines.
note.zh: 流式分选单细胞直接入 96 孔板（完全培养基 + 20% FBS 条件培养基）。有 GFP 报告基因可门控。弱贴壁细胞预包被多聚赖氨酸。大多数细胞系存活率约 30–50%。

components.name: 8. Expand clones: 96-well → 24-well → 6-well → T25; maintain selection throughout

note.en: Passage when 80–90% confluent. Each expansion takes 3–7 days. Keep selection antibiotic at maintenance dose (half kill dose). Freeze early passage aliquots.
note.zh: 80–90% 汇合时传代。每次扩增 3–7 天。维持剂量（杀灭浓度的一半）持续加药。早期传代冻存分装。

components.name: 9. Validate clones: WB, qPCR, genomic PCR, functional assay

note.en: WB: target protein expression (wb_protocol). qPCR: mRNA level (qpcr_protocol). Genomic PCR: integration site/copy number. Functional: phenotypic assay. Screen ≥10 clones; select 2–3 best.
note.zh: WB：目标蛋白表达（wb_protocol）。qPCR：mRNA 水平（qpcr_protocol）。基因组 PCR：整合位点/拷贝数。功能验证：表型分析。筛 ≥10 个克隆，选最优 2–3 个。

notes.en: Timeline: transfection → selection (2 weeks) → clone picking (1 day) → expansion (3–4 weeks) → validation (1 week) = ~6–8 weeks total. Always freeze early-passage validated clones at P2–P3. Compare ≥2 independent clones to rule out clonal variation. For CRISPR knockouts: validate by WB + Sanger sequencing of target region.
notes.zh: 时间线：转染→筛选（2 周）→挑克隆（1 天）→扩增（3–4 周）→验证（1 周）= 共 ~6–8 周。验证后在 P2–P3 冻存。至少比较 ≥2 个独立克隆排除克隆变异。CRISPR 基因敲除：WB + 靶区域 Sanger 测序双重验证。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th ed., Ch. 13; Mao et al. (2018) STAR Protoc Preview; Kim & Bhatt (2020) Nat Protoc 15:3199–3230

usage.en: Generate stable cell lines by antibiotic selection after transfection or transduction.
usage.zh: 转染或转导后通过抗生素筛选建立稳定细胞系。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 6–8 weeks，实操: 4 hours total

note.en: 37°C incubator, change medium every 2–3 days (up to 1–3 weeks)
note.zh: 37°C incubator, change medium every 2–3 days (最长 1–3 weeks)

note.en: Freeze stocks of validated clones (up to indefinite)
note.zh: Freeze stocks of validated clones (最长 indefinite)

name: Standard PCR Amplification

components.name: 1. 冰上配制反应体系 (做 master mix)
3. 琼脂糖凝胶验证
components.note: 取 5 µL + loading dye, 1–2% 琼脂糖凝胶

notes.en: Use Q5/Phusion for high-fidelity PCR (proofreading, 100× lower error rate). Tm calculator: NEB Tm Calculator (tmcalculator.neb.com). NTC (no template control) required. Multiple bands: reduce primer concentration, raise annealing temp, reduce cycles. Smear: optimize Mg²⁺. No product: lower annealing temp, increase template, check primer orientation. GC-rich templates: add 3-5% DMSO or GC enhancer.
notes.zh: 高保真 PCR 用 Q5/Phusion（校对功能, 错误率低 100×）。Tm 计算：NEB Tm Calculator (tmcalculator.neb.com)。无模板对照 (NTC) 必须。多条带：降低引物浓度、提高退火温度、减少循环数。涂片：优化 Mg²⁺ 浓度。无产物：降低退火温度、增加模板量、检查引物方向。GC-rich 模板加 3–5% DMSO 或用 GC enhancer。

ref: Saiki et al. (1988) Science 239:487; NEB PCR Protocol (neb.com)

usage.en: Amplify specific DNA sequences using standard polymerase chain reaction (PCR).
usage.zh: 标准聚合酶链反应（PCR）扩增特定 DNA 序列。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 hours，实操: 30 minutes

note.en: Contains Taq, dNTPs, MgCl₂, buffer
note.zh: 含 Taq、dNTPs、MgCl₂、缓冲液

note.en: Desalted or HPLC-purified
note.zh: 脱盐或HPLC纯化

note.en: Desalted or HPLC-purified
note.zh: 脱盐或HPLC纯化

note.en: 1–100 ng genomic or 0.1–1 ng plasmid
note.zh: 基因组DNA 1–100 ng 或质粒 0.1–1 ng

note.en: For reaction setup
note.zh: 用于配反应体系

note.en: 1–2%, in TAE buffer
note.zh: 1–2%，TAE缓冲液

note.en: 100 bp or 1 kb, as appropriate
note.zh: 100 bp 或 1 kb，视需要选择

note.en: PCR product at 4°C is stable overnight; −20°C for longer
note.zh: PCR产物 4°C 过夜稳定；长期保存 −20°C

detailedSteps.en: **Design primers**: 18–25 nt, Tm 55–65°C (ΔTm < 3°C between pair), 40–60% GC, avoid 3′ complementarity. Check for secondary structures and off-targets with NCBI Primer-BLAST
detailedSteps.zh: **设计引物**: 18–25 nt，Tm 55–65°C（引物对 ΔTm < 3°C），GC 含量 40–60%，避免 3′ 互补。用 NCBI Primer-BLAST 检查二级结构和脱靶

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare master mix**: Per 50 µL reaction: 25 µL 2× Taq Master Mix, 2 µL forward primer (10 µM, final 0.4 µM), 2 µL reverse primer (10 µM, final 0.4 µM), 1–100 ng template DNA, nuclease-free water to 50 µL. ⚠️ Set up on ice. Include no-template control (NTC)
detailedSteps.zh: **配主混液**: 每 50 µL 反应：25 µL 2× Taq Master Mix、2 µL 正向引物（10 µM，终 0.4 µM）、2 µL 反向引物（10 µM，终 0.4 µM）、1–100 ng 模板 DNA、无核酸酶水补至 50 µL。⚠️ 冰上操作。设无模板对照（NTC）

detailedSteps.en: **Mix & spin**: Pipet mix gently or flick tube. Quick-spin to collect liquid at bottom
detailedSteps.zh: **混匀离心**: 轻柔吹打混匀或弹管。快速离心收集液体

detailedSteps.en: **Initial denaturation**: 95°C, 3–5 min (hot-start enzyme may need 95°C, 15 min)
detailedSteps.zh: **初始变性**: 95°C, 3–5 min（热启动酶可能需 95°C, 15 min）

detailedSteps.en: **Cycling (25–35 cycles)**: Denature 95°C, 30 s → Anneal (Tm − 5°C), 30 s → Extend 72°C, 1 min/kb. ⚠️ Use ≤ 30 cycles for cloning to minimize errors
detailedSteps.zh: **循环（25–35个循环）**: 变性 95°C 30 s → 退火（Tm − 5°C）30 s → 延伸 72°C 1 min/kb。⚠️ 克隆用途 ≤ 30 个循环以减少错误

detailedSteps.en: **Final extension**: 72°C, 5–10 min to complete all partial products
detailedSteps.zh: **末端延伸**: 72°C, 5–10 min，使所有未完成产物充分延伸

detailedSteps.en: **Hold**: 4°C hold (indefinitely on thermocycler, but transfer to −20°C for long-term storage)
detailedSteps.zh: **保持**: 4°C 保持（可留在 PCR 仪上，但长期保存需转 −20°C）

detailedSteps.en: **Gel verification**: Load 5 µL product + 1 µL 6× loading dye on 1–2% agarose/TAE gel. Run alongside 100 bp or 1 kb ladder. Expect single band at predicted size. NTC should be clean
detailedSteps.zh: **凝胶验证**: 取 5 µL 产物 + 1 µL 6× 上样缓冲液，上 1–2% 琼脂糖/TAE 凝胶。同时跑 100 bp 或 1 kb ladder。预期为预测大小的单一条带。NTC 应无条带

detailedSteps.en: **Troubleshooting**: No band → lower annealing temp, increase Mg²⁺ or template; multiple bands → increase annealing temp, reduce cycles; smear → reduce template amount, check primer design
detailedSteps.zh: **故障排除**: 无条带 → 降低退火温度、增加 Mg²⁺ 或模板量；多条带 → 升高退火温度、减少循环数；弥散 → 减少模板量、检查引物设计

briefSteps.en: Design primers → set up reaction → run thermocycler (denature–anneal–extend) → verify on gel
briefSteps.zh: 设计引物 → 配反应体系 → 运行PCR仪（变性–退火–延伸）→ 凝胶验证

name: Subcellular Fractionation (Cytoplasmic / Nuclear / Membrane)
nameCn: 亚细胞分级分离（细胞质 / 细胞核 / 膜组分）

components.name: 1. Wash cells 2× ice-cold PBS; collect by scraping + 500×g 5 min 4°C

note.en: ≥2×10⁷ cells per fractionation. Work on ice throughout.
note.zh: 每次分级 ≥2×10⁷ 细胞。全程冰上操作。

components.name: 2. Resuspend in nuclei_isolation_buffer (0.1% NP-40); pipette 10× gently; ice 10–15 min

note.en: 200 µL per 10⁷ cells. Do NOT vortex. Adjust NP-40 (0.05–0.2%) by cell type.
note.zh: 每 10⁷ 细胞加 200 µL。不要涡旋。按细胞类型调 NP-40（0.05–0.2%）。

note.en: Supernatant = cytoplasmic fraction (keep on ice). Verify nuclei integrity by microscopy (dark/intact in pellet).
note.zh: 上清 = 细胞质组分（冰上保存）。显微镜验证核完整性。

components.name: 4. Wash nuclear pellet: 500 µL PBS, pipette gently, 600×g 5 min 4°C (×2)

note.en: Removes cytoplasmic contamination.
note.zh: 去除细胞质污染。

components.name: 5. Extract nuclei: RIPA or high-salt buffer (400 mM NaCl), rotate 30 min 4°C; brief sonication (3× 5 s, 20%)

note.en: Nuclear extract buffer: 20 mM HEPES pH 7.9, 400 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 1 mM DTT, 10% glycerol + protease inhibitors.
note.zh: 核提取缓冲液：20 mM HEPES pH 7.9、400 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、1 mM DTT、10% 甘油 + 蛋白酶抑制剂。

note.en: Supernatant = nuclear extract. Pellet = insoluble chromatin.
note.zh: 上清 = 核提取物。沉淀 = 不溶性染色质。

components.name: 7. Optional membrane fraction: ultracentrifuge cytoplasmic sup at 100,000×g 1 h 4°C

note.en: Supernatant = soluble cytoplasm. Pellet = total membranes (resuspend in RIPA+1% SDS). Requires ultracentrifuge (SW-41 Ti or equivalent).
note.zh: 上清 = 可溶性细胞质。沉淀 = 总膜组分（RIPA+1% SDS 重悬）。需超速离心机（SW-41 Ti 或同等）。

components.name: 8. Quantify all fractions (Bradford/BCA); verify by WB with fraction markers

note.en: Markers: Cytoplasm → GAPDH/tubulin; Nucleus → Lamin B1/H3; Membrane → Na/K-ATPase/cadherin; Mito → VDAC/HSP60.
note.zh: 标记蛋白：细胞质 → GAPDH/tubulin；细胞核 → Lamin B1/H3；膜 → Na/K-ATPase/cadherin；线粒体 → VDAC/HSP60。

note.en: Add loading buffer + boil for WB. Load equal protein (10–20 µg/lane).
note.zh: 加上样缓冲液煮沸后做 WB。每泳道等量上样（10–20 µg）。

notes.en: QC: WB with compartment markers is mandatory. Cross-contamination = incomplete lysis or wrong centrifugation speed. Hard-to-lyse cells (primary neurons, muscle) may need 0.2–0.5% NP-40. For RNA fractionation: add RNase inhibitor (RNaseOUT) to all buffers.
notes.zh: 质控：必须用标记蛋白 WB 验证。交叉污染 = 裂解不充分或离心不当。难裂解细胞可增加 NP-40 至 0.2–0.5%。RNA 分级需全程加 RNase 抑制剂。

ref: Bhatt et al. (2021) STAR Protoc 2:100450; Dignam et al. (1983) Nucleic Acids Res 11:1475; Herrmann et al. (2018) Nat Protoc 13:2548

usage.en: Separate cytoplasmic and nuclear fractions to analyze protein localization by western blot.
usage.zh: 分离细胞质和细胞核组分，WB 分析蛋白质亚细胞定位。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3–4 hours，实操: 3 hours

note.en: For cytoplasmic buffer
note.zh: 用于胞浆缓冲液

note.en: For nuclear extraction buffer
note.zh: 用于核提取缓冲液

note.en: Sigma I8896
note.zh: Sigma I8896

note.en: Store -20°C in aliquots
note.zh: 分装-20°C保存

note.en: Add fresh — t½ ~30 min in aqueous solution
note.zh: 新鲜加入——水溶液中半衰期~30分钟

note.en: Roche cOmplete EDTA-free
note.zh: Roche cOmplete 无EDTA

note.en: NEB M0247S (optional, for chromatin fraction)
note.zh: NEB M0247S（可选，用于染色质组分）

note.en: Cytoplasmic fraction can be snap-frozen at -80°C. Nuclear pellet can be frozen at -80°C for extraction later.
note.zh: 胞浆组分可液氮速冻-80°C保存。核沉淀可冻存-80°C后续提取。

note.en: All fractions can be stored at -80°C after quantification
note.zh: 所有组分定量后可-80°C保存

detailedSteps.en: **Harvest cells**: Collect 5–10 × 10⁶ cells. Wash once with ice-cold PBS. Pellet at 300 × g for 5 min at 4°C. Remove all supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: **收获细胞**: 收集5-10 × 10⁶个细胞。用冰冷PBS洗涤一次。4°C 300 × g离心5分钟沉淀。完全去除上清。

detailedSteps.en: **Cytoplasmic extraction**: Resuspend pellet in 200 µL Cytoplasmic Lysis Buffer (10 mM HEPES pH 7.9, 10 mM KCl, 0.1 mM EDTA, 0.1 mM EGTA, 1 mM DTT, 0.5 mM PMSF, 1× protease inhibitors). Incubate on ice 15 min to swell cells.
detailedSteps.zh: **胞浆提取**: 将沉淀重悬于200 µL胞浆裂解缓冲液（10 mM HEPES pH 7.9、10 mM KCl、0.1 mM EDTA、0.1 mM EGTA、1 mM DTT、0.5 mM PMSF、1×蛋白酶抑制剂）中。冰上孵育15分钟使细胞膨胀。

detailedSteps.en: **Lyse plasma membrane**: Add NP-40 (IGEPAL CA-630) to 0.5% final. Vortex vigorously for 10 s. ⚠️ Excessive vortexing will lyse nuclei and contaminate the cytoplasmic fraction.
detailedSteps.zh: **裂解质膜**: 加入NP-40（IGEPAL CA-630）至终浓度0.5%。剧烈涡旋10秒。⚠️ 过度涡旋会裂解细胞核并污染胞浆组分。

detailedSteps.en: **Separate cytoplasm**: Centrifuge at 3,000 × g for 5 min at 4°C. Transfer supernatant to a new tube — this is the **cytoplasmic fraction**. Clarify by re-spinning at 16,000 × g for 5 min if desired.
detailedSteps.zh: **分离胞浆**: 4°C 3,000 × g离心5分钟。将上清转移至新管——这是**胞浆组分**。如需可16,000 × g再离心5分钟澄清。

detailedSteps.en: **Wash nuclear pellet**: Wash the nuclear pellet 2× with 500 µL Cytoplasmic Lysis Buffer (without NP-40) to remove cytoplasmic contamination. Centrifuge at 3,000 × g for 5 min between washes.
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤核沉淀**: 用500 µL胞浆裂解缓冲液（不含NP-40）洗涤核沉淀2次，去除胞浆污染。洗涤间3,000 × g离心5分钟。

detailedSteps.en: **Nuclear extraction (soluble)**: Resuspend nuclear pellet in 100 µL Nuclear Extraction Buffer (20 mM HEPES pH 7.9, 400 mM NaCl, 1 mM EDTA, 1 mM EGTA, 1 mM DTT, 1 mM PMSF, 1× protease inhibitors). Vortex 15 s. Incubate on ice 30 min with intermittent vortexing every 10 min.
detailedSteps.zh: **核提取（可溶性）**: 将核沉淀重悬于100 µL核提取缓冲液（20 mM HEPES pH 7.9、400 mM NaCl、1 mM EDTA、1 mM EGTA、1 mM DTT、1 mM PMSF、1×蛋白酶抑制剂）中。涡旋15秒。冰上孵育30分钟，每10分钟间歇涡旋。

detailedSteps.en: **Separate nuclear fractions**: Centrifuge at 16,000 × g for 15 min at 4°C. Supernatant = **soluble nuclear fraction** (transcription factors, nuclear enzymes). Pellet = **chromatin-bound fraction**.
detailedSteps.zh: **分离核组分**: 4°C 16,000 × g离心15分钟。上清 = **可溶性核组分**（转录因子、核酶）。沉淀 = **染色质结合组分**。

detailedSteps.en: **Solubilize chromatin fraction (optional)**: Resuspend chromatin pellet in 50 µL Nuclear Extraction Buffer + 5 mM CaCl₂. Add 1 µL Micrococcal Nuclease (2,000 gel units/µL). Incubate 37°C for 15 min. Stop with 5 mM EGTA. Sonicate 3 × 10 s pulses if needed. Centrifuge 16,000 × g for 5 min — supernatant = solubilized chromatin proteins.
detailedSteps.zh: **溶解染色质组分（可选）**: 将染色质沉淀重悬于50 µL核提取缓冲液 + 5 mM CaCl₂中。加入1 µL微球菌核酸酶（2,000凝胶单位/µL）。37°C孵育15分钟。用5 mM EGTA终止。必要时超声3 × 10秒脉冲。16,000 × g离心5分钟——上清 = 溶解的染色质蛋白。

detailedSteps.en: **Quantify fractions**: Measure protein concentration by Bradford or BCA assay for all fractions. Typical yields from 10⁷ cells: cytoplasmic ~200–400 µg, nuclear soluble ~50–100 µg, chromatin ~20–50 µg.
detailedSteps.zh: **定量各组分**: 用Bradford或BCA法测定所有组分的蛋白浓度。10⁷个细胞的典型产量：胞浆~200-400 µg，可溶性核~50-100 µg，染色质~20-50 µg。

detailedSteps.en: **QC by Western blot**: Load equal protein (10–20 µg) from each fraction. Probe for compartment markers — Cytoplasmic: GAPDH, α-tubulin, MEK1/2. Nuclear soluble: Lamin A/C, SP1. Chromatin-bound: Histone H3, PCNA. ⚠️ Cross-contamination between fractions indicates suboptimal lysis.
detailedSteps.zh: **Western blot质控**: 每个组分加载等量蛋白（10-20 µg）。检测区室标记物——胞浆：GAPDH、α-微管蛋白、MEK1/2。可溶性核：Lamin A/C、SP1。染色质结合：组蛋白H3、PCNA。⚠️ 组分间交叉污染表明裂解条件需优化。

briefSteps.en: Harvest cells → Hypotonic lysis → Collect cytoplasmic fraction → Lyse nuclei → Separate soluble nuclear vs chromatin-bound → Western blot QC with compartment markers
briefSteps.zh: 收获细胞 → 低渗裂解 → 收集胞浆组分 → 裂解细胞核 → 分离可溶核蛋白和染色质结合蛋白 → Western blot用区室标记物质控

name: Therapeutic Antibody Dilution for In Vivo Dosing
nameCn: 治疗性抗体稀释（体内给药）

components.name: Step 1: Calculate dilution volume. Given: A mg total at B mg/mL stock (volume C = A/B mL). Target: B' mg/mL. Need X mL D-PBS where A = B' × (C + X), so X = (A/B') - C.

note.en: Example: 50 mg at 2.15 mg/mL (23.26 mL), target 2.0 mg/mL → X = 1.74 mL PBS.
note.zh: 示例：50 mg, 2.15 mg/mL (23.26 mL), 目标 2.0 mg/mL → X = 1.74 mL PBS。

components.name: Step 2: Add X mL cold D-PBS to stock bottle (or transfer stock to 50 mL tube first if bottle is small). Mix well by gentle inversion.
Step 3: Aliquot 1 mL per microcentrifuge tube. Do not waste any antibody solution.

note.en: Example: 50 mg at 2 mg/mL = 25 mL total → ~25 tubes of 1 mL each.
note.zh: 示例：50 mg, 2 mg/mL = 25 mL → 约 25 管，每管 1 mL。

components.name: Step 4: Label tube caps with critical info (antibody name, concentration, date).
Step 5: Keep original stock label as a record. Store diluted antibody tubes at 4°C.

notes.en: Handle therapeutic antibodies carefully — they are expensive. Use cold sterile D-PBS for dilution. Keep antibodies at 4°C (do NOT freeze unless specified by manufacturer). Common suppliers: BioLegend, BioXcell, Leinco. Always verify stock concentration matches label before diluting.
notes.zh: 治疗性抗体昂贵——小心操作。使用冷的无菌 D-PBS 稀释。4°C 保存（除非厂家另有说明，勿冷冻）。常见供应商：BioLegend、BioXcell、Leinco。稀释前务必核实库存浓度与标签一致。

ref: Standard in vivo dosing protocol

usage.en: Protocol for diluting therapeutic antibodies (e.g. anti-PD-1, anti-CTLA-4) from stock concentration to desired in vivo dosing concentration using sterile D-PBS.
usage.zh: 将治疗性抗体（如 anti-PD-1、anti-CTLA-4）从库存浓度稀释至所需体内给药浓度的操作方案。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 30 min，实操: 30 min

materials.name: 50 mL conical tube (if needed for transfer)

name: Transwell Migration Assay

components.name: 2. 下室加含血清培养基，上室加细胞
4. 棉签擦除上表面未迁移细胞
6. 镜下计数 5 个随机视野

notes.en: Quantitative assay for cell migration/invasion using Boyden chamber principle. Cells migrate through 8 µm pores toward chemoattractant (serum). For invasion assay, coat inserts with Matrigel. Count migrated cells on lower surface after crystal violet staining.
notes.zh: 基于 Boyden 小室原理的定量细胞迁移/侵袭实验。细胞通过 8 µm 孔向趋化因子（血清）迁移。侵袭实验需在膜上涂 Matrigel。结晶紫染色后计数下表面迁移细胞。

ref: Justus et al. (2014) J Vis Exp 88:e51046; protocols.io doi:10.17504/protocols.io.261ge3d5ov47

usage.en: Measure cell migration and invasion using Transwell (Boyden chamber) assay.
usage.zh: Transwell（Boyden 小室）实验检测细胞迁移和侵袭能力。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 days，实操: 2 hours

note.en: Corning #3422 or similar
note.zh: Corning #3422 或类似

note.en: Companion plate
note.zh: 配套培养板

note.en: Upper chamber
note.zh: 上室用

note.en: Lower chamber chemoattractant
note.zh: 下室趋化因子

note.en: For fixation
note.zh: 用于固定

note.en: To remove non-migrated cells
note.zh: 去除未迁移细胞

note.en: 37°C incubator (up to 6–24 h (migration time))
note.zh: 37°C incubator (最长 6–24 h (migration time))

note.en: RT (up to indefinitely)
note.zh: RT (最长 indefinitely)

detailedSteps.en: Serum-starve cells for 12-24h before assay to synchronize migration response
detailedSteps.zh: 实验前血清饥饿 12-24h 以同步迁移响应

detailedSteps.en: Optional (invasion assay): Coat upper surface of Transwell insert with 50 µL Matrigel (1:8 dilution in serum-free medium). Incubate 1-2h at 37°C to solidify
detailedSteps.zh: 可选（侵袭实验）：在 Transwell 上表面涂 50 µL Matrigel（无血清培养基 1:8 稀释）。37°C 孵育 1-2h 凝固

detailedSteps.en: Add 600 µL complete medium (10% FBS) to lower chamber of 24-well plate as chemoattractant. For negative control, use serum-free medium in lower chamber
detailedSteps.zh: 在 24 孔板下室加 600 µL 完全培养基（10% FBS）作为趋化因子。阴性对照：下室加无血清培养基

detailedSteps.en: Trypsinize starved cells, count, and resuspend in serum-free medium at 2-5×10⁵ cells/mL
detailedSteps.zh: 消化饥饿细胞，计数，用无血清培养基重悬至 2-5×10⁵ cells/mL

detailedSteps.en: Add 200 µL cell suspension to upper chamber of Transwell insert (4-10×10⁴ cells)
detailedSteps.zh: 取 200 µL 细胞悬液加入 Transwell 上室（4-10×10⁴ 个细胞）

detailedSteps.en: Carefully place insert into well. Avoid air bubbles between insert and lower medium
detailedSteps.zh: 小心将小室放入孔中。避免小室与下室液面间产生气泡

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 16-24h (varies by cell type; fast migrators like MDA-MB-231 may need only 8h)
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C, 5% CO₂ 孵育 16-24h（因细胞类型而异；快速迁移细胞如 MDA-MB-231 可能只需 8h）

detailedSteps.en: Remove insert. Gently wipe upper surface with moist cotton swab to remove non-migrated cells. Repeat 2-3×
detailedSteps.zh: 取出小室。用湿棉签轻轻擦拭上表面去除未迁移细胞。重复 2-3 次

detailedSteps.en: Fix cells on lower surface: dip in methanol for 10 min or 4% PFA for 15 min
detailedSteps.zh: 固定下表面细胞：浸入甲醇 10 min 或 4% PFA 15 min

detailedSteps.en: Stain with 0.5% crystal violet for 20 min. Rinse excess stain in water
detailedSteps.zh: 0.5% 结晶紫染色 20 min。水洗去多余染液

detailedSteps.en: Air-dry inserts. Image 5 random fields per insert under microscope (20× objective)
detailedSteps.zh: 晾干小室。显微镜下（20× 物镜）每个小室随机拍摄 5 个视野

detailedSteps.en: **Analysis**: Count stained cells per field using ImageJ. Report as average cells/field ± SEM. Compare conditions by t-test or ANOVA
detailedSteps.zh: **分析**：用 ImageJ 计数每视野染色细胞。报告平均 cells/field ± SEM。用 t 检验或 ANOVA 比较各组

briefSteps.en: Serum-starve → seed cells in upper chamber (serum-free) → chemoattractant in lower → incubate 16-24h → swab upper surface → fix → crystal violet stain → count
briefSteps.zh: 血清饥饿 → 上室接种细胞（无血清）→ 下室加趋化因子 → 孵育 16-24h → 棉签擦上表面 → 固定 → 结晶紫染色 → 计数

name: TRIzol RNA Extraction

components.name: 1. 加 TRIzol 裂解
components.note: 1 mL per 5–10×10⁶ cells; 组织: 1 mL per 50–100 mg, 匀浆器研磨

components.name: 2. 室温静置 5 min
components.note: 充分裂解核蛋白复合物

components.name: 3. 加 0.2 mL 氯仿 (per 1 mL TRIzol)
components.note: 盖紧, 剧烈摇晃 15 s, 室温 2–3 min

components.name: 4. 离心 12,000×g, 15 min, 4°C
components.note: 分三层: 上层水相 (RNA) / 中间层 (DNA) / 下层有机相 (蛋白)

components.name: 5. 小心吸取上层水相至新管
6. 加 0.5 mL 异丙醇 (per 1 mL TRIzol)
7. 离心 12,000×g, 10 min, 4°C
components.note: RNA 沉淀为白色/透明胶状颗粒

components.name: 8. 弃上清, 加 1 mL 75% 乙醇洗涤
10. 弃乙醇, 风干 5–10 min
components.note: 勿过度干燥 (沉淀变透明即可), 否则难溶解

components.name: 11. 加 20–50 µL RNase-free H₂O 溶解
components.note: 55°C 孵育 10 min 助溶解; 轻弹混匀

notes.en: All steps use RNase-free consumables. TRIzol is toxic (phenol + guanidinium) — work in fume hood with gloves. Typical yield: 5–15 µg RNA per 10⁶ cells. For small amounts, add 1 µL glycogen (20 mg/mL) as carrier before isopropanol step. Store RNA at -80°C. DNase I treatment recommended before RT-qPCR.
notes.zh: 全程使用无 RNase 耗材。TRIzol 含苯酚和异硫氰酸胍，通风橱操作，戴手套。典型产量：每 10⁶ 细胞 5–15 µg RNA。微量样品在异丙醇沉淀前加 1 µL glycogen (20 mg/mL) 做载体。RNA 保存 -80°C。RT-qPCR 前建议 DNase I 处理。

ref: Chomczynski & Sacchi (1987) Anal Biochem 162:156–159; Rio et al. (2010) CSH Protoc doi:10.1101/pdb.prot5439; Thermo Fisher TRIzol Reagent User Guide (Pub. No. MAN0001271)

usage.en: Extract total RNA from cells or tissues using TRIzol (guanidinium thiocyanate-phenol-chloroform) method.
usage.zh: TRIzol 法（异硫氰酸胍-苯酚-氯仿）从细胞或组织中提取总 RNA。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 2–3 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: Commercial reagent
note.zh: 商品化试剂

note.en: ACS grade
note.zh: 分析纯

note.en: Molecular biology grade
note.zh: 分子生物学级

note.en: DEPC-H₂O diluted
note.zh: DEPC 水配制

note.en: DEPC-treated or commercial
note.zh: DEPC 处理或商品化

note.en: Aqueous phase can be stored at -80°C
note.zh: 水相可 -80°C 保存

note.en: RNA pellet in 75% ethanol can be stored at -80°C for months
note.zh: RNA 沉淀在 75% 乙醇中可 -80°C 保存数月

detailedSteps.en: **Cell lysis**: Remove media, add 1 mL TRIzol per 5–10×10⁶ cells (or 50–100 mg tissue). Pipet up/down 10× to lyse completely
detailedSteps.zh: **细胞裂解**: 去除培养基，每 5–10×10⁶ 细胞加 1 mL TRIzol（或 50–100 mg 组织）。反复吹打 10 次至完全裂解

detailedSteps.en: Incubate 5 min at RT to dissociate nucleoprotein complexes
detailedSteps.zh: 室温静置 5 min，使核蛋白复合物完全解离

detailedSteps.en: **Phase separation**: Add 0.2 mL chloroform per 1 mL TRIzol. Cap tightly, shake vigorously 15 s (do NOT vortex)
detailedSteps.zh: **相分离**: 每 1 mL TRIzol 加 0.2 mL 氯仿。盖紧管盖，剧烈摇晃 15 s（不要涡旋）

detailedSteps.en: Incubate 2–3 min at RT. Solution should turn milky pink
detailedSteps.zh: 室温静置 2–3 min。溶液应变为乳白粉红色

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge 12,000×g, 15 min, 4°C. Three layers form: red organic (bottom), white interphase, clear aqueous (top)
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 12,000×g 离心 15 min。形成三层：红色有机相（底）、白色中间相、透明水相（顶）

detailedSteps.en: **RNA precipitation**: Carefully transfer upper aqueous phase to new tube (~60% of TRIzol volume). ⚠️ Avoid interphase!
detailedSteps.zh: **RNA 沉淀**: 小心转移上层水相至新管（约为 TRIzol 体积的 60%）。⚠️ 避免触碰中间相！

detailedSteps.en: Add 0.5 mL isopropanol per 1 mL TRIzol. Mix gently by inversion 6×
detailedSteps.zh: 每 1 mL TRIzol 加 0.5 mL 异丙醇。轻柔颠倒混匀 6 次

detailedSteps.en: Incubate 10 min RT (or -20°C 1 h for low-abundance samples)
detailedSteps.zh: 室温静置 10 min（低丰度样品可 -20°C 放 1 h）

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge 12,000×g, 10 min, 4°C. RNA pellet should be visible (white/translucent)
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 12,000×g 离心 10 min。应可见 RNA 沉淀（白色/半透明）

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: Discard supernatant. Add 1 mL 75% ethanol (in DEPC-H₂O). Vortex briefly
detailedSteps.zh: **洗涤**: 弃上清。加 1 mL 75% 乙醇（DEPC 水配制）。短暂涡旋

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge 7,500×g, 5 min, 4°C. Discard ethanol completely
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C 7,500×g 离心 5 min。完全弃去乙醇

detailedSteps.en: **Dissolve**: Air-dry pellet 5–10 min (do NOT over-dry — pellet becomes hard to dissolve). Dissolve in 20–50 µL RNase-free H₂O
detailedSteps.zh: **溶解**: 室温风干沉淀 5–10 min（不要过度干燥——会难以溶解）。加 20–50 µL 无 RNase 水溶解

detailedSteps.en: Incubate 55°C, 10 min to aid dissolution. Place on ice
detailedSteps.zh: 55°C 孵育 10 min 促进溶解。然后置于冰上

detailedSteps.en: **QC**: Measure A260/280 (expect ~2.0) and A260/230 (expect >1.7). Run on gel or Bioanalyzer if needed
detailedSteps.zh: **质检**: 测 A260/280（期望 ~2.0）和 A260/230（期望 >1.7）。必要时跑胶或 Bioanalyzer 检测

briefSteps.en: Lyse cells in TRIzol → add chloroform → centrifuge → collect aqueous phase → isopropanol precipitate → ethanol wash → dissolve RNA
briefSteps.zh: TRIzol 裂解 → 加氯仿 → 离心 → 取水相 → 异丙醇沉淀 → 乙醇洗涤 → 溶解 RNA

name: Trypan Blue Cell Counting

components.name: 4. 轻柔混匀，室温 1–2 min (勿超 3 min)
5. 加入血球计数板 / 自动计数仪
6. 计数: 活细胞 (透明) vs 死细胞 (蓝色)

notes.en: Cell density = average cells per large square × dilution factor × 10⁴ cells/mL. Viability = live / (live + dead) × 100%. Staining beyond 3 min causes false positives (live cells begin to take up dye). Dilute further if concentration is too high.
notes.zh: 细胞密度 = 平均每大格细胞数 × 稀释倍数 × 10⁴ cells/mL。活率 = 活细胞/(活+死) × 100%。染色时间 >3 min 会导致假阳性 (活细胞也着色)。如浓度过高，进一步稀释后重新计数。

ref: Strober (2015) Curr Protoc Immunol 111:A.3B.1–A.3B.3

usage.en: Assess cell viability and count cells using trypan blue dye exclusion.
usage.zh: 台盼蓝排斥法评估细胞活力和计数。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 15 minutes，实操: 15 minutes

note.en: Commercial solution (Gibco/Sigma)
note.zh: 商品化溶液（Gibco/Sigma）

note.en: + coverslip
note.zh: + 盖玻片

note.en: Optional
note.zh: 可选

detailedSteps.en: Trypsinize adherent cells or resuspend suspension cells. Ensure single-cell suspension (no clumps)
detailedSteps.zh: 消化贴壁细胞或重悬悬浮细胞，确保单细胞悬液（无团块）

detailedSteps.en: Transfer cell suspension to a 15 mL tube. Take a 20 µL aliquot for counting
detailedSteps.zh: 转移到 15 mL 管，取 20 µL 用于计数

detailedSteps.en: Mix 10 µL of cell suspension with 10 µL of 0.4% trypan blue in a microcentrifuge tube
detailedSteps.zh: 在微量离心管中将 10 µL 细胞悬液与 10 µL 0.4% 台盼蓝混匀

detailedSteps.en: Incubate for 1–2 min at RT. Do NOT exceed 5 min (trypan blue becomes toxic to live cells)
detailedSteps.zh: 室温孵育 1–2 分钟。不超过 5 分钟（台盼蓝对活细胞有毒性）

detailedSteps.en: Clean hemocytometer and coverslip with 70% ethanol. Dry completely
detailedSteps.zh: 用 70% 乙醇清洁血球计数板和盖玻片，完全干燥

detailedSteps.en: Place coverslip on hemocytometer. It should adhere by surface tension (Newton rings visible)
detailedSteps.zh: 放置盖玻片，应通过表面张力贴合（可见牛顿环）

detailedSteps.en: Load 10 µL of the trypan blue mixture into one chamber. Let it fill by capillary action
detailedSteps.zh: 取 10 µL 台盼蓝混合物加入一侧计数室，利用毛细作用填充

detailedSteps.en: Place on microscope at 10× magnification
detailedSteps.zh: 放在显微镜下 10× 观察

detailedSteps.en: Count all four corner squares (each 1 mm × 1 mm). Count live cells (clear/refractile) and dead cells (blue) separately
detailedSteps.zh: 计数四个角大格（每个 1 mm × 1 mm）。分别计数活细胞（透明/折光）和死细胞（蓝色）

detailedSteps.en: Follow convention: count cells touching top and left borders, skip bottom and right
detailedSteps.zh: 规则：计数触碰上线和左线的细胞，不计下线和右线的

detailedSteps.en: **Calculate concentration**: Cells/mL = (total live count ÷ 4 squares) × dilution factor (2) × 10⁴
detailedSteps.zh: **计算浓度**: 细胞/mL = (4 格活细胞总数 ÷ 4) × 稀释倍数 (2) × 10⁴

detailedSteps.en: **Calculate viability**: % viable = (live count ÷ total count) × 100. Should be >90% for healthy cultures
detailedSteps.zh: **计算活率**: 活率% = (活细胞数 ÷ 总细胞数) × 100。健康培养 >90%

detailedSteps.en: **Calculate seeding volume**: Volume (mL) = desired cell count ÷ concentration (cells/mL)
detailedSteps.zh: **计算接种体积**: 体积 (mL) = 所需细胞数 ÷ 浓度 (cells/mL)

briefSteps.en: Prepare single-cell suspension → mix 10 µL cells + 10 µL trypan blue → load 10 µL onto hemocytometer → count 4 corner squares (live = clear, dead = blue) → calculate: cells/mL = (count ÷ 4) × 2 × 10⁴
briefSteps.zh: 制备单细胞悬液 → 10 µL 细胞 + 10 µL 台盼蓝 → 取 10 µL 加入计数板 → 数 4 个角大格（活=透明, 死=蓝色）→ 计算: cells/mL = (计数 ÷ 4) × 2 × 10⁴

name: Tube Formation (Angiogenesis)

notes.en: Growth factor-reduced Matrigel. HUVECs passage 2-6. Positive: VEGF 50 ng/mL. Score tube length, branch points, meshes.
notes.zh: 用低生长因子 Matrigel。HUVECs 第 2-6 代。阳性对照：VEGF 50 ng/mL。评估管长、分支点、网格。

ref: Arnaoutova & Kleinman (2010) Nat Protoc 5:628

usage.en: Assess angiogenic potential by endothelial cell tube formation on Matrigel.
usage.zh: Matrigel 上内皮细胞管腔形成实验评估血管生成能力。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 6–24 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: Passage 2–6, > 90% viable
Endothelial cell basal medium
note.zh: 内皮细胞基础培养基

note.en: 0.5% for low serum conditions
note.zh: 0.5% 低血清条件

note.en: 10–50 ng/mL as positive control
note.zh: 10–50 ng/mL 作为阳性对照

note.en: Flat-bottom, tissue culture treated
note.zh: 平底，组织培养处理

note.en: 2 µg/mL for live-cell staining
note.zh: 2 µg/mL 活细胞染色

detailedSteps.en: **Thaw Matrigel**: Thaw growth factor-reduced Matrigel (GFR) on ice at 4°C overnight. ⚠️ Keep below 10°C at all times — Matrigel polymerizes irreversibly above 10°C. Pre-chill pipette tips at −20°C
detailedSteps.zh: **解冻Matrigel**: 生长因子减量 Matrigel（GFR）4°C 冰上过夜解冻。⚠️ 始终保持 < 10°C——Matrigel 超过 10°C 不可逆聚合。移液枪头预冷至 −20°C

detailedSteps.en: **Coat plate**: Using pre-chilled tips, add 50 µL/well Matrigel to 96-well plate (or 250 µL/well for 24-well). Spread evenly by tilting. Incubate 37°C, 30 min to polymerize. ⚠️ Avoid air bubbles — they create imaging artifacts
detailedSteps.zh: **铺板**: 用预冷枪头加 50 µL/孔 Matrigel 至 96 孔板（或 250 µL/孔 24 孔板）。倾斜均匀铺开。37°C 30 min 聚合。⚠️ 避免气泡——影响成像

detailedSteps.en: **Prepare cells**: Trypsinize HUVECs (or other endothelial cells, passage 2–6). Count. Resuspend at 1–2×10⁵ cells/mL in basal medium (EBM-2) + 0.5% FBS (low serum to reduce background)
detailedSteps.zh: **准备细胞**: 胰酶消化 HUVECs（或其他内皮细胞，2–6 代）。计数。用基础培养基（EBM-2）+ 0.5% FBS（低血清减少背景）重悬至 1–2×10⁵ 细胞/mL

detailedSteps.en: **Add treatments**: Prepare conditioned media, growth factors (e.g. VEGF 10–50 ng/mL), or inhibitors at desired concentrations. Mix with cell suspension or add separately
detailedSteps.zh: **加处理因素**: 制备条件培养基、生长因子（如 VEGF 10–50 ng/mL）或抑制剂。与细胞悬液混合或单独加入

detailedSteps.en: **Seed cells**: Add 100 µL cell suspension per well (96-well, ~1–2×10⁴ cells/well). Gently tap plate to distribute evenly. ⚠️ Do not pipet up and down — disrupts Matrigel surface
detailedSteps.zh: **接种细胞**: 每孔加 100 µL 细胞悬液（96 孔板，~1–2×10⁴ 细胞/孔）。轻拍板使均匀分布。⚠️ 勿吹打——破坏 Matrigel 表面

detailedSteps.en: **Incubate**: Place in 37°C, 5% CO₂ incubator. Tube formation begins within 2–4 h. Peak network formation typically at 4–8 h (HUVEC)
detailedSteps.zh: **培养**: 放入 37°C、5% CO₂ 培养箱。管形成 2–4 h 开始。网络形成高峰通常在 4–8 h（HUVEC）

detailedSteps.en: **Image**: Capture phase-contrast images at 4×–10× magnification at 4 h, 6 h, 8 h, and 16 h time points. Photograph entire well (tile-scan for larger wells)
detailedSteps.zh: **成像**: 4×–10× 倍率相差显微镜在 4 h、6 h、8 h、16 h 时间点拍照。拍摄全孔（大孔需拼图扫描）

detailedSteps.en: **Quantify**: Analyze images using Angiogenesis Analyzer plugin for ImageJ/FIJI. Measure: total tube length, number of branch points, number of meshes, number of segments. Compare treatment vs control
detailedSteps.zh: **定量分析**: 用 ImageJ/FIJI 的 Angiogenesis Analyzer 插件分析图像。测量：总管长度、分支点数、网格数、节段数。比较处理组与对照组

detailedSteps.en: **Calcein staining (optional)**: Add 2 µg/mL Calcein AM in PBS, incubate 37°C, 30 min. Wash with PBS. Image fluorescence for clearer visualization and live/dead discrimination
detailedSteps.zh: **Calcein染色（可选）**: 加 2 µg/mL Calcein AM/PBS，37°C 30 min。PBS 洗。荧光成像获得更清晰可视化和活/死鉴别

briefSteps.en: Thaw Matrigel → coat plate → seed endothelial cells → incubate 4–16 h → image tube networks → quantify
briefSteps.zh: 解冻Matrigel → 铺板 → 接种内皮细胞 → 培养4–16 h → 管网成像 → 定量分析

note.en: Matrigel thaws overnight at 4°C (required step)
note.zh: Matrigel 4°C 过夜解冻（必需步骤）

note.en: Polymerized Matrigel-coated plates can be used within 1 h; do not store
note.zh: 聚合后的Matrigel铺板应1 h内使用；勿长期保存

name: Tumor Dissociation Protocol (Enzymatic)
nameCn: 肿瘤组织消化分离方案（酶消化法）

components.name: Step 1: Prepare digestion medium — dilute collagenase stock to 1 mg/mL in dissecting media. 10 mL per tumor. Keep on ice.
Step 2: Mince tumor on sterile petri dish with razor blades. Add 0.5 mL digestion medium to prevent drying.
Step 3: Transfer minced tissue to 9.5 mL digestion medium in 15 mL tube. Rotate 1-2 h at 37°C.

note.en: Immunophenotyping: 1 h is enough. Epithelial cell isolation: 2 h needed.
note.zh: 免疫分型：1 小时足够。上皮细胞分离：需 2 小时。

components.name: Step 4: Spin 300 g, 5 min, 4°C. Remove supernatant. Add 2 mL warm 0.05% trypsin/EDTA. Mix with P1000. Incubate 37°C for 5 min.

note.en: Caution: trypsin trims surface receptors — limit exposure time.
note.zh: 注意：胰蛋白酶会切割表面受体——限制作用时间。

components.name: Step 5: Add 3 mL dissecting media + 125 µL DNase I (~500 Kunitz U). Pass through 18G syringe 5-10×, then 20G syringe 5-10×. Avoid bubbles.
Step 6: Spin 300 g, 5 min, 4°C. Add 1 mL 1× RBC lysis, 1 min on ice. Add 2 mL media. Filter through 70 µm strainer into 50 mL tube. Transfer to new 15 mL tube.

note.en: RBC lysis is critical — do not omit.
note.zh: 红细胞裂解很关键——不可省略。

components.name: Step 7: Spin 300 g, 5 min, 4°C. Resuspend in 2 mL dissecting media (or FACS buffer for immunophenotyping). Count cells.

note.en: If RBCs still abundant, repeat lysis step.
note.zh: 如红细胞仍多，重复裂解步骤。

components.name: Step 8: For cell line establishment — spin, resuspend in appropriate medium, seed into plates.

notes.en: Collagenase Type IV is preferred over Type I for preserving surface antigens (lacks tryptic activity). Avoid repeated freeze-thaw of enzyme stocks. Use HBSS without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ for trypsin/EDTA dilution. 15 mL tubes form better pellets than 50 mL tubes.
notes.zh: 胶原酶 IV 型优于 I 型（无胰蛋白酶活性，保留表面抗原）。避免酶母液反复冻融。用无 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ 的 HBSS 稀释胰蛋白酶/EDTA。15 mL 管比 50 mL 管沉淀效果更好。

ref: Lukacs et al. Nat Protoc. 2010;5(4):702-13. PMID: 20360765

usage.en: Enzymatic dissociation of solid tumors into single-cell suspension using collagenase, trypsin, and DNase I for downstream FACS, scRNA-seq, or cell line establishment.
usage.zh: 使用胶原酶、胰蛋白酶和 DNase I 将实体瘤酶消化为单细胞悬液，用于 FACS、scRNA-seq 或细胞系建立。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 3-4 hours，实操: 1 hour

materials.name: Collagenase Type I or IV (10 mg/mL stock in RPMI, filter 0.22 µm, aliquot 1 mL at -20°C)
0.05% Trypsin/EDTA (dilute 0.25% stock 5× with PBS or HBSS without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺)
DNase I (2 mg/mL in PBS, ~4000 Kunitz U/mL, aliquot at -20°C)
Razor blades, hemostat, sterile petri dish

note.en: Keep on ice in FACS buffer (up to 1-2 hours)
note.zh: Keep on ice in FACS buffer (最长 1-2 hours)

name: Western Blot Full Protocol

components.name: 1. 样品制备: RIPA 裂解
3. 加 Loading Buffer, 煮沸 5 min

notes.en: Primary antibody: 1:500–1:2000; HRP secondary: 1:5000–1:10000. Use BSA blocking for phospho-proteins. Semi-dry transfer suitable for proteins <100 kDa.
notes.zh: 一抗稀释比通常 1:500–1:2000；HRP 二抗 1:5000–1:10000。磷酸化蛋白用 BSA 封闭。半干转适合 <100 kDa 蛋白。PVDF 需甲醇活化。

ref: Mahmood & Yang (2012) N Am J Med Sci 4:429–434; Bass et al. (2017) STAR Protoc Preview; Towbin et al. (1979) PNAS 76:4350

usage.en: Detect specific proteins by SDS-PAGE separation, membrane transfer, and immunodetection (Western blot).
usage.zh: Western blot：SDS-PAGE 分离蛋白、转膜、免疫检测特定蛋白。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 1–2 days，实操: 3–4 hours

note.en: PVDF: activate in methanol
note.zh: PVDF: 甲醇活化

note.en: Commercial kit
note.zh: 商品化试剂盒

note.en: Pre-stained, 10–250 kDa
note.zh: 预染 Marker, 10–250 kDa

note.en: Lysate can be stored at -80°C for months
note.zh: 裂解液可 -80°C 保存数月

note.en: Membrane can be stored dry at -20°C or in TBST at 4°C overnight
note.zh: 膜可 -20°C 干燥保存或 4°C TBST 中过夜

note.en: Can incubate overnight at 4°C (recommended for many antibodies)
note.zh: 可 4°C 过夜孵育（推荐用于多数抗体）

detailedSteps.en: **Day 1 — Sample prep**
detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 样品制备**

detailedSteps.en: **Lysis**: Aspirate media, wash 1× cold PBS. Add cold RIPA buffer (100–200 µL per well of 6-well plate). Rock on ice 15–30 min
detailedSteps.zh: **裂解**: 吸除培养基，冷 PBS 洗 1 次。加冷 RIPA 裂解液（6 孔板每孔 100–200 µL）。冰上晃动 15–30 min

detailedSteps.en: Scrape cells, transfer to 1.5 mL tube. Centrifuge 14,000×g, 15 min, 4°C. Transfer supernatant (= total protein)
detailedSteps.zh: 刮下细胞，转移至 1.5 mL 管。4°C 14,000×g 离心 15 min。取上清（= 总蛋白）

detailedSteps.en: **Quantification**: BCA or Bradford assay. Need 20–50 µg protein per lane
detailedSteps.zh: **定量**: BCA 或 Bradford 法。每泳道需 20–50 µg 蛋白

detailedSteps.en: Mix protein sample with equal volume 2× Laemmli buffer (or 1:3 with 4× buffer)
detailedSteps.zh: 蛋白样品与等体积 2× Laemmli buffer 混合（或与 4× buffer 1:3 混合）

detailedSteps.en: Boil 95°C, 5 min (or 70°C, 10 min for membrane proteins). Quick-spin, place on ice or store -20°C
detailedSteps.zh: 95°C 煮沸 5 min（膜蛋白用 70°C, 10 min）。快速离心，冰上或 -20°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: **SDS-PAGE**: Set up gel (choose % based on target MW — see Gel Calculator tab). Load samples + ladder
detailedSteps.zh: **SDS-PAGE**: 装好凝胶（根据目标蛋白分子量选择浓度——参见配胶计算 tab）。上样 + Marker

detailedSteps.en: Run: 80V through stacking gel (~20 min), then 120V through resolving gel (~1–1.5 h). Run until dye front reaches bottom
detailedSteps.zh: 电泳: 浓缩胶 80V（约 20 min），分离胶 120V（约 1–1.5 h）。跑至溴酚蓝到达底部

detailedSteps.en: **Transfer**: Prepare transfer sandwich — sponge / filter paper / gel / membrane / filter paper / sponge. Remove all air bubbles!
detailedSteps.zh: **转膜**: 组装转膜三明治——海绵 / 滤纸 / 凝胶 / 膜 / 滤纸 / 海绵。去除所有气泡！

detailedSteps.en: Wet transfer: 100V, 60–90 min in cold Transfer Buffer with ice pack. OR semi-dry: 25V, 30 min
detailedSteps.zh: 湿转: 冷 Transfer Buffer 中 100V, 60–90 min，加冰块。或半干转: 25V, 30 min

detailedSteps.en: For proteins >150 kDa: transfer at 30V overnight at 4°C, reduce methanol to 10%, add 0.01% SDS
detailedSteps.zh: >150 kDa 蛋白: 4°C 30V 过夜转膜，甲醇降至 10%，加 0.01% SDS

detailedSteps.en: **Verify transfer**: Ponceau S stain membrane 2 min, wash with ddH₂O. Photograph. Destain with TBST
detailedSteps.zh: **验证转膜**: Ponceau S 染膜 2 min，ddH₂O 冲洗。拍照。用 TBST 脱色

detailedSteps.en: **Blocking**: 5% milk/TBST or 5% BSA/TBST, 1 h at RT with rocking. ⚠️ Use BSA for phospho-antibodies!
detailedSteps.zh: **封闭**: 5% 脱脂奶/TBST 或 5% BSA/TBST，室温摇 1 h。⚠️ 磷酸化抗体必须用 BSA！

detailedSteps.en: **Primary antibody**: Dilute in blocking buffer (typically 1:500–1:2000). Incubate 4°C overnight with rocking
detailedSteps.zh: **一抗**: 用封闭液稀释（通常 1:500–1:2000）。4°C 摇孵过夜

detailedSteps.en: **Day 2 — Detection**
detailedSteps.zh: **第二天 — 检测**

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: TBST 3×10 min with rocking. Use generous volume (>10 mL per wash)
detailedSteps.zh: **洗膜**: TBST 3×10 min 摇洗。用量要足（每次 >10 mL）

detailedSteps.en: **Secondary antibody**: HRP-conjugated anti-mouse/rabbit IgG, dilute 1:5000–1:10,000 in blocking buffer. 1 h RT
detailedSteps.zh: **二抗**: HRP 标记的抗鼠/兔 IgG，封闭液 1:5000–1:10,000 稀释。室温 1 h

detailedSteps.en: **Wash**: TBST 3×10 min. Final wash with TBS (no Tween) 1×5 min
detailedSteps.zh: **洗膜**: TBST 3×10 min。最后用 TBS（不含 Tween）洗 1×5 min

detailedSteps.en: **Detection**: Mix ECL components 1:1, apply to membrane, incubate 1–5 min. Image on ChemiDoc or expose to film
detailedSteps.zh: **检测**: ECL 等比混合，涂于膜上，孵育 1–5 min。用化学发光成像仪或胶片曝光

detailedSteps.en: **Analysis**: Quantify band intensity with ImageJ/Image Lab. Normalize to loading control (β-actin, GAPDH, or total protein)
detailedSteps.zh: **分析**: 用 ImageJ/Image Lab 定量条带灰度。以 loading control（β-actin、GAPDH 或总蛋白）归一化

briefSteps.en: Lyse → quantify → SDS-PAGE → transfer → block → primary Ab O/N → wash → secondary Ab 1h → wash → ECL detect
briefSteps.zh: 裂解 → 定量 → SDS-PAGE → 转膜 → 封闭 → 一抗过夜 → 洗 → 二抗 1h → 洗 → ECL 检测

name: Wound Healing (Scratch) Assay

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 6-well plate; grow to >95% confluency

note.en: Use 2–3×10⁵ cells/well for fast-growing lines (24 h); slower lines may need 48 h. Coat plate with Matrigel or fibronectin for weakly adherent cells.
note.zh: 快速增殖细胞（HeLa、MCF-7）每孔 2–3×10⁵，培养 24 h；缓慢增殖细胞可能需要 48 h。弱贴壁细胞可预包被 Matrigel 或纤连蛋白。

components.name: 2. Optional: pre-treat with Mitomycin C (10 µg/mL, 2 h, 37°C) to inhibit proliferation

note.en: Wash 3× PBS after MMC treatment. MMC isolates migration from proliferation. Omit if growth rate is low. Alternative: serum-free medium alone.
note.zh: MMC 处理后 PBS 洗 3 次。MMC 将迁移与增殖分离。生长缓慢的细胞可省略。替代方案：仅用无血清培养基。

components.name: 3. Create scratch with 200 µL pipette tip held perpendicular to plate

note.en: Drag tip firmly in one straight line. Use ruler as guide for consistent width. Mark bottom of plate with pen perpendicular to scratch for consistent imaging position.
note.zh: 垂直持枪头，用力划直线。用直尺保证一致宽度。在划痕垂直方向用记号笔标记培养皿底部，确保每次拍摄位置一致。

note.en: Gentle wash to remove detached cells and debris without disturbing wound edge.
note.zh: 轻柔冲洗，去除脱落细胞和碎片，避免扰动划痕边缘。

components.name: 5. Add serum-free (or low-serum, 0.5–1% FBS) medium ± treatments

note.en: Vehicle/DMSO controls must be at same concentration as treatment. For cytokines/growth factors: add to serum-free medium.
note.zh: 溶剂/DMSO 对照需与处理组等浓度。细胞因子/生长因子加入无血清培养基中。

components.name: 6. Image at 0 h immediately (4× or 10× objective, phase contrast)

note.en: Take 3–5 images per well at marked positions. Record stage coordinates (automated microscopes). ImageXpress/EVOS/Operetta all suitable.
note.zh: 在标记位置每孔拍 3–5 张图。记录载物台坐标（自动显微镜）。ImageXpress/EVOS/Operetta 均适用。

components.name: 7. Image at regular intervals: 6 h, 12 h, 24 h, 48 h

note.en: Frequency depends on cell migration speed. Fast migrators (MDA-MB-231): 6–12 h endpoint. Slow (primary cells): 24–48 h. Keep cells at 37°C during imaging if possible (live cell imager).
note.zh: 频率取决于细胞迁移速度。快速迁移细胞（MDA-MB-231）：6–12 h 终点。缓慢（原代细胞）：24–48 h。可能时保持 37°C 拍摄（活细胞成像系统）。

components.name: 8. Quantify: measure wound area with ImageJ (MRI Wound Healing Tool plugin)

note.en: % Wound Closure = (Area₀ₕ − Areaₜₕ) / Area₀ₕ × 100. Or measure wound width manually (5 positions/image). Report as % closure or migration distance (µm/h).
note.zh: % 愈合 = (面积₀ₕ − 面积ₜₕ) / 面积₀ₕ × 100。或手动测量 5 个位置的划痕宽度。报告愈合百分比或迁移距离（µm/h）。

notes.en: Controls: (1) untreated cells (baseline), (2) no-serum negative control, (3) MMC-treated + serum (pure migration). Triplicate wells per condition. For 3D migration: transwell_migration (Boyden chamber). Limitations: does not distinguish migration vs proliferation without MMC treatment.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) 未处理细胞（基线）；(2) 无血清阴性对照；(3) MMC 处理 + 血清（纯迁移）。每组 3 个平行孔。3D 迁移实验参见 transwell_migration（Boyden 小室）。局限性：未用 MMC 时无法区分迁移与增殖。

ref: Liang et al. (2007) Nat Protoc 2:329–333; Jonkman et al. (2014) Nat Protoc 9:1234–1248; Zordan et al. (2011) J Immunol Methods 370:56

usage.en: Measure cell migration by wound healing (scratch) assay.
usage.zh: 划痕实验（wound healing）检测细胞迁移能力。

label.zh: 实验方案 — 24–48 hours，实操: 2 hours

note.en: For scratch
note.zh: 用于划痕

note.en: For consistent scratch width
note.zh: 控制划痕宽度一致

note.en: To inhibit proliferation
note.zh: 抑制增殖

detailedSteps.en: Seed cells in 6-well or 12-well plate. Grow to >95% confluence (usually 24–48h)
detailedSteps.zh: 在 6 孔或 12 孔板中接种细胞。培养至 >95% 融合（通常 24–48h）

detailedSteps.en: Optional: Pre-treat with mitomycin C (10 µg/mL, 2h) to inhibit proliferation if measuring migration only
detailedSteps.zh: 可选：丝裂霉素 C（10 µg/mL, 2h）预处理抑制增殖（仅测迁移时）

detailedSteps.en: Using a sterile 200 µL pipette tip, draw a straight line through the cell monolayer. Use a ruler as guide
detailedSteps.zh: 用无菌 200 µL 枪头在细胞单层上划一条直线。用尺子导引

detailedSteps.en: Make 2–3 parallel scratches per well. Mark reference lines on plate bottom perpendicular to scratches
detailedSteps.zh: 每孔划 2–3 条平行线。在板底标记与划痕垂直的参考线

detailedSteps.en: Wash gently 2× with PBS to remove detached cells and debris
detailedSteps.zh: PBS 轻柔洗 2 次，去除脱落细胞和碎片

detailedSteps.en: Add serum-free medium (or 1% FBS) with or without treatment compounds
detailedSteps.zh: 加无血清培养基（或 1% FBS），加或不加处理化合物

detailedSteps.en: Image the scratch at 0h under phase-contrast microscope (4× or 10×). Record same positions using reference marks
detailedSteps.zh: 0h 相差显微镜（4× 或 10×）拍照。利用参考线记录相同位置

detailedSteps.en: Return plate to 37°C, 5% CO₂ incubator
detailedSteps.zh: 培养板放回 37°C, 5% CO₂ 培养箱

detailedSteps.en: Image at regular intervals: 6h, 12h, 24h, 48h (depending on cell type migration speed)
detailedSteps.zh: 定时拍照：6h, 12h, 24h, 48h（取决于细胞迁移速度）

detailedSteps.en: **Analysis**: Measure wound area at each timepoint using ImageJ (MRI Wound Healing Tool). Calculate % closure = (Area₀ₕ − Areaₜₕ) / Area₀ₕ × 100
detailedSteps.zh: **分析**: 用 ImageJ（MRI Wound Healing Tool 插件）测量各时间点伤口面积。% 愈合 = (面积₀ₕ − 面积ₜₕ) / 面积₀ₕ × 100

detailedSteps.en: Plot wound closure (%) vs time. Compare treated vs control groups
detailedSteps.zh: 绘制愈合率 (%) vs 时间曲线。比较处理组与对照组

detailedSteps.en: Representative images: Include 0h and endpoint images for each condition in figures
detailedSteps.zh: 代表性图片：在图中包含每个条件的 0h 和终点图片

briefSteps.en: Grow to confluence → scratch with 200 µL tip → wash → add serum-free medium ± treatment → image at intervals → analyze wound closure
briefSteps.zh: 培养至融合 → 200 µL 枪头划痕 → 洗涤 → 加无血清培养基 ± 处理 → 定时拍照 → 分析愈合率
